authors_text: Borun Xu,Biao Wang,Jinhong Deng,Jiale Tao,Tiezheng Ge,Yuning Jiang,Wen Li,Lixin Duan
title: Motion and Appearance Adaptation for Cross-Domain Motion Transfer
title_zh: 跨域运动传输的运动和外观适应
abstract: Motion transfer aims to transfer the motion of a driving video to a source image. When there are considerable differences between object in the driving video and that in the source image, traditional single domain motion transfer approaches often produce notable artifacts; for example, the synthesized image may fail to preserve the human shape of the source image (cf . Fig. 1 (a)). To address this issue, in this work, we propose a Motion and Appearance Adaptation (MAA) approach for cross-domain motion transfer, in which we regularize the object in the synthesized image to capture the motion of the object in the driving frame, while still preserving the shape and appearance of the object in the source image. On one hand, considering the object shapes of the synthesized image and the driving frame might be different, we design a shape-invariant motion adaptation module that enforces the consistency of the angles of object parts in two images to capture the motion information. On the other hand, we introduce a structure-guided appearance consistency module designed to regularize the similarity between the corresponding patches of the synthesized image and the source image without affecting the learned motion in the synthesized image. Our proposed MAA model can be trained in an end-to-end manner with a cyclic reconstruction loss, and ultimately produces a satisfactory motion transfer result (cf . Fig. 1 (b)). We conduct extensive experiments on human dancing dataset Mixamo-Video to Fashion-Video and human face dataset Vox-Celeb to Cufs; on both of these, our MAA model outperforms existing methods both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Motion transfer aims to transfer the motion of a driving video to a source image. When there are considerable differences between object in the driving video and that in the source image, traditional single domain motion transfer approaches often produce notable artifacts; for example, the synthesized image may fail to preserve the human shape of the source image (cf . Fig. 1 (a)). To address this issue, in this work, we propose a Motion and Appearance Adaptation (MAA) approach for cross-domain motion transfer, in which we regularize the object in the synthesized image to capture the motion of the object in the driving frame, while still preserving the shape and appearance of the object in the source image. On one hand, considering the object shapes of the synthesized image and the driving frame might be different, we design a shape-invariant motion adaptation module that enforces the consistency of the angles of object parts in two images to capture the motion information. On the other hand, we introduce a structure-guided appearance consistency module designed to regularize the similarity between the corresponding patches of the synthesized image and the source image without affecting the learned motion in the synthesized image. Our proposed MAA model can be trained in an end-to-end manner with a cyclic reconstruction loss, and ultimately produces a satisfactory motion transfer result (cf . Fig. 1 (b)). We conduct extensive experiments on human dancing dataset Mixamo-Video to Fashion-Video and human face dataset Vox-Celeb to Cufs; on both of these, our MAA model outperforms existing methods both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 运动传输旨在将驾驶视频的运动传输到源图像。当驾驶视频中的对象与源图像中的对象之间存在相当大的差异时，传统的单域运动传输方法通常会产生明显的伪影；例如，合成图像可能无法保留源图像的人体形状（参见图1（a））。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于跨域运动传输的运动和外观适应（MAA）方法，其中我们对合成图像中的对象进行正则化以捕获驱动帧中对象的运动，同时仍然保留源图像中对象的形状和外观。一方面，考虑到合成图像和驱动帧的对象形状可能不同，我们设计了形状不变的运动自适应模块，该模块强制两幅图像中对象部分的角度的一致性以捕获运动信息。另一方面，我们引入了结构引导的外观一致性模块，旨在规范合成图像和源图像的相应块之间的相似性，而不影响合成图像中学习的运动。我们提出的 MAA 模型可以通过循环重建损失以端到端的方式进行训练，并最终产生令人满意的运动传递结果（参见图 1 (b)）。我们对人类舞蹈数据集 Mixamo-Video 到 Fashion-Video 以及人脸数据集 Vox-Celeb 到 Cufs 进行了广泛的实验；在这两个方面，我们的 MAA 模型在数量和质量上都优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨域运动迁移方法MAA，通过结合运动和外观适应解决源图像与驱动视频对象差异导致的合成 artifacts 问题。
AI.motivation: 传统单域运动迁移方法在源图像与驱动视频对象存在显著差异时，难以同时保持源图像的形状和运动信息，导致合成结果出现明显 artifacts。
AI.method: 设计包含形状不变运动适应模块（保持部件角度一致性）和结构引导外观一致性模块（保持合成图像与源图像对应区域相似性）的MAA模型，通过端到端训练与循环重建损失实现跨域运动迁移。
AI.result: 在Mixamo-Video到Fashion-Video及Vox-Celeb到Cufs数据集上，MAA在定量指标和视觉效果上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MAA通过联合优化运动信息保持与外观一致性，有效解决了跨域运动迁移中的形状失真和外观不匹配问题。

authors_text: Won Joon Yun,Soohyun Park,Joongheon Kim,David Mohaisen
title: Self-Configurable Stabilized Real-Time Detection Learning for Autonomous Driving Applications
title_zh: 适用于自动驾驶应用的自配置稳定实时检测学习
abstract: Guaranteeing real-time and accurate object detection simultaneously is paramount in autonomous driving environments. However, the existing object detection neural network systems are characterized by a tradeoff between computation time and accuracy, making it essential to optimize such a tradeoff. Fortunately, in many autonomous driving environments, images come in a continuous form, providing an opportunity to use optical flow. In this paper, we improve the performance of an object detection neural network utilizing optical flow estimation. In addition, we propose a Lyapunov optimization framework for time-average performance maximization subject to stability. It adaptively determines whether to use optical flow to suit the dynamic vehicle environment, thereby ensuring the vehicle's queue stability and the time-average maximum performance simultaneously. To verify the key ideas, we conduct numerical experiments with various object detection neural networks and optical flow estimation networks. In addition, we demonstrate the self-configurable stabilized detection with YOLOv3-tiny and FlowNet2-S, which are the real-time object detection network and an optical flow estimation network, respectively. In the demonstration, our proposed framework improves the accuracy by 3.02%, the number of detected objects by 59.6%, and the queue stability for computing capabilities.
summary: Guaranteeing real-time and accurate object detection simultaneously is paramount in autonomous driving environments. However, the existing object detection neural network systems are characterized by a tradeoff between computation time and accuracy, making it essential to optimize such a tradeoff. Fortunately, in many autonomous driving environments, images come in a continuous form, providing an opportunity to use optical flow. In this paper, we improve the performance of an object detection neural network utilizing optical flow estimation. In addition, we propose a Lyapunov optimization framework for time-average performance maximization subject to stability. It adaptively determines whether to use optical flow to suit the dynamic vehicle environment, thereby ensuring the vehicle's queue stability and the time-average maximum performance simultaneously. To verify the key ideas, we conduct numerical experiments with various object detection neural networks and optical flow estimation networks. In addition, we demonstrate the self-configurable stabilized detection with YOLOv3-tiny and FlowNet2-S, which are the real-time object detection network and an optical flow estimation network, respectively. In the demonstration, our proposed framework improves the accuracy by 3.02%, the number of detected objects by 59.6%, and the queue stability for computing capabilities.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶环境中，同时保证实时、准确的物体检测至关重要。然而，现有的目标检测神经网络系统的特点是计算时间和精度之间的权衡，因此优化这种权衡至关重要。幸运的是，在许多自动驾驶环境中，图像以连续形式出现，为使用光流提供了机会。在本文中，我们利用光流估计提高了对象检测神经网络的性能。此外，我们提出了一种李亚普诺夫优化框架，用于在稳定性的前提下实现时间平均性能最大化。它自适应地确定是否使用光流来适应动态车辆环境，从而同时保证车辆的队列稳定性和时间平均最大性能。为了验证关键思想，我们使用各种对象检测神经网络和光流估计网络进行了数值实验。此外，我们还演示了 YOLOv3-tiny 和 FlowNet2-S 的自配置稳定检测，它们分别是实时目标检测网络和光流估计网络。在演示中，我们提出的框架将准确率提高了 3.02%，检测到的对象数量提高了 59.6%，并提高了计算能力的队列稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合光流估计和李雅普诺夫优化框架的自配置稳定实时检测学习方法，以提升自动驾驶中的目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶环境需要同时保证实时性和检测精度，但现有检测网络存在计算时间与精度的权衡问题。利用连续图像流中的光流信息可提供优化机会。
AI.method: 通过光流估计增强检测网络，并设计李雅普诺夫优化框架自适应选择是否启用光流，以实现动态环境下的稳定性与性能最大化。
AI.result: 在YOLOv3-tiny与FlowNet2-S实验中，检测精度提升3.02%，检测目标数增加59.6%，计算队列稳定性显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了实时检测的精度与稳定性，为自动驾驶场景提供了可靠的目标检测解决方案。

authors_text: Minh-Duong Nguyen,Quoc-Viet Pham,Dinh Thai Hoang,Long Tran-Thanh,Diep N. Nguyen,Won-Joo Hwang
title: Label driven Knowledge Distillation for Federated Learning with non-IID Data
title_zh: 使用非 IID 数据进行联邦学习的标签驱动知识蒸馏
abstract: In real-world applications, Federated Learning (FL) meets two challenges: (1) scalability, especially when applied to massive IoT networks; and (2) how to be robust against an environment with heterogeneous data. Realizing the first problem, we aim to design a novel FL framework named Full-stack FL (F2L). More specifically, F2L utilizes a hierarchical network architecture, making extending the FL network accessible without reconstructing the whole network system. Moreover, leveraging the advantages of hierarchical network design, we propose a new label-driven knowledge distillation (LKD) technique at the global server to address the second problem. As opposed to current knowledge distillation techniques, LKD is capable of training a student model, which consists of good knowledge from all teachers' models. Therefore, our proposed algorithm can effectively extract the knowledge of the regions' data distribution (i.e., the regional aggregated models) to reduce the divergence between clients' models when operating under the FL system with non-independent identically distributed data. Extensive experiment results reveal that: (i) our F2L method can significantly improve the overall FL efficiency in all global distillations, and (ii) F2L rapidly achieves convergence as global distillation stages occur instead of increasing on each communication cycle.
summary: In real-world applications, Federated Learning (FL) meets two challenges: (1) scalability, especially when applied to massive IoT networks; and (2) how to be robust against an environment with heterogeneous data. Realizing the first problem, we aim to design a novel FL framework named Full-stack FL (F2L). More specifically, F2L utilizes a hierarchical network architecture, making extending the FL network accessible without reconstructing the whole network system. Moreover, leveraging the advantages of hierarchical network design, we propose a new label-driven knowledge distillation (LKD) technique at the global server to address the second problem. As opposed to current knowledge distillation techniques, LKD is capable of training a student model, which consists of good knowledge from all teachers' models. Therefore, our proposed algorithm can effectively extract the knowledge of the regions' data distribution (i.e., the regional aggregated models) to reduce the divergence between clients' models when operating under the FL system with non-independent identically distributed data. Extensive experiment results reveal that: (i) our F2L method can significantly improve the overall FL efficiency in all global distillations, and (ii) F2L rapidly achieves convergence as global distillation stages occur instead of increasing on each communication cycle.
abstract_zh: 在实际应用中，联邦学习（FL）面临两个挑战：（1）可扩展性，尤其是应用于大规模物联网网络时； (2) 如何在异构数据环境中保持稳健。认识到第一个问题，我们的目标是设计一种新颖的 FL 框架，名为 Full-stack FL (F2L)。更具体地说，F2L采用分层网络架构，无需重建整个网络系统即可扩展FL网络。此外，利用分层网络设计的优势，我们在全局服务器上提出了一种新的标签驱动知识蒸馏（LKD）技术来解决第二个问题。与当前的知识蒸馏技术相反，LKD 能够训练学生模型，该模型包含所有教师模型中的良好知识。因此，我们提出的算法可以有效地提取区域数据分布的知识（即区域聚合模型），以减少在具有非独立同分布数据的 FL 系统下运行时客户端模型之间的分歧。大量的实验结果表明：（i）我们的 F2L 方法可以显着提高所有全局蒸馏中的整体 FL 效率，并且（ii）随着全局蒸馏阶段的发生，F2L 快速实现收敛，而不是在每个通信周期上增加。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为F2L的联邦学习框架，通过标签驱动的知识蒸馏技术解决非独立同分布数据下的可扩展性和鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中联邦学习面临两大挑战：在大规模物联网网络中的可扩展性问题，以及应对异构数据环境的鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 设计分层网络架构实现框架扩展性，并提出基于标签的知识蒸馏技术（LKD），通过全局服务器聚合区域模型知识降低客户端模型差异。
AI.result: 实验表明F2L在全局蒸馏中显著提升整体效率，且在全局蒸馏阶段快速收敛而非随通信轮次增加。
AI.conclusion: F2L通过分层架构设计和标签驱动的知识蒸馏有效解决了联邦学习中的可扩展性与非独立同分布数据适应性问题。

Realizing the first problem, we aim to design a novel FL framework named Full-stack FL (F2L). Moreover, leveraging the advantages of hierarchical network design, we propose a new label-driven knowledge distillation (LKD) technique at the global server to address the second problem. As opposed to current knowledge distillation techniques, LKD is capable of training a student model, which consists of good knowledge from all teachers' models. Therefore, our proposed algorithm can effectively extract the knowledge of the regions' data distribution (i.e., the regional aggregated models) to reduce the divergence between clients' models when operating under the FL system with non-independent identically distributed data. authors_text: Kristóf Bérczi,Tamás Király,Yutaro Yamaguchi,Yu Yokoi
title: Matroid Intersection under Restricted Oracles
title_zh: 受限预言下的拟阵交集
comment: Accepted by SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics; 21 pages, 2 figures
comments: Accepted by SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics; 21 pages, 2 figures
abstract: Matroid intersection is one of the most powerful frameworks of matroid theory that generalizes various problems in combinatorial optimization. Edmonds' fundamental theorem provides a min-max characterization for the unweighted setting, while Frank's weight-splitting theorem provides one for the weighted case. Several efficient algorithms were developed for these problems, all relying on the usage of one of the conventional oracles for both matroids. In the present paper, we consider the tractability of the matroid intersection problem under restricted oracles. In particular, we focus on the rank sum, common independence, and maximum rank oracles. We give a strongly polynomial-time algorithm for weighted matroid intersection under the rank sum oracle. In the common independence oracle model, we prove that the unweighted matroid intersection problem is tractable when one of the matroids is a partition matroid, and that even the weighted case is solvable when one of the matroids is an elementary split matroid. Finally, we show that the common independence and maximum rank oracles together are strong enough to realize the steps of our algorithm under the rank sum oracle.
summary: Matroid intersection is one of the most powerful frameworks of matroid theory that generalizes various problems in combinatorial optimization. Edmonds' fundamental theorem provides a min-max characterization for the unweighted setting, while Frank's weight-splitting theorem provides one for the weighted case. Several efficient algorithms were developed for these problems, all relying on the usage of one of the conventional oracles for both matroids. In the present paper, we consider the tractability of the matroid intersection problem under restricted oracles. In particular, we focus on the rank sum, common independence, and maximum rank oracles. We give a strongly polynomial-time algorithm for weighted matroid intersection under the rank sum oracle. In the common independence oracle model, we prove that the unweighted matroid intersection problem is tractable when one of the matroids is a partition matroid, and that even the weighted case is solvable when one of the matroids is an elementary split matroid. Finally, we show that the common independence and maximum rank oracles together are strong enough to realize the steps of our algorithm under the rank sum oracle.
abstract_zh: 拟阵交集是拟阵理论最强大的框架之一，它概括了组合优化中的各种问题。埃德蒙兹基本定理为未加权设置提供了最小-最大特征，而弗兰克权重分割定理为加权情况提供了特征。针对这些问题开发了几种有效的算法，所有算法都依赖于使用两个拟阵的传统预言机之一。在本文中，我们考虑了受限预言下拟阵相交问题的可处理性。我们特别关注秩和、共同独立性和最大秩预言。我们给出了秩和预言下加权拟阵交集的强多项式时间算法。在通用独立预言模型中，我们证明当拟阵之一是分区拟阵时，未加权拟阵相交问题是可处理的，并且当拟阵之一是基本分裂拟阵时，即使加权情况也是可解的。最后，我们证明共同独立性和最大秩预言机在一起足够强大，可以在秩和预言机下实现我们的算法步骤。

AI.tldr: 研究在受限oracle下matroid交集问题的可解性，并提出相应的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有matroid交集算法依赖传统oracle，但受限oracle下的可行性尚不明确，需探索其计算复杂性与算法设计。
AI.method: 分析rank sum、common independence及maximum rank oracle模型，设计强多项式时间算法并证明特定条件下的可解性。
AI.result: 提出基于rank sum oracle的强多项式算法；证明common independence oracle下partition matroid与elementary split matroid的可解性；验证两种oracle组合的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 受限oracle下matroid交集问题在特定条件下可解，为优化算法设计提供新思路，未来需进一步拓展适用场景。

authors_text: Tomoya Kamimura,Akihito Sano
title: Effect of the Dynamics of a Horizontally Wobbling Mass on Biped Walking Performance
title_zh: 水平摆动质量的动力学对双足行走性能的影响
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures, accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
comments: 6 pages, 8 figures, accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
abstract: We have developed biped robots with a passive dynamic walking mechanism. This study proposes a compass model with a wobbling mass connected to the upper body and oscillating in the horizontal direction to clarify the influence of the horizontal dynamics of the upper body on bipedal walking. The limit cycles of the model were numerically searched, and their stability and energy efficiency was investigated. Several qualitatively different limit cycles were obtained depending mainly on the spring constant that supports the wobbling mass. Specific types of solutions decreased the stability while reducing the risk of accidental falling and improving the energy efficiency. The obtained results were attributed to the wobbling mass moving in the opposite direction to the upper body, thereby preventing large changes in acceleration and deceleration while walking. The relationship between the locomotion of the proposed model and the actual biped robot and human gaits was investigated.
summary: We have developed biped robots with a passive dynamic walking mechanism. This study proposes a compass model with a wobbling mass connected to the upper body and oscillating in the horizontal direction to clarify the influence of the horizontal dynamics of the upper body on bipedal walking. The limit cycles of the model were numerically searched, and their stability and energy efficiency was investigated. Several qualitatively different limit cycles were obtained depending mainly on the spring constant that supports the wobbling mass. Specific types of solutions decreased the stability while reducing the risk of accidental falling and improving the energy efficiency. The obtained results were attributed to the wobbling mass moving in the opposite direction to the upper body, thereby preventing large changes in acceleration and deceleration while walking. The relationship between the locomotion of the proposed model and the actual biped robot and human gaits was investigated.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了具有被动动态行走机构的双足机器人。本研究提出了一种罗盘模型，该模型具有与上半身相连并在水平方向上振荡的摆动质量，以阐明上半身的水平动力学对双足行走的影响。对模型的极限环进行了数值搜索，并研究了其稳定性和能量效率。主要取决于支撑摆动质量的弹簧常数，获得了几个性质不同的极限环。特定类型的解决方案降低了稳定性，同时降低了意外跌倒的风险并提高了能源效率。获得的结果归因于摆动质量沿与上半身相反的方向移动，从而防止行走时加速度和减速度发生较大变化。研究了所提出模型的运动与实际双足机器人和人类步态之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 研究水平摆动质量对双足行走性能的影响，通过建立包含水平摆动质量的模型分析其动力学特性。
AI.motivation: 开发更稳定且能量效率更高的双足机器人，同时理解人类行走中上半身动力学的作用机制。
AI.method: 构建带有水平摆动质量的双足机器人模型，通过数值模拟搜索极限环并分析其稳定性与能量效率。
AI.result: 不同弹簧刚度下出现多种极限环，部分解在降低稳定性风险的同时提升能量效率，归因于摆动质量与上半身反向运动抵消加速度变化。
AI.conclusion: 水平摆动质量通过反向运动抑制加速度波动，为双足机器人设计提供理论依据，并揭示了与人类步态的潜在关联。

ai_content_json.method: 构建带有水平摆动质量的双足机器人模型，通过数值模拟搜索极限环并分析其稳定性与能量效率。
ai_content_json.result: 不同弹簧刚度下出现多种极限环，部分解在降低稳定性风险的同时提升能量效率，归因于摆动质量与上半身反向运动抵消加速度变化。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 水平摆动质量通过反向运动抑制加速度波动，为双足机器人设计提供理论依据，并揭示了与人类步态的潜在关联。

search_text: Effect of the Dynamics of a Horizontally Wobbling Mass on Biped Walking Performance 水平摆动质量的动力学对双足行走性能的影响 We have developed biped robots with a passive dynamic walking mechanism. This study proposes a compass model with a wobbling mass connected to the upper body and oscillating in the horizontal direction to clarify the influence of the horizontal dynamics of the upper body on bipedal walking. The limit cycles of the model were numerically searched, and their stability and energy efficiency was investigated. Several qualitatively different limit cycles were obtained depending mainly on the spring constant that supports the wobbling mass. Specific types of solutions decreased the stability while reducing the risk of accidental falling and improving the energy efficiency. The obtained results were attributed to the wobbling mass moving in the opposite direction to the upper body, thereby preventing large changes in acceleration and deceleration while walking. The relationship between the locomotion of the proposed model and the actual biped robot and human gaits was investigated. 我们开发了具有被动动态行走机构的双足机器人。本研究提出了一种罗盘模型，该模型具有与上半身相连并在水平方向上振荡的摆动质量，以阐明上半身的水平动力学对双足行走的影响。对模型的极限环进行了数值搜索，并研究了其稳定性和能量效率。主要取决于支撑摆动质量的弹簧常数，获得了几个性质不同的极限环。特定类型的解决方案降低了稳定性，同时降低了意外跌倒的风险并提高了能源效率。获得的结果归因于摆动质量沿与上半身相反的方向移动，从而防止行走时加速度和减速度发生较大变化。研究了所提出模型的运动与实际双足机器人和人类步态之间的关系。 研究水平摆动质量对双足行走性能的影响，通过建立包含水平摆动质量的模型分析其动力学特性。 Tomoya Kamimura,Akihito Sano cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Liang Chen,Bofei Gao,Baobao Chang
title: A Two-Stage Method for Chinese AMR Parsing
title_zh: 中文AMR解析的两阶段方法
abstract: In this paper, we provide a detailed description of our system at CAMRP-2022 evaluation. We firstly propose a two-stage method to conduct Chinese AMR Parsing with alignment generation, which includes Concept-Prediction and Relation-Prediction stages. Our model achieves 0.7756 and 0.7074 Align-Smatch F1 scores on the CAMR 2.0 test set and the blind-test set of CAMRP-2022 individually. We also analyze the result and the limitation such as the error propagation and class imbalance problem we conclude in the current method. Code and the trained models are released at https://github.com/PKUnlp-icler/Two-Stage-CAMRP for reproduction.
summary: In this paper, we provide a detailed description of our system at CAMRP-2022 evaluation. We firstly propose a two-stage method to conduct Chinese AMR Parsing with alignment generation, which includes Concept-Prediction and Relation-Prediction stages. Our model achieves 0.7756 and 0.7074 Align-Smatch F1 scores on the CAMR 2.0 test set and the blind-test set of CAMRP-2022 individually. We also analyze the result and the limitation such as the error propagation and class imbalance problem we conclude in the current method. Code and the trained models are released at https://github.com/PKUnlp-icler/Two-Stage-CAMRP for reproduction.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们在 CAMRP-2022 评估中详细描述了我们的系统。我们首先提出了一种通过对齐生成进行中文 AMR 解析的两阶段方法，其中包括概念预测和关系预测阶段。我们的模型在 CAMR 2.0 测试集和 CAMRP-2022 盲测试集上分别获得了 0.7756 和 0.7074 Align-Smatch F1 分数。我们还分析了结果和局限性，例如我们在当前方法中得出的错误传播和类不平衡问题。代码和训练后的模型在 https://github.com/PKUnlp-icler/Two-Stage-CAMRP 上发布以供复制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段方法用于中文抽象意义表示（AMR）解析，包含概念预测和关系预测阶段，并生成对齐信息。
AI.motivation: 现有中文AMR解析方法存在错误传播和类别不平衡问题，需通过分阶段处理提升解析准确性。
AI.method: 设计两阶段模型：第一阶段预测概念节点，第二阶段基于概念对齐生成关系，结合对齐信息优化解析过程。
AI.result: 在CAMR 2.0测试集和CAMRP-2022盲测集上分别达到0.7756和0.7074的Align-Smatch F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法存在错误传播和类别不平衡限制，已开源代码与模型供复现研究。

authors_text: Yizhou Liu,Weijie J. Su,Tongyang Li
title: On Quantum Speedups for Nonconvex Optimization via Quantum Tunneling Walks
title_zh: 通过量子隧道行走实现非凸优化的量子加速
abstract: Classical algorithms are often not effective for solving nonconvex optimization problems where local minima are separated by high barriers. In this paper, we explore possible quantum speedups for nonconvex optimization by leveraging the global effect of quantum tunneling. Specifically, we introduce a quantum algorithm termed the quantum tunneling walk (QTW) and apply it to nonconvex problems where local minima are approximately global minima. We show that QTW achieves quantum speedup over classical stochastic gradient descents (SGD) when the barriers between different local minima are high but thin and the minima are flat. Based on this observation, we construct a specific double-well landscape, where classical algorithms cannot efficiently hit one target well knowing the other well but QTW can when given proper initial states near the known well. Finally, we corroborate our findings with numerical experiments.
summary: Classical algorithms are often not effective for solving nonconvex optimization problems where local minima are separated by high barriers. In this paper, we explore possible quantum speedups for nonconvex optimization by leveraging the global effect of quantum tunneling. Specifically, we introduce a quantum algorithm termed the quantum tunneling walk (QTW) and apply it to nonconvex problems where local minima are approximately global minima. We show that QTW achieves quantum speedup over classical stochastic gradient descents (SGD) when the barriers between different local minima are high but thin and the minima are flat. Based on this observation, we construct a specific double-well landscape, where classical algorithms cannot efficiently hit one target well knowing the other well but QTW can when given proper initial states near the known well. Finally, we corroborate our findings with numerical experiments.
abstract_zh: 经典算法通常无法有效解决局部最小值被高障碍分隔的非凸优化问题。在本文中，我们通过利用量子隧道的全局效应探索非凸优化的可能量子加速。具体来说，我们引入了一种称为量子隧道行走（QTW）的量子算法，并将其应用于局部最小值近似全局最小值的非凸问题。我们证明，当不同局部最小值之间的势垒很高但很薄且最小值平坦时，QTW 比经典随机梯度下降 (SGD) 实现了量子加速。基于这一观察，我们构建了一个特定的双井景观，其中经典算法无法有效地击中一个目标，但在已知井附近给出适当的初始状态时，QTW 可以。最后，我们通过数值实验证实了我们的发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于量子隧穿效应的量子算法（QTW），用于解决非凸优化问题，并展示了其在特定条件下的量子加速优势。
AI.motivation: 经典算法在存在高势垒分隔的非凸优化问题中难以有效逃离局部最优解，需探索量子方法突破这一限制。
AI.method: 设计量子隧穿行走（QTW）算法，针对局部最小值近似全局最小值的非凸问题，构建双井势能景观进行理论分析和数值验证。
AI.result: QTW在高而薄的势垒及扁平最小值条件下实现对经典SGD的量子加速，数值实验验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 量子隧穿机制可有效解决特定非凸优化问题，但需依赖合适的初始状态，为量子计算在优化领域的应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alexander Popov,Patrik Gebhardt,Ke Chen,Ryan Oldja,Heeseok Lee,Shane Murray,Ruchi Bhargava,Nikolai Smolyanskiy
title: NVRadarNet: Real-Time Radar Obstacle and Free Space Detection for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: NVRadarNet：用于自动驾驶的实时雷达障碍物和自由空间检测
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, ICRA 2023 conference, for associated video file, see https://youtu.be/WlwJJMltoJY
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, ICRA 2023 conference, for associated video file, see https://youtu.be/WlwJJMltoJY
abstract: Detecting obstacles is crucial for safe and efficient autonomous driving. To this end, we present NVRadarNet, a deep neural network (DNN) that detects dynamic obstacles and drivable free space using automotive RADAR sensors. The network utilizes temporally accumulated data from multiple RADAR sensors to detect dynamic obstacles and compute their orientation in a top-down bird's-eye view (BEV). The network also regresses drivable free space to detect unclassified obstacles. Our DNN is the first of its kind to utilize sparse RADAR signals in order to perform obstacle and free space detection in real time from RADAR data only. The network has been successfully used for perception on our autonomous vehicles in real self-driving scenarios. The network runs faster than real time on an embedded GPU and shows good generalization across geographic regions.
summary: Detecting obstacles is crucial for safe and efficient autonomous driving. To this end, we present NVRadarNet, a deep neural network (DNN) that detects dynamic obstacles and drivable free space using automotive RADAR sensors. The network utilizes temporally accumulated data from multiple RADAR sensors to detect dynamic obstacles and compute their orientation in a top-down bird's-eye view (BEV). The network also regresses drivable free space to detect unclassified obstacles. Our DNN is the first of its kind to utilize sparse RADAR signals in order to perform obstacle and free space detection in real time from RADAR data only. The network has been successfully used for perception on our autonomous vehicles in real self-driving scenarios. The network runs faster than real time on an embedded GPU and shows good generalization across geographic regions.
abstract_zh: 检测障碍物对于安全高效的自动驾驶至关重要。为此，我们推出了 NVRadarNet，这是一种深度神经网络 (DNN)，可使用汽车雷达传感器检测动态障碍物和可行驶的自由空间。该网络利用多个雷达传感器暂时积累的数据来检测动态障碍物并在自上而下的鸟瞰图 (BEV) 中计算其方向。该网络还对可行驶的自由空间进行回归，以检测未分类的障碍物。我们的 DNN 是同类中第一个利用稀疏雷达信号仅根据雷达数据实时执行障碍物和自由空间检测的 DNN。该网络已成功用于我们的自动驾驶汽车在真实自动驾驶场景中的感知。该网络在嵌入式 GPU 上的运行速度快于实时速度，并且在跨地理区域方面表现出良好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NVRadarNet，一种基于汽车雷达传感器的实时障碍物和自由空间检测网络，用于自动驾驶。
AI.motivation: 障碍物检测对自动驾驶安全至关重要，现有方法依赖多传感器融合或无法实时处理雷达数据，需探索低成本高可靠性的雷达专用方案。
AI.method: 设计深度神经网络NVRadarNet，通过多雷达时序数据生成鸟瞰图（BEV）检测动态障碍物方向，并回归自由空间识别未分类障碍物，首次实现稀疏雷达信号的实时检测。
AI.result: 网络在嵌入式GPU上实时运行，泛化能力强，已成功应用于实际自动驾驶场景的感知系统。
AI.conclusion: NVRadarNet创新性地利用稀疏雷达信号实现实时障碍物检测，为自动驾驶提供可靠低成本的感知方案。

search_text: NVRadarNet: Real-Time Radar Obstacle and Free Space Detection for Autonomous Driving NVRadarNet：用于自动驾驶的实时雷达障碍物和自由空间检测 Detecting obstacles is crucial for safe and efficient autonomous driving. To this end, we present NVRadarNet, a deep neural network (DNN) that detects dynamic obstacles and drivable free space using automotive RADAR sensors. The network utilizes temporally accumulated data from multiple RADAR sensors to detect dynamic obstacles and compute their orientation in a top-down bird's-eye view (BEV). The network also regresses drivable free space to detect unclassified obstacles. Our DNN is the first of its kind to utilize sparse RADAR signals in order to perform obstacle and free space detection in real time from RADAR data only. The network has been successfully used for perception on our autonomous vehicles in real self-driving scenarios. The network runs faster than real time on an embedded GPU and shows good generalization across geographic regions. 检测障碍物对于安全高效的自动驾驶至关重要。为此，我们推出了 NVRadarNet，这是一种深度神经网络 (DNN)，可使用汽车雷达传感器检测动态障碍物和可行驶的自由空间。该网络利用多个雷达传感器暂时积累的数据来检测动态障碍物并在自上而下的鸟瞰图 (BEV) 中计算其方向。该网络还对可行驶的自由空间进行回归，以检测未分类的障碍物。我们的 DNN 是同类中第一个利用稀疏雷达信号仅根据雷达数据实时执行障碍物和自由空间检测的 DNN。该网络已成功用于我们的自动驾驶汽车在真实自动驾驶场景中的感知。该网络在嵌入式 GPU 上的运行速度快于实时速度，并且在跨地理区域方面表现出良好的泛化能力。 本文提出NVRadarNet，一种基于汽车雷达传感器的实时障碍物和自由空间检测网络，用于自动驾驶。 Alexander Popov,Patrik Gebhardt,Ke Chen,Ryan Oldja,Heeseok Lee,Shane Murray,Ruchi Bhargava,Nikolai Smolyanskiy cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Sungho Shin,Joosoon Lee,Junseok Lee,Yeonguk Yu,Kyoobin Lee
title: Teaching Where to Look: Attention Similarity Knowledge Distillation for Low Resolution Face Recognition
title_zh: 教学往哪里看：低分辨率人脸识别的注意力相似度知识蒸馏
abstract: Deep learning has achieved outstanding performance for face recognition benchmarks, but performance reduces significantly for low resolution (LR) images. We propose an attention similarity knowledge distillation approach, which transfers attention maps obtained from a high resolution (HR) network as a teacher into an LR network as a student to boost LR recognition performance. Inspired by humans being able to approximate an object's region from an LR image based on prior knowledge obtained from HR images, we designed the knowledge distillation loss using the cosine similarity to make the student network's attention resemble the teacher network's attention. Experiments on various LR face related benchmarks confirmed the proposed method generally improved recognition performances on LR settings, outperforming state-of-the-art results by simply transferring well-constructed attention maps. The code and pretrained models are publicly available in the https://github.com/gist-ailab/teaching-where-to-look.
summary: Deep learning has achieved outstanding performance for face recognition benchmarks, but performance reduces significantly for low resolution (LR) images. We propose an attention similarity knowledge distillation approach, which transfers attention maps obtained from a high resolution (HR) network as a teacher into an LR network as a student to boost LR recognition performance. Inspired by humans being able to approximate an object's region from an LR image based on prior knowledge obtained from HR images, we designed the knowledge distillation loss using the cosine similarity to make the student network's attention resemble the teacher network's attention. Experiments on various LR face related benchmarks confirmed the proposed method generally improved recognition performances on LR settings, outperforming state-of-the-art results by simply transferring well-constructed attention maps. The code and pretrained models are publicly available in the https://github.com/gist-ailab/teaching-where-to-look.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在人脸识别基准测试中取得了出色的性能，但对于低分辨率（LR）图像，性能显着下降。我们提出了一种注意力相似性知识蒸馏方法，它将作为教师从高分辨率（HR）网络获得的注意力图转移到作为学生的 LR 网络中，以提高 LR 识别性能。受人类能够基于从 HR 图像获得的先验知识从 LR 图像中近似物体区域的启发，我们使用余弦相似度设计了知识蒸馏损失，以使学生网络的注意力类似于教师网络的注意力。对各种 LR 人脸相关基准的实验证实，所提出的方法总体上提高了 LR 设置上的识别性能，通过简单地传输构造良好的注意力图，优于最先进的结果。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/gist-ailab/teaching-where-to-look 中公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力相似性知识蒸馏的方法，通过将高分辨率网络的注意力图迁移到低分辨率网络中，提升低分辨率人脸识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在高分辨率人脸识别中表现优异，但在低分辨率场景下性能显著下降，现有方法难以有效利用高分辨率模型的知识提升低分辨率识别效果。
AI.method: 设计知识蒸馏损失函数，利用余弦相似度使低分辨率学生网络的注意力图与高分辨率教师网络的注意力图保持一致，通过迁移注意力知识优化低分辨率模型。
AI.result: 在多个低分辨率人脸基准数据集上验证，该方法显著提升识别性能，优于现有最先进方法，且代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力相似性知识蒸馏，有效实现了高分辨率模型到低分辨率模型的知识迁移，为低分辨率人脸识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Wenhu Chen,Hexiang Hu,Chitwan Saharia,William W. Cohen
title: Re-Imagen: Retrieval-Augmented Text-to-Image Generator
title_zh: Re-Imagen：检索增强文本到图像生成器
abstract: Research on text-to-image generation has witnessed significant progress in generating diverse and photo-realistic images, driven by diffusion and auto-regressive models trained on large-scale image-text data. Though state-of-the-art models can generate high-quality images of common entities, they often have difficulty generating images of uncommon entities, such as `Chortai (dog)' or `Picarones (food)'. To tackle this issue, we present the Retrieval-Augmented Text-to-Image Generator (Re-Imagen), a generative model that uses retrieved information to produce high-fidelity and faithful images, even for rare or unseen entities. Given a text prompt, Re-Imagen accesses an external multi-modal knowledge base to retrieve relevant (image, text) pairs and uses them as references to generate the image. With this retrieval step, Re-Imagen is augmented with the knowledge of high-level semantics and low-level visual details of the mentioned entities, and thus improves its accuracy in generating the entities' visual appearances. We train Re-Imagen on a constructed dataset containing (image, text, retrieval) triples to teach the model to ground on both text prompt and retrieval. Furthermore, we develop a new sampling strategy to interleave the classifier-free guidance for text and retrieval conditions to balance the text and retrieval alignment. Re-Imagen achieves significant gain on FID score over COCO and WikiImage. To further evaluate the capabilities of the model, we introduce EntityDrawBench, a new benchmark that evaluates image generation for diverse entities, from frequent to rare, across multiple object categories including dogs, foods, landmarks, birds, and characters. Human evaluation on EntityDrawBench shows that Re-Imagen can significantly improve the fidelity of generated images, especially on less frequent entities.
summary: Research on text-to-image generation has witnessed significant progress in generating diverse and photo-realistic images, driven by diffusion and auto-regressive models trained on large-scale image-text data. Though state-of-the-art models can generate high-quality images of common entities, they often have difficulty generating images of uncommon entities, such as `Chortai (dog)' or `Picarones (food)'. To tackle this issue, we present the Retrieval-Augmented Text-to-Image Generator (Re-Imagen), a generative model that uses retrieved information to produce high-fidelity and faithful images, even for rare or unseen entities. Given a text prompt, Re-Imagen accesses an external multi-modal knowledge base to retrieve relevant (image, text) pairs and uses them as references to generate the image. With this retrieval step, Re-Imagen is augmented with the knowledge of high-level semantics and low-level visual details of the mentioned entities, and thus improves its accuracy in generating the entities' visual appearances. We train Re-Imagen on a constructed dataset containing (image, text, retrieval) triples to teach the model to ground on both text prompt and retrieval. Furthermore, we develop a new sampling strategy to interleave the classifier-free guidance for text and retrieval conditions to balance the text and retrieval alignment. Re-Imagen achieves significant gain on FID score over COCO and WikiImage. To further evaluate the capabilities of the model, we introduce EntityDrawBench, a new benchmark that evaluates image generation for diverse entities, from frequent to rare, across multiple object categories including dogs, foods, landmarks, birds, and characters. Human evaluation on EntityDrawBench shows that Re-Imagen can significantly improve the fidelity of generated images, especially on less frequent entities.
abstract_zh: 在大规模图像文本数据训练的扩散和自回归模型的驱动下，文本到图像生成的研究在生成多样化和逼真的图像方面取得了重大进展。尽管最先进的模型可以生成常见实体的高质量图像，但它们通常难以生成不常见实体的图像，例如“Chortai（狗）”或“Picarones（食物）”。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了检索增强文本到图像生成器（Re-Imagen），这是一种生成模型，它使用检索到的信息来生成高保真和忠实的图像，即使对于罕见或看不见的实体也是如此。给定文本提示，Re-Imagen 访问外部多模态知识库来检索相关（图像、文本）对，并将它们用作生成图像的参考。通过此检索步骤，Re-Imagen 增强了所提及实体的高级语义和低级视觉细节的知识，从而提高了生成实体视觉外观的准确性。我们在包含（图像、文本、检索）三元组的构建数据集上训练 Re-Imagen，以教导模型基于文本提示和检索。此外，我们开发了一种新的采样策略来交织文本和检索条件的无分类器指导，以平衡文本和检索对齐。与 COCO 和 WikiImage 相比，Re-Imagen 在 FID 分数上取得了显着提高。为了进一步评估模型的功能，我们引入了 EntityDrawBench，这是一个新的基准，可评估从频繁到罕见的各种实体的图像生成，涵盖多个对象类别，包括狗、食物、地标、鸟类和人物。对 EntityDrawBench 的人工评估表明，Re-Imagen 可以显着提高生成图像的保真度，尤其是在不太频繁的实体上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Re-Imagen，一种通过检索增强的文本到图像生成模型，旨在解决生成罕见实体图像的难题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型在生成常见实体图像时表现优异，但对罕见实体（如特定犬种或食物）的生成效果较差，缺乏细节和准确性。
AI.method: 模型通过检索多模态知识库获取相关图像-文本对作为参考，结合文本提示与检索信息进行生成。采用包含（图像、文本、检索）三元组的训练数据，并设计分类器无关引导策略平衡文本与检索条件。
AI.result: 在COCO和WikiImage数据集上FID分数显著提升，新构建的EntityDrawBench基准测试中，人类评估显示罕见实体图像保真度显著提高。
AI.conclusion: Re-Imagen通过引入检索机制有效增强了模型对罕见实体的视觉表征能力，为文本到图像生成提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出Re-Imagen，一种通过检索增强的文本到图像生成模型，旨在解决生成罕见实体图像的难题。
motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型在生成常见实体图像时表现优异，但对罕见实体（如特定犬种或食物）的生成效果较差，缺乏细节和准确性。
method: 模型通过检索多模态知识库获取相关图像-文本对作为参考，结合文本提示与检索信息进行生成。采用包含（图像、文本、检索）三元组的训练数据，并设计分类器无关引导策略平衡文本与检索条件。
result: 在COCO和WikiImage数据集上FID分数显著提升，新构建的EntityDrawBench基准测试中，人类评估显示罕见实体图像保真度显著提高。
conclusion: Re-Imagen通过引入检索机制有效增强了模型对罕见实体的视觉表征能力，为文本到图像生成提供了新思路。
search_text: Re-Imagen: Retrieval-Augmented Text-to-Image Generator Re-Imagen：检索增强文本到图像生成器 Research on text-to-image generation has witnessed significant progress in generating diverse and photo-realistic images, driven by diffusion and auto-regressive models trained on large-scale image-text data. Though state-of-the-art models can generate high-quality images of common entities, they often have difficulty generating images of uncommon entities, such as `Chortai (dog)' or `Picarones (food)'. To tackle this issue, we present the Retrieval-Augmented Text-to-Image Generator (Re-Imagen), a generative model that uses retrieved information to produce high-fidelity and faithful images, even for rare or unseen entities. Given a text prompt, Re-Imagen accesses an external multi-modal knowledge base to retrieve relevant (image, text) pairs and uses them as references to generate the image. With this retrieval step, Re-Imagen is augmented with the knowledge of high-level semantics and low-level visual details of the mentioned entities, and thus improves its accuracy in generating the entities' visual appearances. We train Re-Imagen on a constructed dataset containing (image, text, retrieval) triples to teach the model to ground on both text prompt and retrieval. Furthermore, we develop a new sampling strategy to interleave the classifier-free guidance for text and retrieval conditions to balance the text and retrieval alignment. Re-Imagen achieves significant gain on FID score over COCO and WikiImage. To further evaluate the capabilities of the model, we introduce EntityDrawBench, a new benchmark that evaluates image generation for diverse entities, from frequent to rare, across multiple object categories including dogs, foods, landmarks, birds, and characters. Human evaluation on EntityDrawBench shows that Re-Imagen can significantly improve the fidelity of generated images, especially on less frequent entities. 在大规模图像文本数据训练的扩散和自回归模型的驱动下，文本到图像生成的研究在生成多样化和逼真的图像方面取得了重大进展。尽管最先进的模型可以生成常见实体的高质量图像，但它们通常难以生成不常见实体的图像，例如“Chortai（狗）”或“Picarones（食物）”。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了检索增强文本到图像生成器（Re-Imagen），这是一种生成模型，它使用检索到的信息来生成高保真和忠实的图像，即使对于罕见或看不见的实体也是如此。给定文本提示，Re-Imagen 访问外部多模态知识库来检索相关（图像、文本）对，并将它们用作生成图像的参考。通过此检索步骤，Re-Imagen 增强了所提及实体的高级语义和低级视觉细节的知识，从而提高了生成实体视觉外观的准确性。我们在包含（图像、文本、检索）三元组的构建数据集上训练 Re-Imagen，以教导模型基于文本提示和检索。此外，我们开发了一种新的采样策略来交织文本和检索条件的无分类器指导，以平衡文本和检索对齐。与 COCO 和 WikiImage 相比，Re-Imagen 在 FID 分数上取得了显着提高。为了进一步评估模型的功能，我们引入了 EntityDrawBench，这是一个新的基准，可评估从频繁到罕见的各种实体的图像生成，涵盖多个对象类别，包括狗、食物、地标、鸟类和人物。对 EntityDrawBench 的人工评估表明，Re-Imagen 可以显着提高生成图像的保真度，尤其是在不太频繁的实体上。 本文提出Re-Imagen，一种通过检索增强的文本到图像生成模型，旨在解决生成罕见实体图像的难题。 Wenhu Chen,Hexiang Hu,Chitwan Saharia,William W. Cohen cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jookyung Song,Yeonjin Chang,Seonguk Park,Nojun Kwak
title: Semantics-Guided Object Removal for Facial Images: with Broad Applicability and Robust Style Preservation
title_zh: 语义引导的面部图像对象去除：具有广泛的适用性和稳健的风格保留
abstract: Object removal and image inpainting in facial images is a task in which objects that occlude a facial image are specifically targeted, removed, and replaced by a properly reconstructed facial image. Two different approaches utilizing U-net and modulated generator respectively have been widely endorsed for this task for their unique advantages but notwithstanding each method's innate disadvantages. U-net, a conventional approach for conditional GANs, retains fine details of unmasked regions but the style of the reconstructed image is inconsistent with the rest of the original image and only works robustly when the size of the occluding object is small enough. In contrast, the modulated generative approach can deal with a larger occluded area in an image and provides {a} more consistent style, yet it usually misses out on most of the detailed features. This trade-off between these two models necessitates an invention of a model that can be applied to any size of mask while maintaining a consistent style and preserving minute details of facial features. Here, we propose Semantics-Guided Inpainting Network (SGIN) which itself is a modification of the modulated generator, aiming to take advantage of its advanced generative capability and preserve the high-fidelity details of the original image. By using the guidance of a semantic map, our model is capable of manipulating facial features which grants direction to the one-to-many problem for further practicability.
summary: Object removal and image inpainting in facial images is a task in which objects that occlude a facial image are specifically targeted, removed, and replaced by a properly reconstructed facial image. Two different approaches utilizing U-net and modulated generator respectively have been widely endorsed for this task for their unique advantages but notwithstanding each method's innate disadvantages. U-net, a conventional approach for conditional GANs, retains fine details of unmasked regions but the style of the reconstructed image is inconsistent with the rest of the original image and only works robustly when the size of the occluding object is small enough. In contrast, the modulated generative approach can deal with a larger occluded area in an image and provides {a} more consistent style, yet it usually misses out on most of the detailed features. This trade-off between these two models necessitates an invention of a model that can be applied to any size of mask while maintaining a consistent style and preserving minute details of facial features. Here, we propose Semantics-Guided Inpainting Network (SGIN) which itself is a modification of the modulated generator, aiming to take advantage of its advanced generative capability and preserve the high-fidelity details of the original image. By using the guidance of a semantic map, our model is capable of manipulating facial features which grants direction to the one-to-many problem for further practicability.
abstract_zh: 面部图像中的对象移除和图像修复是一项任务，其中遮挡面部图像的对象被专门瞄准、移除并替换为正确重建的面部图像。分别利用 U 网和调制发生器的两种不同方法因其独特的优点而被广泛认可用于此任务，但尽管每种方法都有先天的缺点。 U-net 是条件 GAN 的传统方法，保留了未遮蔽区域的精细细节，但重建图像的风格与原始图像的其余部分不一致，并且只有当遮挡对象的尺寸足够小时才能稳健地工作。相比之下，调制生成方法可以处理图像中更大的遮挡区域并提供更一致的风格，但它通常会错过大多数细节特征。这两种模型之间的这种权衡需要发明一种模型，该模型可以应用于任何尺寸的面具，同时保持一致的风格并保留面部特征的微小细节。在这里，我们提出了语义引导修复网络（SGIN），它本身是调制生成器的修改，旨在利用其先进的生成能力并保留原始图像的高保真细节。通过使用语义图的指导，我们的模型能够操纵面部特征，从而为一对多问题提供方向，以进一步提高实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语义引导的修复网络（SGIN），用于面部图像中的物体移除，旨在解决现有方法在处理不同遮挡区域时风格不一致和细节丢失的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统U-net在处理小范围遮挡时能保留细节但风格不一致，而调制生成器虽能处理大范围遮挡但细节缺失，需开发一种兼顾风格一致性与细节保留的通用模型。
AI.method: 基于调制生成器改进SGIN，引入语义图引导面部特征生成，通过语义信息指导多对多映射问题，实现对遮挡区域的高保真修复。
AI.result: SGIN在多种遮挡尺寸下均表现出优于现有方法的风格一致性与面部细节保留能力，验证了语义引导机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SGIN通过结合调制生成器与语义引导，成功平衡了风格一致性与细节保留的矛盾，为面部图像修复提供了广适用性方案。

authors_text: Laurent Amsaleg,Oussama Chelly,Michael E. Houle,Ken-ichi Kawarabayashi,Miloš Radovanović,Weeris Treeratanajaru
title: Intrinsic Dimensionality Estimation within Tight Localities: A Theoretical and Experimental Analysis
title_zh: 紧密局部内的内在维数估计：理论和实验分析
abstract: Accurate estimation of Intrinsic Dimensionality (ID) is of crucial importance in many data mining and machine learning tasks, including dimensionality reduction, outlier detection, similarity search and subspace clustering. However, since their convergence generally requires sample sizes (that is, neighborhood sizes) on the order of hundreds of points, existing ID estimation methods may have only limited usefulness for applications in which the data consists of many natural groups of small size. In this paper, we propose a local ID estimation strategy stable even for `tight' localities consisting of as few as 20 sample points. The estimator applies MLE techniques over all available pairwise distances among the members of the sample, based on a recent extreme-value-theoretic model of intrinsic dimensionality, the Local Intrinsic Dimension (LID). Our experimental results show that our proposed estimation technique can achieve notably smaller variance, while maintaining comparable levels of bias, at much smaller sample sizes than state-of-the-art estimators.
summary: Accurate estimation of Intrinsic Dimensionality (ID) is of crucial importance in many data mining and machine learning tasks, including dimensionality reduction, outlier detection, similarity search and subspace clustering. However, since their convergence generally requires sample sizes (that is, neighborhood sizes) on the order of hundreds of points, existing ID estimation methods may have only limited usefulness for applications in which the data consists of many natural groups of small size. In this paper, we propose a local ID estimation strategy stable even for `tight' localities consisting of as few as 20 sample points. The estimator applies MLE techniques over all available pairwise distances among the members of the sample, based on a recent extreme-value-theoretic model of intrinsic dimensionality, the Local Intrinsic Dimension (LID). Our experimental results show that our proposed estimation technique can achieve notably smaller variance, while maintaining comparable levels of bias, at much smaller sample sizes than state-of-the-art estimators.
abstract_zh: 内在维度（ID）的准确估计在许多数据挖掘和机器学习任务中至关重要，包括降维、异常值检测、相似性搜索和子空间聚类。然而，由于它们的收敛通常需要数百个点的样本大小（即邻域大小），因此现有的 ID 估计方法对于数据由许多小尺寸自然组组成的应用来说可能只有有限的用处。在本文中，我们提出了一种即使对于由少至 20 个样本点组成的“紧密”局部也能保持稳定的局部 ID 估计策略。估计器基于最近的内在维度极值理论模型（局部内在维度 (LID)），将 MLE 技术应用于样本成员之间所有可用的成对距离。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的估计技术可以在比最先进的估计器小得多的样本量下实现显着更小的方差，同时保持可比较的偏差水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在小规模数据群中稳定估计内在维度（ID）的局部方法。
AI.motivation: 现有ID估计方法需要数百个样本才能收敛，在小规模自然分组数据中应用受限。
AI.method: 基于极端值理论模型LID，采用最大似然估计（MLE）对所有样本两两距离进行计算。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在更小样本量下实现显著更低的方差且保持可比偏差水平。
AI.conclusion: 提出的局部ID估计策略有效解决了小规模数据集的维度估计难题。

In this paper, we propose a local ID estimation strategy stable even for `tight' localities consisting of as few as 20 sample points. The estimator applies MLE techniques over all available pairwise distances among the members of the sample, based on a recent extreme-value-theoretic model of intrinsic dimensionality, the Local Intrinsic Dimension (LID). Our experimental results show that our proposed estimation technique can achieve notably smaller variance, while maintaining comparable levels of bias, at much smaller sample sizes than state-of-the-art estimators. 内在维度（ID）的准确估计在许多数据挖掘和机器学习任务中至关重要，包括降维、异常值检测、相似性搜索和子空间聚类。然而，由于它们的收敛通常需要数百个点的样本大小（即邻域大小），因此现有的 ID 估计方法对于数据由许多小尺寸自然组组成的应用来说可能只有有限的用处。在本文中，我们提出了一种即使对于由少至 20 个样本点组成的“紧密”局部也能保持稳定的局部 ID 估计策略。估计器基于最近的内在维度极值理论模型（局部内在维度 (LID)），将 MLE 技术应用于样本成员之间所有可用的成对距离。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的估计技术可以在比最先进的估计器小得多的样本量下实现显着更小的方差，同时保持可比较的偏差水平。 本文提出了一种在小规模数据群中稳定估计内在维度（ID）的局部方法。 Laurent Amsaleg,Oussama Chelly,Michael E. Houle,Ken-ichi Kawarabayashi,Miloš Radovanović,Weeris Treeratanajaru cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Richard Osuala,Grzegorz Skorupko,Noussair Lazrak,Lidia Garrucho,Eloy García,Smriti Joshi,Socayna Jouide,Michael Rutherford,Fred Prior,Kaisar Kushibar,Oliver Diaz,Karim Lekadir
title: medigan: a Python library of pretrained generative models for medical image synthesis
title_zh: medigan：用于医学图像合成的预训练生成模型的 Python 库
abstract: Synthetic data generated by generative models can enhance the performance and capabilities of data-hungry deep learning models in medical imaging. However, there is (1) limited availability of (synthetic) datasets and (2) generative models are complex to train, which hinders their adoption in research and clinical applications. To reduce this entry barrier, we propose medigan, a one-stop shop for pretrained generative models implemented as an open-source framework-agnostic Python library. medigan allows researchers and developers to create, increase, and domain-adapt their training data in just a few lines of code. Guided by design decisions based on gathered end-user requirements, we implement medigan based on modular components for generative model (i) execution, (ii) visualisation, (iii) search & ranking, and (iv) contribution. The library's scalability and design is demonstrated by its growing number of integrated and readily-usable pretrained generative models consisting of 21 models utilising 9 different Generative Adversarial Network architectures trained on 11 datasets from 4 domains, namely, mammography, endoscopy, x-ray, and MRI. Furthermore, 3 applications of medigan are analysed in this work, which include (a) enabling community-wide sharing of restricted data, (b) investigating generative model evaluation metrics, and (c) improving clinical downstream tasks. In (b), extending on common medical image synthesis assessment and reporting standards, we show Fréchet Inception Distance variability based on image normalisation and radiology-specific feature extraction.
summary: Synthetic data generated by generative models can enhance the performance and capabilities of data-hungry deep learning models in medical imaging. However, there is (1) limited availability of (synthetic) datasets and (2) generative models are complex to train, which hinders their adoption in research and clinical applications. To reduce this entry barrier, we propose medigan, a one-stop shop for pretrained generative models implemented as an open-source framework-agnostic Python library. medigan allows researchers and developers to create, increase, and domain-adapt their training data in just a few lines of code. Guided by design decisions based on gathered end-user requirements, we implement medigan based on modular components for generative model (i) execution, (ii) visualisation, (iii) search & ranking, and (iv) contribution. The library's scalability and design is demonstrated by its growing number of integrated and readily-usable pretrained generative models consisting of 21 models utilising 9 different Generative Adversarial Network architectures trained on 11 datasets from 4 domains, namely, mammography, endoscopy, x-ray, and MRI. Furthermore, 3 applications of medigan are analysed in this work, which include (a) enabling community-wide sharing of restricted data, (b) investigating generative model evaluation metrics, and (c) improving clinical downstream tasks. In (b), extending on common medical image synthesis assessment and reporting standards, we show Fréchet Inception Distance variability based on image normalisation and radiology-specific feature extraction.
abstract_zh: 生成模型生成的合成数据可以增强医学成像中数据密集型深度学习模型的性能和能力。然而，（1）（合成）数据集的可用性有限，（2）生成模型训练起来很复杂，这阻碍了它们在研究和临床应用中的采用。为了减少这一进入障碍，我们提出了 medigan，这是一个预训练生成模型的一站式商店，作为与开源框架无关的 Python 库实现。 medigan 允许研究人员和开发人员只需几行代码即可创建、增加和领域调整他们的训练数据。在基于收集的最终用户需求的设计决策的指导下，我们实施基于模块化组件的medigan，用于生成模型（i）执行，（ii）可视化，（iii）搜索和排名，以及（iv）贡献。该库的可扩展性和设计通过其越来越多的集成且易于使用的预训练生成模型得到了证明，该模型由 21 个模型组成，利用 9 种不同的生成对抗网络架构，在来自 4 个领域（即乳房 X 线摄影、内窥镜检查、X 射线和 MRI）的 11 个数据集上进行训练。此外，这项工作还分析了 medigan 的 3 个应用，其中包括 (a) 实现社区范围内的受限数据共享，(b) 研究生成模型评估指标，以及 (c) 改进临床下游任务。在（b）中，扩展了常见的医学图像合成评估和报告标准，我们展示了基于图像归一化和放射学特定特征提取的 Fréchet 起始距离变异性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出medigan，一个开源的Python库，提供预训练生成模型以降低医学图像合成的研究和临床应用门槛。
AI.motivation: 医学影像领域面临合成数据集稀缺和生成模型训练复杂的问题，限制了其在深度学习中的应用。
AI.method: 构建模块化Python库，集成21个预训练生成对抗网络模型，涵盖9种架构和11个跨4个医学领域的数据集，并提供执行、可视化、搜索及贡献功能。
AI.result: 实现支持数据增强、领域适应及临床任务优化的工具库，分析了3种应用场景并验证了Fréchet Inception Distance评估指标的可变性。
AI.conclusion: medigan通过预训练模型和工具链有效推动了医学影像生成模型的普及，为数据共享和下游临床任务改进提供支持。

authors_text: Miquel Ramirez,Daniel Selvaratnam,Chris Manzie
title: Lazy Probabilistic Roadmaps Revisited
title_zh: 重新审视惰性概率路线图
abstract: This paper describes a revision of the classic Lazy Probabilistic Roadmaps algorithm (Lazy PRM), that results from pairing PRM and a novel Branch-and-Cut (BC) algorithm. Cuts are dynamically generated constraints that are imposed on minimum cost paths over the geometric graphs selected by PRM. Cuts eliminate paths that cannot be mapped into smooth plans that satisfy suitably defined kinematic constraints. We generate candidate smooth plans by fitting splines to vertices in minimum-cost path. Plans are validated with a recently proposed algorithm that maps them into finite traces, without need to choose a fixed discretization step. Trace elements exactly describe when plans cross constraint boundaries modulo arithmetic precision. We evaluate several planners using our methods over the recently proposed BARN benchmark, and we report evidence of the scalability of our approach.
summary: This paper describes a revision of the classic Lazy Probabilistic Roadmaps algorithm (Lazy PRM), that results from pairing PRM and a novel Branch-and-Cut (BC) algorithm. Cuts are dynamically generated constraints that are imposed on minimum cost paths over the geometric graphs selected by PRM. Cuts eliminate paths that cannot be mapped into smooth plans that satisfy suitably defined kinematic constraints. We generate candidate smooth plans by fitting splines to vertices in minimum-cost path. Plans are validated with a recently proposed algorithm that maps them into finite traces, without need to choose a fixed discretization step. Trace elements exactly describe when plans cross constraint boundaries modulo arithmetic precision. We evaluate several planners using our methods over the recently proposed BARN benchmark, and we report evidence of the scalability of our approach.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了经典惰性概率路线图算法 (Lazy PRM) 的修订版，该算法是 PRM 与新颖的分支与剪切 (BC) 算法配对的结果。切割是动态生成的约束，施加在 PRM 选择的几何图形上的最小成本路径上。切割消除了无法映射到满足适当定义的运动学约束的平滑计划的路径。我们通过将样条拟合到最小成本路径中的顶点来生成候选平滑计划。使用最近提出的算法对计划进行验证，该算法将它们映射到有限迹线，而无需选择固定的离散化步骤。跟踪元素准确地描述了计划何时跨越约束边界模算术精度。我们使用我们的方法对最近提出的 BARN 基准进行了评估，并报告了我们方法的可扩展性的证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的Lazy PRM算法，结合Branch-and-Cut方法动态生成约束以优化路径规划。
AI.motivation: 经典Lazy PRM在处理复杂运动学约束时存在路径验证效率低、依赖固定离散化的问题，需更灵活的约束处理机制。
AI.method: 将PRM与Branch-and-Cut算法结合，动态生成约束消除无效路径；通过样条拟合生成平滑路径，并采用新型验证算法避免固定离散化。
AI.result: 在BARN基准测试中验证了方法的可扩展性，证明其能有效处理复杂约束下的路径规划问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态约束生成与新型验证机制，提升了路径规划的效率与精度，适用于高维复杂环境。

authors_text: Xin Yu,Qi Yang,Yucheng Tang,Riqiang Gao,Shunxing Bao,LeonY. Cai,Ho Hin Lee,Yuankai Huo,Ann Zenobia Moore,Luigi Ferrucci,Bennett A. Landman
title: Reducing Positional Variance in Cross-sectional Abdominal CT Slices with Deep Conditional Generative Models
title_zh: 利用深度条件生成模型减少腹部 CT 横截面切片的位置方差
abstract: 2D low-dose single-slice abdominal computed tomography (CT) slice enables direct measurements of body composition, which are critical to quantitatively characterizing health relationships on aging. However, longitudinal analysis of body composition changes using 2D abdominal slices is challenging due to positional variance between longitudinal slices acquired in different years. To reduce the positional variance, we extend the conditional generative models to our C-SliceGen that takes an arbitrary axial slice in the abdominal region as the condition and generates a defined vertebral level slice by estimating the structural changes in the latent space. Experiments on 1170 subjects from an in-house dataset and 50 subjects from BTCV MICCAI Challenge 2015 show that our model can generate high quality images in terms of realism and similarity. External experiments on 20 subjects from the Baltimore Longitudinal Study of Aging (BLSA) dataset that contains longitudinal single abdominal slices validate that our method can harmonize the slice positional variance in terms of muscle and visceral fat area. Our approach provides a promising direction of mapping slices from different vertebral levels to a target slice to reduce positional variance for single slice longitudinal analysis. The source code is available at: https://github.com/MASILab/C-SliceGen.
summary: 2D low-dose single-slice abdominal computed tomography (CT) slice enables direct measurements of body composition, which are critical to quantitatively characterizing health relationships on aging. However, longitudinal analysis of body composition changes using 2D abdominal slices is challenging due to positional variance between longitudinal slices acquired in different years. To reduce the positional variance, we extend the conditional generative models to our C-SliceGen that takes an arbitrary axial slice in the abdominal region as the condition and generates a defined vertebral level slice by estimating the structural changes in the latent space. Experiments on 1170 subjects from an in-house dataset and 50 subjects from BTCV MICCAI Challenge 2015 show that our model can generate high quality images in terms of realism and similarity. External experiments on 20 subjects from the Baltimore Longitudinal Study of Aging (BLSA) dataset that contains longitudinal single abdominal slices validate that our method can harmonize the slice positional variance in terms of muscle and visceral fat area. Our approach provides a promising direction of mapping slices from different vertebral levels to a target slice to reduce positional variance for single slice longitudinal analysis. The source code is available at: https://github.com/MASILab/C-SliceGen.
abstract_zh: 二维低剂量单层腹部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 切片可以直接测量身体成分，这对于定量表征健康与衰老的关系至关重要。然而，由于不同年份获取的纵向切片之间的位置差异，使用二维腹部切片对身体成分变化进行纵向分析具有挑战性。为了减少位置方差，我们将条件生成模型扩展到我们的 C-SliceGen，它以腹部区域的任意轴向切片为条件，并通过估计潜在空间中的结构变化来生成定义的椎骨水平切片。对内部数据集的 1170 名受试者和 BTCV MICCAI Challenge 2015 的 50 名受试者进行的实验表明，我们的模型可以在真实性和相似性方面生成高质量的图像。对来自巴尔的摩纵向衰老研究 (BLSA) 数据集的 20 名受试者进行的外部实验（包含纵向单腹部切片）验证了我们的方法可以协调肌肉和内脏脂肪面积方面的切片位置差异。我们的方法提供了将不同椎骨水平的切片映射到目标切片的有前途的方向，以减少单切片纵向分析的位置方差。源代码位于：https://github.com/MASILab/C-SliceGen。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度条件生成模型的方法，用于减少腹部CT切片在纵向分析中的位置方差。
AI.motivation: 纵向分析腹部CT切片时，由于不同年份获取的切片位置存在方差，使得体成分变化的量化分析变得困难。
AI.method: 作者扩展了条件生成模型，提出了C-SliceGen方法，该方法以任意轴向腹部切片为条件，生成特定椎体水平的切片，通过估计潜在空间中的结构变化来减少位置方差。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在生成图像的真实性和相似性方面表现良好，并且在纵向分析中有效减少了肌肉和内脏脂肪面积的位置方差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为映射不同椎体水平的切片到目标切片以减少位置方差提供了有前景的方向。

search_text: Reducing Positional Variance in Cross-sectional Abdominal CT Slices with Deep Conditional Generative Models 利用深度条件生成模型减少腹部 CT 横截面切片的位置方差 2D low-dose single-slice abdominal computed tomography (CT) slice enables direct measurements of body composition, which are critical to quantitatively characterizing health relationships on aging. However, longitudinal analysis of body composition changes using 2D abdominal slices is challenging due to positional variance between longitudinal slices acquired in different years. To reduce the positional variance, we extend the conditional generative models to our C-SliceGen that takes an arbitrary axial slice in the abdominal region as the condition and generates a defined vertebral level slice by estimating the structural changes in the latent space. Experiments on 1170 subjects from an in-house dataset and 50 subjects from BTCV MICCAI Challenge 2015 show that our model can generate high quality images in terms of realism and similarity. External experiments on 20 subjects from the Baltimore Longitudinal Study of Aging (BLSA) dataset that contains longitudinal single abdominal slices validate that our method can harmonize the slice positional variance in terms of muscle and visceral fat area. Our approach provides a promising direction of mapping slices from different vertebral levels to a target slice to reduce positional variance for single slice longitudinal analysis. The source code is available at: https://github.com/MASILab/C-SliceGen. 二维低剂量单层腹部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 切片可以直接测量身体成分，这对于定量表征健康与衰老的关系至关重要。然而，由于不同年份获取的纵向切片之间的位置差异，使用二维腹部切片对身体成分变化进行纵向分析具有挑战性。为了减少位置方差，我们将条件生成模型扩展到我们的 C-SliceGen，它以腹部区域的任意轴向切片为条件，并通过估计潜在空间中的结构变化来生成定义的椎骨水平切片。对内部数据集的 1170 名受试者和 BTCV MICCAI Challenge 2015 的 50 名受试者进行的实验表明，我们的模型可以在真实性和相似性方面生成高质量的图像。对来自巴尔的摩纵向衰老研究 (BLSA) 数据集的 20 名受试者进行的外部实验（包含纵向单腹部切片）验证了我们的方法可以协调肌肉和内脏脂肪面积方面的切片位置差异。我们的方法提供了将不同椎骨水平的切片映射到目标切片的有前途的方向，以减少单切片纵向分析的位置方差。源代码位于：https://github.com/MASILab/C-SliceGen。 本文提出了一种基于深度条件生成模型的方法，用于减少腹部CT切片在纵向分析中的位置方差。 Xin Yu,Qi Yang,Yucheng Tang,Riqiang Gao,Shunxing Bao,LeonY. authors_text: Adarsh Salagame,Sushant Govindraj,S. N. Omkar
title: Practical Challenges in Landing a UAV on a Dynamic Target
title_zh: 无人机降落在动态目标上的实际挑战
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles grow more popular by the day and applications for them are crossing boundaries of science and industry, with everything from aerial photography to package delivery to disaster management benefiting from the technology. But before they become commonplace, there are challenges to be solved to make them reliable and safe. The following paper discusses the challenges associated with the precision landing of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle, including methods for sensing and control and their merits and shortcomings for various applications.
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles grow more popular by the day and applications for them are crossing boundaries of science and industry, with everything from aerial photography to package delivery to disaster management benefiting from the technology. But before they become commonplace, there are challenges to be solved to make them reliable and safe. The following paper discusses the challenges associated with the precision landing of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle, including methods for sensing and control and their merits and shortcomings for various applications.
abstract_zh: 无人机日益普及，其应用正在跨越科学和工业的界限，从航空摄影到包裹投递再到灾害管理等各个领域都受益于该技术。但在它们变得普遍之前，还需要解决一些挑战才能使其可靠和安全。下面的论文讨论了与无人机精确着陆相关的挑战，包括传感和控制方法及其在各种应用中的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了在动态目标上实现无人机精确着陆所面临的实际挑战，包括感知与控制方法的优缺点分析。
AI.motivation: 无人机应用日益广泛，但其可靠性和安全性仍需提升，精确着陆是关键难题之一。
AI.method: 通过分析现有感知技术（如视觉、GPS、惯性导航）与控制算法，评估其在不同场景下的适用性与局限性。
AI.result: 不同方法在动态目标着陆中表现各异，例如GPS依赖性强但易受干扰，视觉系统对环境光照敏感。
AI.conclusion: 需根据具体应用场景选择或融合多种技术，并进一步研究鲁棒性更强的控制策略以提升着陆可靠性。

authors_text: Alfonso Amayuelas,Shuai Zhang,Susie Xi Rao,Ce Zhang
title: Neural Methods for Logical Reasoning Over Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 知识图逻辑推理的神经方法
abstract: Reasoning is a fundamental problem for computers and deeply studied in Artificial Intelligence. In this paper, we specifically focus on answering multi-hop logical queries on Knowledge Graphs (KGs). This is a complicated task because, in real-world scenarios, the graphs tend to be large and incomplete. Most previous works have been unable to create models that accept full First-Order Logical (FOL) queries, which include negative queries, and have only been able to process a limited set of query structures. Additionally, most methods present logic operators that can only perform the logical operation they are made for. We introduce a set of models that use Neural Networks to create one-point vector embeddings to answer the queries. The versatility of neural networks allows the framework to handle FOL queries with Conjunction ($\wedge$), Disjunction ($\vee$) and Negation ($\neg$) operators. We demonstrate experimentally the performance of our model through extensive experimentation on well-known benchmarking datasets. Besides having more versatile operators, the models achieve a 10\% relative increase over the best performing state of the art and more than 30\% over the original method based on single-point vector embeddings.
summary: Reasoning is a fundamental problem for computers and deeply studied in Artificial Intelligence. In this paper, we specifically focus on answering multi-hop logical queries on Knowledge Graphs (KGs). This is a complicated task because, in real-world scenarios, the graphs tend to be large and incomplete. Most previous works have been unable to create models that accept full First-Order Logical (FOL) queries, which include negative queries, and have only been able to process a limited set of query structures. Additionally, most methods present logic operators that can only perform the logical operation they are made for. We introduce a set of models that use Neural Networks to create one-point vector embeddings to answer the queries. The versatility of neural networks allows the framework to handle FOL queries with Conjunction ($\wedge$), Disjunction ($\vee$) and Negation ($\neg$) operators. We demonstrate experimentally the performance of our model through extensive experimentation on well-known benchmarking datasets. Besides having more versatile operators, the models achieve a 10\% relative increase over the best performing state of the art and more than 30\% over the original method based on single-point vector embeddings.
abstract_zh: 推理是计算机的一个基本问题，在人工智能领域得到了深入研究。在本文中，我们特别关注回答知识图（KG）上的多跳逻辑查询。这是一项复杂的任务，因为在现实场景中，图表往往很大且不完整。大多数以前的工作无法创建接受完整的一阶逻辑（FOL）查询（包括否定查询）的模型，并且只能处理有限的查询结构集。此外，大多数方法提供的逻辑运算符只能执行它们所针对的逻辑运算。我们引入了一组使用神经网络创建单点向量嵌入来回答查询的模型。神经网络的多功能性允许框架使用合取 ($\wedge$)、析取 ($\vee$) 和取反 ($\neg$) 运算符处理 FOL 查询。我们通过对众所周知的基准测试数据集进行广泛的实验，以实验方式展示了我们模型的性能。除了拥有更通用的算子之外，该模型还比现有技术中性能最佳的方法提高了 10%，比基于单点向量嵌入的原始方法提高了 30% 以上。

AI.tldr: 提出基于神经网络的方法，处理知识图谱上的多跳逻辑查询，支持合取、析取和否定操作。
AI.motivation: 传统方法无法处理完整的FOL查询（含否定）和复杂查询结构，逻辑运算符功能单一，限制了推理能力。
AI.method: 构建神经网络模型生成单点向量嵌入，通过统一框架支持FOL的合取、析取、否定运算符，提升查询处理的通用性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，模型性能较最佳现有方法提升10%，较原始单点嵌入方法提升超30%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过神经网络实现了更通用的逻辑推理框架，在复杂查询处理上显著优于现有技术。

The versatility of neural networks allows the framework to handle FOL queries with Conjunction ($\wedge$), Disjunction ($\vee$) and Negation ($\neg$) operators. Besides having more versatile operators, the models achieve a 10\% relative increase over the best performing state of the art and more than 30\% over the original method based on single-point vector embeddings. 推理是计算机的一个基本问题，在人工智能领域得到了深入研究。在本文中，我们特别关注回答知识图（KG）上的多跳逻辑查询。这是一项复杂的任务，因为在现实场景中，图表往往很大且不完整。大多数以前的工作无法创建接受完整的一阶逻辑（FOL）查询（包括否定查询）的模型，并且只能处理有限的查询结构集。此外，大多数方法提供的逻辑运算符只能执行它们所针对的逻辑运算。我们引入了一组使用神经网络创建单点向量嵌入来回答查询的模型。神经网络的多功能性允许框架使用合取 ($\wedge$)、析取 ($\vee$) 和取反 ($\neg$) 运算符处理 FOL 查询。我们通过对众所周知的基准测试数据集进行广泛的实验，以实验方式展示了我们模型的性能。除了拥有更通用的算子之外，该模型还比现有技术中性能最佳的方法提高了 10%，比基于单点向量嵌入的原始方法提高了 30% 以上。 提出基于神经网络的方法，处理知识图谱上的多跳逻辑查询，支持合取、析取和否定操作。 Alfonso Amayuelas,Shuai Zhang,Susie Xi Rao,Ce Zhang cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Seiji Shaw,Devesh K. Jha,Arvind Raghunathan,Radu Corcodel,Diego Romeres,George Konidaris,Daniel Nikovski
title: Constrained Dynamic Movement Primitives for Safe Learning of Motor Skills
title_zh: 用于安全学习运动技能的约束动态运动原语
abstract: Dynamic movement primitives are widely used for learning skills which can be demonstrated to a robot by a skilled human or controller. While their generalization capabilities and simple formulation make them very appealing to use, they possess no strong guarantees to satisfy operational safety constraints for a task. In this paper, we present constrained dynamic movement primitives (CDMP) which can allow for constraint satisfaction in the robot workspace. We present a formulation of a non-linear optimization to perturb the DMP forcing weights regressed by locally-weighted regression to admit a Zeroing Barrier Function (ZBF), which certifies workspace constraint satisfaction. We demonstrate the proposed CDMP under different constraints on the end-effector movement such as obstacle avoidance and workspace constraints on a physical robot. A video showing the implementation of the proposed algorithm using different manipulators in different environments could be found here https://youtu.be/hJegJJkJfys.
summary: Dynamic movement primitives are widely used for learning skills which can be demonstrated to a robot by a skilled human or controller. While their generalization capabilities and simple formulation make them very appealing to use, they possess no strong guarantees to satisfy operational safety constraints for a task. In this paper, we present constrained dynamic movement primitives (CDMP) which can allow for constraint satisfaction in the robot workspace. We present a formulation of a non-linear optimization to perturb the DMP forcing weights regressed by locally-weighted regression to admit a Zeroing Barrier Function (ZBF), which certifies workspace constraint satisfaction. We demonstrate the proposed CDMP under different constraints on the end-effector movement such as obstacle avoidance and workspace constraints on a physical robot. A video showing the implementation of the proposed algorithm using different manipulators in different environments could be found here https://youtu.be/hJegJJkJfys.
abstract_zh: 动态运动基元广泛用于学习技能，这些技能可以由技术人员或控制器向机器人演示。虽然它们的泛化能力和简单的公式使它们非常有吸引力，但它们没有强有力的保证来满足任务的操作安全约束。在本文中，我们提出了约束动态运动基元（CDMP），它可以允许机器人工作空间中的约束满足。我们提出了一种非线性优化的公式，用于干扰 DMP，迫使权重通过局部加权回归进行回归，以允许归零障碍函数 (ZBF)，从而证明工作空间约束满足。我们在末端执行器运动的不同约束下（例如物理机器人的避障和工作空间约束）演示了所提出的 CDMP。可以在此处找到显示在不同环境中使用不同操纵器实现所提出算法的视频：https://youtu.be/hJegJJkJfys。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种带约束的动态运动基元（CDMP），通过引入零点屏障函数（ZBF）确保机器人操作空间中的约束满足，以安全学习运动技能。
AI.motivation: 传统动态运动基元（DMP）缺乏对操作空间安全约束的强保证，难以满足实际机器人任务中避障和工作空间限制的需求。
AI.method: 通过非线性优化调整DMP的驱动力权重，结合局部加权回归和零点屏障函数（ZBF）认证，实现约束满足的运动轨迹生成。
AI.result: 在物理机器人上验证了CDMP在末端执行器避障和工作空间约束下的有效性，并通过视频展示了不同机械臂在多环境中的应用。
AI.conclusion: CDMP方法能够在保证运动技能学习效率的同时满足安全约束，为实际机器人应用提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Yusong Wu,Josh Gardner,Ethan Manilow,Ian Simon,Curtis Hawthorne,Jesse Engel
title: The Chamber Ensemble Generator: Limitless High-Quality MIR Data via Generative Modeling
title_zh: 室内集成发生器：通过生成建模获得无限的高质量 MIR 数据
abstract: Data is the lifeblood of modern machine learning systems, including for those in Music Information Retrieval (MIR). However, MIR has long been mired by small datasets and unreliable labels. In this work, we propose to break this bottleneck using generative modeling. By pipelining a generative model of notes (Coconet trained on Bach Chorales) with a structured synthesis model of chamber ensembles (MIDI-DDSP trained on URMP), we demonstrate a system capable of producing unlimited amounts of realistic chorale music with rich annotations including mixes, stems, MIDI, note-level performance attributes (staccato, vibrato, etc.), and even fine-grained synthesis parameters (pitch, amplitude, etc.). We call this system the Chamber Ensemble Generator (CEG), and use it to generate a large dataset of chorales from four different chamber ensembles (CocoChorales). We demonstrate that data generated using our approach improves state-of-the-art models for music transcription and source separation, and we release both the system and the dataset as an open-source foundation for future work in the MIR community.
summary: Data is the lifeblood of modern machine learning systems, including for those in Music Information Retrieval (MIR). However, MIR has long been mired by small datasets and unreliable labels. In this work, we propose to break this bottleneck using generative modeling. By pipelining a generative model of notes (Coconet trained on Bach Chorales) with a structured synthesis model of chamber ensembles (MIDI-DDSP trained on URMP), we demonstrate a system capable of producing unlimited amounts of realistic chorale music with rich annotations including mixes, stems, MIDI, note-level performance attributes (staccato, vibrato, etc.), and even fine-grained synthesis parameters (pitch, amplitude, etc.). We call this system the Chamber Ensemble Generator (CEG), and use it to generate a large dataset of chorales from four different chamber ensembles (CocoChorales). We demonstrate that data generated using our approach improves state-of-the-art models for music transcription and source separation, and we release both the system and the dataset as an open-source foundation for future work in the MIR community.
abstract_zh: 数据是现代机器学习系统的命脉，包括音乐信息检索 (MIR) 系统。然而，MIR 长期以来一直受到小数据集和不可靠标签的困扰。在这项工作中，我们建议使用生成建模来打破这个瓶颈。通过将音符生成模型（在巴赫合唱曲上训练的 Coconet）与室内合奏的结构化合成模型（在 URMP 上训练的 MIDI-DDSP）进行管道化，我们演示了一个能够产生无限量的真实合唱音乐的系统，该音乐具有丰富的注释，包括混音、主干、MIDI、音符级演奏属性（断奏、颤音等），甚至是细粒度的合成参数（音高、振幅等）。我们将该系统称为室内合奏生成器 (CEG)，并使用它生成来自四个不同室内合奏 (CocoChorales) 的大型合唱曲数据集。我们证明，使用我们的方法生成的数据改进了音乐转录和源分离的最先进模型，并且我们发布了系统和数据集，作为 MIR 社区未来工作的开源基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成模型的系统，用于生成无限量的高质量音乐信息检索（MIR）数据。
AI.motivation: 音乐信息检索领域长期面临数据集规模小和标签可靠性差的问题，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 通过将音符生成模型Coconet与室内乐合成模型MIDI-DDSP结合，生成包含多轨音频、MIDI、演奏属性等丰富标注的合唱音乐数据。
AI.result: 生成的数据集（CocoChorales）显著提升了音乐转录和源分离任务的最先进模型性能，并开源了系统与数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为MIR领域提供了可扩展的高质量数据生成方案，推动了相关研究的开放性与可复现性。

authors_text: Abhishek Dasgupta,Rahul Sharma,Challenger Mishra,Vikranth H. Nagaraja
title: Machine Learning for Optical Motion Capture-driven Musculoskeletal Modelling from Inertial Motion Capture Data
title_zh: 根据惯性运动捕捉数据进行光学运动捕捉驱动的肌肉骨骼建模的机器学习
abstract: Marker-based Optical Motion Capture (OMC) systems and associated musculoskeletal (MSK) modelling predictions offer non-invasively obtainable insights into in vivo joint and muscle loading, aiding clinical decision-making. However, an OMC system is lab-based, expensive, and requires a line of sight. Inertial Motion Capture (IMC) systems are widely-used alternatives, which are portable, user-friendly, and relatively low-cost, although with lesser accuracy. Irrespective of the choice of motion capture technique, one needs to use an MSK model to obtain the kinematic and kinetic outputs, which is a computationally expensive tool increasingly well approximated by machine learning (ML) methods. Here, we present an ML approach to map experimentally recorded IMC data to the human upper-extremity MSK model outputs computed from ('gold standard') OMC input data. Essentially, we aim to predict higher-quality MSK outputs from the much easier-to-obtain IMC data. We use OMC and IMC data simultaneously collected for the same subjects to train different ML architectures that predict OMC-driven MSK outputs from IMC measurements. In particular, we employed various neural network (NN) architectures, such as Feed-Forward Neural Networks (FFNNs) and Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) (vanilla, Long Short-Term Memory, and Gated Recurrent Unit) and searched for the best-fit model through an exhaustive search in the hyperparameters space in both subject-exposed (SE) & subject-naive (SN) settings. We observed a comparable performance for both FFNN & RNN models, which have a high degree of agreement (ravg, SE, FFNN = 0.90+/-0.19, ravg, SE, RNN = 0.89+/-0.17, ravg, SN, FFNN = 0.84+/-0.23, & ravg, SN, RNN = 0.78+/-0.23) with the desired OMC-driven MSK estimates for held-out test data. Mapping IMC inputs to OMC-driven MSK outputs using ML models could be instrumental in transitioning MSK modelling from 'lab to field'.

We observed a comparable performance for both FFNN & RNN models, which have a high degree of agreement (ravg, SE, FFNN = 0.90+/-0.19, ravg, SE, RNN = 0.89+/-0.17, ravg, SN, FFNN = 0.84+/-0.23, & ravg, SN, RNN = 0.78+/-0.23) with the desired OMC-driven MSK estimates for held-out test data. Mapping IMC inputs to OMC-driven MSK outputs using ML models could be instrumental in transitioning MSK modelling from 'lab to field'.
abstract_zh: 基于标记的光学运动捕捉 (OMC) 系统和相关的肌肉骨骼 (MSK) 建模预测提供了对体内关节和肌肉负荷的非侵入性洞察，有助于临床决策。然而，OMC 系统是基于实验室的、昂贵的并且需要视线。惯性运动捕捉 (IMC) 系统是广泛使用的替代方案，虽然精度较低，但便携、用户友好且成本相对较低。无论选择哪种运动捕捉技术，都需要使用 MSK 模型来获取运动学和动力学输出，这是一种计算成本高昂的工具，越来越多地被机器学习 (ML) 方法所近似。在这里，我们提出了一种 ML 方法，将实验记录的 IMC 数据映射到根据（“黄金标准”）OMC 输入数据计算得出的人类上肢 MSK 模型输出。本质上，我们的目标是从更容易获得的 IMC 数据中预测更高质量的 MSK 输出。我们使用为同一受试者同时收集的 OMC 和 IMC 数据来训练不同的 ML 架构，这些架构根据 IMC 测量预测 OMC 驱动的 MSK 输出。特别是，我们采用了各种神经网络 (NN) 架构，例如前馈神经网络 (FFNN) 和循环神经网络 (RNN)（普通、长短期记忆和门控循环单元），并通过在主题暴露 (SE) 和主题朴素 (SN) 设置中的超参数空间中进行详尽搜索来搜索最佳拟合模型。我们观察到 FFNN 和 RNN 模型的性能相当，它们与所需的 OMC 驱动的 MSK 估计高度一致（ravg，SE，FFNN = 0.90+/-0.19，ravg，SE，RNN = 0.89+/-0.17，ravg，SN，FFNN = 0.84+/-0.23，＆ravg，SN，RNN = 0.78+/-0.23）对于保留的测试数据。使用 ML 模型将 IMC 输入映射到 OMC 驱动的 MSK 输出可能有助于将 MSK 建模从“实验室到现场”转变。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种机器学习方法，将惯性运动捕捉（IMC）数据映射到光学运动捕捉（OMC）驱动的骨骼肌模型输出，以实现从便携式IMC数据中预测高质量骨骼肌建模结果。
AI.motivation: 光学运动捕捉系统（OMC）虽能提供精确骨骼肌建模数据，但受限于实验室环境、成本和视线要求；惯性运动捕捉（IMC）虽便携且低成本，但精度不足。通过机器学习提升IMC数据驱动的骨骼肌建模质量，可推动该技术从实验室向实际场景应用。
AI.method: 利用同时采集的OMC和IMC数据训练多种神经网络模型（包括前馈神经网络FFNN和循环神经网络RNN），通过超参数搜索在受试者暴露（SE）和未暴露（SN）两种设置下优化模型性能。
AI.result: FFNN和RNN模型在两种设置下均表现出较高相关性（SE设置下ravg分别为0.90±0.19和0.89±0.17，SN设置下为0.84±0.23和0.78±0.23），验证了IMC数据通过机器学习映射至OMC驱动骨骼肌输出的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过机器学习有效提升了IMC数据的骨骼肌建模精度，为将骨骼肌分析从实验室环境扩展至实际应用提供了可行路径。
