search_text: Machine Learning for Optical Motion Capture-driven Musculoskeletal Modelling from Inertial Motion Capture Data 根据惯性运动捕捉数据进行光学运动捕捉驱动的肌肉骨骼建模的机器学习 Marker-based Optical Motion Capture (OMC) systems and associated musculoskeletal (MSK) modelling predictions offer non-invasively obtainable insights into in vivo joint and muscle loading, aiding clinical decision-making. However, an OMC system is lab-based, expensive, and requires a line of sight. Inertial Motion Capture (IMC) systems are widely-used alternatives, which are portable, user-friendly, and relatively low-cost, although with lesser accuracy. Irrespective of the choice of motion capture technique, one needs to use an MSK model to obtain the kinematic and kinetic outputs, which is a computationally expensive tool increasingly well approximated by machine learning (ML) methods. Here, we present an ML approach to map experimentally recorded IMC data to the human upper-extremity MSK model outputs computed from ('gold standard') OMC input data. Essentially, we aim to predict higher-quality MSK outputs from the much easier-to-obtain IMC data. We use OMC and IMC data simultaneously collected for the same subjects to train different ML architectures that predict OMC-driven MSK outputs from IMC measurements. In particular, we employed various neural network (NN) architectures, such as Feed-Forward Neural Networks (FFNNs) and Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) (vanilla, Long Short-Term Memory, and Gated Recurrent Unit) and searched for the best-fit model through an exhaustive search in the hyperparameters space in both subject-exposed (SE) & subject-naive (SN) settings. We observed a comparable performance for both FFNN & RNN models, which have a high degree of agreement (ravg, SE, FFNN = 0.90+/-0.19, ravg, SE, RNN = 0.89+/-0.17, ravg, SN, FFNN = 0.84+/-0.23, & ravg, SN, RNN = 0.78+/-0.23) with the desired OMC-driven MSK estimates for held-out test data. Mapping IMC inputs to OMC-driven MSK outputs using ML models could be instrumental in transitioning MSK modelling from 'lab to field'. 基于标记的光学运动捕捉 (OMC) 系统和相关的肌肉骨骼 (MSK) 建模预测提供了对体内关节和肌肉负荷的非侵入性洞察，有助于临床决策。然而，OMC 系统是基于实验室的、昂贵的并且需要视线。惯性运动捕捉 (IMC) 系统是广泛使用的替代方案，虽然精度较低，但便携、用户友好且成本相对较低。无论选择哪种运动捕捉技术，都需要使用 MSK 模型来获取运动学和动力学输出，这是一种计算成本高昂的工具，越来越多地被机器学习 (ML) 方法所近似。在这里，我们提出了一种 ML 方法，将实验记录的 IMC 数据映射到根据（“黄金标准”）OMC 输入数据计算得出的人类上肢 MSK 模型输出。本质上，我们的目标是从更容易获得的 IMC 数据中预测更高质量的 MSK 输出。我们使用为同一受试者同时收集的 OMC 和 IMC 数据来训练不同的 ML 架构，这些架构根据 IMC 测量预测 OMC 驱动的 MSK 输出。特别是，我们采用了各种神经网络 (NN) 架构，例如前馈神经网络 (FFNN) 和循环神经网络 (RNN)（普通、长短期记忆和门控循环单元），并通过在主题暴露 (SE) 和主题朴素 (SN) 设置中的超参数空间中进行详尽搜索来搜索最佳拟合模型。我们观察到 FFNN 和 RNN 模型的性能相当，它们与所需的 OMC 驱动的 MSK 估计高度一致（ravg，SE，FFNN = 0.90+/-0.19，ravg，SE，RNN = 0.89+/-0.17，ravg，SN，FFNN = 0.84+/-0.23，＆ravg，SN，RNN = 0.78+/-0.23）对于保留的测试数据。使用 ML 模型将 IMC 输入映射到 OMC 驱动的 MSK 输出可能有助于将 MSK 建模从“实验室到现场”转变。 本文提出一种机器学习方法，将惯性运动捕捉（IMC）数据映射到光学运动捕捉（OMC）驱动的骨骼肌模型输出，以实现从便携式IMC数据中预测高质量骨骼肌建模结果。 Abhishek Dasgupta,Rahul Sharma,Challenger Mishra,Vikranth H. authors_text: Sourav Sahoo,Siddhant Chaudhary,Samrat Mukhopadhyay,Abhishek Sinha
title: Online Subset Selection using $α$-Core with no Augmented Regret
title_zh: 使用 $α$-Core 进行在线子集选择，无增强遗憾
abstract: We revisit the classic problem of optimal subset selection in the online learning set-up. Assume that the set $[N]$ consists of $N$ distinct elements. On the $t$th round, an adversary chooses a monotone reward function $f_t: 2^{[N]} \to \mathbb{R}_+$ that assigns a non-negative reward to each subset of $[N].$ An online policy selects (perhaps randomly) a subset $S_t \subseteq [N]$ consisting of $k$ elements before the reward function $f_t$ for the $t$th round is revealed to the learner. As a consequence of its choice, the policy receives a reward of $f_t(S_t)$ on the $t$th round. Our goal is to design an online sequential subset selection policy to maximize the expected cumulative reward accumulated over a time horizon. In this connection, we propose an online learning policy called SCore (Subset Selection with Core) that solves the problem for a large class of reward functions. The proposed SCore policy is based on a new polyhedral characterization of the reward functions called $α$-Core - a generalization of Core from the cooperative game theory literature. We establish a learning guarantee for the SCore policy in terms of a new performance metric called $α$-augmented regret. In this new metric, the performance of the online policy is compared with an unrestricted offline benchmark that can select all $N$ elements at every round. We show that a large class of reward functions, including submodular, can be efficiently optimized with the SCore policy. We also extend the proposed policy to the optimistic learning set-up where the learner has access to additional untrusted hints regarding the reward functions. Finally, we conclude the paper with a list of open problems.
summary: We revisit the classic problem of optimal subset selection in the online learning set-up. Assume that the set $[N]$ consists of $N$ distinct elements. On the $t$th round, an adversary chooses a monotone reward function $f_t: 2^{[N]} \to \mathbb{R}_+$ that assigns a non-negative reward to each subset of $[N].$ An online policy selects (perhaps randomly) a subset $S_t \subseteq [N]$ consisting of $k$ elements before the reward function $f_t$ for the $t$th round is revealed to the learner. As a consequence of its choice, the policy receives a reward of $f_t(S_t)$ on the $t$th round. Our goal is to design an online sequential subset selection policy to maximize the expected cumulative reward accumulated over a time horizon. In this connection, we propose an online learning policy called SCore (Subset Selection with Core) that solves the problem for a large class of reward functions. The proposed SCore policy is based on a new polyhedral characterization of the reward functions called $α$-Core - a generalization of Core from the cooperative game theory literature. We establish a learning guarantee for the SCore policy in terms of a new performance metric called $α$-augmented regret. In this new metric, the performance of the online policy is compared with an unrestricted offline benchmark that can select all $N$ elements at every round. We show that a large class of reward functions, including submodular, can be efficiently optimized with the SCore policy. We also extend the proposed policy to the optimistic learning set-up where the learner has access to additional untrusted hints regarding the reward functions. Finally, we conclude the paper with a list of open problems.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视在线学习设置中最优子集选择的经典问题。假设集合 $[N]$ 由 $N$ 个不同元素组成。在第 $t$ 轮中，对手选择单调奖励函数 $f_t: 2^{[N]} \to \mathbb{R}_+$ ，为 $[N] 的每个子集分配非负奖励。$ 在向学习者揭示第 $t$ 轮的奖励函数 $f_t$ 之前，在线策略选择（可能随机）由 $k$ 个元素组成的子集 $S_t \subseteq [N]$。作为其选择的结果，该策略在第 $t$ 轮获得 $f_t(S_t)$ 奖励。我们的目标是设计一个在线顺序子集选择策略，以最大化在一段时间内累积的预期累积奖励。在这方面，我们提出了一种称为 SCore（带有核心的子集选择）的在线学习策略，它解决了一大类奖励函数的问题。拟议的 SCore 策略基于奖励函数的新多面体特征，称为 $α$-Core - 来自合作博弈论文献的 Core 的概括。我们根据称为 $α$ 增强遗憾的新绩效指标为 SCore 策略建立学习保证。在这个新指标中，在线策略的性能与无限制的离线基准进行比较，该基准可以在每一轮选择所有 $N$ 元素。我们证明了一大类奖励函数（包括子模块）可以通过 SCore 策略进行有效优化。我们还将提议的策略扩展到乐观学习设置，其中学习者可以获得有关奖励函数的其他不可信提示。最后，我们以一系列未解决的问题来结束本文。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线学习环境下最优子集选择问题，提出基于α-Core的SCore策略以最大化累积奖励。
AI.motivation: 现有在线子集选择方法在处理复杂奖励函数时存在遗憾度量不足的问题，需设计更通用的策略以适应多种奖励函数类。
AI.method: 提出SCore策略，通过合作博弈论中的α-Core多面体表征，结合α-增强遗憾度量，扩展至乐观学习场景并利用不可靠提示优化。
AI.result: 证明SCore策略对包括子模函数在内的广泛奖励函数类具有高效优化能力，并建立α-增强遗憾的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 提出α-Core框架解决了在线子集选择的通用性问题，但仍有多个开放性问题待进一步研究。

The proposed SCore policy is based on a new polyhedral characterization of the reward functions called $α$-Core - a generalization of Core from the cooperative game theory literature. We establish a learning guarantee for the SCore policy in terms of a new performance metric called $α$-augmented regret. In this new metric, the performance of the online policy is compared with an unrestricted offline benchmark that can select all $N$ elements at every round. We show that a large class of reward functions, including submodular, can be efficiently optimized with the SCore policy. We also extend the proposed policy to the optimistic learning set-up where the learner has access to additional untrusted hints regarding the reward functions. Finally, we conclude the paper with a list of open problems. 我们重新审视在线学习设置中最优子集选择的经典问题。假设集合 $[N]$ 由 $N$ 个不同元素组成。在第 $t$ 轮中，对手选择单调奖励函数 $f_t: 2^{[N]} \to \mathbb{R}_+$ ，为 $[N] 的每个子集分配非负奖励。$ 在向学习者揭示第 $t$ 轮的奖励函数 $f_t$ 之前，在线策略选择（可能随机）由 $k$ 个元素组成的子集 $S_t \subseteq [N]$。作为其选择的结果，该策略在第 $t$ 轮获得 $f_t(S_t)$ 奖励。我们的目标是设计一个在线顺序子集选择策略，以最大化在一段时间内累积的预期累积奖励。在这方面，我们提出了一种称为 SCore（带有核心的子集选择）的在线学习策略，它解决了一大类奖励函数的问题。拟议的 SCore 策略基于奖励函数的新多面体特征，称为 $α$-Core - 来自合作博弈论文献的 Core 的概括。我们根据称为 $α$ 增强遗憾的新绩效指标为 SCore 策略建立学习保证。在这个新指标中，在线策略的性能与无限制的离线基准进行比较，该基准可以在每一轮选择所有 $N$ 元素。我们证明了一大类奖励函数（包括子模块）可以通过 SCore 策略进行有效优化。我们还将提议的策略扩展到乐观学习设置，其中学习者可以获得有关奖励函数的其他不可信提示。最后，我们以一系列未解决的问题来结束本文。 本文研究在线学习环境下最优子集选择问题，提出基于α-Core的SCore策略以最大化累积奖励。 Sourav Sahoo,Siddhant Chaudhary,Samrat Mukhopadhyay,Abhishek Sinha cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Alberto Silvio Chiappa,Alessandro Marin Vargas,Alexander Mathis
title: DMAP: a Distributed Morphological Attention Policy for Learning to Locomote with a Changing Body
title_zh: DMAP：一种分布式形态注意力策略，用于学习随着身体变化而运动
comment: mber:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 35, 37214-37227
comments: mber:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 35, 37214-37227
abstract: Biological and artificial agents need to deal with constant changes in the real world. We study this problem in four classical continuous control environments, augmented with morphological perturbations. Learning to locomote when the length and the thickness of different body parts vary is challenging, as the control policy is required to adapt to the morphology to successfully balance and advance the agent. We show that a control policy based on the proprioceptive state performs poorly with highly variable body configurations, while an (oracle) agent with access to a learned encoding of the perturbation performs significantly better. We introduce DMAP, a biologically-inspired, attention-based policy network architecture. DMAP combines independent proprioceptive processing, a distributed policy with individual controllers for each joint, and an attention mechanism, to dynamically gate sensory information from different body parts to different controllers. Despite not having access to the (hidden) morphology information, DMAP can be trained end-to-end in all the considered environments, overall matching or surpassing the performance of an oracle agent. Thus DMAP, implementing principles from biological motor control, provides a strong inductive bias for learning challenging sensorimotor tasks. Overall, our work corroborates the power of these principles in challenging locomotion tasks.
summary: Biological and artificial agents need to deal with constant changes in the real world. We study this problem in four classical continuous control environments, augmented with morphological perturbations. Learning to locomote when the length and the thickness of different body parts vary is challenging, as the control policy is required to adapt to the morphology to successfully balance and advance the agent. We show that a control policy based on the proprioceptive state performs poorly with highly variable body configurations, while an (oracle) agent with access to a learned encoding of the perturbation performs significantly better. We introduce DMAP, a biologically-inspired, attention-based policy network architecture. DMAP combines independent proprioceptive processing, a distributed policy with individual controllers for each joint, and an attention mechanism, to dynamically gate sensory information from different body parts to different controllers. Despite not having access to the (hidden) morphology information, DMAP can be trained end-to-end in all the considered environments, overall matching or surpassing the performance of an oracle agent. Thus DMAP, implementing principles from biological motor control, provides a strong inductive bias for learning challenging sensorimotor tasks. Overall, our work corroborates the power of these principles in challenging locomotion tasks.
abstract_zh: 生物和人工智能体需要应对现实世界的不断变化。我们在四种经典的连续控制环境中研究这个问题，并通过形态扰动进行增强。当不同身体部位的长度和厚度变化时学习运动是具有挑战性的，因为需要控制策略来适应形态以成功地平衡和推进智能体。我们表明，基于本体感受状态的控制策略在高度可变的身体配置中表现不佳，而能够访问学习的扰动编码的（预言机）代理则表现明显更好。我们介绍 DMAP，一种受生物学启发、基于注意力的策略网络架构。 DMAP 结合了独立的本体感受处理、每个关节具有单独控制器的分布式策略以及注意力机制，以动态地将来自不同身体部位的感觉信息传送到不同的控制器。尽管无法访问（隐藏的）形态信息，但 DMAP 可以在所有考虑的环境中进行端到端训练，整体匹配或超越预言机代理的性能。因此，DMAP 实施了生物运动控制原理，为学习具有挑战性的感觉运动任务提供了强大的归纳偏差。总的来说，我们的工作证实了这些原则在挑战性运动任务中的力量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DMAP的分布式形态注意策略，用于在身体形态变化的情况下学习移动控制。
AI.motivation: 生物和人工智能体需应对现实世界中不断变化的形态，传统基于本体感觉状态的控制策略在高度可变的身体配置下表现不佳，需开发能自适应形态变化的策略。
AI.method: DMAP结合独立本体感觉处理、分布式关节控制器和注意力机制，通过动态分配不同身体部位的感知信息到对应控制器，实现无需显式形态信息的端到端训练。
AI.result: DMAP在四个经典连续控制环境中表现优于传统策略，且在无形态信息情况下整体性能匹配或超越了拥有形态编码的Oracle代理。
AI.conclusion: DMAP验证了生物运动控制原理在复杂移动任务中的有效性，为形态可变场景下的传感器运动学习提供了强归纳偏置。

authors_text: Xin Yu,Yucheng Tang,Qi Yang,Ho Hin Lee,Riqiang Gao,Shunxing Bao,Ann Zenobia Moore,Luigi Ferrucci,Bennett A. Landman
title: Longitudinal Variability Analysis on Low-dose Abdominal CT with Deep Learning-based Segmentation
title_zh: 基于深度学习的分割的低剂量腹部 CT 纵向变异性分析
abstract: Metabolic health is increasingly implicated as a risk factor across conditions from cardiology to neurology, and efficiency assessment of body composition is critical to quantitatively characterizing these relationships. 2D low dose single slice computed tomography (CT) provides a high resolution, quantitative tissue map, albeit with a limited field of view. Although numerous potential analyses have been proposed in quantifying image context, there has been no comprehensive study for low-dose single slice CT longitudinal variability with automated segmentation. We studied a total of 1816 slices from 1469 subjects of Baltimore Longitudinal Study on Aging (BLSA) abdominal dataset using supervised deep learning-based segmentation and unsupervised clustering method. 300 out of 1469 subjects that have two year gap in their first two scans were pick out to evaluate longitudinal variability with measurements including intraclass correlation coefficient (ICC) and coefficient of variation (CV) in terms of tissues/organs size and mean intensity. We showed that our segmentation methods are stable in longitudinal settings with Dice ranged from 0.821 to 0.962 for thirteen target abdominal tissues structures. We observed high variability in most organ with ICC<0.5, low variability in the area of muscle, abdominal wall, fat and body mask with average ICC>0.8. We found that the variability in organ is highly related to the cross-sectional position of the 2D slice. Our efforts pave quantitative exploration and quality control to reduce uncertainties in longitudinal analysis.
summary: Metabolic health is increasingly implicated as a risk factor across conditions from cardiology to neurology, and efficiency assessment of body composition is critical to quantitatively characterizing these relationships. 2D low dose single slice computed tomography (CT) provides a high resolution, quantitative tissue map, albeit with a limited field of view. Although numerous potential analyses have been proposed in quantifying image context, there has been no comprehensive study for low-dose single slice CT longitudinal variability with automated segmentation. We studied a total of 1816 slices from 1469 subjects of Baltimore Longitudinal Study on Aging (BLSA) abdominal dataset using supervised deep learning-based segmentation and unsupervised clustering method. 300 out of 1469 subjects that have two year gap in their first two scans were pick out to evaluate longitudinal variability with measurements including intraclass correlation coefficient (ICC) and coefficient of variation (CV) in terms of tissues/organs size and mean intensity. We showed that our segmentation methods are stable in longitudinal settings with Dice ranged from 0.821 to 0.962 for thirteen target abdominal tissues structures. We observed high variability in most organ with ICC<0.5, low variability in the area of muscle, abdominal wall, fat and body mask with average ICC>0.8. We found that the variability in organ is highly related to the cross-sectional position of the 2D slice. Our efforts pave quantitative exploration and quality control to reduce uncertainties in longitudinal analysis.
abstract_zh: 代谢健康越来越成为从心脏病学到神经病学等多种疾病的危险因素，而身体成分的效率评估对于定量描述这些关系至关重要。二维低剂量单层计算机断层扫描 (CT) 提供高分辨率、定量组织图，尽管视野有限。尽管在量化图像背景方面已经提出了许多潜在的分析，但尚未对具有自动分割的低剂量单层 CT 纵向变异性进行全面的研究。我们使用基于监督深度学习的分割和无监督聚类方法，研究了巴尔的摩纵向衰老研究 (BLSA) 腹部数据集的 1469 名受试者的总共 1816 个切片。从 1469 名受试者中挑选出 300 名在前两次扫描中有两年差距的受试者来评估纵向变异性，测量值包括组内相关系数 (ICC) 和组织/器官大小和平均强度方面的变异系数 (CV)。我们表明，我们的分割方法在纵向设置中是稳定的，对于 13 个目标腹部组织结构，Dice 范围为 0.821 到 0.962。我们观察到大多数器官的变异性较高，ICC<0.5，肌肉、腹壁、脂肪和身体面罩区域的变异性较低，平均 ICC>0.8。我们发现器官的变异性与二维切片的横截面位置高度相关。我们的努力为定量探索和质量控制奠定了基础，以减少纵向分析的不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文利用深度学习分割方法分析低剂量腹部CT的纵向变异性，评估不同组织器官的测量稳定性。
AI.motivation: 代谢健康作为多种疾病的风险因素，需通过身体成分定量分析进行表征，但低剂量单层CT的纵向变异性缺乏自动化分割研究。
AI.method: 基于BLSA数据集的1816张切片，采用监督深度学习分割与无监督聚类方法，选取间隔两年的300名受试者，计算ICC和CV评估纵向变异性。
AI.result: 分割方法在13种腹部组织中表现稳定（Dice 0.821-0.962），多数器官ICC<0.5，肌肉、脂肪等区域ICC>0.8，变异性与切片位置相关。
AI.conclusion: 研究为纵向分析提供了量化评估框架，有助于减少低剂量CT测量的不确定性。

Our efforts pave quantitative exploration and quality control to reduce uncertainties in longitudinal analysis. 代谢健康越来越成为从心脏病学到神经病学等多种疾病的危险因素，而身体成分的效率评估对于定量描述这些关系至关重要。二维低剂量单层计算机断层扫描 (CT) 提供高分辨率、定量组织图，尽管视野有限。尽管在量化图像背景方面已经提出了许多潜在的分析，但尚未对具有自动分割的低剂量单层 CT 纵向变异性进行全面的研究。我们使用基于监督深度学习的分割和无监督聚类方法，研究了巴尔的摩纵向衰老研究 (BLSA) 腹部数据集的 1469 名受试者的总共 1816 个切片。从 1469 名受试者中挑选出 300 名在前两次扫描中有两年差距的受试者来评估纵向变异性，测量值包括组内相关系数 (ICC) 和组织/器官大小和平均强度方面的变异系数 (CV)。我们表明，我们的分割方法在纵向设置中是稳定的，对于 13 个目标腹部组织结构，Dice 范围为 0.821 到 0.962。我们观察到大多数器官的变异性较高，ICC<0.5，肌肉、腹壁、脂肪和身体面罩区域的变异性较低，平均 ICC>0.8。我们发现器官的变异性与二维切片的横截面位置高度相关。我们的努力为定量探索和质量控制奠定了基础，以减少纵向分析的不确定性。 本文利用深度学习分割方法分析低剂量腹部CT的纵向变异性，评估不同组织器官的测量稳定性。 Xin Yu,Yucheng Tang,Qi Yang,Ho Hin Lee,Riqiang Gao,Shunxing Bao,Ann Zenobia Moore,Luigi Ferrucci,Bennett A. Landman cs.CV

authors_text: Emily Chan,Ciaran O'Hanlon,Carlota Asegurado Marquez,Marwenie Petalcorin,Jorge Mariscal-Harana,Haotian Gu,Raymond J. Kim,Robert M. Judd,Phil Chowienczyk,Julia A. Schnabel,Reza Razavi,Andrew P. King,Bram Ruijsink,Esther Puyol-Antón
title: Automated Quality Controlled Analysis of 2D Phase Contrast Cardiovascular Magnetic Resonance Imaging
title_zh: 二维相衬心血管磁共振成像的自动质量控制分析
abstract: Flow analysis carried out using phase contrast cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (PC-CMR) enables the quantification of important parameters that are used in the assessment of cardiovascular function. An essential part of this analysis is the identification of the correct CMR views and quality control (QC) to detect artefacts that could affect the flow quantification. We propose a novel deep learning based framework for the fully-automated analysis of flow from full CMR scans that first carries out these view selection and QC steps using two sequential convolutional neural networks, followed by automatic aorta and pulmonary artery segmentation to enable the quantification of key flow parameters. Accuracy values of 0.958 and 0.914 were obtained for view classification and QC, respectively. For segmentation, Dice scores were $>$0.969 and the Bland-Altman plots indicated excellent agreement between manual and automatic peak flow values. In addition, we tested our pipeline on an external validation data set, with results indicating good robustness of the pipeline. This work was carried out using multivendor clinical data consisting of 986 cases, indicating the potential for the use of this pipeline in a clinical setting.
summary: Flow analysis carried out using phase contrast cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (PC-CMR) enables the quantification of important parameters that are used in the assessment of cardiovascular function. An essential part of this analysis is the identification of the correct CMR views and quality control (QC) to detect artefacts that could affect the flow quantification. We propose a novel deep learning based framework for the fully-automated analysis of flow from full CMR scans that first carries out these view selection and QC steps using two sequential convolutional neural networks, followed by automatic aorta and pulmonary artery segmentation to enable the quantification of key flow parameters. Accuracy values of 0.958 and 0.914 were obtained for view classification and QC, respectively. For segmentation, Dice scores were $>$0.969 and the Bland-Altman plots indicated excellent agreement between manual and automatic peak flow values. In addition, we tested our pipeline on an external validation data set, with results indicating good robustness of the pipeline. This work was carried out using multivendor clinical data consisting of 986 cases, indicating the potential for the use of this pipeline in a clinical setting.
abstract_zh: 使用相差心脏磁共振成像 (PC-CMR) 进行的血流分析可以量化用于评估心血管功能的重要参数。该分析的一个重要部分是识别正确的 CMR 视图和质量控制 (QC)，以检测可能影响流量量化的伪影。我们提出了一种基于深度学习的新颖框架，用于对完整 CMR 扫描的血流进行全自动分析，该框架首先使用两个顺序卷积神经网络执行这些视图选择和 QC 步骤，然后进行自动主动脉和肺动脉分割，以实现关键血流参数的量化。视图分类和 QC 的准确度值分别为 0.958 和 0.914。对于分割，Dice 得分为 $>$0.969，Bland-Altman 图表明手动和自动峰值流量值之间具有良好的一致性。此外，我们还在外部验证数据集上测试了我们的管道，结果表明管道具有良好的稳健性。这项工作是使用包含 986 个病例的多供应商临床数据进行的，表明该管道在临床环境中使用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的全自动框架，用于分析二维相位对比心血管磁共振成像（PC-CMR），包括视图选择、质量控制及主动脉和肺动脉分割。
AI.motivation: 传统PC-CMR分析依赖人工操作，耗时且易受人为误差影响，需自动化工具提高效率和准确性以支持临床应用。
AI.method: 采用两个顺序卷积神经网络（CNN）进行视图分类和质量控制，随后通过分割网络实现主动脉与肺动脉的自动分割，并利用Dice分数和Bland-Altman图评估性能。
AI.result: 视图分类准确率达0.958，质量控制准确率为0.914，分割Dice分数高于0.969，与手动测量的峰值流量具有高度一致性，且在外部数据集上表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在多厂商临床数据中验证有效，具备临床部署潜力，可提升心血管功能评估的自动化水平和诊断可靠性。

authors_text: Haoran Li,Chun-Mei Feng,Tao Zhou,Yong Xu,Xiaojun Chang
title: Prompt-driven efficient Open-set Semi-supervised Learning
title_zh: 即时驱动的高效开放集半监督学习
abstract: Open-set semi-supervised learning (OSSL) has attracted growing interest, which investigates a more practical scenario where out-of-distribution (OOD) samples are only contained in unlabeled data. Existing OSSL methods like OpenMatch learn an OOD detector to identify outliers, which often update all modal parameters (i.e., full fine-tuning) to propagate class information from labeled data to unlabeled ones. Currently, prompt learning has been developed to bridge gaps between pre-training and fine-tuning, which shows higher computational efficiency in several downstream tasks. In this paper, we propose a prompt-driven efficient OSSL framework, called OpenPrompt, which can propagate class information from labeled to unlabeled data with only a small number of trainable parameters. We propose a prompt-driven joint space learning mechanism to detect OOD data by maximizing the distribution gap between ID and OOD samples in unlabeled data, thereby our method enables the outliers to be detected in a new way. The experimental results on three public datasets show that OpenPrompt outperforms state-of-the-art methods with less than 1% of trainable parameters. More importantly, OpenPrompt achieves a 4% improvement in terms of AUROC on outlier detection over a fully supervised model on CIFAR10.
summary: Open-set semi-supervised learning (OSSL) has attracted growing interest, which investigates a more practical scenario where out-of-distribution (OOD) samples are only contained in unlabeled data. Existing OSSL methods like OpenMatch learn an OOD detector to identify outliers, which often update all modal parameters (i.e., full fine-tuning) to propagate class information from labeled data to unlabeled ones. Currently, prompt learning has been developed to bridge gaps between pre-training and fine-tuning, which shows higher computational efficiency in several downstream tasks. In this paper, we propose a prompt-driven efficient OSSL framework, called OpenPrompt, which can propagate class information from labeled to unlabeled data with only a small number of trainable parameters. We propose a prompt-driven joint space learning mechanism to detect OOD data by maximizing the distribution gap between ID and OOD samples in unlabeled data, thereby our method enables the outliers to be detected in a new way. The experimental results on three public datasets show that OpenPrompt outperforms state-of-the-art methods with less than 1% of trainable parameters. More importantly, OpenPrompt achieves a 4% improvement in terms of AUROC on outlier detection over a fully supervised model on CIFAR10.
abstract_zh: 开放集半监督学习（OSSL）引起了越来越多的兴趣，它研究了一种更实际的场景，其中分布外（OOD）样本仅包含在未标记的数据中。现有的 OSSL 方法（例如 OpenMatch）学习 OOD 检测器来识别异常值，这通常会更新所有模态参数（即完全微调）以将类信息从标记数据传播到未标记数据。目前，即时学习已经被开发出来，以弥补预训练和微调之间的差距，这在一些下游任务中显示出更高的计算效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种提示驱动的高效 OSSL 框架，称为 OpenPrompt，它可以仅使用少量可训练参数将类信息从标记数据传播到未标记数据。我们提出了一种提示驱动的联合空间学习机制，通过最大化未标记数据中 ID 和 OOD 样本之间的分布差距来检测 OOD 数据，从而我们的方法能够以新的方式检测异常值。在三个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，OpenPrompt 的可训练参数少于 1%，优于最先进的方法。更重要的是，与 CIFAR10 上的完全监督模型相比，OpenPrompt 在异常值检测方面的 AUROC 提高了 4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于提示学习的高效开放集半监督学习框架OpenPrompt，通过少量可训练参数实现类别信息传播与异常检测。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集半监督学习方法需全量微调参数导致计算成本高，而提示学习在下游任务中展现更高效率，需探索其在OSSL中的应用。
AI.method: 设计OpenPrompt框架，采用提示驱动的联合空间学习机制，通过最大化未标记数据中ID与OOD样本的分布差异实现异常检测。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上，OpenPrompt以不足1%可训练参数超越现有方法，在CIFAR10上AUROC较全监督模型提升4%。
AI.conclusion: OpenPrompt通过提示学习显著降低参数量并提升异常检测性能，为高效OSSL提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jianhui Liu,Yukang Chen,Xiaoqing Ye,Zhuotao Tian,Xiao Tan,Xiaojuan Qi
title: Spatial Pruned Sparse Convolution for Efficient 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 用于高效 3D 物体检测的空间剪枝稀疏卷积
abstract: 3D scenes are dominated by a large number of background points, which is redundant for the detection task that mainly needs to focus on foreground objects. In this paper, we analyze major components of existing sparse 3D CNNs and find that 3D CNNs ignore the redundancy of data and further amplify it in the down-sampling process, which brings a huge amount of extra and unnecessary computational overhead. Inspired by this, we propose a new convolution operator named spatial pruned sparse convolution (SPS-Conv), which includes two variants, spatial pruned submanifold sparse convolution (SPSS-Conv) and spatial pruned regular sparse convolution (SPRS-Conv), both of which are based on the idea of dynamically determining crucial areas for redundancy reduction. We validate that the magnitude can serve as important cues to determine crucial areas which get rid of the extra computations of learning-based methods. The proposed modules can easily be incorporated into existing sparse 3D CNNs without extra architectural modifications. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, Waymo and nuScenes datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve more than 50% reduction in GFLOPs without compromising the performance.
summary: 3D scenes are dominated by a large number of background points, which is redundant for the detection task that mainly needs to focus on foreground objects. In this paper, we analyze major components of existing sparse 3D CNNs and find that 3D CNNs ignore the redundancy of data and further amplify it in the down-sampling process, which brings a huge amount of extra and unnecessary computational overhead. Inspired by this, we propose a new convolution operator named spatial pruned sparse convolution (SPS-Conv), which includes two variants, spatial pruned submanifold sparse convolution (SPSS-Conv) and spatial pruned regular sparse convolution (SPRS-Conv), both of which are based on the idea of dynamically determining crucial areas for redundancy reduction. We validate that the magnitude can serve as important cues to determine crucial areas which get rid of the extra computations of learning-based methods. The proposed modules can easily be incorporated into existing sparse 3D CNNs without extra architectural modifications. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, Waymo and nuScenes datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve more than 50% reduction in GFLOPs without compromising the performance.
abstract_zh: 3D场景以大量背景点为主，这对于主要需要关注前景物体的检测任务来说是多余的。在本文中，我们分析了现有稀疏 3D CNN 的主要组成部分，发现 3D CNN 忽略了数据的冗余，并在下采样过程中进一步放大数据，这带来了大量额外和不必要的计算开销。受此启发，我们提出了一种新的卷积算子，称为空间剪枝稀疏卷积（SPS-Conv），它包括两个变体，空间剪枝子流形稀疏卷积（SPSS-Conv）和空间剪枝规则稀疏卷积（SPRS-Conv），两者都基于动态确定关键区域以减少冗余的思想。我们验证了大小可以作为确定关键领域的重要线索，从而摆脱基于学习的方法的额外计算。所提出的模块可以轻松地合并到现有的稀疏 3D CNN 中，无需额外的架构修改。在 KITTI、Waymo 和 nuScenes 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以在不影响性能的情况下实现 GFLOP 降低 50% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的空间剪枝稀疏卷积（SPS-Conv）方法，用于提高3D目标检测的效率。
AI.motivation: 3D场景中存在大量冗余的背景点，现有的稀疏3D CNN在下采样过程中会放大这种冗余，造成不必要的计算开销。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为空间剪枝稀疏卷积（SPS-Conv）的新卷积操作，包括两种变体：空间剪枝子流形稀疏卷积（SPSS-Conv）和空间剪枝常规稀疏卷积（SPRS-Conv），通过动态确定关键区域来减少冗余计算。
AI.result: 在KITTI、Waymo和nuScenes数据集上的实验表明，该方法在不牺牲性能的情况下，将GFLOPs减少了超过50%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可以轻松集成到现有的稀疏3D CNN中，有效提高了3D目标检测的计算效率。

We validate that the magnitude can serve as important cues to determine crucial areas which get rid of the extra computations of learning-based methods. The proposed modules can easily be incorporated into existing sparse 3D CNNs without extra architectural modifications. authors_text: Jana Holznigenkemper,Christian Komusiewicz,Bernhard Seeger
title: On Computing Exact Means of Time Series Using the Move-Split-Merge Metric
title_zh: 关于使用移动-分割-合并度量计算时间序列的精确均值
abstract: Computing an accurate mean of a set of time series is a critical task in applications like nearest-neighbor classification and clustering of time series. While there are many distance functions for time series, the most popular distance function used for the computation of time series means is the non-metric dynamic time warping (DTW) distance. A recent algorithm for the exact computation of a DTW-Mean has a running time of $\mathcal{O}(n^{2k+1}2^kk)$, where $k$ denotes the number of time series and $n$ their maximum length. In this paper, we study the mean problem for the move-split-merge (MSM) metric that not only offers high practical accuracy for time series classification but also carries of the advantages of the metric properties that enable further diverse applications. The main contribution of this paper is an exact and efficient algorithm for the MSM-Mean problem of time series. The running time of our algorithm is $\mathcal{O}(n^{k+3}2^k k^3 )$, and thus better than the previous DTW-based algorithm. The results of an experimental comparison confirm the running time superiority of our algorithm in comparison to the DTW-Mean competitor. Moreover, we introduce a heuristic to improve the running time significantly without sacrificing much accuracy.
summary: Computing an accurate mean of a set of time series is a critical task in applications like nearest-neighbor classification and clustering of time series. While there are many distance functions for time series, the most popular distance function used for the computation of time series means is the non-metric dynamic time warping (DTW) distance. A recent algorithm for the exact computation of a DTW-Mean has a running time of $\mathcal{O}(n^{2k+1}2^kk)$, where $k$ denotes the number of time series and $n$ their maximum length. In this paper, we study the mean problem for the move-split-merge (MSM) metric that not only offers high practical accuracy for time series classification but also carries of the advantages of the metric properties that enable further diverse applications. The main contribution of this paper is an exact and efficient algorithm for the MSM-Mean problem of time series. The running time of our algorithm is $\mathcal{O}(n^{k+3}2^k k^3 )$, and thus better than the previous DTW-based algorithm. The results of an experimental comparison confirm the running time superiority of our algorithm in comparison to the DTW-Mean competitor. Moreover, we introduce a heuristic to improve the running time significantly without sacrificing much accuracy.
abstract_zh: 计算一组时间序列的准确平均值是最近邻分类和时间序列聚类等应用中的一项关键任务。虽然时间序列有许多距离函数，但用于计算时间序列均值的最流行的距离函数是非度量动态时间规整 (DTW) 距离。最近用于精确计算 DTW-Mean 的算法的运行时间为 $\mathcal{O}(n^{2k+1}2^kk)$，其中 $k$ 表示时间序列的数量，$n$ 表示时间序列的最大长度。在本文中，我们研究了移动-分割-合并（MSM）度量的均值问题，该度量不仅为时间序列分类提供了较高的实用精度，而且还具有度量属性的优点，可实现进一步多样化的应用。本文的主要贡献是针对时间序列的 MSM-Mean 问题提出了一种精确且高效的算法。我们算法的运行时间为$\mathcal{O}(n^{k+3}2^k k^3 )$，因此比之前基于DTW的算法更好。实验比较的结果证实了我们的算法与 DTW-Mean 竞争对手相比的运行时间优势。此外，我们引入了一种启发式方法，可以在不牺牲太多准确性的情况下显着缩短运行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Move-Split-Merge（MSM）度量的精确时间序列均值计算算法，改进了传统DTW方法的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 动态时间规整（DTW）虽广泛用于时间序列均值计算，但其时间复杂度较高。MSM度量兼具高分类精度和度量性质优势，但缺乏高效的均值计算方法。
AI.method: 设计了一种精确计算MSM均值的算法，时间复杂度为O(n^{k+3}2^k k^3)，并引入启发式方法进一步提升效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，新算法在运行时间上优于DTW均值算法，且启发式方法在保持精度的同时显著降低计算耗时。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的MSM均值算法在保证精度的前提下实现了更优的时间复杂度，为时间序列分析提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Eleonora Ceccaldi,Nale Lehmann-Willenbrock,Erica Volta,Mohamed Chetouani,Gualtiero Volpe,Giovanna Varni
title: How unitizing affects annotation of cohesion
title_zh: 统一化如何影响内聚性注释
abstract: This paper investigates how unitizing affects external observers' annotation of group cohesion. We compared unitizing techniques belonging to these categories: interval coding, continuous coding, and a technique inspired by a cognitive theory on event perception. We applied such techniques for sampling coding units from a set of recordings of social interactions rich in behaviors related to cohesion. Then, we compared the cohesion scores the observers assigned to each coding unit. Results show that the three techniques can lead to suitable ratings and that the technique inspired to cognitive theories leads to scores reflecting variability in cohesion better than the other ones.
summary: This paper investigates how unitizing affects external observers' annotation of group cohesion. We compared unitizing techniques belonging to these categories: interval coding, continuous coding, and a technique inspired by a cognitive theory on event perception. We applied such techniques for sampling coding units from a set of recordings of social interactions rich in behaviors related to cohesion. Then, we compared the cohesion scores the observers assigned to each coding unit. Results show that the three techniques can lead to suitable ratings and that the technique inspired to cognitive theories leads to scores reflecting variability in cohesion better than the other ones.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了统一化如何影响外部观察者对群体凝聚力的诠释。我们比较了属于以下类别的统一技术：间隔编码、连续编码以及受事件感知认知理论启发的技术。我们应用这种技术从一组富含与凝聚力相关的行为的社交互动记录中采样编码单元。然后，我们比较了观察者分配给每个编码单元的内聚分数。结果表明，这三种技术可以产生合适的评分，并且受认知理论启发的技术可以比其他技术更好地反映凝聚力的变化。

AI.tldr: 研究不同单元化技术对群体凝聚力标注的影响
AI.motivation: 现有方法在标注群体凝聚力时可能存在不足，需比较不同单元化技术的效果
AI.method: 比较三种单元化技术（区间编码、连续编码、认知理论启发技术）在社交互动录音中的编码单元抽样，并对比观察者的凝聚力评分
AI.result: 三种技术均能产生合理评分，但认知理论启发技术更准确反映凝聚力变化
AI.conclusion: 基于认知理论的单元化技术能更有效捕捉凝聚力变化，可能提升分析准确性

tldr: 研究不同单元化技术对群体凝聚力标注的影响
motivation: 现有方法在标注群体凝聚力时可能存在不足，需比较不同单元化技术的效果
method: 比较三种单元化技术（区间编码、连续编码、认知理论启发技术）在社交互动录音中的编码单元抽样，并对比观察者的凝聚力评分
result: 三种技术均能产生合理评分，但认知理论启发技术更准确反映凝聚力变化

search_text: How unitizing affects annotation of cohesion 统一化如何影响内聚性注释 This paper investigates how unitizing affects external observers' annotation of group cohesion. We compared unitizing techniques belonging to these categories: interval coding, continuous coding, and a technique inspired by a cognitive theory on event perception. We applied such techniques for sampling coding units from a set of recordings of social interactions rich in behaviors related to cohesion. Then, we compared the cohesion scores the observers assigned to each coding unit. Results show that the three techniques can lead to suitable ratings and that the technique inspired to cognitive theories leads to scores reflecting variability in cohesion better than the other ones. 本文研究了统一化如何影响外部观察者对群体凝聚力的诠释。我们比较了属于以下类别的统一技术：间隔编码、连续编码以及受事件感知认知理论启发的技术。我们应用这种技术从一组富含与凝聚力相关的行为的社交互动记录中采样编码单元。然后，我们比较了观察者分配给每个编码单元的内聚分数。结果表明，这三种技术可以产生合适的评分，并且受认知理论启发的技术可以比其他技术更好地反映凝聚力的变化。 研究不同单元化技术对群体凝聚力标注的影响 Eleonora Ceccaldi,Nale Lehmann-Willenbrock,Erica Volta,Mohamed Chetouani,Gualtiero Volpe,Giovanna Varni cs.HC

authors_text: Andrea Lacava,Michele Polese,Rajarajan Sivaraj,Rahul Soundrarajan,Bhawani Shanker Bhati,Tarunjeet Singh,Tommaso Zugno,Francesca Cuomo,Tommaso Melodia
title: Programmable and Customized Intelligence for Traffic Steering in 5G Networks Using Open RAN Architectures
title_zh: 使用开放 RAN 架构在 5G 网络中实现流量引导的可编程和定制智能
abstract: 5G and beyond mobile networks will support heterogeneous use cases at an unprecedented scale, thus demanding automated control and optimization of network functionalities customized to the needs of individual users. Such fine-grained control of the Radio Access Network (RAN) is not possible with the current cellular architecture. To fill this gap, the Open RAN paradigm and its specification introduce an open architecture with abstractions that enable closed-loop control and provide data-driven, and intelligent optimization of the RAN at the user level. This is obtained through custom RAN control applications (i.e., xApps) deployed on near-real-time RAN Intelligent Controller (near-RT RIC) at the edge of the network. Despite these premises, as of today the research community lacks a sandbox to build data-driven xApps, and create large-scale datasets for effective AI training. In this paper, we address this by introducing ns-O-RAN, a software framework that integrates a real-world, production-grade near-RT RIC with a 3GPP-based simulated environment on ns-3, enabling the development of xApps and automated large-scale data collection and testing of Deep Reinforcement Learning-driven control policies for the optimization at the user-level. In addition, we propose the first user-specific O-RAN Traffic Steering (TS) intelligent handover framework. It uses Random Ensemble Mixture, combined with a state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Network architecture, to optimally assign a serving base station to each user in the network. Our TS xApp, trained with more than 40 million data points collected by ns-O-RAN, runs on the near-RT RIC and controls its base stations. We evaluate the performance on a large-scale deployment, showing that the xApp-based handover improves throughput and spectral efficiency by an average of 50% over traditional handover heuristics, with less mobility overhead.

Such fine-grained control of the Radio Access Network (RAN) is not possible with the current cellular architecture. This is obtained through custom RAN control applications (i.e., xApps) deployed on near-real-time RAN Intelligent Controller (near-RT RIC) at the edge of the network. Despite these premises, as of today the research community lacks a sandbox to build data-driven xApps, and create large-scale datasets for effective AI training. In this paper, we address this by introducing ns-O-RAN, a software framework that integrates a real-world, production-grade near-RT RIC with a 3GPP-based simulated environment on ns-3, enabling the development of xApps and automated large-scale data collection and testing of Deep Reinforcement Learning-driven control policies for the optimization at the user-level. In addition, we propose the first user-specific O-RAN Traffic Steering (TS) intelligent handover framework. It uses Random Ensemble Mixture, combined with a state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Network architecture, to optimally assign a serving base station to each user in the network. Our TS xApp, trained with more than 40 million data points collected by ns-O-RAN, runs on the near-RT RIC and controls its base stations. We evaluate the performance on a large-scale deployment, showing that the xApp-based handover improves throughput and spectral efficiency by an average of 50% over traditional handover heuristics, with less mobility overhead.
abstract_zh: 5G 及更高版本的移动网络将以前所未有的规模支持异构用例，因此需要根据个人用户的需求定制网络功能的自动化控制和优化。当前的蜂窝架构不可能对无线接入网络（RAN）进行如此细粒度的控制。为了填补这一空白，Open RAN 范式及其规范引入了一种具有抽象的开放架构，可实现闭环控制并在用户级别提供数据驱动的 RAN 智能优化。这是通过部署在网络边缘的近实时 RAN 智能控制器（近 RT RIC）上的自定义 RAN 控制应用程序（即 xApp）获得的。尽管有这些前提，但截至目前，研究社区仍缺乏沙箱来构建数据驱动的 xApp，并为有效的人工智能训练创建大规模数据集。在本文中，我们通过引入 ns-O-RAN 来解决这个问题，这是一个软件框架，它将现实世界的生产级近 RT RIC 与 ns-3 上基于 3GPP 的模拟环境集成在一起，支持 xApp 的开发以及深度强化学习驱动的控制策略的自动化大规模数据收集和测试，以在用户级别进行优化。此外，我们提出了第一个用户特定的 O-RAN 流量引导 (TS) 智能切换框架。它使用随机集成混合，结合最先进的卷积神经网络架构，为网络中的每个用户最佳地分配服务基站。我们的 TS xApp 经过 ns-O-RAN 收集的超过 4000 万个数据点的训练，在近 RT RIC 上运行并控制其基站。我们评估了大规模部署的性能，结果表明，基于 xApp 的切换比传统的切换启发式方法平均提高了 50% 的吞吐量和频谱效率，并且移动性开销更少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于开放RAN架构的可编程智能交通调度框架，通过深度强化学习优化5G网络中的用户级资源分配。
AI.motivation: 现有蜂窝网络架构无法实现针对单个用户的精细化RAN控制，缺乏支持数据驱动智能优化的开发环境和大规模训练数据集。
AI.method: 开发ns-O-RAN软件框架整合生产级near-RT RIC与ns-3仿真环境，结合随机集成混合模型与卷积神经网络构建用户特定的交通调度xApp。
AI.result: 在大规模部署测试中，基于xApp的切换策略使吞吐量和频谱效率平均提升50%，同时降低移动性开销。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了开放RAN架构下AI驱动的用户级网络优化有效性，为未来6G网络智能化提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Such fine-grained control of the Radio Access Network (RAN) is not possible with the current cellular architecture. To fill this gap, the Open RAN paradigm and its specification introduce an open architecture with abstractions that enable closed-loop control and provide data-driven, and intelligent optimization of the RAN at the user level. Despite these premises, as of today the research community lacks a sandbox to build data-driven xApps, and create large-scale datasets for effective AI training. In this paper, we address this by introducing ns-O-RAN, a software framework that integrates a real-world, production-grade near-RT RIC with a 3GPP-based simulated environment on ns-3, enabling the development of xApps and automated large-scale data collection and testing of Deep Reinforcement Learning-driven control policies for the optimization at the user-level. authors_text: Ziyu Guo,Renrui Zhang,Longtian Qiu,Xianzheng Ma,Xupeng Miao,Xuming He,Bin Cui
title: CALIP: Zero-Shot Enhancement of CLIP with Parameter-free Attention
title_zh: CALIP：无参数注意力的 CLIP 零样本增强
abstract: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has been shown to learn visual representations with great transferability, which achieves promising accuracy for zero-shot classification. To further improve its downstream performance, existing works propose additional learnable modules upon CLIP and fine-tune them by few-shot training sets. However, the resulting extra training cost and data requirement severely hinder the efficiency for model deployment and knowledge transfer. In this paper, we introduce a free-lunch enhancement method, CALIP, to boost CLIP's zero-shot performance via a parameter-free Attention module. Specifically, we guide visual and textual representations to interact with each other and explore cross-modal informative features via attention. As the pre-training has largely reduced the embedding distances between two modalities, we discard all learnable parameters in the attention and bidirectionally update the multi-modal features, enabling the whole process to be parameter-free and training-free. In this way, the images are blended with textual-aware signals and the text representations become visual-guided for better adaptive zero-shot alignment. We evaluate CALIP on various benchmarks of 14 datasets for both 2D image and 3D point cloud few-shot classification, showing consistent zero-shot performance improvement over CLIP. Based on that, we further insert a small number of linear layers in CALIP's attention module and verify our robustness under the few-shot settings, which also achieves leading performance compared to existing methods. Those extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our approach for efficient enhancement of CLIP.
summary: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has been shown to learn visual representations with great transferability, which achieves promising accuracy for zero-shot classification. To further improve its downstream performance, existing works propose additional learnable modules upon CLIP and fine-tune them by few-shot training sets. However, the resulting extra training cost and data requirement severely hinder the efficiency for model deployment and knowledge transfer. In this paper, we introduce a free-lunch enhancement method, CALIP, to boost CLIP's zero-shot performance via a parameter-free Attention module. Specifically, we guide visual and textual representations to interact with each other and explore cross-modal informative features via attention. As the pre-training has largely reduced the embedding distances between two modalities, we discard all learnable parameters in the attention and bidirectionally update the multi-modal features, enabling the whole process to be parameter-free and training-free. In this way, the images are blended with textual-aware signals and the text representations become visual-guided for better adaptive zero-shot alignment. We evaluate CALIP on various benchmarks of 14 datasets for both 2D image and 3D point cloud few-shot classification, showing consistent zero-shot performance improvement over CLIP. Based on that, we further insert a small number of linear layers in CALIP's attention module and verify our robustness under the few-shot settings, which also achieves leading performance compared to existing methods. Those extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our approach for efficient enhancement of CLIP.
abstract_zh: 对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）已被证明可以学习具有良好可迁移性的视觉表示，从而实现零样本分类的有希望的准确性。为了进一步提高其下游性能，现有的工作在 CLIP 上提出了额外的可学习模块，并通过少量训练集对其进行微调。然而，由此产生的额外培训成本和数据需求严重阻碍了模型部署和知识转移的效率。在本文中，我们介绍了一种免费午餐增强方法 CALIP，通过无参数注意力模块来提高 CLIP 的零样本性能。具体来说，我们引导视觉和文本表示相互交互，并通过注意力探索跨模式信息特征。由于预训练大大减少了两种模态之间的嵌入距离，因此我们丢弃注意力中的所有可学习参数并双向更新多模态特征，使整个过程无参数且免训练。通过这种方式，图像与文本感知信号混合，并且文本表示变得视觉引导，以实现更好的自适应零样本对齐。我们在 2D 图像和 3D 点云少样本分类的 14 个数据集的各种基准上评估 CALIP，显示出相对于 CLIP 的一致的零样本性能改进。在此基础上，我们进一步在CALIP的注意力模块中插入少量线性层，并验证我们在few-shot设置下的鲁棒性，与现有方法相比也取得了领先的性能。这些广泛的实验证明了我们的方法在有效增强 CLIP 方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CALIP方法，通过无参数注意力机制提升CLIP模型的零样本分类性能，同时保持高效部署。
AI.motivation: 现有CLIP增强方法依赖额外可学习模块和训练数据，导致效率低下，难以满足模型部署和知识迁移需求。
AI.method: 设计无参数注意力模块，引导视觉与文本表征跨模态交互，通过双向更新多模态特征实现零训练成本增强，并插入少量线性层验证鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在14个2D/3D数据集上持续提升CLIP零样本性能，且在少量样本设置下优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CALIP通过参数自由训练的跨模态特征交互，实现了CLIP的高效零样本性能增强，具有显著应用优势。

method: 设计无参数注意力模块，引导视觉与文本表征跨模态交互，通过双向更新多模态特征实现零训练成本增强，并插入少量线性层验证鲁棒性。
result: 在14个2D/3D数据集上持续提升CLIP零样本性能，且在少量样本设置下优于现有方法。
conclusion: CALIP通过参数自由训练的跨模态特征交互，实现了CLIP的高效零样本性能增强，具有显著应用优势。
search_text: CALIP: Zero-Shot Enhancement of CLIP with Parameter-free Attention CALIP：无参数注意力的 CLIP 零样本增强 Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has been shown to learn visual representations with great transferability, which achieves promising accuracy for zero-shot classification. To further improve its downstream performance, existing works propose additional learnable modules upon CLIP and fine-tune them by few-shot training sets. However, the resulting extra training cost and data requirement severely hinder the efficiency for model deployment and knowledge transfer. In this paper, we introduce a free-lunch enhancement method, CALIP, to boost CLIP's zero-shot performance via a parameter-free Attention module. Specifically, we guide visual and textual representations to interact with each other and explore cross-modal informative features via attention. As the pre-training has largely reduced the embedding distances between two modalities, we discard all learnable parameters in the attention and bidirectionally update the multi-modal features, enabling the whole process to be parameter-free and training-free. In this way, the images are blended with textual-aware signals and the text representations become visual-guided for better adaptive zero-shot alignment. We evaluate CALIP on various benchmarks of 14 datasets for both 2D image and 3D point cloud few-shot classification, showing consistent zero-shot performance improvement over CLIP. Based on that, we further insert a small number of linear layers in CALIP's attention module and verify our robustness under the few-shot settings, which also achieves leading performance compared to existing methods. Those extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our approach for efficient enhancement of CLIP. 对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）已被证明可以学习具有良好可迁移性的视觉表示，从而实现零样本分类的有希望的准确性。为了进一步提高其下游性能，现有的工作在 CLIP 上提出了额外的可学习模块，并通过少量训练集对其进行微调。然而，由此产生的额外培训成本和数据需求严重阻碍了模型部署和知识转移的效率。在本文中，我们介绍了一种免费午餐增强方法 CALIP，通过无参数注意力模块来提高 CLIP 的零样本性能。具体来说，我们引导视觉和文本表示相互交互，并通过注意力探索跨模式信息特征。由于预训练大大减少了两种模态之间的嵌入距离，因此我们丢弃注意力中的所有可学习参数并双向更新多模态特征，使整个过程无参数且免训练。通过这种方式，图像与文本感知信号混合，并且文本表示变得视觉引导，以实现更好的自适应零样本对齐。我们在 2D 图像和 3D 点云少样本分类的 14 个数据集的各种基准上评估 CALIP，显示出相对于 CLIP 的一致的零样本性能改进。在此基础上，我们进一步在CALIP的注意力模块中插入少量线性层，并验证我们在few-shot设置下的鲁棒性，与现有方法相比也取得了领先的性能。这些广泛的实验证明了我们的方法在有效增强 CLIP 方面的优越性。 本文提出CALIP方法，通过无参数注意力机制提升CLIP模型的零样本分类性能，同时保持高效部署。 Ziyu Guo,Renrui Zhang,Longtian Qiu,Xianzheng Ma,Xupeng Miao,Xuming He,Bin Cui cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Zineng Tang,Jaemin Cho,Yixin Nie,Mohit Bansal
title: TVLT: Textless Vision-Language Transformer
title_zh: TVLT：无文本视觉语言转换器
comment: NeurIPS 2022 Oral (21 pages; the first three authors contributed equally)
comments: NeurIPS 2022 Oral (21 pages; the first three authors contributed equally)
abstract: In this work, we present the Textless Vision-Language Transformer (TVLT), where homogeneous transformer blocks take raw visual and audio inputs for vision-and-language representation learning with minimal modality-specific design, and do not use text-specific modules such as tokenization or automatic speech recognition (ASR). TVLT is trained by reconstructing masked patches of continuous video frames and audio spectrograms (masked autoencoding) and contrastive modeling to align video and audio. TVLT attains performance comparable to its text-based counterpart on various multimodal tasks, such as visual question answering, image retrieval, video retrieval, and multimodal sentiment analysis, with 28x faster inference speed and only 1/3 of the parameters. Our findings suggest the possibility of learning compact and efficient visual-linguistic representations from low-level visual and audio signals without assuming the prior existence of text. Our code and checkpoints are available at: https://github.com/zinengtang/TVLT
summary: In this work, we present the Textless Vision-Language Transformer (TVLT), where homogeneous transformer blocks take raw visual and audio inputs for vision-and-language representation learning with minimal modality-specific design, and do not use text-specific modules such as tokenization or automatic speech recognition (ASR). TVLT is trained by reconstructing masked patches of continuous video frames and audio spectrograms (masked autoencoding) and contrastive modeling to align video and audio. TVLT attains performance comparable to its text-based counterpart on various multimodal tasks, such as visual question answering, image retrieval, video retrieval, and multimodal sentiment analysis, with 28x faster inference speed and only 1/3 of the parameters. Our findings suggest the possibility of learning compact and efficient visual-linguistic representations from low-level visual and audio signals without assuming the prior existence of text. Our code and checkpoints are available at: https://github.com/zinengtang/TVLT
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了无文本视觉语言转换器（TVLT），其中同质转换器块采用原始视觉和音频输入，以最小的特定模态设计进行视觉和语言表示学习，并且不使用特定于文本的模块，例如标记化或自动语音识别（ASR）。 TVLT 通过重建连续视频帧和音频频谱图的屏蔽补丁（屏蔽自动编码）以及对比建模来对齐视频和音频来进行训练。 TVLT 在各种多模态任务（例如视觉问答、图像检索、视频检索和多模态情感分析）上获得了与基于文本的对应物相当的性能，推理速度提高了 28 倍，参数仅为其 1/3。我们的研究结果表明，在不假设文本事先存在的情况下，可以从低级视觉和音频信号中学习紧凑且有效的视觉语言表示。我们的代码和检查点位于：https://github.com/zinengtang/TVLT

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需文本模块的视觉-语言Transformer模型TVLT，直接利用原始视觉和音频输入进行多模态表征学习。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉-语言模型依赖文本处理模块（如分词或语音识别），增加了复杂性和计算成本，而本文旨在探索无需预设文本的紧凑高效表征方法。
AI.method: 采用同构Transformer块处理连续视频帧和音频频谱，通过掩码重建（MAE）和对比学习对齐视听模态，完全省去文本相关组件。
AI.result: 在视觉问答、图像检索等任务中性能与文本基模型相当，推理速度提升28倍，参数量仅为1/3。
AI.conclusion: 证明了可从低级视听信号中学习紧凑高效的视觉-语言表征，无需依赖文本先验假设。

authors_text: Jialiang Lin,Yingmin Wang,Yao Yu,Yu Zhou,Yidong Chen,Xiaodong Shi
title: Automatic Analysis of Available Source Code of Top Artificial Intelligence Conference Papers
title_zh: 自动分析顶级人工智能会议论文的可用源代码
comment: Please cite the version of IJSEKE
comments: Please cite the version of IJSEKE
abstract: Source code is essential for researchers to reproduce the methods and replicate the results of artificial intelligence (AI) papers. Some organizations and researchers manually collect AI papers with available source code to contribute to the AI community. However, manual collection is a labor-intensive and time-consuming task. To address this issue, we propose a method to automatically identify papers with available source code and extract their source code repository URLs. With this method, we find that 20.5% of regular papers of 10 top AI conferences published from 2010 to 2019 are identified as papers with available source code and that 8.1% of these source code repositories are no longer accessible. We also create the XMU NLP Lab README Dataset, the largest dataset of labeled README files for source code document research. Through this dataset, we have discovered that quite a few README files have no installation instructions or usage tutorials provided. Further, a large-scale comprehensive statistical analysis is made for a general picture of the source code of AI conference papers. The proposed solution can also go beyond AI conference papers to analyze other scientific papers from both journals and conferences to shed light on more domains.
summary: Source code is essential for researchers to reproduce the methods and replicate the results of artificial intelligence (AI) papers. Some organizations and researchers manually collect AI papers with available source code to contribute to the AI community. However, manual collection is a labor-intensive and time-consuming task. To address this issue, we propose a method to automatically identify papers with available source code and extract their source code repository URLs. With this method, we find that 20.5% of regular papers of 10 top AI conferences published from 2010 to 2019 are identified as papers with available source code and that 8.1% of these source code repositories are no longer accessible. We also create the XMU NLP Lab README Dataset, the largest dataset of labeled README files for source code document research. Through this dataset, we have discovered that quite a few README files have no installation instructions or usage tutorials provided. Further, a large-scale comprehensive statistical analysis is made for a general picture of the source code of AI conference papers. The proposed solution can also go beyond AI conference papers to analyze other scientific papers from both journals and conferences to shed light on more domains.
abstract_zh: 源代码对于研究人员重现人工智能 (AI) 论文的方法和结果至关重要。一些组织和研究人员手动收集带有可用源代码的人工智能论文，为人工智能社区做出贡献。然而，人工收集是一项劳动密集型且耗时的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种方法来自动识别具有可用源代码的论文并提取其源代码存储库 URL。通过这种方法，我们发现2010年至2019年发表的10个顶级人工智能会议的常规论文中有20.5%被识别为具有可用源代码的论文，并且其中8.1%的源代码存储库不再可访问。我们还创建了 XMU NLP 实验室 README 数据集，这是用于源代码文档研究的最大标记 README 文件数据集。通过这个数据集，我们发现相当多的README文件没有提供安装说明或使用教程。进一步对AI会议论文源代码概况进行大规模综合统计分析。所提出的解决方案还可以超越人工智能会议论文，分析期刊和会议中的其他科学论文，以阐明更多领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动识别顶级AI会议论文源代码并分析其可用性的方法，构建了README数据集并进行大规模统计分析。
AI.motivation: 手动收集AI论文源代码效率低且耗时，需自动化方法提升效率并推动代码可复现性研究。
AI.method: 设计自动识别含源代码论文的方法，提取代码仓库URL，构建XMU NLP Lab README数据集并进行统计分析。
AI.result: 识别出20.5%的论文含源代码（其中8.1%失效），创建最大README标注数据集，发现多数README缺少安装/使用说明。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可扩展至其他领域科学论文，为代码可复现性研究和学术成果评估提供新工具和数据支持。

authors_text: Xiao-Ying Zhao,Qiu-Shi Zhu,Jie Zhang
title: Speech Enhancement Using Self-Supervised Pre-Trained Model and Vector Quantization
title_zh: 使用自监督预训练模型和矢量量化进行语音增强
abstract: With the development of deep learning, neural network-based speech enhancement (SE) models have shown excellent performance. Meanwhile, it was shown that the development of self-supervised pre-trained models can be applied to various downstream tasks. In this paper, we will consider the application of the pre-trained model to the real-time SE problem. Specifically, the encoder and bottleneck layer of the DEMUCS model are initialized using the self-supervised pretrained WavLM model, the convolution in the encoder is replaced by causal convolution, and the transformer encoder in the bottleneck layer is based on causal attention mask. In addition, as discretizing the noisy speech representations is more beneficial for denoising, we utilize a quantization module to discretize the representation output from the bottleneck layer, which is then fed into the decoder to reconstruct the clean speech waveform. Experimental results on the Valentini dataset and an internal dataset show that the pre-trained model based initialization can improve the SE performance and the discretization operation suppresses the noise component in the representations to some extent, which can further improve the performance.
summary: With the development of deep learning, neural network-based speech enhancement (SE) models have shown excellent performance. Meanwhile, it was shown that the development of self-supervised pre-trained models can be applied to various downstream tasks. In this paper, we will consider the application of the pre-trained model to the real-time SE problem. Specifically, the encoder and bottleneck layer of the DEMUCS model are initialized using the self-supervised pretrained WavLM model, the convolution in the encoder is replaced by causal convolution, and the transformer encoder in the bottleneck layer is based on causal attention mask. In addition, as discretizing the noisy speech representations is more beneficial for denoising, we utilize a quantization module to discretize the representation output from the bottleneck layer, which is then fed into the decoder to reconstruct the clean speech waveform. Experimental results on the Valentini dataset and an internal dataset show that the pre-trained model based initialization can improve the SE performance and the discretization operation suppresses the noise component in the representations to some extent, which can further improve the performance.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的发展，基于神经网络的语音增强（SE）模型表现出了优异的性能。同时，研究表明，自监督预训练模型的开发可以应用于各种下游任务。在本文中，我们将考虑将预训练模型应用于实时 SE 问题。具体来说，DEMUCS模型的编码器和瓶颈层使用自监督预训练WavLM模型进行初始化，编码器中的卷积被因果卷积取代，瓶颈层中的Transformer编码器基于因果注意掩模。此外，由于离散化有噪声的语音表示更有利于去噪，因此我们利用量化模块来离散化瓶颈层输出的表示，然后将其输入解码器以重建干净的语音波形。在Valentini数据集和内部数据集上的实验结果表明，基于预训练模型的初始化可以提高SE性能，并且离散化操作在一定程度上抑制了表示中的噪声成分，可以进一步提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自监督预训练模型与向量量化的实时语音增强方法，通过改进DEMOCS模型结构并引入离散化模块提升降噪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强模型在实时性与噪声抑制间存在平衡难题，而自监督预训练模型能提供更丰富的语音表征，向量量化有助于增强表征的离散性以提升去噪能力。
AI.method: 采用WavLM模型初始化DEMOCS编码器与瓶颈层，替换为因果卷积并引入因果注意力机制，通过量化模块对瓶颈层输出进行离散化处理后输入解码器重建干净语音。
AI.result: 在Valentini数据集和内部数据集实验中，预训练模型初始化使语音增强性能提升，离散化操作进一步抑制噪声成分，整体指标优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练模型初始化与表征离散化结合可有效提升实时语音增强效果，为后续模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Yitong Wang,Jun Zhao
title: Mobile Edge Computing, Metaverse, 6G Wireless Communications, Artificial Intelligence, and Blockchain: Survey and Their Convergence
title_zh: 移动边缘计算、Metaverse、6G 无线通信、人工智能和区块链：调查及其融合
comment: This paper appears in the Proceedings of 2022 IEEE 8th World Forum on Internet of Things (WF-IoT). Please feel free to contact us for questions or remarks
comments: This paper appears in the Proceedings of 2022 IEEE 8th World Forum on Internet of Things (WF-IoT). Please feel free to contact us for questions or remarks
abstract: With the advances of the Internet of Things (IoT) and 5G/6G wireless communications, the paradigms of mobile computing have developed dramatically in recent years, from centralized mobile cloud computing to distributed fog computing and mobile edge computing (MEC). MEC pushes compute-intensive assignments to the edge of the network and brings resources as close to the endpoints as possible, addressing the shortcomings of mobile devices with regard to storage space, resource optimisation, computational performance and efficiency. Compared to cloud computing, as the distributed and closer infrastructure, the convergence of MEC with other emerging technologies, including the Metaverse, 6G wireless communications, artificial intelligence (AI), and blockchain, also solves the problems of network resource allocation, more network load as well as latency requirements. Accordingly, this paper investigates the computational paradigms used to meet the stringent requirements of modern applications. The application scenarios of MEC in mobile augmented reality (MAR) are provided. Furthermore, this survey presents the motivation of MEC-based Metaverse and introduces the applications of MEC to the Metaverse. Particular emphasis is given on a set of technical fusions mentioned above, e.g., 6G with MEC paradigm, MEC strengthened by blockchain, etc.

Accordingly, this paper investigates the computational paradigms used to meet the stringent requirements of modern applications. The application scenarios of MEC in mobile augmented reality (MAR) are provided. Furthermore, this survey presents the motivation of MEC-based Metaverse and introduces the applications of MEC to the Metaverse. Particular emphasis is given on a set of technical fusions mentioned above, e.g., 6G with MEC paradigm, MEC strengthened by blockchain, etc.
abstract_zh: 随着物联网（IoT）和5G/6G无线通信的进步，移动计算的范式近年来得到了巨大的发展，从集中式移动云计算到分布式雾计算和移动边缘计算（MEC）。 MEC将计算密集型任务推至网络边缘，使资源尽可能靠近端点，解决移动设备在存储空间、资源优化、计算性能和效率方面的缺点。与云计算相比，MEC作为分布式、更紧密的基础设施，与元界、6G无线通信、人工智能（AI）、区块链等其他新兴技术的融合，也解决了网络资源分配、更多网络负载以及延迟要求的问题。因此，本文研究了用于满足现代应用严格要求的计算范例。给出了MEC在移动增强现实（MAR）中的应用场景。此外，本次调查还介绍了基于 MEC 的元宇宙的动机，并介绍了 MEC 在元宇宙中的应用。特别强调上述一组技术融合，例如6G与MEC范式、区块链增强的MEC等。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了移动边缘计算（MEC）与元宇宙、6G通信、人工智能和区块链等技术的融合趋势，并探讨其在移动增强现实等场景中的应用。
AI.motivation: 为应对移动设备存储、计算性能不足及网络延迟等问题，通过MEC与新兴技术的结合优化资源分配与网络负载。
AI.method: 通过文献调研与技术分析，总结MEC与元宇宙、6G、AI及区块链的融合方式，并探讨其应用场景与技术挑战。
AI.result: 系统梳理了MEC在元宇宙中的应用案例，分析了6G与区块链增强MEC的潜在技术路径及未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: MEC与多技术融合是支撑未来沉浸式应用（如元宇宙）的关键，需进一步解决网络资源分配与安全信任等核心问题。

authors_text: Stacey Jeffery
title: Quantum Subroutine Composition
title_zh: 量子子程序组成
abstract: An important tool in algorithm design is the ability to build algorithms from other algorithms that run as subroutines. In the case of quantum algorithms, a subroutine may be called on a superposition of different inputs, which complicates things. For example, a classical algorithm that calls a subroutine $Q$ times, where the average probability of querying the subroutine on input $i$ is $p_i$, and the cost of the subroutine on input $i$ is $T_i$, incurs expected cost $Q\sum_i p_i E[T_i]$ from all subroutine queries. While this statement is obvious for classical algorithms, for quantum algorithms, it is much less so, since naively, if we run a quantum subroutine on a superposition of inputs, we need to wait for all branches of the superposition to terminate before we can apply the next operation. We nonetheless show an analogous quantum statement (*): If $q_i$ is the average query weight on $i$ over all queries, the cost from all quantum subroutine queries is $Q\sum_i q_i E[T_i]$. Here the query weight on $i$ for a particular query is the probability of measuring $i$ in the input register if we were to measure right before the query. We prove this result using the technique of multidimensional quantum walks, recently introduced in arXiv:2208.13492. We present a more general version of their quantum walk edge composition result, which yields variable-time quantum walks, generalizing variable-time quantum search, by, for example, replacing the update cost with $\sqrt{\sum_{u,v}π_u P_{u,v} E[T_{u,v}^2]}$, where $T_{u,v}$ is the cost to move from vertex $u$ to vertex $v$. The same technique that allows us to compose quantum subroutines in quantum walks can also be used to compose in any quantum algorithm, which is how we prove (*).

We present a more general version of their quantum walk edge composition result, which yields variable-time quantum walks, generalizing variable-time quantum search, by, for example, replacing the update cost with $\sqrt{\sum_{u,v}π_u P_{u,v} E[T_{u,v}^2]}$, where $T_{u,v}$ is the cost to move from vertex $u$ to vertex $v$. The same technique that allows us to compose quantum subroutines in quantum walks can also be used to compose in any quantum algorithm, which is how we prove (*).
abstract_zh: 算法设计中的一个重要工具是能够从作为子例程运行的其他算法构建算法。在量子算法的情况下，可能会在不同输入的叠加上调用子程序，这使事情变得复杂。例如，调用子例程 $Q$ 次的经典算法，其中在输入 $i$ 上查询子例程的平均概率为 $p_i$，在输入 $i$ 上查询子例程的成本为 $T_i$，所有子例程查询都会产生预期成本 $Q\sum_i p_i E[T_i]$。虽然这种说法对于经典算法来说是显而易见的，但对于量子算法来说，情况就不那么明显了，因为天真地，如果我们在输入的叠加上运行量子子例程，我们需要等待叠加的所有分支终止，然后才能应用下一个操作。尽管如此，我们还是展示了一个类似的量子语句 (*)：如果 $q_i$ 是所有查询中 $i$ 上的平均查询权重，则所有量子子例程查询的成本为 $Q\sum_i q_i E[T_i]$。这里，如果我们要在查询之前进行测量，则特定查询的 $i$ 上的查询权重是在输入寄存器中测量 $i$ 的概率。我们使用最近在 arXiv:2208.13492 中引入的多维量子行走技术证明了这个结果。我们提出了他们的量子游走边缘合成结果的更通用版本，它产生可变时间量子游走，概括了可变时间量子搜索，例如，通过用 $\sqrt{\sum_{u,v}π_u P_{u,v} E[T_{u,v}^2]}$ 替换更新成本，其中 $T_{u,v}$ 是从顶点 $u$ 移动到顶点 $v$ 的成本。允许我们在量子行走中编写量子子例程的相同技术也可以用于在任何量子算法中进行编写，这就是我们证明的方式（*）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究量子算法中子程序组合的成本分析问题，提出量子子程序调用的总成本计算公式，并基于多维量子行走技术进行证明。
AI.motivation: 经典算法中子程序调用成本计算简单，但量子算法因叠加态特性导致无法直接套用经典模型，需建立新的量子子程序成本分析框架。
AI.method: 采用多维量子行走技术，推广量子行走边组合结果，通过替换更新成本公式实现可变时间量子行走，并将其应用于一般量子算法分析。
AI.result: 证明量子子程序总成本公式为Q∑q_i E[T_i]，并推广量子行走边组合结果，将更新成本替换为√(∑π_u P_{u,v} E[T_{u,v}^2])形式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅适用于量子行走场景，还可推广至任意量子算法，为量子算法设计提供理论支持。

search_text: Quantum Subroutine Composition 量子子程序组成 An important tool in algorithm design is the ability to build algorithms from other algorithms that run as subroutines. In the case of quantum algorithms, a subroutine may be called on a superposition of different inputs, which complicates things. For example, a classical algorithm that calls a subroutine $Q$ times, where the average probability of querying the subroutine on input $i$ is $p_i$, and the cost of the subroutine on input $i$ is $T_i$, incurs expected cost $Q\sum_i p_i E[T_i]$ from all subroutine queries. While this statement is obvious for classical algorithms, for quantum algorithms, it is much less so, since naively, if we run a quantum subroutine on a superposition of inputs, we need to wait for all branches of the superposition to terminate before we can apply the next operation. We nonetheless show an analogous quantum statement (*): If $q_i$ is the average query weight on $i$ over all queries, the cost from all quantum subroutine queries is $Q\sum_i q_i E[T_i]$. Here the query weight on $i$ for a particular query is the probability of measuring $i$ in the input register if we were to measure right before the query. We prove this result using the technique of multidimensional quantum walks, recently introduced in arXiv:2208.13492. We present a more general version of their quantum walk edge composition result, which yields variable-time quantum walks, generalizing variable-time quantum search, by, for example, replacing the update cost with $\sqrt{\sum_{u,v}π_u P_{u,v} E[T_{u,v}^2]}$, where $T_{u,v}$ is the cost to move from vertex $u$ to vertex $v$. The same technique that allows us to compose quantum subroutines in quantum walks can also be used to compose in any quantum algorithm, which is how we prove (*). 算法设计中的一个重要工具是能够从作为子例程运行的其他算法构建算法。在量子算法的情况下，可能会在不同输入的叠加上调用子程序，这使事情变得复杂。例如，调用子例程 $Q$ 次的经典算法，其中在输入 $i$ 上查询子例程的平均概率为 $p_i$，在输入 $i$ 上查询子例程的成本为 $T_i$，所有子例程查询都会产生预期成本 $Q\sum_i p_i E[T_i]$。虽然这种说法对于经典算法来说是显而易见的，但对于量子算法来说，情况就不那么明显了，因为天真地，如果我们在输入的叠加上运行量子子例程，我们需要等待叠加的所有分支终止，然后才能应用下一个操作。尽管如此，我们还是展示了一个类似的量子语句 (*)：如果 $q_i$ 是所有查询中 $i$ 上的平均查询权重，则所有量子子例程查询的成本为 $Q\sum_i q_i E[T_i]$。这里，如果我们要在查询之前进行测量，则特定查询的 $i$ 上的查询权重是在输入寄存器中测量 $i$ 的概率。我们使用最近在 arXiv:2208.13492 中引入的多维量子行走技术证明了这个结果。我们提出了他们的量子游走边缘合成结果的更通用版本，它产生可变时间量子游走，概括了可变时间量子搜索，例如，通过用 $\sqrt{\sum_{u,v}π_u P_{u,v} E[T_{u,v}^2]}$ 替换更新成本，其中 $T_{u,v}$ 是从顶点 $u$ 移动到顶点 $v$ 的成本。允许我们在量子行走中编写量子子例程的相同技术也可以用于在任何量子算法中进行编写，这就是我们证明的方式（*）。 本文研究量子算法中子程序组合的成本分析问题，提出量子子程序调用的总成本计算公式，并基于多维量子行走技术进行证明。 Stacey Jeffery quant-ph,cs.DS

authors_text: Yan Wang,Yusen Li,Gang Wang,Xiaoguang Liu
title: Multi-scale Attention Network for Single Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于单图像超分辨率的多尺度注意力网络
abstract: ConvNets can compete with transformers in high-level tasks by exploiting larger receptive fields. To unleash the potential of ConvNet in super-resolution, we propose a multi-scale attention network (MAN), by coupling classical multi-scale mechanism with emerging large kernel attention. In particular, we proposed multi-scale large kernel attention (MLKA) and gated spatial attention unit (GSAU). Through our MLKA, we modify large kernel attention with multi-scale and gate schemes to obtain the abundant attention map at various granularity levels, thereby aggregating global and local information and avoiding potential blocking artifacts. In GSAU, we integrate gate mechanism and spatial attention to remove the unnecessary linear layer and aggregate informative spatial context. To confirm the effectiveness of our designs, we evaluate MAN with multiple complexities by simply stacking different numbers of MLKA and GSAU. Experimental results illustrate that our MAN can perform on par with SwinIR and achieve varied trade-offs between state-of-the-art performance and computations.
summary: ConvNets can compete with transformers in high-level tasks by exploiting larger receptive fields. To unleash the potential of ConvNet in super-resolution, we propose a multi-scale attention network (MAN), by coupling classical multi-scale mechanism with emerging large kernel attention. In particular, we proposed multi-scale large kernel attention (MLKA) and gated spatial attention unit (GSAU). Through our MLKA, we modify large kernel attention with multi-scale and gate schemes to obtain the abundant attention map at various granularity levels, thereby aggregating global and local information and avoiding potential blocking artifacts. In GSAU, we integrate gate mechanism and spatial attention to remove the unnecessary linear layer and aggregate informative spatial context. To confirm the effectiveness of our designs, we evaluate MAN with multiple complexities by simply stacking different numbers of MLKA and GSAU. Experimental results illustrate that our MAN can perform on par with SwinIR and achieve varied trade-offs between state-of-the-art performance and computations.
abstract_zh: 卷积网络可以通过利用更大的感受野，在高级任务中与 Transformer 竞争。为了释放ConvNet在超分辨率方面的潜力，我们通过将经典的多尺度机制与新兴的大核注意力相结合，提出了一种多尺度注意力网络（MAN）。特别是，我们提出了多尺度大核注意（MLKA）和门控空间注意单元（GSAU）。通过我们的 MLKA，我们用多尺度和门方案修改大内核注意力，以获得各种粒度级别的丰富注意力图，从而聚合全局和局部信息并避免潜在的阻塞伪影。在 GSAU 中，我们整合了门机制和空间注意力，以去除不必要的线性层并聚合信息丰富的空间上下文。为了确认我们设计的有效性，我们通过简单地堆叠不同数量的 MLKA 和 GSAU 来评估具有多种复杂性的 MAN。实验结果表明，我们的 MAN 的性能可以与 SwinIR 相当，并在最先进的性能和计算之间实现各种权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度注意力网络（MAN），用于单图像超分辨率任务，结合多尺度机制与大核注意力以提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积网络在超分辨率任务中因感受野限制难以与Transformer竞争，需通过改进机制释放其潜力。
AI.method: 设计多尺度大核注意力（MLKA）和门控空间注意力单元（GSAU），通过多尺度粒度聚合全局局部信息，并利用门控机制优化空间上下文建模。
AI.result: MAN在多种复杂度配置下性能与SwinIR相当，实现了先进性能与计算量的灵活权衡。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度注意力机制有效增强了卷积网络的超分辨率能力，验证了其在图像重建任务中的竞争力。

authors_text: Gianluca De Marco,Dariusz R. Kowalski,Grzegorz Stachowiak
title: Time and Energy Efficient Contention Resolution in Asynchronous Shared Channels
title_zh: 异步共享通道中的时间和能源高效的争用解决方案
abstract: A number of stations, independently activated over time, is able to communicate by transmitting and listening to a shared channel in discrete time slots, and a message is successfully delivered to all stations if and only if its source station is the only transmitter at a time. Despite a vast amount of work in the last decades, many fundamental questions remain open in the realistic situation where stations do not start synchronously but are awaken in arbitrary times. In this work we present a broad picture of results for the fundamental problem of Contention resolution, in which each of the contending stations needs to broadcast successfully its message. We show that adaptive algorithms or algorithms with the knowledge of the contention size $k$ achieve a linear $O(k)$ message latency even if the channel feedback is restricted to simple acknowledgements in case of successful transmissions and in the absence of synchronization. This asymptotically optimal performance cannot be extended to other settings: we prove that there is no non-adaptive algorithm without the knowledge of contention size $k$ admitting latency $o(k\log k/(\log\log k)^2)$. This means, in particular, that coding (even random) with acknowledgements is not very efficient on a shared channel without synchronization or an estimate of the contention size. We also present a non-adaptive algorithm with no knowledge of contention size that almost matches the lower bound on latency. Finally, despite the absence of a collision detection mechanism, we show that our algorithms are also efficient in terms of energy, understood as the total number of transmissions performed by the stations during the execution.
summary: A number of stations, independently activated over time, is able to communicate by transmitting and listening to a shared channel in discrete time slots, and a message is successfully delivered to all stations if and only if its source station is the only transmitter at a time. Despite a vast amount of work in the last decades, many fundamental questions remain open in the realistic situation where stations do not start synchronously but are awaken in arbitrary times. In this work we present a broad picture of results for the fundamental problem of Contention resolution, in which each of the contending stations needs to broadcast successfully its message. We show that adaptive algorithms or algorithms with the knowledge of the contention size $k$ achieve a linear $O(k)$ message latency even if the channel feedback is restricted to simple acknowledgements in case of successful transmissions and in the absence of synchronization. This asymptotically optimal performance cannot be extended to other settings: we prove that there is no non-adaptive algorithm without the knowledge of contention size $k$ admitting latency $o(k\log k/(\log\log k)^2)$. This means, in particular, that coding (even random) with acknowledgements is not very efficient on a shared channel without synchronization or an estimate of the contention size. We also present a non-adaptive algorithm with no knowledge of contention size that almost matches the lower bound on latency. Finally, despite the absence of a collision detection mechanism, we show that our algorithms are also efficient in terms of energy, understood as the total number of transmissions performed by the stations during the execution.
abstract_zh: 随着时间的推移独立激活的多个站能够通过在离散时隙中发送和侦听共享信道来进行通信，并且当且仅当其源站是同一时间唯一的发送器时，消息才能成功传递到所有站。尽管在过去的几十年里做了大量的工作，但在站点不同步启动而是在任意时间唤醒的现实情况下，许多基本问题仍然悬而未决。在这项工作中，我们展示了争用解决的基本问题的总体结果，其中每个竞争站都需要成功广播其消息。我们表明，自适应算法或了解竞争大小 $k$ 的算法可以实现线性 $O(k)$ 消息延迟，即使在成功传输和缺乏同步的情况下，信道反馈仅限于简单的确认。这种渐近最优性能不能扩展到其他设置：我们证明，在不知道竞争大小 $k$ 并承认延迟 $o(k\log k/(\log\log k)^2)$ 的情况下，不存在非自适应算法。这尤其意味着，在没有同步或竞争大小估计的情况下，带有确认的编码（甚至是随机的）在共享信道上并不是非常有效。我们还提出了一种不了解争用大小的非自适应算法，该算法几乎与延迟下限匹配。最后，尽管没有冲突检测机制，我们表明我们的算法在能量方面也是高效的，能量可以理解为执行期间站执行的传输总数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在异步共享信道中实现时间与能量高效的冲突解决机制，针对多个独立激活的站点在无同步情况下成功传输消息的问题进行分析。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在异步场景下（站点随机唤醒且无同步）的冲突解决方法仍存在效率瓶颈，尤其在不依赖碰撞检测和未知竞争规模的情况下缺乏有效算法。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与算法设计，对比了自适应算法与非自适应算法的性能差异，证明了竞争规模k的下界，并提出一种无需k先验知识的非自适应算法。
AI.result: 自适应算法可实现O(k)的线性延迟，而非自适应算法无法突破o(k log k/(log log k)^2)下界；提出的非自适应算法接近该下界，且在无碰撞检测机制下保持能量效率。
AI.conclusion: 自适应算法在异步场景中具有最优性能，但非自适应算法需依赖竞争规模估计；所提算法在延迟与能量消耗上均达到近似理论最优。

search_text: Time and Energy Efficient Contention Resolution in Asynchronous Shared Channels 异步共享通道中的时间和能源高效的争用解决方案 A number of stations, independently activated over time, is able to communicate by transmitting and listening to a shared channel in discrete time slots, and a message is successfully delivered to all stations if and only if its source station is the only transmitter at a time. Despite a vast amount of work in the last decades, many fundamental questions remain open in the realistic situation where stations do not start synchronously but are awaken in arbitrary times. In this work we present a broad picture of results for the fundamental problem of Contention resolution, in which each of the contending stations needs to broadcast successfully its message. We show that adaptive algorithms or algorithms with the knowledge of the contention size $k$ achieve a linear $O(k)$ message latency even if the channel feedback is restricted to simple acknowledgements in case of successful transmissions and in the absence of synchronization. This asymptotically optimal performance cannot be extended to other settings: we prove that there is no non-adaptive algorithm without the knowledge of contention size $k$ admitting latency $o(k\log k/(\log\log k)^2)$. This means, in particular, that coding (even random) with acknowledgements is not very efficient on a shared channel without synchronization or an estimate of the contention size. We also present a non-adaptive algorithm with no knowledge of contention size that almost matches the lower bound on latency. Finally, despite the absence of a collision detection mechanism, we show that our algorithms are also efficient in terms of energy, understood as the total number of transmissions performed by the stations during the execution. 随着时间的推移独立激活的多个站能够通过在离散时隙中发送和侦听共享信道来进行通信，并且当且仅当其源站是同一时间唯一的发送器时，消息才能成功传递到所有站。尽管在过去的几十年里做了大量的工作，但在站点不同步启动而是在任意时间唤醒的现实情况下，许多基本问题仍然悬而未决。在这项工作中，我们展示了争用解决的基本问题的总体结果，其中每个竞争站都需要成功广播其消息。我们表明，自适应算法或了解竞争大小 $k$ 的算法可以实现线性 $O(k)$ 消息延迟，即使在成功传输和缺乏同步的情况下，信道反馈仅限于简单的确认。这种渐近最优性能不能扩展到其他设置：我们证明，在不知道竞争大小 $k$ 并承认延迟 $o(k\log k/(\log\log k)^2)$ 的情况下，不存在非自适应算法。这尤其意味着，在没有同步或竞争大小估计的情况下，带有确认的编码（甚至是随机的）在共享信道上并不是非常有效。我们还提出了一种不了解争用大小的非自适应算法，该算法几乎与延迟下限匹配。最后，尽管没有冲突检测机制，我们表明我们的算法在能量方面也是高效的，能量可以理解为执行期间站执行的传输总数。 本文研究了在异步共享信道中实现时间与能量高效的冲突解决机制，针对多个独立激活的站点在无同步情况下成功传输消息的问题进行分析。 Gianluca De Marco,Dariusz R.
