authors_text: He Li,Tingnan Zhang,Wenhao Yu,Patrick M. Wensing
title: Versatile Real-Time Motion Synthesis via Kino-Dynamic MPC with Hybrid-Systems DDP
title_zh: 通过带有混合系统 DDP 的 Kino-Dynamic MPC 进行多功能实时运动合成
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures, submitted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 7 pages, 7 figures, submitted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Specialized motions such as jumping are often achieved on quadruped robots by solving a trajectory optimization problem once and executing the trajectory using a tracking controller. This approach is in parallel with Model Predictive Control (MPC) strategies that commonly control regular gaits via online re-planning. In this work, we present a nonlinear MPC (NMPC) technique that unlocks on-the-fly re-planning of specialized motion skills and regular locomotion within a unified framework. The NMPC reasons about a hybrid kinodynamic model, and is solved using a variant of a constrained Differential Dynamic Programming (DDP) solver. The proposed NMPC enables the robot to perform a variety of agile skills like jumping, bounding, and trotting, and the rapid transition between these skills. We evaluated the proposed algorithm with three challenging motion sequences that combine multiple agile skills, on two quadruped platforms, Unitree A1, and MIT Mini Cheetah, showing its effectiveness and generality.
summary: Specialized motions such as jumping are often achieved on quadruped robots by solving a trajectory optimization problem once and executing the trajectory using a tracking controller. This approach is in parallel with Model Predictive Control (MPC) strategies that commonly control regular gaits via online re-planning. In this work, we present a nonlinear MPC (NMPC) technique that unlocks on-the-fly re-planning of specialized motion skills and regular locomotion within a unified framework. The NMPC reasons about a hybrid kinodynamic model, and is solved using a variant of a constrained Differential Dynamic Programming (DDP) solver. The proposed NMPC enables the robot to perform a variety of agile skills like jumping, bounding, and trotting, and the rapid transition between these skills. We evaluated the proposed algorithm with three challenging motion sequences that combine multiple agile skills, on two quadruped platforms, Unitree A1, and MIT Mini Cheetah, showing its effectiveness and generality.
abstract_zh: 四足机器人通常通过解决一次轨迹优化问题并使用跟踪控制器执行轨迹来实现跳跃等特殊运动。这种方法与模型预测控制（MPC）策略并行，后者通常通过在线重新规划来控制常规步态。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种非线性 MPC (NMPC) 技术，可以在统一的框架内解锁专门运动技能和常规运动的动态重新规划。 NMPC 对混合运动动力学模型进行推理，并使用约束微分动态规划 (DDP) 求解器的变体进行求解。所提出的 NMPC 使机器人能够执行各种敏捷技能，如跳跃、弹跳和小跑，以及这些技能之间的快速转换。我们在两个四足平台 Unitree A1 和 MIT Mini Cheetah 上使用三个具有挑战性的运动序列（结合了多种敏捷技能）评估了所提出的算法，显示了其有效性和通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）技术，通过混合系统差分动态规划（DDP）求解器，在统一框架中实现四足机器人敏捷运动技能的实时重新规划与切换。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将特殊运动（如跳跃）与常规步态控制分开处理，难以实现动态环境下的实时调整与技能切换，缺乏统一的控制框架。
AI.method: 基于混合动力学模型构建NMPC框架，结合约束差分动态规划求解器，实现特殊运动技能与常规运动的在线联合优化与快速切换。
AI.result: 在Unitree A1和MIT Mini Cheetah平台上验证了算法有效性，成功完成包含跳跃、奔走等复杂技能的多组运动序列测试。
AI.conclusion: 该NMPC方法通过统一框架实现了四足机器人敏捷运动技能的实时合成与切换，为复杂动态场景下的运动控制提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Wadie Skaf,Arzu Tosayeva,Dániel T. Várkonyi
title: Towards Automatic Forecasting: Evaluation of Time-Series Forecasting Models for Chickenpox Cases Estimation in Hungary
title_zh: 迈向自动预测：匈牙利水痘病例估计的时间序列预测模型评估
abstract: Time-Series Forecasting is a powerful data modeling discipline that analyzes historical observations to predict future values of a time-series. It has been utilized in numerous applications, including but not limited to economics, meteorology, and health. In this paper, we use time-series forecasting techniques to model and predict the future incidence of chickenpox. To achieve this, we implement and simulate multiple models and data preprocessing techniques on a Hungary-collected dataset. We demonstrate that the LSTM model outperforms all other models in the vast majority of the experiments in terms of county-level forecasting, whereas the SARIMAX model performs best at the national level. We also demonstrate that the performance of the traditional data preprocessing method is inferior to that of the data preprocessing method that we have proposed.
summary: Time-Series Forecasting is a powerful data modeling discipline that analyzes historical observations to predict future values of a time-series. It has been utilized in numerous applications, including but not limited to economics, meteorology, and health. In this paper, we use time-series forecasting techniques to model and predict the future incidence of chickenpox. To achieve this, we implement and simulate multiple models and data preprocessing techniques on a Hungary-collected dataset. We demonstrate that the LSTM model outperforms all other models in the vast majority of the experiments in terms of county-level forecasting, whereas the SARIMAX model performs best at the national level. We also demonstrate that the performance of the traditional data preprocessing method is inferior to that of the data preprocessing method that we have proposed.
abstract_zh: 时间序列预测是一门强大的数据建模学科，它分析历史观察结果以预测时间序列的未来值。它已被用于许多应用，包括但不限于经济学、气象学和健康。在本文中，我们使用时间序列预测技术来建模和预测未来水痘的发病率。为了实现这一目标，我们在匈牙利收集的数据集上实现并模拟了多个模型和数据预处理技术。我们证明，在县级预测方面，LSTM 模型在绝大多数实验中优于所有其他模型，而 SARIMAX 模型在国家级预测方面表现最好。我们还证明了传统数据预处理方法的性能不如我们提出的数据预处理方法。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了多种时间序列预测模型在匈牙利水痘病例预测中的表现，比较了不同模型和数据预处理方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 水痘病例预测对公共卫生管理具有重要意义，但现有模型在不同层级（县/国家）和预处理方法上的效果尚未明确比较。
AI.method: 实现并模拟了LSTM、SARIMAX等多种时间序列模型，结合传统与自定义数据预处理方法，基于匈牙利实际数据进行实验对比。
AI.result: LSTM模型在县级预测中表现最优，SARIMAX模型在国家级预测中效果最佳，作者提出的预处理方法显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 不同模型适用于不同层级预测，改进的预处理方法能有效提升模型性能，为自动化的疫情预测提供了可行方案。

search_text: Towards Automatic Forecasting: Evaluation of Time-Series Forecasting Models for Chickenpox Cases Estimation in Hungary 迈向自动预测：匈牙利水痘病例估计的时间序列预测模型评估 Time-Series Forecasting is a powerful data modeling discipline that analyzes historical observations to predict future values of a time-series. It has been utilized in numerous applications, including but not limited to economics, meteorology, and health. In this paper, we use time-series forecasting techniques to model and predict the future incidence of chickenpox. To achieve this, we implement and simulate multiple models and data preprocessing techniques on a Hungary-collected dataset. We demonstrate that the LSTM model outperforms all other models in the vast majority of the experiments in terms of county-level forecasting, whereas the SARIMAX model performs best at the national level. We also demonstrate that the performance of the traditional data preprocessing method is inferior to that of the data preprocessing method that we have proposed. 时间序列预测是一门强大的数据建模学科，它分析历史观察结果以预测时间序列的未来值。它已被用于许多应用，包括但不限于经济学、气象学和健康。在本文中，我们使用时间序列预测技术来建模和预测未来水痘的发病率。为了实现这一目标，我们在匈牙利收集的数据集上实现并模拟了多个模型和数据预处理技术。我们证明，在县级预测方面，LSTM 模型在绝大多数实验中优于所有其他模型，而 SARIMAX 模型在国家级预测方面表现最好。我们还证明了传统数据预处理方法的性能不如我们提出的数据预处理方法。 本文评估了多种时间序列预测模型在匈牙利水痘病例预测中的表现，比较了不同模型和数据预处理方法的效果。 Wadie Skaf,Arzu Tosayeva,Dániel T. Várkonyi cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: He Li,Tingnan Zhang,Wenhao Yu,Patrick M. Wensing
title: Zero-Shot Retargeting of Learned Quadruped Locomotion Policies Using Hybrid Kinodynamic Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 使用混合运动动力学模型预测控制学习四足动物运动策略的零样本重定向
comment: This paper is accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022. We would like to make this paper visible on arxiv to the general public in case some research groups are interested
comments: This paper is accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022. We would like to make this paper visible on arxiv to the general public in case some research groups are interested
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has witnessed great strides for quadruped locomotion, with continued progress in the reliable sim-to-real transfer of policies. However, it remains a challenge to reuse a policy on another robot, which could save time for retraining. In this work, we present a framework for zero-shot policy retargeting wherein diverse motor skills can be transferred between robots of different shapes and sizes. The new framework centers on a planning-and-control pipeline that systematically integrates RL and Model Predictive Control (MPC). The planning stage employs RL to generate a dynamically plausible trajectory as well as the contact schedule, avoiding the combinatorial complexity of contact sequence optimization. This information is then used to seed the MPC to stabilize and robustify the policy roll-out via a new Hybrid Kinodynamic (HKD) model that implicitly optimizes the foothold locations. Hardware results show an ability to transfer policies from both the A1 and Laikago robots to the MIT Mini Cheetah robot without requiring any policy re-tuning.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has witnessed great strides for quadruped locomotion, with continued progress in the reliable sim-to-real transfer of policies. However, it remains a challenge to reuse a policy on another robot, which could save time for retraining. In this work, we present a framework for zero-shot policy retargeting wherein diverse motor skills can be transferred between robots of different shapes and sizes. The new framework centers on a planning-and-control pipeline that systematically integrates RL and Model Predictive Control (MPC). The planning stage employs RL to generate a dynamically plausible trajectory as well as the contact schedule, avoiding the combinatorial complexity of contact sequence optimization. This information is then used to seed the MPC to stabilize and robustify the policy roll-out via a new Hybrid Kinodynamic (HKD) model that implicitly optimizes the foothold locations. Hardware results show an ability to transfer policies from both the A1 and Laikago robots to the MIT Mini Cheetah robot without requiring any policy re-tuning.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 见证了四足动物运动的巨大进步，在可靠的模拟到真实的策略迁移方面不断取得进展。然而，在另一个机器人上重复使用策略仍然是一个挑战，这可以节省重新训练的时间。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个零射击策略重定向的框架，其中可以在不同形状和大小的机器人之间转移不同的运动技能。新框架以规划和控制管道为中心，系统地集成了强化学习和模型预测控制 (MPC)。规划阶段采用强化学习来生成动态合理的轨迹以及接触时间表，避免了接触序列优化的组合复杂性。然后，该信息被用于为 MPC 提供种子，通过隐式优化立足点位置的新混合动力学 (HKD) 模型来稳定和强化政策的推出。硬件结果表明能够将策略从 A1 和 Laikago 机器人转移到 MIT Mini Cheetah 机器人，而无需任何策略重新调整。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需重新训练即可将学习到的四足机器人运动策略零样本迁移至不同形态和尺寸机器人的框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管强化学习在四足机器人运动控制中取得进展，但将策略迁移到其他机器人仍需大量再训练，存在效率问题。
AI.method: 结合强化学习与混合运动学动态模型预测控制（HKD-MPC），通过规划阶段生成动态轨迹和接触计划，控制阶段利用HKD模型优化足端位置实现策略稳定化。
AI.result: 实验验证了从A1、Laikago机器人到MIT Mini Cheetah的策略迁移可行性，无需策略参数调整即可实现稳定运动。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过规划-控制联合优化，有效解决了异构四足机器人间的策略迁移问题，为跨平台策略复用提供了新方法。

authors_text: Shaohua Fan,Xiao Wang,Yanhu Mo,Chuan Shi,Jian Tang
title: Debiasing Graph Neural Networks via Learning Disentangled Causal Substructure
title_zh: 通过学习解纠缠的因果子结构消除图神经网络的偏差
abstract: Most Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) predict the labels of unseen graphs by learning the correlation between the input graphs and labels. However, by presenting a graph classification investigation on the training graphs with severe bias, surprisingly, we discover that GNNs always tend to explore the spurious correlations to make decision, even if the causal correlation always exists. This implies that existing GNNs trained on such biased datasets will suffer from poor generalization capability. By analyzing this problem in a causal view, we find that disentangling and decorrelating the causal and bias latent variables from the biased graphs are both crucial for debiasing. Inspiring by this, we propose a general disentangled GNN framework to learn the causal substructure and bias substructure, respectively. Particularly, we design a parameterized edge mask generator to explicitly split the input graph into causal and bias subgraphs. Then two GNN modules supervised by causal/bias-aware loss functions respectively are trained to encode causal and bias subgraphs into their corresponding representations. With the disentangled representations, we synthesize the counterfactual unbiased training samples to further decorrelate causal and bias variables. Moreover, to better benchmark the severe bias problem, we construct three new graph datasets, which have controllable bias degrees and are easier to visualize and explain. Experimental results well demonstrate that our approach achieves superior generalization performance over existing baselines. Furthermore, owing to the learned edge mask, the proposed model has appealing interpretability and transferability. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/googlebaba/DisC.
summary: Most Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) predict the labels of unseen graphs by learning the correlation between the input graphs and labels. However, by presenting a graph classification investigation on the training graphs with severe bias, surprisingly, we discover that GNNs always tend to explore the spurious correlations to make decision, even if the causal correlation always exists. This implies that existing GNNs trained on such biased datasets will suffer from poor generalization capability. By analyzing this problem in a causal view, we find that disentangling and decorrelating the causal and bias latent variables from the biased graphs are both crucial for debiasing. Inspiring by this, we propose a general disentangled GNN framework to learn the causal substructure and bias substructure, respectively. Particularly, we design a parameterized edge mask generator to explicitly split the input graph into causal and bias subgraphs. Then two GNN modules supervised by causal/bias-aware loss functions respectively are trained to encode causal and bias subgraphs into their corresponding representations. With the disentangled representations, we synthesize the counterfactual unbiased training samples to further decorrelate causal and bias variables. Moreover, to better benchmark the severe bias problem, we construct three new graph datasets, which have controllable bias degrees and are easier to visualize and explain. Experimental results well demonstrate that our approach achieves superior generalization performance over existing baselines. Furthermore, owing to the learned edge mask, the proposed model has appealing interpretability and transferability. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/googlebaba/DisC.
abstract_zh: 大多数图神经网络（GNN）通过学习输入图和标签之间的相关性来预测未见过的图的标签。然而，通过对具有严重偏差的训练图进行图分类研究，令人惊讶的是，我们发现 GNN 总是倾向于探索虚假相关性来做出决策，即使因果相关性始终存在。这意味着在此类有偏差的数据集上训练的现有 GNN 将面临泛化能力较差的问题。通过从因果角度分析这个问题，我们发现从有偏差的图中解开因果和偏差潜变量的纠缠和去相关对于去偏差来说都是至关重要的。受此启发，我们提出了一个通用的解缠结 GNN 框架来分别学习因果子结构和偏差子结构。特别是，我们设计了一个参数化边缘掩模生成器，以将输入图显式地分割为因果子图和偏差子图。然后，分别训练由因果/偏差感知损失函数监督的两个 GNN 模块，将因果子图和偏差子图编码为其相应的表示。通过解开的表示，我们合成了反事实的无偏差训练样本，以进一步去相关因果变量和偏差变量。此外，为了更好地对严重偏差问题进行基准测试，我们构建了三个新的图数据集，它们具有可控的偏差程度，并且更容易可视化和解释。实验结果很好地证明了我们的方法在现有基线上实现了卓越的泛化性能。此外，由于学习到的边缘掩模，所提出的模型具有有吸引力的可解释性和可迁移性。代码和数据可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/googlebaba/DisC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过学习解耦因果子结构来消除图神经网络（GNN）中偏差的方法，以提升其在存在严重偏差数据集上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN在存在严重偏差的训练数据上容易依赖虚假相关性而非因果关系，导致泛化能力差。需要通过解耦因果与偏差潜在变量来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 设计参数化边掩码生成器将输入图分割为因果子图和偏差子图，分别用因果/偏差感知损失函数训练两个GNN模块，并合成反事实无偏样本进一步解耦变量。
AI.result: 在三个新构建的可控偏差图数据集上，该方法在泛化性能上优于现有基线，且模型具有良好的可解释性和可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦因果与偏差子结构，所提框架有效提升了GNN在偏差数据下的泛化能力，并提供了直观的模型解释性。

tldr: 本文提出一种通过学习解耦因果子结构来消除图神经网络（GNN）中偏差的方法，以提升其在存在严重偏差数据集上的泛化能力。
motivation: 现有GNN在存在严重偏差的训练数据上容易依赖虚假相关性而非因果关系，导致泛化能力差。需要通过解耦因果与偏差潜在变量来解决这一问题。
method: 设计参数化边掩码生成器将输入图分割为因果子图和偏差子图，分别用因果/偏差感知损失函数训练两个GNN模块，并合成反事实无偏样本进一步解耦变量。
result: 在三个新构建的可控偏差图数据集上，该方法在泛化性能上优于现有基线，且模型具有良好的可解释性和可迁移性。
conclusion: 通过解耦因果与偏差子结构，所提框架有效提升了GNN在偏差数据下的泛化能力，并提供了直观的模型解释性。
search_text: Debiasing Graph Neural Networks via Learning Disentangled Causal Substructure 通过学习解纠缠的因果子结构消除图神经网络的偏差 Most Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) predict the labels of unseen graphs by learning the correlation between the input graphs and labels. However, by presenting a graph classification investigation on the training graphs with severe bias, surprisingly, we discover that GNNs always tend to explore the spurious correlations to make decision, even if the causal correlation always exists. This implies that existing GNNs trained on such biased datasets will suffer from poor generalization capability. By analyzing this problem in a causal view, we find that disentangling and decorrelating the causal and bias latent variables from the biased graphs are both crucial for debiasing. Inspiring by this, we propose a general disentangled GNN framework to learn the causal substructure and bias substructure, respectively. Particularly, we design a parameterized edge mask generator to explicitly split the input graph into causal and bias subgraphs. Then two GNN modules supervised by causal/bias-aware loss functions respectively are trained to encode causal and bias subgraphs into their corresponding representations. With the disentangled representations, we synthesize the counterfactual unbiased training samples to further decorrelate causal and bias variables. Moreover, to better benchmark the severe bias problem, we construct three new graph datasets, which have controllable bias degrees and are easier to visualize and explain. Experimental results well demonstrate that our approach achieves superior generalization performance over existing baselines. Furthermore, owing to the learned edge mask, the proposed model has appealing interpretability and transferability. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/googlebaba/DisC. 大多数图神经网络（GNN）通过学习输入图和标签之间的相关性来预测未见过的图的标签。然而，通过对具有严重偏差的训练图进行图分类研究，令人惊讶的是，我们发现 GNN 总是倾向于探索虚假相关性来做出决策，即使因果相关性始终存在。这意味着在此类有偏差的数据集上训练的现有 GNN 将面临泛化能力较差的问题。通过从因果角度分析这个问题，我们发现从有偏差的图中解开因果和偏差潜变量的纠缠和去相关对于去偏差来说都是至关重要的。受此启发，我们提出了一个通用的解缠结 GNN 框架来分别学习因果子结构和偏差子结构。特别是，我们设计了一个参数化边缘掩模生成器，以将输入图显式地分割为因果子图和偏差子图。然后，分别训练由因果/偏差感知损失函数监督的两个 GNN 模块，将因果子图和偏差子图编码为其相应的表示。通过解开的表示，我们合成了反事实的无偏差训练样本，以进一步去相关因果变量和偏差变量。此外，为了更好地对严重偏差问题进行基准测试，我们构建了三个新的图数据集，它们具有可控的偏差程度，并且更容易可视化和解释。实验结果很好地证明了我们的方法在现有基线上实现了卓越的泛化性能。此外，由于学习到的边缘掩模，所提出的模型具有有吸引力的可解释性和可迁移性。代码和数据可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/googlebaba/DisC。 本文提出一种通过学习解耦因果子结构来消除图神经网络（GNN）中偏差的方法，以提升其在存在严重偏差数据集上的泛化能力。 Shaohua Fan,Xiao Wang,Yanhu Mo,Chuan Shi,Jian Tang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhiwei Song,Hui Yao,Dan Tian,Gaohui Zhan
title: Cyclegan Network for Sheet Metal Welding Drawing Translation
title_zh: 用于钣金焊接图纸翻译的 Cyclegan 网络
abstract: In intelligent manufacturing, the quality of machine translation engineering drawings will directly affect its manufacturing accuracy. Currently, most of the work is manually translated, greatly reducing production efficiency. This paper proposes an automatic translation method for welded structural engineering drawings based on Cyclic Generative Adversarial Networks (CycleGAN). The CycleGAN network model of unpaired transfer learning is used to learn the feature mapping of real welding engineering drawings to realize automatic translation of engineering drawings. U-Net and PatchGAN are the main network for the generator and discriminator, respectively. Based on removing the identity mapping function, a high-dimensional sparse network is proposed to replace the traditional dense network for the Cyclegan generator to improve noise robustness. Increase the residual block hidden layer to increase the resolution of the generated graph. The improved and fine-tuned network models are experimentally validated, computing the gap between real and generated data. It meets the welding engineering precision standard and solves the main problem of low drawing recognition efficiency in the welding manufacturing process. The results show. After training with our model, the PSNR, SSIM and MSE of welding engineering drawings reach about 44.89%, 99.58% and 2.11, respectively, which are superior to traditional networks in both training speed and accuracy.
summary: In intelligent manufacturing, the quality of machine translation engineering drawings will directly affect its manufacturing accuracy. Currently, most of the work is manually translated, greatly reducing production efficiency. This paper proposes an automatic translation method for welded structural engineering drawings based on Cyclic Generative Adversarial Networks (CycleGAN). The CycleGAN network model of unpaired transfer learning is used to learn the feature mapping of real welding engineering drawings to realize automatic translation of engineering drawings. U-Net and PatchGAN are the main network for the generator and discriminator, respectively. Based on removing the identity mapping function, a high-dimensional sparse network is proposed to replace the traditional dense network for the Cyclegan generator to improve noise robustness. Increase the residual block hidden layer to increase the resolution of the generated graph. The improved and fine-tuned network models are experimentally validated, computing the gap between real and generated data. It meets the welding engineering precision standard and solves the main problem of low drawing recognition efficiency in the welding manufacturing process. The results show. After training with our model, the PSNR, SSIM and MSE of welding engineering drawings reach about 44.89%, 99.58% and 2.11, respectively, which are superior to traditional networks in both training speed and accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在智能制造中，机器翻译工程图纸的质量将直接影响其制造精度。目前大部分工作都是人工翻译，大大降低了生产效率。本文提出一种基于循环生成对抗网络（CycleGAN）的焊接结构工程图纸自动翻译方法。利用非配对迁移学习的CycleGAN网络模型来学习真实焊接工程图的特征映射，实现工程图的自动翻译。 U-Net 和 PatchGAN 分别是生成器和判别器的主要网络。在去除恒等映射函数的基础上，提出了一种高维稀疏网络来替代Cyclegan生成器的传统密集网络，以提高噪声鲁棒性。增加残差块隐藏层以提高生成图的分辨率。改进和微调的网络模型经过实验验证，计算真实数据和生成数据之间的差距。满足焊接工程精度标准，解决了焊接制造过程中图纸识别效率低的主要问题。结果显示。使用我们的模型进行训练后，焊接工程图的PSNR、SSIM和MSE分别达到约44.89%、99.58%和2.11，在训练速度和精度上均优于传统网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于CycleGAN网络的钣金焊接工程图纸自动翻译方法，解决传统人工翻译效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 人工翻译焊接图纸效率低下且影响制造精度，需通过AI方法提升自动化水平与翻译准确性。
AI.method: 采用无配对迁移学习的CycleGAN框架，结合U-Net生成器与PatchGAN判别器，改进生成器为高维稀疏网络并增强残差块以提升分辨率。
AI.result: 实验显示PSNR达44.89%、SSIM达99.58%、MSE为2.11，优于传统网络且满足焊接工程精度标准。
AI.conclusion: 改进的CycleGAN模型有效解决了焊接图纸翻译效率与精度问题，符合智能制造需求。

After training with our model, the PSNR, SSIM and MSE of welding engineering drawings reach about 44.89%, 99.58% and 2.11, respectively, which are superior to traditional networks in both training speed and accuracy. 在智能制造中，机器翻译工程图纸的质量将直接影响其制造精度。目前大部分工作都是人工翻译，大大降低了生产效率。本文提出一种基于循环生成对抗网络（CycleGAN）的焊接结构工程图纸自动翻译方法。利用非配对迁移学习的CycleGAN网络模型来学习真实焊接工程图的特征映射，实现工程图的自动翻译。 U-Net 和 PatchGAN 分别是生成器和判别器的主要网络。在去除恒等映射函数的基础上，提出了一种高维稀疏网络来替代Cyclegan生成器的传统密集网络，以提高噪声鲁棒性。增加残差块隐藏层以提高生成图的分辨率。改进和微调的网络模型经过实验验证，计算真实数据和生成数据之间的差距。满足焊接工程精度标准，解决了焊接制造过程中图纸识别效率低的主要问题。结果显示。使用我们的模型进行训练后，焊接工程图的PSNR、SSIM和MSE分别达到约44.89%、99.58%和2.11，在训练速度和精度上均优于传统网络。 本文提出基于CycleGAN网络的钣金焊接工程图纸自动翻译方法，解决传统人工翻译效率低的问题。 Zhiwei Song,Hui Yao,Dan Tian,Gaohui Zhan cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhiwei Song,Hui Yao
title: Segmentation method of U-net sheet metal engineering drawing based on CBAM attention mechanism
title_zh: 基于CBAM注意力机制的U网钣金工程图分割方法
abstract: In the manufacturing process of heavy industrial equipment, the specific unit in the welding diagram is first manually redrawn and then the corresponding sheet metal parts are cut, which is inefficient. To this end, this paper proposes a U-net-based method for the segmentation and extraction of specific units in welding engineering drawings. This method enables the cutting device to automatically segment specific graphic units according to visual information and automatically cut out sheet metal parts of corresponding shapes according to the segmentation results. This process is more efficient than traditional human-assisted cutting. Two weaknesses in the U-net network will lead to a decrease in segmentation performance: first, the focus on global semantic feature information is weak, and second, there is a large dimensional difference between shallow encoder features and deep decoder features. Based on the CBAM (Convolutional Block Attention Module) attention mechanism, this paper proposes a U-net jump structure model with an attention mechanism to improve the network's global semantic feature extraction ability. In addition, a U-net attention mechanism model with dual pooling convolution fusion is designed, the deep encoder's maximum pooling + convolution features and the shallow encoder's average pooling + convolution features are fused vertically to reduce the dimension difference between the shallow encoder and deep decoder. The dual-pool convolutional attention jump structure replaces the traditional U-net jump structure, which can effectively improve the specific unit segmentation performance of the welding engineering drawing. Using vgg16 as the backbone network, experiments have verified that the IoU, mAP, and Accu of our model in the welding engineering drawing dataset segmentation task are 84.72%, 86.84%, and 99.42%, respectively.
summary: In the manufacturing process of heavy industrial equipment, the specific unit in the welding diagram is first manually redrawn and then the corresponding sheet metal parts are cut, which is inefficient. To this end, this paper proposes a U-net-based method for the segmentation and extraction of specific units in welding engineering drawings. This method enables the cutting device to automatically segment specific graphic units according to visual information and automatically cut out sheet metal parts of corresponding shapes according to the segmentation results. This process is more efficient than traditional human-assisted cutting. Two weaknesses in the U-net network will lead to a decrease in segmentation performance: first, the focus on global semantic feature information is weak, and second, there is a large dimensional difference between shallow encoder features and deep decoder features. Based on the CBAM (Convolutional Block Attention Module) attention mechanism, this paper proposes a U-net jump structure model with an attention mechanism to improve the network's global semantic feature extraction ability. In addition, a U-net attention mechanism model with dual pooling convolution fusion is designed, the deep encoder's maximum pooling + convolution features and the shallow encoder's average pooling + convolution features are fused vertically to reduce the dimension difference between the shallow encoder and deep decoder. The dual-pool convolutional attention jump structure replaces the traditional U-net jump structure, which can effectively improve the specific unit segmentation performance of the welding engineering drawing. Using vgg16 as the backbone network, experiments have verified that the IoU, mAP, and Accu of our model in the welding engineering drawing dataset segmentation task are 84.72%, 86.84%, and 99.42%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在重工业设备的制造过程中，首先手动重新绘制焊接图中的特定单元，然后切割相应的钣金件，效率低下。为此，本文提出一种基于U-net的焊接工程图中特定单元的分割和提取方法。该方法使得切割装置能够根据视觉信息自动分割特定的图形单元，并根据分割结果自动切割出相应形状的钣金件。该过程比传统的人工辅助切割更加高效。 U-net网络的两个弱点会导致分割性能下降：一是对全局语义特征信息的关注较弱，二是浅层编码器特征和深层解码器特征之间存在较大的维度差异。基于CBAM（Convolutional Block Attention Module）注意力机制，本文提出了一种带有注意力机制的U-net跳跃结构模型，以提高网络的全局语义特征提取能力。此外，设计了双池化卷积融合的U-net注意力机制模型，将深层编码器的最大池化+卷积特征和浅层编码器的平均池化+卷积特征垂直融合，以减少浅层编码器和深层解码器之间的维度差异。双池卷积注意力跳跃结构替代了传统的U-net跳跃结构，可以有效提高焊接工程图的特定单元分割性能。使用vgg16作为主干网络，实验验证了我们的模型在焊接工程图数据集分割任务中的IoU、mAP和Accu分别为84.72%、86.84%和99.42%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于CBAM注意力机制的U-net模型，用于焊接工程图纸中特定单元的分割提取，以提高钣金件切割效率。
AI.motivation: 传统人工重绘图纸并切割钣金件的方式效率低下，U-net网络存在全局语义特征提取不足及编码器-解码器特征维度差异大的缺陷。
AI.method: 融合CBAM注意力机制改进U-net跳跃结构，设计双池化卷积融合模块，通过垂直融合深层最大池化特征与浅层平均池化特征缩小维度差异。
AI.result: 在焊接工程图纸数据集上，模型分割任务的IoU、mAP和Accu分别达到84.72%、86.84%和99.42%。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过注意力机制与双池化融合有效提升了焊接图纸特定单元分割性能，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Segmentation method of U-net sheet metal engineering drawing based on CBAM attention mechanism 基于CBAM注意力机制的U网钣金工程图分割方法 In the manufacturing process of heavy industrial equipment, the specific unit in the welding diagram is first manually redrawn and then the corresponding sheet metal parts are cut, which is inefficient. To this end, this paper proposes a U-net-based method for the segmentation and extraction of specific units in welding engineering drawings. This method enables the cutting device to automatically segment specific graphic units according to visual information and automatically cut out sheet metal parts of corresponding shapes according to the segmentation results. This process is more efficient than traditional human-assisted cutting. Two weaknesses in the U-net network will lead to a decrease in segmentation performance: first, the focus on global semantic feature information is weak, and second, there is a large dimensional difference between shallow encoder features and deep decoder features. Based on the CBAM (Convolutional Block Attention Module) attention mechanism, this paper proposes a U-net jump structure model with an attention mechanism to improve the network's global semantic feature extraction ability. In addition, a U-net attention mechanism model with dual pooling convolution fusion is designed, the deep encoder's maximum pooling + convolution features and the shallow encoder's average pooling + convolution features are fused vertically to reduce the dimension difference between the shallow encoder and deep decoder. The dual-pool convolutional attention jump structure replaces the traditional U-net jump structure, which can effectively improve the specific unit segmentation performance of the welding engineering drawing. Using vgg16 as the backbone network, experiments have verified that the IoU, mAP, and Accu of our model in the welding engineering drawing dataset segmentation task are 84.72%, 86.84%, and 99.42%, respectively. 在重工业设备的制造过程中，首先手动重新绘制焊接图中的特定单元，然后切割相应的钣金件，效率低下。为此，本文提出一种基于U-net的焊接工程图中特定单元的分割和提取方法。该方法使得切割装置能够根据视觉信息自动分割特定的图形单元，并根据分割结果自动切割出相应形状的钣金件。该过程比传统的人工辅助切割更加高效。 U-net网络的两个弱点会导致分割性能下降：一是对全局语义特征信息的关注较弱，二是浅层编码器特征和深层解码器特征之间存在较大的维度差异。基于CBAM（Convolutional Block Attention Module）注意力机制，本文提出了一种带有注意力机制的U-net跳跃结构模型，以提高网络的全局语义特征提取能力。此外，设计了双池化卷积融合的U-net注意力机制模型，将深层编码器的最大池化+卷积特征和浅层编码器的平均池化+卷积特征垂直融合，以减少浅层编码器和深层解码器之间的维度差异。双池卷积注意力跳跃结构替代了传统的U-net跳跃结构，可以有效提高焊接工程图的特定单元分割性能。使用vgg16作为主干网络，实验验证了我们的模型在焊接工程图数据集分割任务中的IoU、mAP和Accu分别为84.72%、86.84%和99.42%。 本文提出基于CBAM注意力机制的U-net模型，用于焊接工程图纸中特定单元的分割提取，以提高钣金件切割效率。 Zhiwei Song,Hui Yao cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Jiaguo Yu,Huming Qiu,Dubing Chen,Haofeng Zhang
title: Weighted Contrastive Hashing
title_zh: 加权对比哈希
abstract: The development of unsupervised hashing is advanced by the recent popular contrastive learning paradigm. However, previous contrastive learning-based works have been hampered by (1) insufficient data similarity mining based on global-only image representations, and (2) the hash code semantic loss caused by the data augmentation. In this paper, we propose a novel method, namely Weighted Contrative Hashing (WCH), to take a step towards solving these two problems. We introduce a novel mutual attention module to alleviate the problem of information asymmetry in network features caused by the missing image structure during contrative augmentation. Furthermore, we explore the fine-grained semantic relations between images, i.e., we divide the images into multiple patches and calculate similarities between patches. The aggregated weighted similarities, which reflect the deep image relations, are distilled to facilitate the hash codes learning with a distillation loss, so as to obtain better retrieval performance. Extensive experiments show that the proposed WCH significantly outperforms existing unsupervised hashing methods on three benchmark datasets.
summary: The development of unsupervised hashing is advanced by the recent popular contrastive learning paradigm. However, previous contrastive learning-based works have been hampered by (1) insufficient data similarity mining based on global-only image representations, and (2) the hash code semantic loss caused by the data augmentation. In this paper, we propose a novel method, namely Weighted Contrative Hashing (WCH), to take a step towards solving these two problems. We introduce a novel mutual attention module to alleviate the problem of information asymmetry in network features caused by the missing image structure during contrative augmentation. Furthermore, we explore the fine-grained semantic relations between images, i.e., we divide the images into multiple patches and calculate similarities between patches. The aggregated weighted similarities, which reflect the deep image relations, are distilled to facilitate the hash codes learning with a distillation loss, so as to obtain better retrieval performance. Extensive experiments show that the proposed WCH significantly outperforms existing unsupervised hashing methods on three benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近流行的对比学习范式推动了无监督哈希的发展。然而，之前基于对比学习的工作受到以下因素的阻碍：（1）基于仅全局图像表示的数据相似性挖掘不足，以及（2）数据增强导致的哈希码语义损失。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，即加权对比哈希（WCH），以解决这两个问题。我们引入了一种新颖的相互关注模块来缓解对比增强期间由于丢失图像结构而导致的网络特征信息不对称问题。此外，我们探索图像之间的细粒度语义关系，即将图像划分为多个块并计算块之间的相似度。对反映深层图像关系的聚合加权相似度进行蒸馏，以方便具有蒸馏损失的哈希码学习，从而获得更好的检索性能。大量实验表明，所提出的 WCH 在三个基准数据集上显着优于现有的无监督哈希方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的无监督哈希方法Weighted Contrastive Hashing（WCH），通过改进对比学习中的相似性挖掘和语义损失问题，提升图像检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法在无监督哈希中存在两个问题：仅依赖全局图像表示导致相似性挖掘不足，以及数据增强引发的哈希码语义损失。
AI.method: 引入互注意力模块缓解图像结构缺失导致的特征不对称问题，并通过分块计算细粒度语义相似性，结合蒸馏损失优化哈希码学习。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，WCH显著优于现有无监督哈希方法，检索性能明显提升。
AI.conclusion: WCH通过改进相似性建模和语义对齐，有效解决了无监督哈希中的关键问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alessandro Pianese,Davide Cozzolino,Giovanni Poggi,Luisa Verdoliva
title: Deepfake audio detection by speaker verification
title_zh: 通过说话者验证进行 Deepfake 音频检测
abstract: Thanks to recent advances in deep learning, sophisticated generation tools exist, nowadays, that produce extremely realistic synthetic speech. However, malicious uses of such tools are possible and likely, posing a serious threat to our society. Hence, synthetic voice detection has become a pressing research topic, and a large variety of detection methods have been recently proposed. Unfortunately, they hardly generalize to synthetic audios generated by tools never seen in the training phase, which makes them unfit to face real-world scenarios. In this work, we aim at overcoming this issue by proposing a new detection approach that leverages only the biometric characteristics of the speaker, with no reference to specific manipulations. Since the detector is trained only on real data, generalization is automatically ensured. The proposed approach can be implemented based on off-the-shelf speaker verification tools. We test several such solutions on three popular test sets, obtaining good performance, high generalization ability, and high robustness to audio impairment.
summary: Thanks to recent advances in deep learning, sophisticated generation tools exist, nowadays, that produce extremely realistic synthetic speech. However, malicious uses of such tools are possible and likely, posing a serious threat to our society. Hence, synthetic voice detection has become a pressing research topic, and a large variety of detection methods have been recently proposed. Unfortunately, they hardly generalize to synthetic audios generated by tools never seen in the training phase, which makes them unfit to face real-world scenarios. In this work, we aim at overcoming this issue by proposing a new detection approach that leverages only the biometric characteristics of the speaker, with no reference to specific manipulations. Since the detector is trained only on real data, generalization is automatically ensured. The proposed approach can be implemented based on off-the-shelf speaker verification tools. We test several such solutions on three popular test sets, obtaining good performance, high generalization ability, and high robustness to audio impairment.
abstract_zh: 由于深度学习的最新进展，如今存在复杂的生成工具，可以产生极其逼真的合成语音。然而，恶意使用此类工具是可能的，并且很可能对我们的社会构成严重威胁。因此，合成语音检测已成为一个紧迫的研究课题，并且最近提出了多种检测方法。不幸的是，它们很难推广到由训练阶段从未见过的工具生成的合成音频，这使得它们不适合面对现实世界的场景。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过提出一种新的检测方法来克服这个问题，该方法仅利用说话者的生物特征，而不参考特定的操作。由于检测器仅根据真实数据进行训练，因此自动确保了泛化性。所提出的方法可以基于现成的说话者验证工具来实现。我们在三个流行的测试集上测试了几种这样的解决方案，获得了良好的性能、高泛化能力和对音频损伤的高鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于说话人验证的深度伪造音频检测方法，解决现有检测技术泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有合成语音检测方法难以应对训练阶段未接触过的生成工具，导致现实场景中检测效果不佳，亟需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用说话人生物特征进行检测，仅使用真实数据训练模型，通过现成的说话人验证工具实现，无需针对特定合成方式设计检测特征。
AI.result: 在三个主流测试集上取得良好检测效果，展现出对未见合成工具的强泛化能力及对音频损伤的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生物特征验证实现通用型检测，为应对不断演进的深度伪造音频威胁提供了有效技术路径。

authors_text: Khushboo Mehra,Hassan Soliman,Soumya Ranjan Sahoo
title: Data Augmentation using Feature Generation for Volumetric Medical Images
title_zh: 使用体积医学图像特征生成进行数据增强
abstract: Medical image classification is one of the most critical problems in the image recognition area. One of the major challenges in this field is the scarcity of labelled training data. Additionally, there is often class imbalance in datasets as some cases are very rare to happen. As a result, accuracy in classification task is normally low. Deep Learning models, in particular, show promising results on image segmentation and classification problems, but they require very large datasets for training. Therefore, there is a need to generate more of synthetic samples from the same distribution. Previous work has shown that feature generation is more efficient and leads to better performance than corresponding image generation. We apply this idea in the Medical Imaging domain. We use transfer learning to train a segmentation model for the small dataset for which gold-standard class annotations are available. We extracted the learnt features and use them to generate synthetic features conditioned on class labels, using Auxiliary Classifier GAN (ACGAN). We test the quality of the generated features in a downstream classification task for brain tumors according to their severity level. Experimental results show a promising result regarding the validity of these generated features and their overall contribution to balancing the data and improving the classification class-wise accuracy.
summary: Medical image classification is one of the most critical problems in the image recognition area. One of the major challenges in this field is the scarcity of labelled training data. Additionally, there is often class imbalance in datasets as some cases are very rare to happen. As a result, accuracy in classification task is normally low. Deep Learning models, in particular, show promising results on image segmentation and classification problems, but they require very large datasets for training. Previous work has shown that feature generation is more efficient and leads to better performance than corresponding image generation. We apply this idea in the Medical Imaging domain. We use transfer learning to train a segmentation model for the small dataset for which gold-standard class annotations are available. We extracted the learnt features and use them to generate synthetic features conditioned on class labels, using Auxiliary Classifier GAN (ACGAN). We test the quality of the generated features in a downstream classification task for brain tumors according to their severity level. Experimental results show a promising result regarding the validity of these generated features and their overall contribution to balancing the data and improving the classification class-wise accuracy.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分类是图像识别领域最关键的问题之一。该领域的主要挑战之一是标记训练数据的稀缺。此外，数据集中经常存在类别不平衡，因为某些情况很少发生。因此，分类任务的准确性通常较低。特别是深度学习模型在图像分割和分类问题上显示出有希望的结果，但它们需要非常大的数据集进行训练。因此，需要从同一分布生成更多的合成样本。先前的工作表明，特征生成比相应的图像生成更高效，并且性能更好。我们将这个想法应用到医学成像领域。我们使用迁移学习为可使用黄金标准类注释的小数据集训练分割模型。我们提取学习到的特征，并使用它们通过辅助分类器 GAN (ACGAN) 生成以类标签为条件的合成特征。我们根据脑肿瘤的严重程度测试下游分类任务中生成的特征的质量。实验结果表明，这些生成的特征的有效性及其对平衡数据和提高分类准确度的总体贡献是有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征生成的数据增强方法，用于解决医学影像分类中数据稀缺和类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 医学影像分类面临标注数据不足和类别分布不均的挑战，而深度学习模型需要大量数据训练，传统图像生成效率较低。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习训练分割模型提取特征，利用ACGAN根据类别标签生成合成特征，并在脑肿瘤分类任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 生成的特征有效提升分类任务的准确率，显著改善数据不平衡问题。
AI.conclusion: 特征生成方法在医学影像数据增强中具有可行性，能有效提升分类模型性能。

search_text: Data Augmentation using Feature Generation for Volumetric Medical Images 使用体积医学图像特征生成进行数据增强 Medical image classification is one of the most critical problems in the image recognition area. One of the major challenges in this field is the scarcity of labelled training data. Additionally, there is often class imbalance in datasets as some cases are very rare to happen. As a result, accuracy in classification task is normally low. Deep Learning models, in particular, show promising results on image segmentation and classification problems, but they require very large datasets for training. Therefore, there is a need to generate more of synthetic samples from the same distribution. Previous work has shown that feature generation is more efficient and leads to better performance than corresponding image generation. We apply this idea in the Medical Imaging domain. We use transfer learning to train a segmentation model for the small dataset for which gold-standard class annotations are available. We extracted the learnt features and use them to generate synthetic features conditioned on class labels, using Auxiliary Classifier GAN (ACGAN). We test the quality of the generated features in a downstream classification task for brain tumors according to their severity level. Experimental results show a promising result regarding the validity of these generated features and their overall contribution to balancing the data and improving the classification class-wise accuracy. 医学图像分类是图像识别领域最关键的问题之一。该领域的主要挑战之一是标记训练数据的稀缺。此外，数据集中经常存在类别不平衡，因为某些情况很少发生。因此，分类任务的准确性通常较低。特别是深度学习模型在图像分割和分类问题上显示出有希望的结果，但它们需要非常大的数据集进行训练。因此，需要从同一分布生成更多的合成样本。先前的工作表明，特征生成比相应的图像生成更高效，并且性能更好。我们将这个想法应用到医学成像领域。我们使用迁移学习为可使用黄金标准类注释的小数据集训练分割模型。我们提取学习到的特征，并使用它们通过辅助分类器 GAN (ACGAN) 生成以类标签为条件的合成特征。我们根据脑肿瘤的严重程度测试下游分类任务中生成的特征的质量。实验结果表明，这些生成的特征的有效性及其对平衡数据和提高分类准确度的总体贡献是有希望的结果。 本文提出一种基于特征生成的数据增强方法，用于解决医学影像分类中数据稀缺和类别不平衡问题。 Khushboo Mehra,Hassan Soliman,Soumya Ranjan Sahoo eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ivor van der Hoog,Irene Parada,Eva Rotenberg
title: Dynamic Embeddings of Dynamic Single-Source Upward Planar Graphs
title_zh: 动态单源向上平面图的动态嵌入
abstract: A directed graph $G$ is upward planar if it admits a planar embedding such that each edge is $y$-monotone. Unlike planarity testing, upward planarity testing is NP-hard except in restricted cases, such as when the graph has the single-source property (i.e. each connected component only has one source). In this paper, we present a dynamic algorithm for maintaining a combinatorial embedding $\mathcal{E}(G)$ of a single-source upward planar graph subject to edge deletions, edge contractions, edge insertions upwards across a face, and single-source-preserving vertex splits through specified corners. We furthermore support changes to the embedding $\mathcal{E}(G)$ on the form of subgraph flips that mirror or slide the placement of a subgraph that is connected to the rest of the graph via at most two vertices. All update operations are supported as long as the graph remains upward planar, and all queries are supported as long as the graph remains single-source. Updates that violate upward planarity are identified as such and rejected by our update algorithm. We dynamically maintain a linear-size data structure on $G$ which supports incidence queries between a vertex and a face, and upward-linkability of vertex pairs. If a pair of vertices are not upwards-linkable, we facilitate one-flip-linkable queries that point to a subgraph flip that makes them linkable, if any such flip exists. We support all updates and queries in $O(\log^2 n)$ time.

Unlike planarity testing, upward planarity testing is NP-hard except in restricted cases, such as when the graph has the single-source property (i.e. each connected component only has one source). In this paper, we present a dynamic algorithm for maintaining a combinatorial embedding $\mathcal{E}(G)$ of a single-source upward planar graph subject to edge deletions, edge contractions, edge insertions upwards across a face, and single-source-preserving vertex splits through specified corners. We furthermore support changes to the embedding $\mathcal{E}(G)$ on the form of subgraph flips that mirror or slide the placement of a subgraph that is connected to the rest of the graph via at most two vertices. All update operations are supported as long as the graph remains upward planar, and all queries are supported as long as the graph remains single-source. Updates that violate upward planarity are identified as such and rejected by our update algorithm. We dynamically maintain a linear-size data structure on $G$ which supports incidence queries between a vertex and a face, and upward-linkability of vertex pairs. If a pair of vertices are not upwards-linkable, we facilitate one-flip-linkable queries that point to a subgraph flip that makes them linkable, if any such flip exists. We support all updates and queries in $O(\log^2 n)$ time.
abstract_zh: 如果有向图 $G$ 允许平面嵌入且每条边都是 $y$ 单调，则它是向上平面的。与平面性测试不同，向上平面性测试是 NP 困难的，除非在有限的情况下，例如当图形具有单源属性时（即每个连接的组件只有一个源）。在本文中，我们提出了一种动态算法，用于维护单源向上平面图的组合嵌入$\mathcal{E}(G)$，该算法会受到边删除、边收缩、跨面向上的边插入以及通过指定角的单源保留顶点分割的影响。我们还支持以子图翻转的形式对嵌入 $\mathcal{E}(G)$ 进行更改，子图翻转镜像或滑动通过最多两个顶点连接到图的其余部分的子图的位置。只要图形保持向上平面，就支持所有更新操作；只要图形保持单一源，就支持所有查询。违反向上平面性的更新将被我们的更新算法识别并拒绝。我们在 $G$ 上动态维护一个线性大小的数据结构，它支持顶点和面之间的关联查询以及顶点对的向上可链接性。如果一对顶点不可向上链接，我们将促进单翻转可链接查询，该查询指向使它们可链接的子图翻转（如果存在任何此类翻转）。我们支持 $O(\log^2 n)$ 时间内的所有更新和查询。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态维护单源向上平面图组合嵌入的算法，支持多种图操作并保持向上平面性。
AI.motivation: 向上平面性测试是NP难问题，现有方法难以处理动态变化的图结构，需高效维护单源向上平面图的嵌入。
AI.method: 设计动态算法处理边删除、收缩、插入及顶点分裂等操作，结合子图翻转技术维护嵌入，并使用线性大小数据结构支持查询。
AI.result: 所有更新和查询操作在$O(\\log^2 n)$时间内完成，动态维护嵌入并检测违反向上平面性的操作。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为动态单源向上平面图提供了高效的维护方案，拓展了平面图动态处理的应用场景。

authors_text: Aleksander B. G. Christiansen,Jacob Holm,Ivor van der Hoog,Eva Rotenberg,Chris Schwiegelshohn
title: Adaptive Out-Orientations with Applications
title_zh: 自适应外向与应用程序
abstract: We give improved algorithms for maintaining edge-orientations of a fully-dynamic graph, such that the out-degree of each vertex is bounded. On one hand, we show how to orient the edges such that the out-degree of each vertex is proportional to the arboricity $α$ of the graph, in a worst-case update time of $O(\log^3 n \log α)$. On the other hand, motivated by applications including dynamic maximal matching, we obtain a different trade-off, namely the improved worst case update time of $O(\log ^2 n \log α)$ for the problem of maintaining an edge-orientation with at most $O(α+ \log n)$ out-edges per vertex. Since our algorithms have update times with worst-case guarantees, the number of changes to the solution (i.e. the recourse) is naturally limited. Our algorithms adapt to the current arboricity of the graph, and yield improvements over previous work: Firstly, we obtain an $O(\varepsilon^{-6}\log^3 n \log ρ)$ worst-case update time algorithm for maintaining a $(1+\varepsilon)$ approximation of the maximum subgraph density, $ρ$. Secondly, we obtain an $O(\varepsilon^{-6}\log^3 n \log α)$ worst-case update time algorithm for maintaining a $(1 + \varepsilon) \cdot OPT + 2$ approximation of the optimal out-orientation of a graph with adaptive arboricity $α$. This yields the first worst-case polylogarithmic dynamic algorithm for decomposing into $O(α)$ forests.Thirdly, we obtain arboricity-adaptive fully-dynamic deterministic algorithms for a variety, of problems including maximal matching, $Δ+1$ coloring, and matrix vector multiplication. All update times are worst-case $O(α+\log^2n \log α)$, where $α$ is the current arboricity of the graph.
summary: We give improved algorithms for maintaining edge-orientations of a fully-dynamic graph, such that the out-degree of each vertex is bounded. On one hand, we show how to orient the edges such that the out-degree of each vertex is proportional to the arboricity $α$ of the graph, in a worst-case update time of $O(\log^3 n \log α)$. On the other hand, motivated by applications including dynamic maximal matching, we obtain a different trade-off, namely the improved worst case update time of $O(\log ^2 n \log α)$ for the problem of maintaining an edge-orientation with at most $O(α+ \log n)$ out-edges per vertex. Since our algorithms have update times with worst-case guarantees, the number of changes to the solution (i.e. the recourse) is naturally limited. Our algorithms adapt to the current arboricity of the graph, and yield improvements over previous work: Firstly, we obtain an $O(\varepsilon^{-6}\log^3 n \log ρ)$ worst-case update time algorithm for maintaining a $(1+\varepsilon)$ approximation of the maximum subgraph density, $ρ$. Secondly, we obtain an $O(\varepsilon^{-6}\log^3 n \log α)$ worst-case update time algorithm for maintaining a $(1 + \varepsilon) \cdot OPT + 2$ approximation of the optimal out-orientation of a graph with adaptive arboricity $α$. This yields the first worst-case polylogarithmic dynamic algorithm for decomposing into $O(α)$ forests.Thirdly, we obtain arboricity-adaptive fully-dynamic deterministic algorithms for a variety, of problems including maximal matching, $Δ+1$ coloring, and matrix vector multiplication. All update times are worst-case $O(α+\log^2n \log α)$, where $α$ is the current arboricity of the graph.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了用于维护全动态图的边方向的改进算法，使得每个顶点的出度是有界的。一方面，我们展示了如何定向边，使得每个顶点的出度与图的树木度 $α$ 成正比，最坏情况的更新时间为 $O(\log^3 n \log α)$。另一方面，在包括动态最大匹配在内的应用的推动下，我们获得了不同的权衡，即对于维持每个顶点最多 $O(α+ \log n)$ 出边的边缘方向问题，改进了 $O(\log ^2 n \log α)$ 的最坏情况更新时间。由于我们的算法具有最坏情况保证的更新时间，因此解决方案的更改次数（即追索权）自然是有限的。我们的算法适应图的当前树木性，并比之前的工作有所改进：首先，我们获得 $O(\varepsilon^{-6}\log^3 n \log ρ)$ 最坏情况更新时间算法，用于维持最大子图密度 $ρ$ 的 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 近似值。其次，我们获得一个 $O(\varepsilon^{-6}\log^3 n \log α)$ 最坏情况更新时间算法，用于维持具有自适应树木性 $α$ 的图的最佳外向的 $(1 + \varepsilon) \cdot OPT + 2$ 近似值。这产生了第一个用于分解 $O(α)$ 森林的最坏情况多对数动态算法。第三，我们获得了针对各种问题的树木性自适应全动态确定性算法，包括最大匹配、$Δ+1$ 着色和矩阵向量乘法。所有更新时间均为最坏情况 $O(α+\log^2n \log α)$，其中 $α$ 是图的当前树状度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究动态图中边定向维护的改进算法，确保顶点出度受限，并应用于多个问题。
AI.motivation: 现有动态图算法在更新时间与资源消耗上存在不足，需适应图的当前树度以提高效率。
AI.method: 提出两种边定向策略：基于树度α的出度比例控制及针对动态匹配的改进更新时间，算法适应当前树度。
AI.result: 实现更优更新时间，改进最大匹配、Δ+1着色等问题的动态算法，并首次提供多项式对数时间的森林分解方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过适应性算法显著提升动态图维护效率，为多个问题提供更优解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究动态图中边定向维护的改进算法，确保顶点出度受限，并应用于多个问题。

ai_content.conclusion: 通过适应性算法显著提升动态图维护效率，为多个问题提供更优解决方案。

search_text: Adaptive Out-Orientations with Applications 自适应外向与应用程序 We give improved algorithms for maintaining edge-orientations of a fully-dynamic graph, such that the out-degree of each vertex is bounded. On one hand, we show how to orient the edges such that the out-degree of each vertex is proportional to the arboricity $α$ of the graph, in a worst-case update time of $O(\log^3 n \log α)$. On the other hand, motivated by applications including dynamic maximal matching, we obtain a different trade-off, namely the improved worst case update time of $O(\log ^2 n \log α)$ for the problem of maintaining an edge-orientation with at most $O(α+ \log n)$ out-edges per vertex. Since our algorithms have update times with worst-case guarantees, the number of changes to the solution (i.e. the recourse) is naturally limited. Our algorithms adapt to the current arboricity of the graph, and yield improvements over previous work: Firstly, we obtain an $O(\varepsilon^{-6}\log^3 n \log ρ)$ worst-case update time algorithm for maintaining a $(1+\varepsilon)$ approximation of the maximum subgraph density, $ρ$. Secondly, we obtain an $O(\varepsilon^{-6}\log^3 n \log α)$ worst-case update time algorithm for maintaining a $(1 + \varepsilon) \cdot OPT + 2$ approximation of the optimal out-orientation of a graph with adaptive arboricity $α$. This yields the first worst-case polylogarithmic dynamic algorithm for decomposing into $O(α)$ forests.Thirdly, we obtain arboricity-adaptive fully-dynamic deterministic algorithms for a variety, of problems including maximal matching, $Δ+1$ coloring, and matrix vector multiplication. All update times are worst-case $O(α+\log^2n \log α)$, where $α$ is the current arboricity of the graph. 我们给出了用于维护全动态图的边方向的改进算法，使得每个顶点的出度是有界的。一方面，我们展示了如何定向边，使得每个顶点的出度与图的树木度 $α$ 成正比，最坏情况的更新时间为 $O(\log^3 n \log α)$。另一方面，在包括动态最大匹配在内的应用的推动下，我们获得了不同的权衡，即对于维持每个顶点最多 $O(α+ \log n)$ 出边的边缘方向问题，改进了 $O(\log ^2 n \log α)$ 的最坏情况更新时间。由于我们的算法具有最坏情况保证的更新时间，因此解决方案的更改次数（即追索权）自然是有限的。我们的算法适应图的当前树木性，并比之前的工作有所改进：首先，我们获得 $O(\varepsilon^{-6}\log^3 n \log ρ)$ 最坏情况更新时间算法，用于维持最大子图密度 $ρ$ 的 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 近似值。其次，我们获得一个 $O(\varepsilon^{-6}\log^3 n \log α)$ 最坏情况更新时间算法，用于维持具有自适应树木性 $α$ 的图的最佳外向的 $(1 + \varepsilon) \cdot OPT + 2$ 近似值。这产生了第一个用于分解 $O(α)$ 森林的最坏情况多对数动态算法。第三，我们获得了针对各种问题的树木性自适应全动态确定性算法，包括最大匹配、$Δ+1$ 着色和矩阵向量乘法。所有更新时间均为最坏情况 $O(α+\log^2n \log α)$，其中 $α$ 是图的当前树状度。 本文研究动态图中边定向维护的改进算法，确保顶点出度受限，并应用于多个问题。 Aleksander B. G. Christiansen,Jacob Holm,Ivor van der Hoog,Eva Rotenberg,Chris Schwiegelshohn cs.DS

authors_text: Moctar Abdoul Latif Sawadogo,Furkan Pala,Gurkirat Singh,Imen Selmi,Pauline Puteaux,Alice Othmani
title: PTSD in the Wild: A Video Database for Studying Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder Recognition in Unconstrained Environments
title_zh: 野外 PTSD：用于研究不受约束的环境中创伤后应激障碍识别的视频数据库
abstract: POST-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) is a chronic and debilitating mental condition that is developed in response to catastrophic life events, such as military combat, sexual assault, and natural disasters. PTSD is characterized by flashbacks of past traumatic events, intrusive thoughts, nightmares, hypervigilance, and sleep disturbance, all of which affect a person's life and lead to considerable social, occupational, and interpersonal dysfunction. The diagnosis of PTSD is done by medical professionals using self-assessment questionnaire of PTSD symptoms as defined in the Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders (DSM). In this paper, and for the first time, we collected, annotated, and prepared for public distribution a new video database for automatic PTSD diagnosis, called PTSD in the wild dataset. The database exhibits "natural" and big variability in acquisition conditions with different pose, facial expression, lighting, focus, resolution, age, gender, race, occlusions and background. In addition to describing the details of the dataset collection, we provide a benchmark for evaluating computer vision and machine learning based approaches on PTSD in the wild dataset. In addition, we propose and we evaluate a deep learning based approach for PTSD detection in respect to the given benchmark. The proposed approach shows very promising results. Interested researcher can download a copy of PTSD-in-the wild dataset from: http://www.lissi.fr/PTSD-Dataset/
summary: POST-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) is a chronic and debilitating mental condition that is developed in response to catastrophic life events, such as military combat, sexual assault, and natural disasters. PTSD is characterized by flashbacks of past traumatic events, intrusive thoughts, nightmares, hypervigilance, and sleep disturbance, all of which affect a person's life and lead to considerable social, occupational, and interpersonal dysfunction. The diagnosis of PTSD is done by medical professionals using self-assessment questionnaire of PTSD symptoms as defined in the Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders (DSM). In this paper, and for the first time, we collected, annotated, and prepared for public distribution a new video database for automatic PTSD diagnosis, called PTSD in the wild dataset. The database exhibits "natural" and big variability in acquisition conditions with different pose, facial expression, lighting, focus, resolution, age, gender, race, occlusions and background. In addition to describing the details of the dataset collection, we provide a benchmark for evaluating computer vision and machine learning based approaches on PTSD in the wild dataset. In addition, we propose and we evaluate a deep learning based approach for PTSD detection in respect to the given benchmark. The proposed approach shows very promising results. Interested researcher can download a copy of PTSD-in-the wild dataset from: http://www.lissi.fr/PTSD-Dataset/
abstract_zh: 创伤后应激障碍 (PTSD) 是一种慢性且令人衰弱的精神疾病，是由于灾难性的生活事件（如军事战斗、性侵犯和自然灾害）而产生的。 PTSD 的特点是过去创伤事件的闪回、侵入性想法、噩梦、过度警觉和睡眠障碍，所有这些都会影响一个人的生活，并导致相当大的社交、职业和人际功能障碍。 PTSD 的诊断由医疗专业人员使用《精神疾病诊断和统计手册》(DSM) 中定义的 PTSD 症状自我评估问卷来完成。在本文中，我们首次收集、注释并准备公开分发一个用于自动 PTSD 诊断的新视频数据库，称为野生数据集中的 PTSD。该数据库在不同姿势、面部表情、照明、焦点、分辨率、年龄、性别、种族、遮挡和背景的采集条件中表现出“自然”和巨大的变化。除了描述数据集集合的细节之外，我们还提供了一个基准，用于评估野生数据集中针对 PTSD 的计算机视觉和机器学习方法。此外，我们根据给定的基准提出并评估了一种基于深度学习的 PTSD 检测方法。所提出的方法显示出非常有希望的结果。有兴趣的研究人员可以从以下位置下载 PTSD-in-the wild 数据集的副本：http://www.lissi.fr/PTSD-Dataset/

AI.tldr: 本文提出并构建了一个名为'PTSD in the wild'的视频数据库，用于在非受限环境下研究创伤后应激障碍（PTSD）的自动识别，并提出基于深度学习的检测方法。
AI.motivation: PTSD诊断依赖专业人员的主观评估，缺乏客观且自动化的工具。现有方法难以处理真实场景中的复杂变化，因此需要构建多样化数据集并探索机器学习解决方案。
AI.method: 收集包含多种姿态、表情、光照、分辨率等自然变异的视频数据，建立标注数据集；设计基准测试框架，并提出基于深度学习的PTSD检测模型进行评估。
AI.result: 提出的深度学习方法在数据集基准测试中表现出有前景的识别效果，验证了该方法在非受限环境下的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为PTSD自动识别研究提供了重要资源，所提方法证明了计算机视觉技术在该领域的潜力，但需进一步优化以适应实际应用需求。

authors_text: Jacob Holm,Ivor van der Hoog,Eva Rotenberg
title: Worst-case Deterministic Fully-Dynamic Planar 2-vertex Connectivity
title_zh: 最坏情况确定性全动态平面 2 顶点连接
abstract: We study dynamic planar graphs with $n$ vertices, subject to edge deletion, edge contraction, edge insertion across a face, and the splitting of a vertex in specified corners. We dynamically maintain a combinatorial embedding of such a planar graph, subject to connectivity and $2$-vertex-connectivity (biconnectivity) queries between pairs of vertices. Whenever a query pair is connected and not biconnected, we find the first and last cutvertex separating them. Additionally, we allow local changes to the embedding by flipping the embedding of a subgraph that is connected by at most two vertices to the rest of the graph. We support all queries and updates in deterministic, worst-case, $O(\log^2 n)$ time, using an $O(n)$-sized data structure. Previously, the best bound for fully-dynamic planar biconnectivity (subject to our set of operations) was an amortised $\tilde{O}(\log^3 n)$ for general graphs, and algorithms with worst-case polylogarithmic update times were known only in the partially dynamic (insertion-only or deletion-only) setting.
summary: We study dynamic planar graphs with $n$ vertices, subject to edge deletion, edge contraction, edge insertion across a face, and the splitting of a vertex in specified corners. We dynamically maintain a combinatorial embedding of such a planar graph, subject to connectivity and $2$-vertex-connectivity (biconnectivity) queries between pairs of vertices. Whenever a query pair is connected and not biconnected, we find the first and last cutvertex separating them. Additionally, we allow local changes to the embedding by flipping the embedding of a subgraph that is connected by at most two vertices to the rest of the graph. We support all queries and updates in deterministic, worst-case, $O(\log^2 n)$ time, using an $O(n)$-sized data structure. Previously, the best bound for fully-dynamic planar biconnectivity (subject to our set of operations) was an amortised $\tilde{O}(\log^3 n)$ for general graphs, and algorithms with worst-case polylogarithmic update times were known only in the partially dynamic (insertion-only or deletion-only) setting.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有 $n$ 个顶点的动态平面图，受边删除、边收缩、跨面插入边以及在指定角分割顶点的影响。我们动态维护这样一个平面图的组合嵌入，受顶点对之间的连通性和 $2$-顶点连通性（双连通性）查询的影响。每当查询对是连接的而不是双连接的时，我们都会找到将它们分开的第一个和最后一个割点。此外，我们允许通过翻转由最多两个顶点连接到图的其余部分的子图的嵌入来对嵌入进行局部更改。我们使用 $O(n)$ 大小的数据结构，支持确定性、最坏情况、$O(\log^2 n)$ 时间内的所有查询和更新。以前，完全动态平面双连通性的最佳界限（取决于我们的操作集）是一般图的摊销 $\tilde{O}(\log^3 n)$，并且具有最坏情况多对数更新时间的算法仅在部分动态（仅插入或仅删除）设置中已知。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了动态平面图的2顶点连通性维护问题，提出了一种支持多种操作并在最坏情况下实现高效查询的数据结构。
AI.motivation: 现有动态平面图的双连通性维护算法在最坏情况下的时间复杂度较高，且无法处理所有操作类型，需改进以实现更优性能。
AI.method: 通过维护平面图的组合嵌入结构，结合对子图嵌入翻转的局部调整，设计了一种支持边插入、删除、收缩及顶点分裂的动态数据结构。
AI.result: 实现了最坏情况下O(log²n)时间复杂度的查询与更新操作，空间复杂度为O(n)，优于之前基于摊还分析的O(log³n)结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在动态平面图场景下实现了双连通性维护的最坏情况多项式时间复杂度，扩展了动态图算法的应用边界。

search_text: Worst-case Deterministic Fully-Dynamic Planar 2-vertex Connectivity 最坏情况确定性全动态平面 2 顶点连接 We study dynamic planar graphs with $n$ vertices, subject to edge deletion, edge contraction, edge insertion across a face, and the splitting of a vertex in specified corners. We dynamically maintain a combinatorial embedding of such a planar graph, subject to connectivity and $2$-vertex-connectivity (biconnectivity) queries between pairs of vertices. Whenever a query pair is connected and not biconnected, we find the first and last cutvertex separating them. Additionally, we allow local changes to the embedding by flipping the embedding of a subgraph that is connected by at most two vertices to the rest of the graph. We support all queries and updates in deterministic, worst-case, $O(\log^2 n)$ time, using an $O(n)$-sized data structure. Previously, the best bound for fully-dynamic planar biconnectivity (subject to our set of operations) was an amortised $\tilde{O}(\log^3 n)$ for general graphs, and algorithms with worst-case polylogarithmic update times were known only in the partially dynamic (insertion-only or deletion-only) setting. 我们研究具有 $n$ 个顶点的动态平面图，受边删除、边收缩、跨面插入边以及在指定角分割顶点的影响。我们动态维护这样一个平面图的组合嵌入，受顶点对之间的连通性和 $2$-顶点连通性（双连通性）查询的影响。每当查询对是连接的而不是双连接的时，我们都会找到将它们分开的第一个和最后一个割点。此外，我们允许通过翻转由最多两个顶点连接到图的其余部分的子图的嵌入来对嵌入进行局部更改。我们使用 $O(n)$ 大小的数据结构，支持确定性、最坏情况、$O(\log^2 n)$ 时间内的所有查询和更新。以前，完全动态平面双连通性的最佳界限（取决于我们的操作集）是一般图的摊销 $\tilde{O}(\log^3 n)$，并且具有最坏情况多对数更新时间的算法仅在部分动态（仅插入或仅删除）设置中已知。 本文研究了动态平面图的2顶点连通性维护问题，提出了一种支持多种操作并在最坏情况下实现高效查询的数据结构。 Jacob Holm,Ivor van der Hoog,Eva Rotenberg cs.DS

authors_text: Andrés Carofilis,Laura Fernández-Robles,Enrique Alegre,Eduardo Fidalgo
title: MeWEHV: Mel and Wave Embeddings for Human Voice Tasks
title_zh: MeWEHV：用于人类语音任务的 Mel 和 Wave 嵌入
abstract: A recent trend in speech processing is the use of embeddings created through machine learning models trained on a specific task with large datasets. By leveraging the knowledge already acquired, these models can be reused in new tasks where the amount of available data is small. This paper proposes a pipeline to create a new model, called Mel and Wave Embeddings for Human Voice Tasks (MeWEHV), capable of generating robust embeddings for speech processing. MeWEHV combines the embeddings generated by a pre-trained raw audio waveform encoder model, and deep features extracted from Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCCs) using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). We evaluate the performance of MeWEHV on three tasks: speaker, language, and accent identification. For the first one, we use the VoxCeleb1 dataset and present YouSpeakers204, a new and publicly available dataset for English speaker identification that contains 19607 audio clips from 204 persons speaking in six different accents, allowing other researchers to work with a very balanced dataset, and to create new models that are robust to multiple accents. For evaluating the language identification task, we use the VoxForge and Common Language datasets. Finally, for accent identification, we use the Latin American Spanish Corpora (LASC) and Common Voice datasets. Our approach allows a significant increase in the performance of state-of-the-art models on all the tested datasets, with a low additional computational cost.
summary: A recent trend in speech processing is the use of embeddings created through machine learning models trained on a specific task with large datasets. By leveraging the knowledge already acquired, these models can be reused in new tasks where the amount of available data is small. This paper proposes a pipeline to create a new model, called Mel and Wave Embeddings for Human Voice Tasks (MeWEHV), capable of generating robust embeddings for speech processing. MeWEHV combines the embeddings generated by a pre-trained raw audio waveform encoder model, and deep features extracted from Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCCs) using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). We evaluate the performance of MeWEHV on three tasks: speaker, language, and accent identification. For the first one, we use the VoxCeleb1 dataset and present YouSpeakers204, a new and publicly available dataset for English speaker identification that contains 19607 audio clips from 204 persons speaking in six different accents, allowing other researchers to work with a very balanced dataset, and to create new models that are robust to multiple accents. For evaluating the language identification task, we use the VoxForge and Common Language datasets. Finally, for accent identification, we use the Latin American Spanish Corpora (LASC) and Common Voice datasets. Our approach allows a significant increase in the performance of state-of-the-art models on all the tested datasets, with a low additional computational cost.
abstract_zh: 语音处理的最新趋势是使用通过针对大型数据集的特定任务训练的机器学习模型创建的嵌入。通过利用已经获得的知识，这些模型可以在可用数据量较小的新任务中重复使用。本文提出了一种创建新模型的管道，称为人类语音任务的梅尔和波嵌入（MeWEHV），能够生成用于语音处理的鲁棒嵌入。 MeWEHV 结合了预先训练的原始音频波形编码器模型生成的嵌入，以及使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 从梅尔频率倒谱系数 (MFCC) 中提取的深度特征。我们评估 MeWEHV 在三项任务上的表现：说话人、语言和口音识别。对于第一个，我们使用 VoxCeleb1 数据集并展示 YouSpeakers204，这是一个用于英语说话者识别的新的公开数据集，其中包含 204 个人以六种不同口音说话的 19607 个音频片段，允许其他研究人员使用非常平衡的数据集，并创建对多种口音具有鲁棒性的新模型。为了评估语言识别任务，我们使用 VoxForge 和 Common Language 数据集。最后，为了进行口音识别，我们使用拉丁美洲西班牙语语料库 (LASC) 和通用语音数据集。我们的方法可以显着提高所有测试数据集上最先进模型的性能，并且附加计算成本较低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合原始音频波形编码器和MFCC深度特征的模型MeWEHV，用于提升语音处理任务中的嵌入表示。
AI.motivation: 现有语音任务在数据量有限时性能不足，需利用预训练模型知识提升小数据任务效果。
AI.method: 融合预训练波形编码器生成的嵌入与CNN提取的MFCC特征，构建MeWEHV模型，并在说话人、语言及口音识别任务中验证。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1、VoxForge等数据集上显著优于现有模型，且计算成本低；同时发布新数据集YouSpeakers204支持多口音研究。
AI.conclusion: MeWEHV通过多模态特征融合有效提升语音任务性能，为小数据场景提供高效解决方案，并推动多口音鲁棒性研究。

authors_text: Nicholas Rober,Sydney M. Katz,Chelsea Sidrane,Esen Yel,Michael Everett,Mykel J. Kochenderfer,Jonathan P. How
title: Backward Reachability Analysis of Neural Feedback Loops: Techniques for Linear and Nonlinear Systems
title_zh: 神经反馈环路的后向可达性分析：线性和非线性系统的技术
comment: 17 pages, 15 figures. Journal extension of arXiv:2204.08319
comments: 17 pages, 15 figures. Journal extension of arXiv:2204.08319
abstract: As neural networks (NNs) become more prevalent in safety-critical applications such as control of vehicles, there is a growing need to certify that systems with NN components are safe. This paper presents a set of backward reachability approaches for safety certification of neural feedback loops (NFLs), i.e., closed-loop systems with NN control policies. While backward reachability strategies have been developed for systems without NN components, the nonlinearities in NN activation functions and general noninvertibility of NN weight matrices make backward reachability for NFLs a challenging problem. To avoid the difficulties associated with propagating sets backward through NNs, we introduce a framework that leverages standard forward NN analysis tools to efficiently find over-approximations to backprojection (BP) sets, i.e., sets of states for which an NN policy will lead a system to a given target set. We present frameworks for calculating BP over approximations for both linear and nonlinear systems with control policies represented by feedforward NNs and propose computationally efficient strategies. We use numerical results from a variety of models to showcase the proposed algorithms, including a demonstration of safety certification for a 6D system.
summary: As neural networks (NNs) become more prevalent in safety-critical applications such as control of vehicles, there is a growing need to certify that systems with NN components are safe. This paper presents a set of backward reachability approaches for safety certification of neural feedback loops (NFLs), i.e., closed-loop systems with NN control policies. While backward reachability strategies have been developed for systems without NN components, the nonlinearities in NN activation functions and general noninvertibility of NN weight matrices make backward reachability for NFLs a challenging problem. To avoid the difficulties associated with propagating sets backward through NNs, we introduce a framework that leverages standard forward NN analysis tools to efficiently find over-approximations to backprojection (BP) sets, i.e., sets of states for which an NN policy will lead a system to a given target set. We present frameworks for calculating BP over approximations for both linear and nonlinear systems with control policies represented by feedforward NNs and propose computationally efficient strategies. We use numerical results from a variety of models to showcase the proposed algorithms, including a demonstration of safety certification for a 6D system.
abstract_zh: 随着神经网络 (NN) 在车辆控制等安全关键应用中变得越来越普遍，越来越需要证明具有 NN 组件的系统是安全的。本文提出了一组用于神经反馈环（NFL）安全认证的后向可达性方法，即具有神经网络控制策略的闭环系统。虽然已经为没有 NN 组件的系统开发了后向可达性策略，但 NN 激活函数的非线性和 NN 权重矩阵的一般不可逆性使得 NFL 的后向可达性成为一个具有挑战性的问题。为了避免通过神经网络向后传播集合相关的困难，我们引入了一个框架，该框架利用标准前向神经网络分析工具来有效地找到反向投影（BP）集的过近似值，即神经网络策略将引导系统达到给定目标集的状态集。我们提出了用于通过前馈神经网络代表的控制策略来计算线性和非线性系统的近似 BP 的框架，并提出了计算有效的策略。我们使用各种模型的数值结果来展示所提出的算法，包括 6D 系统安全认证的演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对神经反馈环路的反向可达性分析方法，用于验证包含神经网络控制策略的闭环系统的安全性，适用于线性和非线性系统。
AI.motivation: 随着神经网络在安全关键系统（如车辆控制）中的应用增加，需确保系统安全性。传统反向可达性方法难以处理神经网络的非线性和权重矩阵不可逆性，亟需新方法。
AI.method: 提出利用前向神经网络分析工具近似反向投影集的框架，避免直接反向传播困难，针对线性和非线性系统设计高效计算策略。
AI.result: 通过多种模型数值实验验证算法有效性，包括对6D系统的安全认证示例，证明方法可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决神经反馈环路安全认证难题，为实际安全关键系统提供理论支持与计算工具。

search_text: Backward Reachability Analysis of Neural Feedback Loops: Techniques for Linear and Nonlinear Systems 神经反馈环路的后向可达性分析：线性和非线性系统的技术 As neural networks (NNs) become more prevalent in safety-critical applications such as control of vehicles, there is a growing need to certify that systems with NN components are safe. This paper presents a set of backward reachability approaches for safety certification of neural feedback loops (NFLs), i.e., closed-loop systems with NN control policies. While backward reachability strategies have been developed for systems without NN components, the nonlinearities in NN activation functions and general noninvertibility of NN weight matrices make backward reachability for NFLs a challenging problem. To avoid the difficulties associated with propagating sets backward through NNs, we introduce a framework that leverages standard forward NN analysis tools to efficiently find over-approximations to backprojection (BP) sets, i.e., sets of states for which an NN policy will lead a system to a given target set. We present frameworks for calculating BP over approximations for both linear and nonlinear systems with control policies represented by feedforward NNs and propose computationally efficient strategies. We use numerical results from a variety of models to showcase the proposed algorithms, including a demonstration of safety certification for a 6D system. 随着神经网络 (NN) 在车辆控制等安全关键应用中变得越来越普遍，越来越需要证明具有 NN 组件的系统是安全的。本文提出了一组用于神经反馈环（NFL）安全认证的后向可达性方法，即具有神经网络控制策略的闭环系统。虽然已经为没有 NN 组件的系统开发了后向可达性策略，但 NN 激活函数的非线性和 NN 权重矩阵的一般不可逆性使得 NFL 的后向可达性成为一个具有挑战性的问题。为了避免通过神经网络向后传播集合相关的困难，我们引入了一个框架，该框架利用标准前向神经网络分析工具来有效地找到反向投影（BP）集的过近似值，即神经网络策略将引导系统达到给定目标集的状态集。我们提出了用于通过前馈神经网络代表的控制策略来计算线性和非线性系统的近似 BP 的框架，并提出了计算有效的策略。我们使用各种模型的数值结果来展示所提出的算法，包括 6D 系统安全认证的演示。 本文提出针对神经反馈环路的反向可达性分析方法，用于验证包含神经网络控制策略的闭环系统的安全性，适用于线性和非线性系统。 Nicholas Rober,Sydney M. Katz,Chelsea Sidrane,Esen Yel,Michael Everett,Mykel J. Kochenderfer,Jonathan P. How eess.SY,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Seok-Yong Byun,Wonju Lee
title: Recipro-CAM: Fast gradient-free visual explanations for convolutional neural networks
title_zh: Recipro-CAM：卷积神经网络的快速无梯度视觉解释
abstract: The Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is a widely used deep learning architecture for computer vision. However, its black box nature makes it difficult to interpret the behavior of the model. To mitigate this issue, AI practitioners have explored explainable AI methods like Class Activation Map (CAM) and Grad-CAM. Although these methods have shown promise, they are limited by architectural constraints or the burden of gradient computing. To overcome this issue, Score-CAM and Ablation-CAM have been proposed as gradient-free methods, but they have longer execution times compared to CAM or Grad-CAM based methods, making them unsuitable for real-world solution though they resolved gradient related issues and enabled inference mode XAI. To address this challenge, we propose a fast gradient-free Reciprocal CAM (Recipro-CAM) method. Our approach involves spatially masking the extracted feature maps to exploit the correlation between activation maps and network predictions for target classes. Our proposed method has yielded promising results, outperforming current state-of-the-art method in the Average Drop-Coherence-Complexity (ADCC) metric by $1.78 \%$ to $3.72 \%$, excluding VGG-16 backbone. Moreover, Recipro-CAM generates saliency maps at a similar rate to Grad-CAM and is approximately $148$ times faster than Score-CAM. The source code for Recipro-CAM is available in our data analysis framework.
summary: The Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is a widely used deep learning architecture for computer vision. However, its black box nature makes it difficult to interpret the behavior of the model. To mitigate this issue, AI practitioners have explored explainable AI methods like Class Activation Map (CAM) and Grad-CAM. Although these methods have shown promise, they are limited by architectural constraints or the burden of gradient computing. To overcome this issue, Score-CAM and Ablation-CAM have been proposed as gradient-free methods, but they have longer execution times compared to CAM or Grad-CAM based methods, making them unsuitable for real-world solution though they resolved gradient related issues and enabled inference mode XAI. To address this challenge, we propose a fast gradient-free Reciprocal CAM (Recipro-CAM) method. Our approach involves spatially masking the extracted feature maps to exploit the correlation between activation maps and network predictions for target classes. Our proposed method has yielded promising results, outperforming current state-of-the-art method in the Average Drop-Coherence-Complexity (ADCC) metric by $1.78 \%$ to $3.72 \%$, excluding VGG-16 backbone. Moreover, Recipro-CAM generates saliency maps at a similar rate to Grad-CAM and is approximately $148$ times faster than Score-CAM. The source code for Recipro-CAM is available in our data analysis framework.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）是一种广泛使用的计算机视觉深度学习架构。然而，其黑盒性质使得很难解释模型的行为。为了缓解这个问题，人工智能从业者探索了可解释的人工智能方法，例如类激活图（CAM）和 Grad-CAM。尽管这些方法已经显示出前景，但它们受到架构限制或梯度计算负担的限制。为了克服这个问题，Score-CAM 和 Ablation-CAM 被提出作为无梯度方法，但与 CAM 或基于 Grad-CAM 的方法相比，它们的执行时间更长，使得它们不适合实际解决方案，尽管它们解决了梯度相关问题并启用了推理模式 XAI。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种快速无梯度倒数 CAM (Recipro-CAM) 方法。我们的方法涉及对提取的特征图进行空间屏蔽，以利用激活图和目标类别的网络预测之间的相关性。我们提出的方法取得了有希望的结果，在平均下降相干复杂度（ADCC）指标上比当前最先进的方法高出 1.78 美元到 3.72 美元（不包括 VGG-16 主干）。此外，Recipro-CAM 生成显着性图的速度与 Grad-CAM 相似，并且比 Score-CAM 快大约 148 倍。 Recipro-CAM 的源代码可在我们的数据分析框架中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Recipro-CAM的快速无梯度视觉解释方法，用于卷积神经网络（CNN）的可解释性研究。
AI.motivation: 现有解释方法如CAM和Grad-CAM存在架构限制或依赖梯度计算的缺陷，而Score-CAM等无梯度方法虽解决了梯度问题但计算速度较慢，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 通过空间掩码提取特征图，利用激活图与目标类预测之间的相关性生成显著性图，完全避免梯度计算。
AI.result: 在排除VGG-16主干网络的情况下，Recipro-CAM在ADCC指标上优于现有方法1.78%至3.72%，且生成速度比Score-CAM快148倍，与Grad-CAM相当。
AI.conclusion: Recipro-CAM在保持高解释性的同时显著提升了计算效率，为实时应用场景提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Yongliang Shi,Runyi Yang,Pengfei Li,Zirui Wu,Hao Zhao,Guyue Zhou
title: City-scale Incremental Neural Mapping with Three-layer Sampling and Panoptic Representation
title_zh: 具有三层采样和全景表示的城市规模增量神经映射
abstract: Neural implicit representations are drawing a lot of attention from the robotics community recently, as they are expressive, continuous and compact. However, city-scale continual implicit dense mapping based on sparse LiDAR input is still an under-explored challenge. To this end, we successfully build a city-scale continual neural mapping system with a panoptic representation that consists of environment-level and instance-level modelling. Given a stream of sparse LiDAR point cloud, it maintains a dynamic generative model that maps 3D coordinates to signed distance field (SDF) values. To address the difficulty of representing geometric information at different levels in city-scale space, we propose a tailored three-layer sampling strategy to dynamically sample the global, local and near-surface domains. Meanwhile, to realize high fidelity mapping of instance under incomplete observation, category-specific prior is introduced to better model the geometric details. We evaluate on the public SemanticKITTI dataset and demonstrate the significance of the newly proposed three-layer sampling strategy and panoptic representation, using both quantitative and qualitative results. Codes and model will be publicly available.
summary: Neural implicit representations are drawing a lot of attention from the robotics community recently, as they are expressive, continuous and compact. However, city-scale continual implicit dense mapping based on sparse LiDAR input is still an under-explored challenge. To this end, we successfully build a city-scale continual neural mapping system with a panoptic representation that consists of environment-level and instance-level modelling. Given a stream of sparse LiDAR point cloud, it maintains a dynamic generative model that maps 3D coordinates to signed distance field (SDF) values. To address the difficulty of representing geometric information at different levels in city-scale space, we propose a tailored three-layer sampling strategy to dynamically sample the global, local and near-surface domains. Meanwhile, to realize high fidelity mapping of instance under incomplete observation, category-specific prior is introduced to better model the geometric details. We evaluate on the public SemanticKITTI dataset and demonstrate the significance of the newly proposed three-layer sampling strategy and panoptic representation, using both quantitative and qualitative results. Codes and model will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 神经隐式表示最近引起了机器人界的广泛关注，因为它们具有表现力、连续性和紧凑性。然而，基于稀疏激光雷达输入​​的城市规模连续隐式密集测绘仍然是一个尚未充分探索的挑战。为此，我们成功构建了一个城市规模的连续神经绘图系统，该系统具有由环境级和实例级建模组成的全景表示。给定稀疏 LiDAR 点云流，它维护一个动态生成模型，将 3D 坐标映射到有符号距离场 (SDF) 值。为了解决在城市尺度空间的不同层次上表示几何信息的困难，我们提出了一种定制的三层采样策略来动态采样全局、局部和近地表域。同时，为了实现不完全观察下实例的高保真映射，引入特定于类别的先验以更好地建模几何细节。我们对公共 SemanticKITTI 数据集进行评估，并使用定量和定性结果证明了新提出的三层采样策略和全景表示的重要性。代码和模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三层采样和全景表示的城市规模增量神经映射系统，用于处理稀疏LiDAR点云的连续三维重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在城市规模场景中难以有效表示多层级几何信息，且对不完整观测的实例级细节建模不足，亟需改进的映射策略。
AI.method: 设计三层动态采样策略（全局/局部/近表面域）结合环境级与实例级的全景表示，并引入类别先验优化几何细节建模。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上通过定量与定性实验验证了三层采样策略和全景表示的有效性，实现高保真城市规模映射。
AI.conclusion: 提出的三层采样与全景表示方法显著提升了城市级神经映射性能，未来将公开代码与模型促进技术发展。
