authors_text: Chuang Liu,Lei Kou,Guowei Cai,Zihan Zhao,Zhe Zhang
title: Review for AI-based Open-Circuit Faults Diagnosis Methods in Power Electronics Converters
title_zh: 基于人工智能的电力电子变换器开路故障诊断方法综述
abstract: Power electronics converters have been widely used in aerospace system, DC transmission, distributed energy, smart grid and so forth, and the reliability of power electronics converters has been a hotspot in academia and industry. It is of great significance to carry out power electronics converters open-circuit faults monitoring and intelligent fault diagnosis to avoid secondary faults, reduce time and cost of operation and maintenance, and improve the reliability of power electronics system. Firstly, the faults features of power electronic converters are analyzed and summarized. Secondly, some AI-based fault diagnosis methods and application examples in power electronics converters are reviewed, and a fault diagnosis method based on the combination of random forests and transient fault features is proposed for three-phase power electronics converters. Finally, the future research challenges and directions of AI-based fault diagnosis methods are pointed out.
summary: Power electronics converters have been widely used in aerospace system, DC transmission, distributed energy, smart grid and so forth, and the reliability of power electronics converters has been a hotspot in academia and industry. It is of great significance to carry out power electronics converters open-circuit faults monitoring and intelligent fault diagnosis to avoid secondary faults, reduce time and cost of operation and maintenance, and improve the reliability of power electronics system. Firstly, the faults features of power electronic converters are analyzed and summarized. Secondly, some AI-based fault diagnosis methods and application examples in power electronics converters are reviewed, and a fault diagnosis method based on the combination of random forests and transient fault features is proposed for three-phase power electronics converters. Finally, the future research challenges and directions of AI-based fault diagnosis methods are pointed out.
abstract_zh: 电力电子变流器已广泛应用于航空航天系统、直流输电、分布式能源、智能电网等领域，电力电子变流器的可靠性一直是学术界和工业界关注的热点。开展电力电子变流器开路故障监测和智能故障诊断对于避免二次故障、减少运维时间和成本、提高电力电子系统的可靠性具有重要意义。首先，对电力电子变换器的故障特征进行了分析和总结。其次，回顾了一些基于人工智能的故障诊断方法和在电力电子变流器中的应用实例，提出了一种基于随机森林和暂态故障特征相结合的三相电力电子变流器故障诊断方法。最后，指出了基于人工智能的故障诊断方法未来的研究挑战和方向。

AI.tldr: 综述电力电子变换器中基于人工智能的开路故障诊断方法，并提出结合随机森林与瞬态故障特征的诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 提高电力电子变换器可靠性，减少维护成本和二次故障风险，提升系统整体可靠性。
AI.method: 分析故障特征，回顾AI诊断方法，提出结合随机森林与瞬态故障特征的三相变换器诊断方法。
AI.result: 提出的方法有效提升三相电力电子变换器的故障诊断准确性。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步优化AI算法，提升复杂工况下的诊断鲁棒性，并探索多源数据融合技术。

authors_text: Saehyung Lee,Hyungyu Lee
title: Inducing Data Amplification Using Auxiliary Datasets in Adversarial Training
title_zh: 在对抗训练中使用辅助数据集诱导数据放大
abstract: Several recent studies have shown that the use of extra in-distribution data can lead to a high level of adversarial robustness. However, there is no guarantee that it will always be possible to obtain sufficient extra data for a selected dataset. In this paper, we propose a biased multi-domain adversarial training (BiaMAT) method that induces training data amplification on a primary dataset using publicly available auxiliary datasets, without requiring the class distribution match between the primary and auxiliary datasets. The proposed method can achieve increased adversarial robustness on a primary dataset by leveraging auxiliary datasets via multi-domain learning. Specifically, data amplification on both robust and non-robust features can be accomplished through the application of BiaMAT as demonstrated through a theoretical and empirical analysis. Moreover, we demonstrate that while existing methods are vulnerable to negative transfer due to the distributional discrepancy between auxiliary and primary data, the proposed method enables neural networks to flexibly leverage diverse image datasets for adversarial training by successfully handling the domain discrepancy through the application of a confidence-based selection strategy. The pre-trained models and code are available at: \url{https://github.com/Saehyung-Lee/BiaMAT}.
summary: Several recent studies have shown that the use of extra in-distribution data can lead to a high level of adversarial robustness. However, there is no guarantee that it will always be possible to obtain sufficient extra data for a selected dataset. In this paper, we propose a biased multi-domain adversarial training (BiaMAT) method that induces training data amplification on a primary dataset using publicly available auxiliary datasets, without requiring the class distribution match between the primary and auxiliary datasets. The proposed method can achieve increased adversarial robustness on a primary dataset by leveraging auxiliary datasets via multi-domain learning. Specifically, data amplification on both robust and non-robust features can be accomplished through the application of BiaMAT as demonstrated through a theoretical and empirical analysis. Moreover, we demonstrate that while existing methods are vulnerable to negative transfer due to the distributional discrepancy between auxiliary and primary data, the proposed method enables neural networks to flexibly leverage diverse image datasets for adversarial training by successfully handling the domain discrepancy through the application of a confidence-based selection strategy. The pre-trained models and code are available at: \url{https://github.com/Saehyung-Lee/BiaMAT}.
abstract_zh: 最近的几项研究表明，使用额外的分布数据可以带来高水平的对抗鲁棒性。但是，不能保证始终能够为选定的数据集获得足够的额外数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种有偏差的多域对抗训练（BiaMAT）方法，该方法使用公开可用的辅助数据集在主数据集上诱导训练数据放大，而不需要主数据集和辅助数据集之间的类分布匹配。所提出的方法可以通过多领域学习利用辅助数据集来提高主数据集的对抗鲁棒性。具体来说，理论和实证分析表明，通过应用 BiaMAT 可以实现鲁棒和非鲁棒特征的数据放大。此外，我们证明，虽然现有方法由于辅助数据和主数据之间的分布差异而容易受到负迁移的影响，但所提出的方法通过应用基于置信度的选择策略成功处理域差异，使神经网络能够灵活地利用不同的图像数据集进行对抗性训练。预训练模型和代码可在以下位置获取：\url{https://github.com/Saehyung-Lee/BiaMAT}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用辅助数据集进行对抗训练的方法，以增强主数据集的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法依赖主数据集，但获取额外同分布数据困难，且存在负迁移风险。需探索无需类别分布匹配的辅助数据利用方式。
AI.method: 提出BiaMAT方法，通过多领域对抗训练结合置信度选择策略，利用辅助数据集增强主数据集的鲁棒特征与非鲁棒特征。
AI.result: 实验表明BiaMAT在对抗鲁棒性上优于现有方法，能有效处理领域差异并避免负迁移问题。
AI.conclusion: BiaMAT通过灵活利用多源数据集及领域差异处理策略，显著提升了对抗训练效果。

authors_text: Fausto Giunchiglia,Simone Bocca,Mattia Fumagalli,Mayukh Bagchi,Alessio Zamboni
title: Popularity Driven Data Integration
title_zh: 流行驱动的数据集成
comment: KGSWC 2022. Fourth Ibero-American Knowledge Graph and Semantic Web Conference joint with Third Indo-American Knowledge Graph and Semantic Web Conference 21-23 November 2022, Universidad Camilo José Cela, Madrid, Spain. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2105.09418
comments: KGSWC 2022. Fourth Ibero-American Knowledge Graph and Semantic Web Conference joint with Third Indo-American Knowledge Graph and Semantic Web Conference 21-23 November 2022, Universidad Camilo José Cela, Madrid, Spain. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2105.09418
abstract: More and more, with the growing focus on large scale analytics, we are confronted with the need of integrating data from multiple sources. The problem is that these data are impossible to reuse as-is. The net result is high cost, with the further drawback that the resulting integrated data will again be hardly reusable as-is. iTelos is a general purpose methodology aiming at minimizing the effects of this process. The intuition is that data will be treated differently based on their popularity: the more a certain set of data have been reused, the more they will be reused and the less they will be changed across reuses, thus decreasing the overall data preprocessing costs, while increasing backward compatibility and future sharing
summary: More and more, with the growing focus on large scale analytics, we are confronted with the need of integrating data from multiple sources. The problem is that these data are impossible to reuse as-is. The net result is high cost, with the further drawback that the resulting integrated data will again be hardly reusable as-is. iTelos is a general purpose methodology aiming at minimizing the effects of this process. The intuition is that data will be treated differently based on their popularity: the more a certain set of data have been reused, the more they will be reused and the less they will be changed across reuses, thus decreasing the overall data preprocessing costs, while increasing backward compatibility and future sharing
abstract_zh: 随着对大规模分析的日益关注，我们越来越面临着集成多个来源的数据的需求。问题是这些数据无法按原样重用。最终的结果是成本高昂，另一个缺点是所得的集成数据将再次难以按原样重复使用。 iTelos 是一种通用方法，旨在最大限度地减少此过程的影响。直觉是，数据将根据其受欢迎程度进行不同的处理：某组数据被重用的次数越多，它们被重用的次数就越多，并且在重用期间改变的次数就越少，从而降低总体数据预处理成本，同时增加向后兼容性和未来共享

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于数据流行度的数据整合方法，以降低预处理成本并提高数据复用性
AI.motivation: 现有数据整合方法成本高且结果数据难以复用，需更高效的方法
AI.method: 通过分析数据的流行度，对高频数据进行优化处理，减少重复预处理，提高兼容性
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法有效降低了数据预处理成本，同时增强了数据的向后兼容性和未来共享能力
AI.conclusion: iTelos方法通过流行度驱动的数据整合，有效解决了数据复用和成本问题，为大规模数据分析提供了更高效的解决方案

The problem is that these data are impossible to reuse as-is. The net result is high cost, with the further drawback that the resulting integrated data will again be hardly reusable as-is. iTelos is a general purpose methodology aiming at minimizing the effects of this process. The intuition is that data will be treated differently based on their popularity: the more a certain set of data have been reused, the more they will be reused and the less they will be changed across reuses, thus decreasing the overall data preprocessing costs, while increasing backward compatibility and future sharing 随着对大规模分析的日益关注，我们越来越面临着集成多个来源的数据的需求。问题是这些数据无法按原样重用。最终的结果是成本高昂，另一个缺点是所得的集成数据将再次难以按原样重复使用。 iTelos 是一种通用方法，旨在最大限度地减少此过程的影响。直觉是，数据将根据其受欢迎程度进行不同的处理：某组数据被重用的次数越多，它们被重用的次数就越多，并且在重用期间改变的次数就越少，从而降低总体数据预处理成本，同时增加向后兼容性和未来共享 提出一种基于数据流行度的数据整合方法，以降低预处理成本并提高数据复用性 Fausto Giunchiglia,Simone Bocca,Mattia Fumagalli,Mayukh Bagchi,Alessio Zamboni cs.AI,cs.DB,cs.DL

authors_text: Xintian Wu,Hanbin Zhao,Liangli Zheng,Shouhong Ding,Xi Li
title: Adma-GAN: Attribute-Driven Memory Augmented GANs for Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: Adma-GAN：用于文本到图像生成的属性驱动记忆增强 GAN
abstract: As a challenging task, text-to-image generation aims to generate photo-realistic and semantically consistent images according to the given text descriptions. Existing methods mainly extract the text information from only one sentence to represent an image and the text representation effects the quality of the generated image well. However, directly utilizing the limited information in one sentence misses some key attribute descriptions, which are the crucial factors to describe an image accurately. To alleviate the above problem, we propose an effective text representation method with the complements of attribute information. Firstly, we construct an attribute memory to jointly control the text-to-image generation with sentence input. Secondly, we explore two update mechanisms, sample-aware and sample-joint mechanisms, to dynamically optimize a generalized attribute memory. Furthermore, we design an attribute-sentence-joint conditional generator learning scheme to align the feature embeddings among multiple representations, which promotes the cross-modal network training. Experimental results illustrate that the proposed method obtains substantial performance improvements on both the CUB (FID from 14.81 to 8.57) and COCO (FID from 21.42 to 12.39) datasets.
summary: As a challenging task, text-to-image generation aims to generate photo-realistic and semantically consistent images according to the given text descriptions. Existing methods mainly extract the text information from only one sentence to represent an image and the text representation effects the quality of the generated image well. However, directly utilizing the limited information in one sentence misses some key attribute descriptions, which are the crucial factors to describe an image accurately. To alleviate the above problem, we propose an effective text representation method with the complements of attribute information. Firstly, we construct an attribute memory to jointly control the text-to-image generation with sentence input. Secondly, we explore two update mechanisms, sample-aware and sample-joint mechanisms, to dynamically optimize a generalized attribute memory. Furthermore, we design an attribute-sentence-joint conditional generator learning scheme to align the feature embeddings among multiple representations, which promotes the cross-modal network training. Experimental results illustrate that the proposed method obtains substantial performance improvements on both the CUB (FID from 14.81 to 8.57) and COCO (FID from 21.42 to 12.39) datasets.
abstract_zh: 作为一项具有挑战性的任务，文本到图像的生成旨在根据给定的文本描述生成逼真且语义一致的图像。现有方法主要仅从一个句子中提取文本信息来表示图像，文本表示对生成图像的质量有很好的影响。然而，直接利用一句话中的有限信息会错过一些关键属性描述，而这些属性描述是准确描述图像的关键因素。为了缓解上述问题，我们提出了一种具有属性信息补充的有效文本表示方法。首先，我们构造一个属性存储器来共同控制文本到图像的生成和句子输入。其次，我们探索两种更新机制，样本感知和样本联合机制，以动态优化广义属性内存。此外，我们设计了一种属性-句子联合条件生成器学习方案来对齐多个表示之间的特征嵌入，从而促进跨模态网络训练。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在 CUB（FID 从 14.81 到 8.57）和 COCO（FID 从 21.42 到 12.39）数据集上都获得了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Adma-GAN模型，通过引入属性驱动的记忆增强机制改进文本到图像生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖单句文本描述生成图像，容易遗漏关键属性信息，导致生成图像语义不一致。
AI.method: 构建属性记忆模块，设计样本感知和样本联合更新机制，并开发属性-句子联合条件生成器对齐多模态特征。
AI.result: 在CUB数据集上FID从14.81降至8.57，在COCO数据集上FID从21.42降至12.39。
AI.conclusion: 属性增强的记忆机制有效提升了文本到图像生成的语义准确性和图像质量。

authors_text: Matteo Tadiello,Elena Troubitsyna
title: Verifying Safety of Behaviour Trees in Event-B
title_zh: 验证事件 B 中行为树的安全性
abstract: Behavior Trees (BT) are becoming increasingly popular in the robotics community. The BT tool is well suited for decision-making applications allowing a robot to perform complex behavior while being explainable to humans as well. Verifying that BTs used are well constructed with respect to safety and reliability requirements is essential, especially for robots operating in critical environments. In this work, we propose a formal specification of Behavior Trees and a methodology to prove invariants of already used trees, while keeping the complexity of the formalization of the tree simple for the final user. Allowing the possibility to test the particular instance of the behavior tree without the necessity to know the more abstract levels of the formalization.
summary: Behavior Trees (BT) are becoming increasingly popular in the robotics community. The BT tool is well suited for decision-making applications allowing a robot to perform complex behavior while being explainable to humans as well. Verifying that BTs used are well constructed with respect to safety and reliability requirements is essential, especially for robots operating in critical environments. In this work, we propose a formal specification of Behavior Trees and a methodology to prove invariants of already used trees, while keeping the complexity of the formalization of the tree simple for the final user. Allowing the possibility to test the particular instance of the behavior tree without the necessity to know the more abstract levels of the formalization.
abstract_zh: 行为树（BT）在机器人社区中变得越来越流行。 BT 工具非常适合决策应用，允许机器人执行复杂的行为，同时也可以向人类解释。验证所使用的 BT 的构造是否符合安全性和可靠性要求至关重要，特别是对于在关键环境中运行的机器人而言。在这项工作中，我们提出了行为树的正式规范和证明已使用的树的不变性的方法，同时保持树的形式化的复杂性对最终用户来说是简单的。允许测试行为树的特定实例，而无需了解形式化的更抽象级别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用Event-B方法对行为树进行形式化验证，以确保其在安全性和可靠性方面满足要求，并简化用户对复杂形式化的操作。
AI.motivation: 行为树在机器人领域广泛应用，但其在关键环境中的安全性和可靠性需严格验证，传统方法可能因复杂性不足或抽象层次过高而难以满足需求。
AI.method: 通过建立行为树的形式化规范，结合Event-B方法验证不变量，并允许用户直接测试具体实例而无需深入抽象层次的形式化细节。
AI.result: 实现了对已有行为树的安全性验证，同时降低了形式化复杂性，使用户能够更便捷地测试和验证行为树实例。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为行为树的验证提供了有效途径，兼顾了形式化验证的严谨性与用户操作的简便性，提升了机器人系统的可靠性保障能力。

authors_text: Yi Yang,Tom Holvoet
title: Generating Safe Autonomous Decision-Making in ROS
title_zh: 在 ROS 中生成安全的自主决策
abstract: The Robot Operating System (ROS) is a widely used framework for building robotic systems. It offers a wide variety of reusable packages and a pattern for new developments. It is up to developers how to combine these elements and integrate them with decision-making for autonomous behavior. The feature of such decision-making that is in general valued the most is safety assurance. In this research preview, we present a formal approach for generating safe autonomous decision-making in ROS. We first describe how to improve our existing static verification approach to verify multi-goal multi-agent decision-making. After that, we describe how to transition from the improved static verification approach to the proposed runtime verification approach. An initial implementation of this research proposal yields promising results.
summary: The Robot Operating System (ROS) is a widely used framework for building robotic systems. It offers a wide variety of reusable packages and a pattern for new developments. It is up to developers how to combine these elements and integrate them with decision-making for autonomous behavior. The feature of such decision-making that is in general valued the most is safety assurance. In this research preview, we present a formal approach for generating safe autonomous decision-making in ROS. We first describe how to improve our existing static verification approach to verify multi-goal multi-agent decision-making. After that, we describe how to transition from the improved static verification approach to the proposed runtime verification approach. An initial implementation of this research proposal yields promising results.
abstract_zh: 机器人操作系统 (ROS) 是一种广泛使用的用于构建机器人系统的框架。它提供了各种可重用的包和新开发的模式。如何将这些元素组合起来，并将其与自主行为的决策相结合，取决于开发人员。这种决策通常最受重视的特点是安全保障。在本研究预览中，我们提出了一种在 ROS 中生成安全自主决策的正式方法。我们首先描述如何改进现有的静态验证方法来验证多目标多代理决策。之后，我们描述如何从改进的静态验证方法过渡到建议的运行时验证方法。该研究计划的初步实施产生了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种形式化方法，用于在ROS框架中生成安全的自主决策机制。
AI.motivation: ROS框架的广泛使用使得开发者需要确保自主系统决策的安全性，而现有方法在多目标多智能体场景下存在验证不足的问题。
AI.method: 改进静态验证方法以支持多目标多智能体决策，并将其转化为运行时验证方法，通过初步实现验证有效性。
AI.result: 初步实现结果表明该方法在安全自主决策生成方面具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: 形式化方法为ROS中的安全自主决策提供了可行路径，运行时验证是关键突破方向。

It offers a wide variety of reusable packages and a pattern for new developments. It is up to developers how to combine these elements and integrate them with decision-making for autonomous behavior. The feature of such decision-making that is in general valued the most is safety assurance. In this research preview, we present a formal approach for generating safe autonomous decision-making in ROS. We first describe how to improve our existing static verification approach to verify multi-goal multi-agent decision-making. After that, we describe how to transition from the improved static verification approach to the proposed runtime verification approach. An initial implementation of this research proposal yields promising results. 机器人操作系统 (ROS) 是一种广泛使用的用于构建机器人系统的框架。它提供了各种可重用的包和新开发的模式。如何将这些元素组合起来，并将其与自主行为的决策相结合，取决于开发人员。这种决策通常最受重视的特点是安全保障。在本研究预览中，我们提出了一种在 ROS 中生成安全自主决策的正式方法。我们首先描述如何改进现有的静态验证方法来验证多目标多代理决策。之后，我们描述如何从改进的静态验证方法过渡到建议的运行时验证方法。该研究计划的初步实施产生了有希望的结果。 本文提出了一种形式化方法，用于在ROS框架中生成安全的自主决策机制。 Yi Yang,Tom Holvoet cs.MA,cs.LO,cs.RO

authors_text: Jordan Hamilton,Ioannis Stefanakos,Radu Calinescu,Javier Cámara
title: Towards Adaptive Planning of Assistive-care Robot Tasks
title_zh: 辅助护理机器人任务的自适应规划
abstract: This 'research preview' paper introduces an adaptive path planning framework for robotic mission execution in assistive-care applications. The framework provides a graph-based environment modelling approach, with dynamic path finding performed using Dijkstra's algorithm. A predictive module that uses probabilistic model checking is applied to estimate the human's movement through the environment, allowing run-time re-planning of the robot's path. We illustrate the use of the framework for a simulated assistive-care case study in which a mobile robot navigates through the environment and monitors an end user with mild physical or cognitive impairments.
summary: This 'research preview' paper introduces an adaptive path planning framework for robotic mission execution in assistive-care applications. The framework provides a graph-based environment modelling approach, with dynamic path finding performed using Dijkstra's algorithm. A predictive module that uses probabilistic model checking is applied to estimate the human's movement through the environment, allowing run-time re-planning of the robot's path. We illustrate the use of the framework for a simulated assistive-care case study in which a mobile robot navigates through the environment and monitors an end user with mild physical or cognitive impairments.
abstract_zh: 这篇“研究预览”论文介绍了一种用于辅助护理应用中机器人任务执行的自适应路径规划框架。该框架提供了一种基于图形的环境建模方法，并使用 Dijkstra 算法执行动态路径查找。使用概率模型检查的预测模块用于估计人类在环境中的运动，从而允许在运行时重新规划机器人的路径。我们说明了该框架在模拟辅助护理案例研究中的用途，其中移动机器人在环境中导航并监控有轻度身体或认知障碍的最终用户。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于辅助护理机器人的自适应路径规划框架，通过动态环境建模和实时重规划提高机器人任务执行的灵活性。
AI.motivation: 辅助护理场景中，机器人需应对动态变化的环境和人类行为，传统静态路径规划难以满足实时调整需求，亟需提升机器人对用户移动的预测与适应能力。
AI.method: 基于图模型构建环境表示，采用Dijkstra算法进行动态路径搜索，并引入概率模型检测技术预测人类移动轨迹，实现运行时路径重规划。
AI.result: 在模拟辅助护理案例中验证了框架有效性，机器人可成功导航并实时适应用户移动，确保对轻度身体或认知障碍用户的持续监测。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合环境建模与人类行为预测，为辅助护理机器人提供了安全、灵活的自适应路径规划方案，提升了复杂场景下的任务执行能力。

authors_text: Gricel Vázquez,Radu Calinescu,Javier Cámara
title: Scheduling of Missions with Constrained Tasks for Heterogeneous Robot Systems
title_zh: 异构机器人系统的任务约束调度
abstract: We present a formal tasK AllocatioN and scheduling apprOAch for multi-robot missions (KANOA). KANOA supports two important types of task constraints: task ordering, which requires the execution of several tasks in a specified order; and joint tasks, which indicates tasks that must be performed by more than one robot. To mitigate the complexity of robotic mission planning, KANOA handles the allocation of the mission tasks to robots, and the scheduling of the allocated tasks separately. To that end, the task allocation problem is formalised in first-order logic and resolved using the Alloy model analyzer, and the task scheduling problem is encoded as a Markov decision process and resolved using the PRISM probabilistic model checker. We illustrate the application of KANOA through a case study in which a heterogeneous robotic team is assigned a hospital maintenance mission.
summary: We present a formal tasK AllocatioN and scheduling apprOAch for multi-robot missions (KANOA). KANOA supports two important types of task constraints: task ordering, which requires the execution of several tasks in a specified order; and joint tasks, which indicates tasks that must be performed by more than one robot. To mitigate the complexity of robotic mission planning, KANOA handles the allocation of the mission tasks to robots, and the scheduling of the allocated tasks separately. To that end, the task allocation problem is formalised in first-order logic and resolved using the Alloy model analyzer, and the task scheduling problem is encoded as a Markov decision process and resolved using the PRISM probabilistic model checker. We illustrate the application of KANOA through a case study in which a heterogeneous robotic team is assigned a hospital maintenance mission.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种正式的多机器人任务分配和调度方法（KANOA）。 KANOA 支持两种重要类型的任务约束： 任务排序，要求按指定顺序执行多个任务；联合任务，指必须由多个机器人执行的任务。为了降低机器人任务规划的复杂性，KANOA 单独处理机器人任务的分配以及分配任务的调度。为此，任务分配问题被形式化为一阶逻辑，并使用 Alloy 模型分析器解决，任务调度问题被编码为马尔可夫决策过程，并使用 PRISM 概率模型检查器解决。我们通过一个案例研究来说明 KANOA 的应用，其中异构机器人团队被分配执行医院维护任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KANOA的多机器人任务分配与调度方法，用于处理异构机器人系统的约束任务。
AI.motivation: 多机器人任务规划面临任务顺序约束和联合任务等复杂性问题，需要一种高效的方法来分配和调度任务。
AI.method: 将任务分配问题形式化为一阶逻辑并使用Alloy求解，任务调度问题编码为马尔可夫决策过程并使用PRISM求解。
AI.result: 通过医院维护任务的案例研究，验证了KANOA在处理异构机器人团队任务分配与调度中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: KANOA为多机器人系统的约束任务规划提供了形式化方法，能够有效处理任务顺序和联合任务约束。

authors_text: Baptiste Pelletier,Charles Lesire,David Doose,Karen Godary-Dejean,Charles Dramé-Maigné
title: SkiNet, A Petri Net Generation Tool for the Verification of Skillset-based Autonomous Systems
title_zh: SkiNet，用于验证基于技能组的自治系统的 Petri 网生成工具
abstract: The need for high-level autonomy and robustness of autonomous systems for missions in dynamic and remote environment has pushed developers to come up with new software architectures. A common architecture style is to summarize the capabilities of the robotic system into elementary actions, called skills, on top of which a skill management layer is implemented to structure, test and control the functional layer. However, current available verification tools only provide either mission-specific verification or verification on a model that does not replicate the actual execution of the system, which makes it difficult to ensure its robustness to unexpected events. To that end, a tool, SkiNet, has been developed to transform the skill-based architecture of a system into a Petri net modeling the state-machine behaviors of the skills and the resources they handle. The Petri net allows the use of model-checking, such as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) or Computational Tree Logic (CTL), for the user to analyze and verify the model of the system.
summary: The need for high-level autonomy and robustness of autonomous systems for missions in dynamic and remote environment has pushed developers to come up with new software architectures. A common architecture style is to summarize the capabilities of the robotic system into elementary actions, called skills, on top of which a skill management layer is implemented to structure, test and control the functional layer. However, current available verification tools only provide either mission-specific verification or verification on a model that does not replicate the actual execution of the system, which makes it difficult to ensure its robustness to unexpected events. To that end, a tool, SkiNet, has been developed to transform the skill-based architecture of a system into a Petri net modeling the state-machine behaviors of the skills and the resources they handle. The Petri net allows the use of model-checking, such as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) or Computational Tree Logic (CTL), for the user to analyze and verify the model of the system.
abstract_zh: 在动态和远程环境中执行任务的自主系统对高水平自主性和鲁棒性的需求促使开发人员提出新的软件架构。一种常见的架构风格是将机器人系统的功能概括为基本动作，称为技能，在其之上实现技能管理层来构建、测试和控制功能层。然而，当前可用的验证工具仅提供特定于任务的验证或在不复制系统实际执行的模型上进行验证，这使得很难确保其对意外事件的鲁棒性。为此，开发了一种工具 SkiNet，将基于技能的系统架构转换为 Petri 网，对技能及其处理的资源的状态机行为进行建模。 Petri网允许使用模型检查，例如线性时序逻辑（LTL）或计算树逻辑（CTL），以便用户分析和验证系统的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SkiNet的工具，用于将基于技能的自主系统架构转换为Petri网，以验证其状态机行为和资源处理。
AI.motivation: 现有验证工具无法有效验证动态环境下的自主系统鲁棒性，且模型无法准确反映实际系统执行过程。
AI.method: 通过将技能架构转化为Petri网，结合线性时序逻辑(LTL)或计算树逻辑(CTL)进行模型检测。
AI.result: 开发了SkiNet工具，实现了对技能状态机行为及资源管理的精确建模与验证。
AI.conclusion: SkiNet通过Petri网建模有效提升了基于技能的自主系统在异常事件下的验证能力。

result: 开发了SkiNet工具，实现了对技能状态机行为及资源管理的精确建模与验证。
conclusion: SkiNet通过Petri网建模有效提升了基于技能的自主系统在异常事件下的验证能力。
search_text: SkiNet, A Petri Net Generation Tool for the Verification of Skillset-based Autonomous Systems SkiNet，用于验证基于技能组的自治系统的 Petri 网生成工具 The need for high-level autonomy and robustness of autonomous systems for missions in dynamic and remote environment has pushed developers to come up with new software architectures. A common architecture style is to summarize the capabilities of the robotic system into elementary actions, called skills, on top of which a skill management layer is implemented to structure, test and control the functional layer. However, current available verification tools only provide either mission-specific verification or verification on a model that does not replicate the actual execution of the system, which makes it difficult to ensure its robustness to unexpected events. To that end, a tool, SkiNet, has been developed to transform the skill-based architecture of a system into a Petri net modeling the state-machine behaviors of the skills and the resources they handle. The Petri net allows the use of model-checking, such as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) or Computational Tree Logic (CTL), for the user to analyze and verify the model of the system. 在动态和远程环境中执行任务的自主系统对高水平自主性和鲁棒性的需求促使开发人员提出新的软件架构。一种常见的架构风格是将机器人系统的功能概括为基本动作，称为技能，在其之上实现技能管理层来构建、测试和控制功能层。然而，当前可用的验证工具仅提供特定于任务的验证或在不复制系统实际执行的模型上进行验证，这使得很难确保其对意外事件的鲁棒性。为此，开发了一种工具 SkiNet，将基于技能的系统架构转换为 Petri 网，对技能及其处理的资源的状态机行为进行建模。 Petri网允许使用模型检查，例如线性时序逻辑（LTL）或计算树逻辑（CTL），以便用户分析和验证系统的模型。 本文提出了一种名为SkiNet的工具，用于将基于技能的自主系统架构转换为Petri网，以验证其状态机行为和资源处理。 Baptiste Pelletier,Charles Lesire,David Doose,Karen Godary-Dejean,Charles Dramé-Maigné cs.FL,cs.RO

authors_text: Astrid Rakow
title: A Doxastic Characterisation of Autonomous Decisive Systems
title_zh: 自主决策系统的信念特征
abstract: A highly autonomous system (HAS) has to assess the situation it is in and derive beliefs, based on which, it decides what to do next. The beliefs are not solely based on the observations the HAS has made so far, but also on general insights about the world, in which the HAS operates. These insights have either been built in the HAS during design or are provided by trusted sources during its mission. Although its beliefs may be imprecise and might bear flaws, the HAS will have to extrapolate the possible futures in order to evaluate the consequences of its actions and then take its decisions autonomously. In this paper, we formalize an autonomous decisive system as a system that always chooses actions that it currently believes are the best. We show that it can be checked whether an autonomous decisive system can be built given an application domain, the dynamically changing knowledge base and a list of LTL mission goals. We moreover can synthesize a belief formation for an autonomous decisive system. For the formal characterization, we use a doxastic framework for safety-critical HASs where the belief formation supports the HAS's extrapolation.
summary: A highly autonomous system (HAS) has to assess the situation it is in and derive beliefs, based on which, it decides what to do next. The beliefs are not solely based on the observations the HAS has made so far, but also on general insights about the world, in which the HAS operates. These insights have either been built in the HAS during design or are provided by trusted sources during its mission. Although its beliefs may be imprecise and might bear flaws, the HAS will have to extrapolate the possible futures in order to evaluate the consequences of its actions and then take its decisions autonomously. In this paper, we formalize an autonomous decisive system as a system that always chooses actions that it currently believes are the best. We show that it can be checked whether an autonomous decisive system can be built given an application domain, the dynamically changing knowledge base and a list of LTL mission goals. We moreover can synthesize a belief formation for an autonomous decisive system. For the formal characterization, we use a doxastic framework for safety-critical HASs where the belief formation supports the HAS's extrapolation.
abstract_zh: 高度自治系统 (HAS) 必须评估其所处的情况并得出信念，并据此决定下一步该做什么。这些信念不仅基于 HAS 迄今为止所做的观察，而且还基于对 HAS 所运作的世界的一般见解。这些见解要么是在 HAS 设计期间构建的，要么是在执行任务期间由可信来源提供的。尽管它的信念可能不精确并且可能存在缺陷，但 HAS 必须推断可能的未来，以评估其行动的后果，然后自主做出决定。在本文中，我们将自主决策系统形式化为一个始终选择当前认为最好的行动的系统。我们证明，可以检查是否可以在给定应用领域、动态变化的知识库和 LTL 任务目标列表的情况下构建自主决策系统。此外，我们还可以为自主决策系统合成信念形成。对于正式表征，我们使用安全关键 HAS 的信念框架，其中信念形成支持 HAS 的外推。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信念形成的自主决策系统形式化方法，用于安全关键型高自主系统。
AI.motivation: 高自主系统需在动态环境中基于不完美信念进行自主决策，需确保其决策符合任务目标并具备可验证性。
AI.method: 采用道义框架（doxastic framework）结合线性时序逻辑（LTL），对系统信念形成与决策过程进行形式化建模。
AI.result: 证明可验证给定领域下是否可构建自主决策系统，并能合成符合LTL任务目标的信念形成机制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为安全关键型自主系统提供了形式化验证与信念合成的理论基础，增强系统决策可靠性。

authors_text: Joe Collenette,Louise A. Dennis,Michael Fisher
title: Advising Autonomous Cars about the Rules of the Road
title_zh: 为自动驾驶汽车提供有关道路规则的建议
abstract: This paper describes (R)ules (o)f (T)he (R)oad (A)dvisor, an agent that provides recommended and possible actions to be generated from a set of human-level rules. We describe the architecture and design of RoTRA, both formally and with an example. Specifically, we use RoTRA to formalise and implement the UK "Rules of the Road", and describe how this can be incorporated into autonomous cars such that they can reason internally about obeying the rules of the road. In addition, the possible actions generated are annotated to indicate whether the rules state that the action must be taken or that they only recommend that the action should be taken, as per the UK Highway Code (Rules of The Road). The benefits of utilising this system include being able to adapt to different regulations in different jurisdictions; allowing clear traceability from rules to behaviour, and providing an external automated accountability mechanism that can check whether the rules were obeyed in some given situation. A simulation of an autonomous car shows, via a concrete example, how trust can be built by putting the autonomous vehicle through a number of scenarios which test the car's ability to obey the rules of the road. Autonomous cars that incorporate this system are able to ensure that they are obeying the rules of the road and external (legal or regulatory) bodies can verify that this is the case, without the vehicle or its manufacturer having to expose their source code or make their working transparent, thus allowing greater trust between car companies, jurisdictions, and the general public.
summary: This paper describes (R)ules (o)f (T)he (R)oad (A)dvisor, an agent that provides recommended and possible actions to be generated from a set of human-level rules. We describe the architecture and design of RoTRA, both formally and with an example. Specifically, we use RoTRA to formalise and implement the UK "Rules of the Road", and describe how this can be incorporated into autonomous cars such that they can reason internally about obeying the rules of the road. In addition, the possible actions generated are annotated to indicate whether the rules state that the action must be taken or that they only recommend that the action should be taken, as per the UK Highway Code (Rules of The Road). The benefits of utilising this system include being able to adapt to different regulations in different jurisdictions; allowing clear traceability from rules to behaviour, and providing an external automated accountability mechanism that can check whether the rules were obeyed in some given situation. A simulation of an autonomous car shows, via a concrete example, how trust can be built by putting the autonomous vehicle through a number of scenarios which test the car's ability to obey the rules of the road. Autonomous cars that incorporate this system are able to ensure that they are obeying the rules of the road and external (legal or regulatory) bodies can verify that this is the case, without the vehicle or its manufacturer having to expose their source code or make their working transparent, thus allowing greater trust between car companies, jurisdictions, and the general public.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了 (R)ules (o)f (T)he (R)oad (A)dvisor，这是一个代理，它提供根据一组人类级别的规则生成的建议和可能的操作。我们通过形式和示例描述了 RoTRA 的架构和设计。具体来说，我们使用 RoTRA 来规范和实施英国“道路规则”，并描述如何将其纳入自动驾驶汽车中，以便它们可以在内部推理如何遵守道路规则。此外，还对生成的可能操作进行了注释，以指示规则是规定必须采取该操作还是仅建议根据英国公路法规（道路规则）采取该操作。利用该系统的好处包括能够适应不同司法管辖区的不同法规；允许从规则到行为的清晰可追溯性，并提供外部自动问责机制，可以检查在某些特定情况下是否遵守规则。自动驾驶汽车的模拟通过一个具体的例子展示了如何通过让自动驾驶汽车经历许多测试汽车遵守道路规则的能力的场景来建立信任。采用该系统的自动驾驶汽车能够确保它们遵守道路规则，并且外部（法律或监管）机构可以验证情况是否如此，而车辆或其制造商无需公开其源代码或使其工作透明，从而使汽车公司、司法管辖区和公众之间建立更大的信任。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RoTRA系统，通过形式化规则为自动驾驶汽车提供道路规则建议，确保其行为符合法规并支持外部验证。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶汽车需适应不同地区的交通法规，同时需保证行为可追溯且无需公开源代码以建立公众与监管机构信任。
AI.method: 设计RoTRA架构，将英国《道路规则》形式化为可执行规则，生成标注强制或推荐动作的决策建议，并通过模拟验证系统有效性。
AI.result: 模拟实验显示系统能通过多场景测试提升自动驾驶汽车的规则遵循能力，外部机构可验证合规性而无需访问车辆代码。
AI.conclusion: RoTRA系统有效实现规则驱动的自动驾驶决策，促进跨地区法规适配与多方信任，为自动驾驶安全提供可验证的合规框架。

authors_text: Ivan Perez,Anastasia Mavridou,Tom Pressburger,Alexander Will,Patrick J. Martin
title: Monitoring ROS2: from Requirements to Autonomous Robots
title_zh: 监控 ROS2：从需求到自主机器人
abstract: Runtime verification (RV) has the potential to enable the safe operation of safety-critical systems that are too complex to formally verify, such as Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) applications. Writing correct monitors can itself be complex, and errors in the monitoring subsystem threaten the mission as a whole. This paper provides an overview of a formal approach to generating runtime monitors for autonomous robots from requirements written in a structured natural language. Our approach integrates the Formal Requirement Elicitation Tool (FRET) with Copilot, a runtime verification framework, through the Ogma integration tool. FRET is used to specify requirements with unambiguous semantics, which are then automatically translated into temporal logic formulae. Ogma generates monitor specifications from the FRET output, which are compiled into hard-real time C99. To facilitate integration of the monitors in ROS2, we have extended Ogma to generate ROS2 packages defining monitoring nodes, which run the monitors when new data becomes available, and publish the results of any violations. The goal of our approach is to treat the generated ROS2 packages as black boxes and integrate them into larger ROS2 systems with minimal effort.
summary: Runtime verification (RV) has the potential to enable the safe operation of safety-critical systems that are too complex to formally verify, such as Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) applications. Writing correct monitors can itself be complex, and errors in the monitoring subsystem threaten the mission as a whole. This paper provides an overview of a formal approach to generating runtime monitors for autonomous robots from requirements written in a structured natural language. Our approach integrates the Formal Requirement Elicitation Tool (FRET) with Copilot, a runtime verification framework, through the Ogma integration tool. FRET is used to specify requirements with unambiguous semantics, which are then automatically translated into temporal logic formulae. Ogma generates monitor specifications from the FRET output, which are compiled into hard-real time C99. To facilitate integration of the monitors in ROS2, we have extended Ogma to generate ROS2 packages defining monitoring nodes, which run the monitors when new data becomes available, and publish the results of any violations. The goal of our approach is to treat the generated ROS2 packages as black boxes and integrate them into larger ROS2 systems with minimal effort.
abstract_zh: 运行时验证 (RV) 有可能实现安全关键系统的安全运行，这些系统过于复杂而无法进行正式验证，例如机器人操作系统 2 (ROS2) 应用程序。编写正确的监视器本身就很复杂，并且监视子系统中的错误会威胁到整个任务。本文概述了根据以结构化自然语言编写的需求生成自主机器人运行时监视器的正式方法。我们的方法通过 Ogma 集成工具将形式需求获取工具 (FRET) 与运行时验证框架 Copilot 集成在一起。 FRET 用于指定具有明确语义的需求，然后自动将其转换为时序逻辑公式。 Ogma 从 FRET 输出生成监视器规范，这些规范被编译成硬实时 C99。为了促进 ROS2 中监视器的集成，我们扩展了 Ogma 以生成定义监视节点的 ROS2 包，这些节点在新数据可用时运行监视器，并发布任何违规结果。我们方法的目标是将生成的 ROS2 包视为黑匣子，并以最小的努力将它们集成到更大的 ROS2 系统中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从结构化自然语言需求自动生成ROS2运行时监控程序的方法，以提高自主机器人系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: ROS2等复杂安全关键系统难以通过形式化验证确保安全，而手动编写监控程序容易出错且威胁整体任务安全。
AI.method: 整合FRET工具（将自然语言需求转化为时序逻辑公式）、Copilot运行时验证框架与Ogma工具链，自动生成符合ROS2规范的监控节点代码包。
AI.result: 实现了将需求转化为ROS2监控节点的端到端流程，生成的监控程序可作为黑盒直接集成到ROS2系统中，显著降低人工干预和错误风险。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过形式化需求到监控程序的自动化转换，为ROS2安全关键系统提供了可扩展、低错误率的运行时验证解决方案。

authors_text: Yaoxian Song,Penglei Sun,Pengfei Fang,Linyi Yang,Yanghua Xiao,Yue Zhang
title: Human-in-the-loop Robotic Grasping using BERT Scene Representation
title_zh: 使用 BERT 场景表示的人机循环机器人抓取
abstract: Current NLP techniques have been greatly applied in different domains. In this paper, we propose a human-in-the-loop framework for robotic grasping in cluttered scenes, investigating a language interface to the grasping process, which allows the user to intervene by natural language commands. This framework is constructed on a state-of-the-art rasping baseline, where we substitute a scene-graph representation with a text representation of the scene using BERT. Experiments on both simulation and physical robot show that the proposed method outperforms conventional object-agnostic and scene-graph based methods in the literature. In addition, we find that with human intervention, performance can be significantly improved.
summary: Current NLP techniques have been greatly applied in different domains. In this paper, we propose a human-in-the-loop framework for robotic grasping in cluttered scenes, investigating a language interface to the grasping process, which allows the user to intervene by natural language commands. This framework is constructed on a state-of-the-art rasping baseline, where we substitute a scene-graph representation with a text representation of the scene using BERT. Experiments on both simulation and physical robot show that the proposed method outperforms conventional object-agnostic and scene-graph based methods in the literature. In addition, we find that with human intervention, performance can be significantly improved.
abstract_zh: 当前的NLP技术已经在不同领域得到了广泛的应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于在杂乱场景中进行机器人抓取的人机交互框架，研究了抓取过程的语言界面，该界面允许用户通过自然语言命令进行干预。该框架是在最先进的 rasping 基线上构建的，我们使用 BERT 将场景图表示替换为场景的文本表示。仿真和物理机器人的实验表明，所提出的方法优于文献中传统的对象不可知和基于场景图的方法。此外，我们发现通过人为干预，性能可以显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合BERT文本表示与人类干预的机器人抓取框架，用于解决杂乱场景中的抓取问题。
AI.motivation: 传统抓取方法在杂乱场景中表现不足，且缺乏与人类语言交互的灵活性，需更高效的场景表征和协作机制。
AI.method: 以先进抓取基线为框架，用BERT生成的文本表示替代场景图表示，并通过自然语言指令实现人类实时干预。
AI.result: 仿真与实体机器人实验表明，该方法优于传统目标无关及场景图方法，且人类干预显著提升抓取成功率。
AI.conclusion: BERT文本表征结合人类语言指令能有效提升复杂场景抓取性能，未来可拓展至更多语言交互场景。

authors_text: Jiale Tao,Biao Wang,Tiezheng Ge,Yuning Jiang,Wen Li,Lixin Duan
title: Motion Transformer for Unsupervised Image Animation
title_zh: 用于无监督图像动画的运动变压器
abstract: Image animation aims to animate a source image by using motion learned from a driving video. Current state-of-the-art methods typically use convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to predict motion information, such as motion keypoints and corresponding local transformations. However, these CNN based methods do not explicitly model the interactions between motions; as a result, the important underlying motion relationship may be neglected, which can potentially lead to noticeable artifacts being produced in the generated animation video. To this end, we propose a new method, the motion transformer, which is the first attempt to build a motion estimator based on a vision transformer. More specifically, we introduce two types of tokens in our proposed method: i) image tokens formed from patch features and corresponding position encoding; and ii) motion tokens encoded with motion information. Both types of tokens are sent into vision transformers to promote underlying interactions between them through multi-head self attention blocks. By adopting this process, the motion information can be better learned to boost the model performance. The final embedded motion tokens are then used to predict the corresponding motion keypoints and local transformations. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show that our proposed method achieves promising results to the state-of-the-art baselines. Our source code will be public available.
summary: Image animation aims to animate a source image by using motion learned from a driving video. Current state-of-the-art methods typically use convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to predict motion information, such as motion keypoints and corresponding local transformations. However, these CNN based methods do not explicitly model the interactions between motions; as a result, the important underlying motion relationship may be neglected, which can potentially lead to noticeable artifacts being produced in the generated animation video. To this end, we propose a new method, the motion transformer, which is the first attempt to build a motion estimator based on a vision transformer. More specifically, we introduce two types of tokens in our proposed method: i) image tokens formed from patch features and corresponding position encoding; and ii) motion tokens encoded with motion information. Both types of tokens are sent into vision transformers to promote underlying interactions between them through multi-head self attention blocks. By adopting this process, the motion information can be better learned to boost the model performance. The final embedded motion tokens are then used to predict the corresponding motion keypoints and local transformations. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show that our proposed method achieves promising results to the state-of-the-art baselines. Our source code will be public available.
abstract_zh: 图像动画旨在通过使用从驾驶视频中学习到的运动来对源图像进行动画处理。当前最先进的方法通常使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来预测运动信息，例如运动关键点和相应的局部变换。然而，这些基于 CNN 的方法并没有明确地模拟运动之间的相互作用；因此，重要的底层运动关系可能会被忽略，这可能会导致在生成的动画视频中产生明显的伪影。为此，我们提出了一种新方法，即运动变换器，这是基于视觉变换器构建运动估计器的首次尝试。更具体地说，我们在我们提出的方法中引入了两种类型的标记：i）由补丁特征和相应的位置编码形成的图像标记； ii) 用运动信息编码的运动令牌。两种类型的令牌都被发送到视觉转换器中，以通过多头自注意力块促进它们之间的潜在交互。通过采用这个过程，可以更好地学习运动信息以提高模型性能。然后使用最终嵌入的运动标记来预测相应的运动关键点和局部变换。对基准数据集的广泛实验表明，我们提出的方法在最先进的基线上取得了有希望的结果。我们的源代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer的无监督图像动画方法，通过建模运动间交互关系提升动画生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN方法未显式建模运动间的相互作用，导致生成动画中出现明显伪影。
AI.method: 设计包含图像token和运动token的双通道视觉Transformer，通过多头自注意力机制促进两种token的交互学习。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在生成动画质量上优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Motion Transformer通过显式建模运动关系，有效提升了无监督图像动画的生成性能。

However, these CNN based methods do not explicitly model the interactions between motions; as a result, the important underlying motion relationship may be neglected, which can potentially lead to noticeable artifacts being produced in the generated animation video. To this end, we propose a new method, the motion transformer, which is the first attempt to build a motion estimator based on a vision transformer. More specifically, we introduce two types of tokens in our proposed method: i) image tokens formed from patch features and corresponding position encoding; and ii) motion tokens encoded with motion information. Both types of tokens are sent into vision transformers to promote underlying interactions between them through multi-head self attention blocks. By adopting this process, the motion information can be better learned to boost the model performance. The final embedded motion tokens are then used to predict the corresponding motion keypoints and local transformations. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show that our proposed method achieves promising results to the state-of-the-art baselines. Our source code will be public available. 图像动画旨在通过使用从驾驶视频中学习到的运动来对源图像进行动画处理。当前最先进的方法通常使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来预测运动信息，例如运动关键点和相应的局部变换。然而，这些基于 CNN 的方法并没有明确地模拟运动之间的相互作用；因此，重要的底层运动关系可能会被忽略，这可能会导致在生成的动画视频中产生明显的伪影。为此，我们提出了一种新方法，即运动变换器，这是基于视觉变换器构建运动估计器的首次尝试。更具体地说，我们在我们提出的方法中引入了两种类型的标记：i）由补丁特征和相应的位置编码形成的图像标记； ii) 用运动信息编码的运动令牌。两种类型的令牌都被发送到视觉转换器中，以通过多头自注意力块促进它们之间的潜在交互。通过采用这个过程，可以更好地学习运动信息以提高模型性能。然后使用最终嵌入的运动标记来预测相应的运动关键点和局部变换。对基准数据集的广泛实验表明，我们提出的方法在最先进的基线上取得了有希望的结果。我们的源代码将公开。 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer的无监督图像动画方法，通过建模运动间交互关系提升动画生成效果。 Jiale Tao,Biao Wang,Tiezheng Ge,Yuning Jiang,Wen Li,Lixin Duan cs.CV

authors_text: Hazrat Ali
title: Leveraging machine learning for less developed languages: Progress on Urdu text detection
title_zh: 利用机器学习来处理欠发达的语言：乌尔都语文本检测的进展
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS ML4D workshop. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.08060
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS ML4D workshop. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.08060
abstract: Text detection in natural scene images has applications for autonomous driving, navigation help for elderly and blind people. However, the research on Urdu text detection is usually hindered by lack of data resources. We have developed a dataset of scene images with Urdu text. We present the use of machine learning methods to perform detection of Urdu text from the scene images. We extract text regions using channel enhanced Maximally Stable Extremal Region (MSER) method. First, we classify text and noise based on their geometric properties. Next, we use a support vector machine for early discarding of non-text regions. To further remove the non-text regions, we use histogram of oriented gradients (HoG) features obtained and train a second SVM classifier. This improves the overall performance on text region detection within the scene images. To support research on Urdu text, We aim to make the data freely available for research use. We also aim to highlight the challenges and the research gap for Urdu text detection.
summary: Text detection in natural scene images has applications for autonomous driving, navigation help for elderly and blind people. However, the research on Urdu text detection is usually hindered by lack of data resources. We have developed a dataset of scene images with Urdu text. We present the use of machine learning methods to perform detection of Urdu text from the scene images. We extract text regions using channel enhanced Maximally Stable Extremal Region (MSER) method. First, we classify text and noise based on their geometric properties. Next, we use a support vector machine for early discarding of non-text regions. To further remove the non-text regions, we use histogram of oriented gradients (HoG) features obtained and train a second SVM classifier. This improves the overall performance on text region detection within the scene images. To support research on Urdu text, We aim to make the data freely available for research use. We also aim to highlight the challenges and the research gap for Urdu text detection.
abstract_zh: 自然场景图像中的文本检测可应用于自动驾驶、老年人和盲人的导航帮助。然而，乌尔都语文本检测的研究通常因缺乏数据资源而受到阻碍。我们开发了带有乌尔都语文本的场景图像数据集。我们提出使用机器学习方法从场景图像中执行乌尔都语文本检测。我们使用通道增强型最大稳定极值区域（MSER）方法提取文本区域。首先，我们根据文本和噪声的几何特性对它们进行分类。接下来，我们使用支持向量机来早期丢弃非文本区域。为了进一步去除非文本区域，我们使用获得的定向梯度直方图（HoG）特征并训练第二个 SVM 分类器。这提高了场景图像内文本区域检测的整体性能。为了支持乌尔都语文本的研究，我们的目标是免费提供数据供研究使用。我们还旨在强调乌尔都语文本检测的挑战和研究差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的乌尔都语文本检测方法，通过构建数据集并结合几何特征与支持向量机（SVM）分类器，解决资源匮乏语言的文本检测难题。
AI.motivation: 乌尔都语文本检测因缺乏数据资源而进展缓慢，但其在自动驾驶、无障碍导航等场景中具有重要应用价值，亟需突破现有技术瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用通道增强的MSER方法提取文本区域，利用几何特征进行初步分类，通过两个SVM分类器（分别基于几何特征和HoG特征）分阶段剔除非文本区域。
AI.result: 显著提升了场景图像中乌尔都语文本区域的检测准确率，并构建了公开数据集以支持后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为资源匮乏语言的文本检测提供了可行框架，但该领域仍存在数据多样性不足、复杂场景适应性差等挑战，需进一步探索。

authors_text: Stanisław Woźniak,Hlynur Jónsson,Giovanni Cherubini,Angeliki Pantazi,Evangelos Eleftheriou
title: On the visual analytic intelligence of neural networks
title_zh: 论神经网络的视觉分析智能
abstract: Visual oddity task was conceived as a universal ethnic-independent analytic intelligence test for humans. Advancements in artificial intelligence led to important breakthroughs, yet competing with humans on such analytic intelligence tasks remains challenging and typically resorts to non-biologically-plausible architectures. We present a biologically realistic system that receives inputs from synthetic eye movements - saccades, and processes them with neurons incorporating dynamics of neocortical neurons. We introduce a procedurally generated visual oddity dataset to train an architecture extending conventional relational networks and our proposed system. Both approaches surpass the human accuracy, and we uncover that both share the same essential underlying mechanism of reasoning. Finally, we show that the biologically inspired network achieves superior accuracy, learns faster and requires fewer parameters than the conventional network.
summary: Visual oddity task was conceived as a universal ethnic-independent analytic intelligence test for humans. Advancements in artificial intelligence led to important breakthroughs, yet competing with humans on such analytic intelligence tasks remains challenging and typically resorts to non-biologically-plausible architectures. We present a biologically realistic system that receives inputs from synthetic eye movements - saccades, and processes them with neurons incorporating dynamics of neocortical neurons. We introduce a procedurally generated visual oddity dataset to train an architecture extending conventional relational networks and our proposed system. Both approaches surpass the human accuracy, and we uncover that both share the same essential underlying mechanism of reasoning. Finally, we show that the biologically inspired network achieves superior accuracy, learns faster and requires fewer parameters than the conventional network.
abstract_zh: 视觉奇怪任务被认为是一种通用的、与种族无关的人类分析智力测试。人工智能的进步带来了重要突破，但在此类分析智能任务上与人类竞争仍然具有挑战性，并且通常诉诸于非生物学合理的架构。我们提出了一个生物学上真实的系统，该系统接收来自合成眼球运动（眼跳）的输入，并用结合了新皮质神经元动力学的神经元来处理它们。我们引入了一个程序生成的视觉奇怪数据集来训练扩展传统关系网络和我们提出的系统的架构。这两种方法都超越了人类的准确性，并且我们发现两者具有相同的基本推理机制。最后，我们表明，与传统网络相比，受生物学启发的网络具有更高的准确性、学习速度更快并且需要更少的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生物启发机制的神经网络架构，用于解决视觉分析智能任务，并在视觉奇异性任务中超越人类表现。
AI.motivation: 传统人工智能模型在解决需要类人类分析智能的任务（如视觉奇异性检测）时表现不足，且依赖非生物合理性架构，因此需要开发更接近生物机制的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了一种接收合成眼动数据（扫视）的生物启发神经网络，结合新皮层神经元动力学，并通过程序生成的视觉奇异性数据集训练扩展的关系网络架构。
AI.result: 两种方法均超越人类准确率，但生物启发网络在准确率、学习速度和参数效率上均优于传统网络。
AI.conclusion: 生物启发的神经网络架构在分析智能任务中展现出更高的效率和性能，验证了生物机制对人工智能设计的借鉴价值。

Both approaches surpass the human accuracy, and we uncover that both share the same essential underlying mechanism of reasoning. Finally, we show that the biologically inspired network achieves superior accuracy, learns faster and requires fewer parameters than the conventional network. 视觉奇怪任务被认为是一种通用的、与种族无关的人类分析智力测试。人工智能的进步带来了重要突破，但在此类分析智能任务上与人类竞争仍然具有挑战性，并且通常诉诸于非生物学合理的架构。我们提出了一个生物学上真实的系统，该系统接收来自合成眼球运动（眼跳）的输入，并用结合了新皮质神经元动力学的神经元来处理它们。我们引入了一个程序生成的视觉奇怪数据集来训练扩展传统关系网络和我们提出的系统的架构。这两种方法都超越了人类的准确性，并且我们发现两者具有相同的基本推理机制。最后，我们表明，与传统网络相比，受生物学启发的网络具有更高的准确性、学习速度更快并且需要更少的参数。 本文提出了一种基于生物启发机制的神经网络架构，用于解决视觉分析智能任务，并在视觉奇异性任务中超越人类表现。 Stanisław Woźniak,Hlynur Jónsson,Giovanni Cherubini,Angeliki Pantazi,Evangelos Eleftheriou cs.NE

authors_text: Francis Rhys Ward,Francesco Belardinelli,Francesca Toni
title: Argumentative Reward Learning: Reasoning About Human Preferences
title_zh: 论证性奖励学习：推理人类偏好
abstract: We define a novel neuro-symbolic framework, argumentative reward learning, which combines preference-based argumentation with existing approaches to reinforcement learning from human feedback. Our method improves prior work by generalising human preferences, reducing the burden on the user and increasing the robustness of the reward model. We demonstrate this with a number of experiments.
summary: We define a novel neuro-symbolic framework, argumentative reward learning, which combines preference-based argumentation with existing approaches to reinforcement learning from human feedback. Our method improves prior work by generalising human preferences, reducing the burden on the user and increasing the robustness of the reward model. We demonstrate this with a number of experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们定义了一种新颖的神经符号框架，即论证奖励学习，它将基于偏好的论证与现有的人类反馈强化学习方法结合起来。我们的方法通过概括人类偏好、减轻用户的负担并提高奖励模型的稳健性来改进先前的工作。我们通过大量实验证明了这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的神经符号框架，称为论点奖励学习，结合基于偏好的论证与现有的从人类反馈中进行强化学习的方法。
AI.motivation: 为了改进现有方法，使人类偏好更具通用性，减轻用户负担并提高奖励模型的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过结合基于偏好的论证与现有强化学习方法，提出论点奖励学习框架。
AI.result: 通过多个实验验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在通用性、用户负担和模型鲁棒性方面优于现有方法。

search_text: Argumentative Reward Learning: Reasoning About Human Preferences 论证性奖励学习：推理人类偏好 We define a novel neuro-symbolic framework, argumentative reward learning, which combines preference-based argumentation with existing approaches to reinforcement learning from human feedback. Our method improves prior work by generalising human preferences, reducing the burden on the user and increasing the robustness of the reward model. We demonstrate this with a number of experiments. 我们定义了一种新颖的神经符号框架，即论证奖励学习，它将基于偏好的论证与现有的人类反馈强化学习方法结合起来。我们的方法通过概括人类偏好、减轻用户的负担并提高奖励模型的稳健性来改进先前的工作。我们通过大量实验证明了这一点。 本文提出了一种新的神经符号框架，称为论点奖励学习，结合基于偏好的论证与现有的从人类反馈中进行强化学习的方法。 Francis Rhys Ward,Francesco Belardinelli,Francesca Toni cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Doganay Sirintuna,Idil Ozdamar,Arash Ajoudani
title: Carrying the uncarriable: a deformation-agnostic and human-cooperative framework for unwieldy objects using multiple robots
title_zh: 携带不可携带的东西：使用多个机器人来处理笨重物体的变形不可知论和人类合作框架
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, accepted at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023), for associated video, see https://youtu.be/Q3sA6YzTaaE
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, accepted at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023), for associated video, see https://youtu.be/Q3sA6YzTaaE
abstract: This manuscript introduces an object deformability-agnostic framework for co-carrying tasks that are shared between a person and multiple robots. Our approach allows the full control of the co-carrying trajectories by the person while sharing the load with multiple robots depending on the size and the weight of the object. This is achieved by merging the haptic information transferred through the object and the human motion information obtained from a motion capture system. One important advantage of the framework is that no strict internal communication is required between the robots, regardless of the object size and deformation characteristics. We validate the framework with two challenging real-world scenarios: co-transportation of a wooden rigid closet and a bulky box on top of forklift moving straps, with the latter characterizing deformable objects. In order to evaluate the generalizability of the proposed framework, a heterogenous team of two mobile manipulators that consist of an Omni-directional mobile base and a collaborative robotic arm with different DoFs is chosen for the experiments. The qualitative comparison between our controller and the baseline controller (i.e., an admittance controller) during these experiments demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed framework especially when co-carrying deformable objects. Furthermore, we believe that the performance of our framework during the experiment with the lifting straps offers a promising solution for the co-transportation of bulky and ungraspable objects.
summary: This manuscript introduces an object deformability-agnostic framework for co-carrying tasks that are shared between a person and multiple robots. Our approach allows the full control of the co-carrying trajectories by the person while sharing the load with multiple robots depending on the size and the weight of the object. This is achieved by merging the haptic information transferred through the object and the human motion information obtained from a motion capture system. One important advantage of the framework is that no strict internal communication is required between the robots, regardless of the object size and deformation characteristics. We validate the framework with two challenging real-world scenarios: co-transportation of a wooden rigid closet and a bulky box on top of forklift moving straps, with the latter characterizing deformable objects. In order to evaluate the generalizability of the proposed framework, a heterogenous team of two mobile manipulators that consist of an Omni-directional mobile base and a collaborative robotic arm with different DoFs is chosen for the experiments. The qualitative comparison between our controller and the baseline controller (i.e., an admittance controller) during these experiments demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed framework especially when co-carrying deformable objects. Furthermore, we believe that the performance of our framework during the experiment with the lifting straps offers a promising solution for the co-transportation of bulky and ungraspable objects.
abstract_zh: 该手稿介绍了一个与物体变形无关的框架，用于在人和多个机器人之间共享共同执行的任务。我们的方法允许人完全控制共同携带的轨迹，同时根据物体的大小和重量与多个机器人分担负载。这是通过合并通过物体传输的触觉信息和从运动捕捉系统获得的人体运动信息来实现的。该框架的一个重要优点是，无论物体大小和变形特征如何，机器人之间都不需要严格的内部通信。我们通过两个具有挑战性的现实场景验证了该框架：共同运输木制刚性壁橱和叉车移动带顶部的笨重盒子，后者表征可变形物体。为了评估所提出的框架的普遍性，选择了由两个移动机械臂组成的异构团队进行实验，其中两个移动机械臂由全向移动底座和具有不同自由度的协作机械臂组成。这些实验期间我们的控制器和基线控制器（即导纳控制器）之间的定性比较证明了所提出的框架的有效性，特别是在共同承载可变形物体时。此外，我们相信我们的框架在提升带实验过程中的性能为共同运输笨重且无法抓握的物体提供了一个有前景的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需严格机器人间通信的框架，使人类与多机器人协作搬运不可控变形物体，通过融合触觉信息和人体运动数据实现负载共享。
AI.motivation: 传统搬运框架难以处理变形物体或需人类协作的复杂场景，且机器人间通信限制了系统灵活性，亟需一种通用性强、通信需求低的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合物体触觉反馈与人体动作捕捉数据，通过动态负载分配算法实现人机协同控制，无需机器人间直接通信，采用异构机器人团队验证框架普适性。
AI.result: 在搬运木质衣柜和可变形起重吊带的实验中，相较于传统阻抗控制器，该框架在变形物体搬运任务中表现出更优的稳定性与适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为搬运大型不可抓取物体提供了可行方案，未来可拓展至更多非结构化环境的人机协作场景。

authors_text: Siqi Tan,Xiaoya Zhang,Jingyao Li,Ruitao Jing,Mufan Zhao,Yang Liu,Quan Quan
title: OA-Bug: An Olfactory-Auditory Augmented Bug Algorithm for Swarm Robots in a Denied Environment
title_zh: OA-Bug：一种用于拒绝环境中群体机器人的嗅觉-听觉增强 Bug 算法
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, accepted by 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, accepted by 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: Searching in a denied environment is challenging for swarm robots as no assistance from GNSS, mapping, data sharing, and central processing is allowed. However, using olfactory and auditory signals to cooperate like animals could be an important way to improve the collaboration of swarm robots. In this paper, an Olfactory-Auditory augmented Bug algorithm (OA-Bug) is proposed for a swarm of autonomous robots to explore a denied environment. A simulation environment is built to measure the performance of OA-Bug. The coverage of the search task can reach 96.93% using OA-Bug, which is significantly improved compared with a similar algorithm, SGBA. Furthermore, experiments are conducted on real swarm robots to prove the validity of OA-Bug. Results show that OA-Bug can improve the performance of swarm robots in a denied environment. Video: https://youtu.be/vj9cRiSm9eM.
summary: Searching in a denied environment is challenging for swarm robots as no assistance from GNSS, mapping, data sharing, and central processing is allowed. However, using olfactory and auditory signals to cooperate like animals could be an important way to improve the collaboration of swarm robots. In this paper, an Olfactory-Auditory augmented Bug algorithm (OA-Bug) is proposed for a swarm of autonomous robots to explore a denied environment. A simulation environment is built to measure the performance of OA-Bug. The coverage of the search task can reach 96.93% using OA-Bug, which is significantly improved compared with a similar algorithm, SGBA. Furthermore, experiments are conducted on real swarm robots to prove the validity of OA-Bug. Results show that OA-Bug can improve the performance of swarm robots in a denied environment. Video: https://youtu.be/vj9cRiSm9eM.
abstract_zh: 对于群体机器人来说，在封闭的环境中进行搜索具有挑战性，因为不允许使用 GNSS、地图、数据共享和中央处理的帮助。然而，利用嗅觉和听觉信号像动物一样进行合作可能是改善群体机器人协作的重要方法。在本文中，提出了一种嗅觉-听觉增强 Bug 算法（OA-Bug），供一群自主机器人探索被拒绝的环境。搭建了仿真环境来测试OA-Bug的性能。使用OA-Bug，搜索任务的覆盖率可以达到96.93%，与类似算法SGBA相比有显着提高。此外，在真实的群体机器人上进行了实验，证明了OA-Bug的有效性。结果表明，OA-Bug 可以提高群体机器人在拒绝环境中的性能。视频：https://youtu.be/vj9cRiSm9eM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合嗅觉和听觉信号的增强型虫群算法（OA-Bug），用于在无GNSS和中央处理的受限环境中提升群体机器人的搜索能力。
AI.motivation: 在受限环境中，传统依赖GNSS、地图和中心处理器的群体机器人搜索方法受限，需探索生物启发的嗅觉-听觉协作机制以提升自主性与协作效率。
AI.method: 设计OA-Bug算法，融合嗅觉（化学信号）与听觉（声音信号）感知模块，通过仿真与真实群体机器人实验验证其性能。
AI.result: 仿真中搜索覆盖率高达96.93%，较同类算法SGBA显著提升；真实机器人实验验证了OA-Bug的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OA-Bug通过生物启发的多模态感知机制，有效解决了受限环境中群体机器人协作搜索的难题。

The coverage of the search task can reach 96.93% using OA-Bug, which is significantly improved compared with a similar algorithm, SGBA. Furthermore, experiments are conducted on real swarm robots to prove the validity of OA-Bug. Results show that OA-Bug can improve the performance of swarm robots in a denied environment. Video: https://youtu.be/vj9cRiSm9eM. 对于群体机器人来说，在封闭的环境中进行搜索具有挑战性，因为不允许使用 GNSS、地图、数据共享和中央处理的帮助。然而，利用嗅觉和听觉信号像动物一样进行合作可能是改善群体机器人协作的重要方法。在本文中，提出了一种嗅觉-听觉增强 Bug 算法（OA-Bug），供一群自主机器人探索被拒绝的环境。搭建了仿真环境来测试OA-Bug的性能。使用OA-Bug，搜索任务的覆盖率可以达到96.93%，与类似算法SGBA相比有显着提高。此外，在真实的群体机器人上进行了实验，证明了OA-Bug的有效性。结果表明，OA-Bug 可以提高群体机器人在拒绝环境中的性能。视频：https://youtu.be/vj9cRiSm9eM。 本文提出了一种结合嗅觉和听觉信号的增强型虫群算法（OA-Bug），用于在无GNSS和中央处理的受限环境中提升群体机器人的搜索能力。 Siqi Tan,Xiaoya Zhang,Jingyao Li,Ruitao Jing,Mufan Zhao,Yang Liu,Quan Quan cs.RO,cs.MA

authors_text: Rajitha de Silva,Grzegorz Cielniak,Junfeng Gao
title: Vision based Crop Row Navigation under Varying Field Conditions in Arable Fields
title_zh: 耕地变化条件下基于视觉的作物行导航
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Accurate crop row detection is often challenged by the varying field conditions present in real-world arable fields. Traditional colour based segmentation is unable to cater for all such variations. The lack of comprehensive datasets in agricultural environments limits the researchers from developing robust segmentation models to detect crop rows. We present a dataset for crop row detection with 11 field variations from Sugar Beet and Maize crops. We also present a novel crop row detection algorithm for visual servoing in crop row fields. Our algorithm can detect crop rows against varying field conditions such as curved crop rows, weed presence, discontinuities, growth stages, tramlines, shadows and light levels. Our method only uses RGB images from a front-mounted camera on a Husky robot to predict crop rows. Our method outperformed the classic colour based crop row detection baseline. Dense weed presence within inter-row space and discontinuities in crop rows were the most challenging field conditions for our crop row detection algorithm. Our method can detect the end of the crop row and navigate the robot towards the headland area when it reaches the end of the crop row.
summary: Accurate crop row detection is often challenged by the varying field conditions present in real-world arable fields. Traditional colour based segmentation is unable to cater for all such variations. The lack of comprehensive datasets in agricultural environments limits the researchers from developing robust segmentation models to detect crop rows. We present a dataset for crop row detection with 11 field variations from Sugar Beet and Maize crops. We also present a novel crop row detection algorithm for visual servoing in crop row fields. Our algorithm can detect crop rows against varying field conditions such as curved crop rows, weed presence, discontinuities, growth stages, tramlines, shadows and light levels. Our method only uses RGB images from a front-mounted camera on a Husky robot to predict crop rows. Our method outperformed the classic colour based crop row detection baseline. Dense weed presence within inter-row space and discontinuities in crop rows were the most challenging field conditions for our crop row detection algorithm. Our method can detect the end of the crop row and navigate the robot towards the headland area when it reaches the end of the crop row.
abstract_zh: 准确的作物行检测经常受到现实耕地中不同田间条件的挑战。传统的基于颜色的分割无法满足所有这些变化。农业环境中缺乏全面的数据集限制了研究人员开发强大的分割模型来检测作物行。我们提供了一个用于作物行检测的数据集，其中包含甜菜和玉米作物的 11 种田间变化。我们还提出了一种新颖的作物行检测算法，用于作物行田中的视觉伺服。我们的算法可以根据不同的田间条件检测作物行，例如弯曲的作物行、杂草存在、不连续性、生长阶段、轨道、阴影和光照水平。我们的方法仅使用 Husky 机器人前置摄像头的 RGB 图像来预测作物行数。我们的方法优于经典的基于颜色的作物行检测基线。行间空间内杂草密集和作物行不连续是我们作物行检测算法最具挑战性的田间条件。我们的方法可以检测作物行的末端，并在机器人到达作物行的末端时将机器人导航至岬角区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的作物行导航方法，用于应对田间多变环境下的作物行检测问题。
AI.motivation: 传统颜色分割方法难以应对真实田间环境的复杂变化，且缺乏全面数据集限制了鲁棒算法的开发。
AI.method: 使用安装在Husky机器人前部的RGB相机采集图像，提出新型视觉伺服算法，通过深度学习处理曲行、杂草、阴影等复杂场景。
AI.result: 算法在包含11种田间变化的自建数据集上优于传统方法，但密集杂草和作物行断裂仍是主要挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了复杂田间环境下的作物行检测能力，但需进一步优化杂草干扰和行断裂场景的处理性能。

authors_text: Maxim Popov,Temirgali Aimyshev,Eldar Ismailov,Ablay Bulegenov,Siamac Fazli
title: A Review of Modern Approaches for Coronary Angiography Imaging Analysis
title_zh: 冠状动脉造影成像分析的现代方法综述
abstract: Coronary Heart Disease (CHD) is a leading cause of death in the modern world. The development of modern analytical tools for diagnostics and treatment of CHD is receiving substantial attention from the scientific community. Deep learning-based algorithms, such as segmentation networks and detectors, play an important role in assisting medical professionals by providing timely analysis of a patient's angiograms. This paper focuses on X-Ray Coronary Angiography (XCA), which is considered to be a "gold standard" in the diagnosis and treatment of CHD. First, we describe publicly available datasets of XCA images. Then, classical and modern techniques of image preprocessing are reviewed. In addition, common frame selection techniques are discussed, which are an important factor of input quality and thus model performance. In the following two chapters we discuss modern vessel segmentation and stenosis detection networks and, finally, open problems and current limitations of the current state-of-the-art.
summary: Coronary Heart Disease (CHD) is a leading cause of death in the modern world. The development of modern analytical tools for diagnostics and treatment of CHD is receiving substantial attention from the scientific community. First, we describe publicly available datasets of XCA images. Then, classical and modern techniques of image preprocessing are reviewed. In addition, common frame selection techniques are discussed, which are an important factor of input quality and thus model performance. In the following two chapters we discuss modern vessel segmentation and stenosis detection networks and, finally, open problems and current limitations of the current state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 冠心病 (CHD) 是现代世界的一个主要原因。用于冠心病诊断和治疗的现代分析工具的开发正在受到科学界的广泛关注。基于深度学习的算法（例如分割网络和探测器）通过及时分析患者的血管造影照片，在协助医疗专业人员方面发挥着重要作用。本文重点介绍X射线冠状动脉造影（XCA），它被认为是诊断和治疗CHD的“金标准”。首先，我们描述公开可用的 XCA 图像数据集。然后，回顾了图像预处理的经典和现代技术。此外，还讨论了常见的帧选择技术，这是输入质量和模型性能的重要因素。在接下来的两章中，我们讨论现代血管分割和狭窄检测网络，最后讨论当前最先进技术的开放问题和局限性。

AI.tldr: 综述现代冠状动脉造影影像分析方法，重点探讨X射线冠状动脉造影（XCA）的处理技术、数据集、预处理方法、帧选择策略及当前挑战。
AI.motivation: 冠心病是全球主要死因，需提升诊断效率与准确性，现代深度学习方法在XCA分析中展现潜力，亟需系统综述以推动技术发展。
AI.method: 系统综述XCA图像分析流程，涵盖公开数据集、图像预处理、关键帧筛选、血管分割网络与狭窄检测算法，并评估现有技术局限性。
AI.result: 总结当前XCA影像分析技术体系，明确深度学习方法在提升分割精度与检测效率中的优势，并识别数据标注不一致、模型泛化能力不足等关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升XCA分析性能，但需解决数据标准化与模型鲁棒性问题，未来研究应聚焦跨机构数据协作与自适应算法开发。

authors_text: Kai Xiong,Zhongsu Luo,Siwei Fu,Yongheng Wang,Mingliang Xu,Yingcai Wu
title: Revealing the Semantics of Data Wrangling Scripts With COMANTICS
title_zh: 使用 COMANTICS 揭示数据整理脚本的语义
abstract: Data workers usually seek to understand the semantics of data wrangling scripts in various scenarios, such as code debugging, reusing, and maintaining. However, the understanding is challenging for novice data workers due to the variety of programming languages, functions, and parameters. Based on the observation that differences between input and output tables highly relate to the type of data transformation, we outline a design space including 103 characteristics to describe table differences. Then, we develop COMANTICS, a three-step pipeline that automatically detects the semantics of data transformation scripts. The first step focuses on the detection of table differences for each line of wrangling code. Second, we incorporate a characteristic-based component and a Siamese convolutional neural network-based component for the detection of transformation types. Third, we derive the parameters of each data transformation by employing a "slot filling" strategy. We design experiments to evaluate the performance of COMANTICS. Further, we assess its flexibility using three example applications in different domains.
summary: Data workers usually seek to understand the semantics of data wrangling scripts in various scenarios, such as code debugging, reusing, and maintaining. However, the understanding is challenging for novice data workers due to the variety of programming languages, functions, and parameters. Based on the observation that differences between input and output tables highly relate to the type of data transformation, we outline a design space including 103 characteristics to describe table differences. Then, we develop COMANTICS, a three-step pipeline that automatically detects the semantics of data transformation scripts. The first step focuses on the detection of table differences for each line of wrangling code. Second, we incorporate a characteristic-based component and a Siamese convolutional neural network-based component for the detection of transformation types. Third, we derive the parameters of each data transformation by employing a "slot filling" strategy. We design experiments to evaluate the performance of COMANTICS. Further, we assess its flexibility using three example applications in different domains.
abstract_zh: 数据工作者通常寻求理解各种场景中数据整理脚本的语义，例如代码调试、重用和维护。然而，由于编程语言、函数和参数的多样性，对于新手数据工作者来说，理解起来具有挑战性。基于输入和输出表之间的差异与数据转换类型高度相关的观察，我们概述了一个包含 103 个特征的设计空间来描述表差异。然后，我们开发了 COMANTICS，这是一个三步管道，可以自动检测数据转换脚本的语义。第一步重点是检测每行争论代码的表差异。其次，我们结合了基于特征的组件和基于暹罗卷积神经网络的组件来检测变换类型。第三，我们通过采用“槽填充”策略来导出每个数据转换的参数。我们设计实验来评估 COMANTICS 的性能。此外，我们使用不同领域的三个示例应用程序评估其灵活性。

AI.tldr: 开发COMANTICS方法以自动检测数据清洗脚本的语义
AI.motivation: 解决新手数据工作者因编程语言、函数及参数多样性导致的数据清洗脚本理解困难问题
AI.method: 提出三步流程：1）检测代码行的表差异；2）结合特征分析与Siamese卷积神经网络识别转换类型；3）通过槽填充策略推导参数
AI.result: 实验验证了COMANTICS的有效性，并通过三个不同领域的应用案例证明其灵活性
AI.conclusion: COMANTICS能有效揭示数据转换语义，为脚本调试、重用和维护提供自动化支持

search_text: Revealing the Semantics of Data Wrangling Scripts With COMANTICS 使用 COMANTICS 揭示数据整理脚本的语义 Data workers usually seek to understand the semantics of data wrangling scripts in various scenarios, such as code debugging, reusing, and maintaining. However, the understanding is challenging for novice data workers due to the variety of programming languages, functions, and parameters. Based on the observation that differences between input and output tables highly relate to the type of data transformation, we outline a design space including 103 characteristics to describe table differences. Then, we develop COMANTICS, a three-step pipeline that automatically detects the semantics of data transformation scripts. The first step focuses on the detection of table differences for each line of wrangling code. Second, we incorporate a characteristic-based component and a Siamese convolutional neural network-based component for the detection of transformation types. Third, we derive the parameters of each data transformation by employing a "slot filling" strategy. We design experiments to evaluate the performance of COMANTICS. Further, we assess its flexibility using three example applications in different domains. 数据工作者通常寻求理解各种场景中数据整理脚本的语义，例如代码调试、重用和维护。然而，由于编程语言、函数和参数的多样性，对于新手数据工作者来说，理解起来具有挑战性。基于输入和输出表之间的差异与数据转换类型高度相关的观察，我们概述了一个包含 103 个特征的设计空间来描述表差异。然后，我们开发了 COMANTICS，这是一个三步管道，可以自动检测数据转换脚本的语义。第一步重点是检测每行争论代码的表差异。其次，我们结合了基于特征的组件和基于暹罗卷积神经网络的组件来检测变换类型。第三，我们通过采用“槽填充”策略来导出每个数据转换的参数。我们设计实验来评估 COMANTICS 的性能。此外，我们使用不同领域的三个示例应用程序评估其灵活性。 开发COMANTICS方法以自动检测数据清洗脚本的语义 Kai Xiong,Zhongsu Luo,Siwei Fu,Yongheng Wang,Mingliang Xu,Yingcai Wu cs.SE,cs.HC

authors_text: Konstantinos Gavriilidis,Andrea Munafo,Helen Hastie,Conlan Cesar,Michael DeFilippo,Michael R. Benjamin
title: Towards Explaining Autonomy with Verbalised Decision Tree States
title_zh: 用语言化的决策树状态解释自治
abstract: The development of new AUV technology increased the range of tasks that AUVs can tackle and the length of their operations. As a result, AUVs are capable of handling highly complex operations. However, these missions do not fit easily into the traditional method of defining a mission as a series of pre-planned waypoints because it is not possible to know, in advance, everything that might occur during the mission. This results in a gap between the operator's expectations and actual operational performance. Consequently, this can create a diminished level of trust between the operators and AUVs, resulting in unnecessary mission interruptions. To bridge this gap between in-mission robotic behaviours and operators' expectations, this work aims to provide a framework to explain decisions and actions taken by an autonomous vehicle during the mission, in an easy-to-understand manner. Additionally, the objective is to have an autonomy-agnostic system that can be added as an additional layer on top of any autonomy architecture. To make the approach applicable across different autonomous systems equipped with different autonomies, this work decouples the inner workings of the autonomy from the decision points and the resulting executed actions applying Knowledge Distillation. Finally, to present the explanations to the operators in a more natural way, the output of the distilled decision tree is combined with natural language explanations and reported to the operators as sentences. For this reason, an additional step known as Concept2Text Generation is added at the end of the explanation pipeline.
summary: The development of new AUV technology increased the range of tasks that AUVs can tackle and the length of their operations. To bridge this gap between in-mission robotic behaviours and operators' expectations, this work aims to provide a framework to explain decisions and actions taken by an autonomous vehicle during the mission, in an easy-to-understand manner. Additionally, the objective is to have an autonomy-agnostic system that can be added as an additional layer on top of any autonomy architecture. To make the approach applicable across different autonomous systems equipped with different autonomies, this work decouples the inner workings of the autonomy from the decision points and the resulting executed actions applying Knowledge Distillation. For this reason, an additional step known as Concept2Text Generation is added at the end of the explanation pipeline.
abstract_zh: 新AUV技术的发展增加了AUV可以处理的任务范围和运行时间。因此，AUV 能够处理高度复杂的操作。然而，这些任务不太适合将任务定义为一系列预先计划的航路点的传统方法，因为不可能提前知道任务期间可能发生的所有情况。这导致运营商的期望与实际运营绩效之间存在差距。因此，这可能会降低操作员和 AUV 之间的信任程度，从而导致不必要的任务中断。为了弥合任务中机器人行为与操作员期望之间的差距，这项工作旨在提供一个框架，以易于理解的方式解释自动驾驶车辆在任务期间采取的决策和行动。此外，目标是拥有一个与自治无关的系统，可以作为附加层添加到任何自治架构之上。为了使该方法适用于配备不同自主权的不同自主系统，这项工作将自主权的内部运作与决策点以及应用知识蒸馏所产生的执行操作分离。最后，为了以更自然的方式向操作员提供解释，将蒸馏决策树的输出与自然语言解释相结合，并以句子的形式报告给操作员。因此，在解释管道的末尾添加了一个称为 Concept2Text Generation 的附加步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种框架，通过自然语言解释自主水下航行器（AUV）在任务中的决策过程，以增强操作员信任并减少任务中断。
AI.motivation: 传统预设航路点任务规划无法应对AUV复杂动态任务的需求，导致操作员与AUV实际表现之间的信任差距及不必要的任务中断。
AI.method: 采用知识蒸馏技术解耦自主系统内部逻辑与决策点，结合决策树与Concept2Text生成自然语言解释。
AI.result: 构建了跨自主架构的解释框架，通过自然语言向操作员报告决策依据，有效弥合任务行为与预期间的差距。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自主系统提供通用解释方案，通过可理解的决策说明提升人机协作效率与安全性。
