authors_text: Yaqian Zhang,Bernhard Pfahringer,Eibe Frank,Albert Bifet,Nick Jin Sean Lim,Yunzhe Jia
title: A simple but strong baseline for online continual learning: Repeated Augmented Rehearsal
title_zh: 在线持续学习的简单但强大的基线：重复增强排练
abstract: Online continual learning (OCL) aims to train neural networks incrementally from a non-stationary data stream with a single pass through data. Rehearsal-based methods attempt to approximate the observed input distributions over time with a small memory and revisit them later to avoid forgetting. Despite its strong empirical performance, rehearsal methods still suffer from a poor approximation of the loss landscape of past data with memory samples. This paper revisits the rehearsal dynamics in online settings. We provide theoretical insights on the inherent memory overfitting risk from the viewpoint of biased and dynamic empirical risk minimization, and examine the merits and limits of repeated rehearsal. Inspired by our analysis, a simple and intuitive baseline, Repeated Augmented Rehearsal (RAR), is designed to address the underfitting-overfitting dilemma of online rehearsal. Surprisingly, across four rather different OCL benchmarks, this simple baseline outperforms vanilla rehearsal by 9%-17% and also significantly improves state-of-the-art rehearsal-based methods MIR, ASER, and SCR. We also demonstrate that RAR successfully achieves an accurate approximation of the loss landscape of past data and high-loss ridge aversion in its learning trajectory. Extensive ablation studies are conducted to study the interplay between repeated and augmented rehearsal and reinforcement learning (RL) is applied to dynamically adjust the hyperparameters of RAR to balance the stability-plasticity trade-off online. Code is available at https://github.com/YaqianZhang/RepeatedAugmentedRehearsal
summary: Online continual learning (OCL) aims to train neural networks incrementally from a non-stationary data stream with a single pass through data. Rehearsal-based methods attempt to approximate the observed input distributions over time with a small memory and revisit them later to avoid forgetting. Despite its strong empirical performance, rehearsal methods still suffer from a poor approximation of the loss landscape of past data with memory samples. This paper revisits the rehearsal dynamics in online settings. We provide theoretical insights on the inherent memory overfitting risk from the viewpoint of biased and dynamic empirical risk minimization, and examine the merits and limits of repeated rehearsal. Inspired by our analysis, a simple and intuitive baseline, Repeated Augmented Rehearsal (RAR), is designed to address the underfitting-overfitting dilemma of online rehearsal. Surprisingly, across four rather different OCL benchmarks, this simple baseline outperforms vanilla rehearsal by 9%-17% and also significantly improves state-of-the-art rehearsal-based methods MIR, ASER, and SCR. We also demonstrate that RAR successfully achieves an accurate approximation of the loss landscape of past data and high-loss ridge aversion in its learning trajectory. Extensive ablation studies are conducted to study the interplay between repeated and augmented rehearsal and reinforcement learning (RL) is applied to dynamically adjust the hyperparameters of RAR to balance the stability-plasticity trade-off online. Code is available at https://github.com/YaqianZhang/RepeatedAugmentedRehearsal
abstract_zh: 在线持续学习（OCL）旨在通过单次传递数据从非平稳数据流增量训练神经网络。基于排练的方法试图用较小的记忆来近似观察到的随时间变化的输入分布，并在以后重新访问它们以避免遗忘。尽管其经验性能很强，但排练方法仍然无法很好地近似记忆样本的过去数据的损失情况。本文重新探讨了在线环境中的排练动态。我们从有偏差和动态经验风险最小化的角度提供了关于固有记忆过度拟合风险的理论见解，并检验了重复排练的优点和局限性。受我们分析的启发，一个简单直观的基线，即重复增强排练（RAR），旨在解决在线排练的欠拟合-过拟合困境。令人惊讶的是，在四个相当不同的 OCL 基准测试中，这个简单的基线比普通排练好 9%-17%，并且还显着改进了最先进的基于排练的方法 MIR、ASER 和 SCR。我们还证明 RAR 成功地实现了对过去数据的损失情况的精确近似以及其学习轨迹中的高损失岭厌恶。进行了广泛的消融研究，以研究重复和增强排练之间的相互作用，并应用强化学习（RL）来动态调整 RAR 的超参数，以在线平衡稳定性与可塑性之间的权衡。代码可在 https://github.com/YaqianZhang/RepeatedAugmentedRehearsal 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Repeated Augmented Rehearsal (RAR)的在线持续学习基线方法，通过重复增强回放机制解决记忆过拟合与欠拟合的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有回放方法在在线持续学习中难以准确逼近历史数据的损失景观，导致记忆过拟合风险，需设计更有效的回放策略平衡稳定性与可塑性。
AI.method: 提出RAR方法，结合重复回放与数据增强，并引入强化学习动态调整超参数，以优化历史数据损失景观逼近与高损失区域规避。
AI.result: 在四个OCL基准测试中，RAR较传统回放方法提升9%-17%，显著超越MIR、ASER等先进方法，且有效逼近历史数据损失景观。
AI.conclusion: RAR通过简单机制实现性能突破，证明了重复增强回放与动态超参数调整在在线持续学习中的有效性，为未来研究提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Repeated Augmented Rehearsal (RAR)的在线持续学习基线方法，通过重复增强回放机制解决记忆过拟合与欠拟合的矛盾。

search_text: A simple but strong baseline for online continual learning: Repeated Augmented Rehearsal 在线持续学习的简单但强大的基线：重复增强排练 Online continual learning (OCL) aims to train neural networks incrementally from a non-stationary data stream with a single pass through data. Rehearsal-based methods attempt to approximate the observed input distributions over time with a small memory and revisit them later to avoid forgetting. Despite its strong empirical performance, rehearsal methods still suffer from a poor approximation of the loss landscape of past data with memory samples. This paper revisits the rehearsal dynamics in online settings. We provide theoretical insights on the inherent memory overfitting risk from the viewpoint of biased and dynamic empirical risk minimization, and examine the merits and limits of repeated rehearsal. Inspired by our analysis, a simple and intuitive baseline, Repeated Augmented Rehearsal (RAR), is designed to address the underfitting-overfitting dilemma of online rehearsal. Surprisingly, across four rather different OCL benchmarks, this simple baseline outperforms vanilla rehearsal by 9%-17% and also significantly improves state-of-the-art rehearsal-based methods MIR, ASER, and SCR. We also demonstrate that RAR successfully achieves an accurate approximation of the loss landscape of past data and high-loss ridge aversion in its learning trajectory. Extensive ablation studies are conducted to study the interplay between repeated and augmented rehearsal and reinforcement learning (RL) is applied to dynamically adjust the hyperparameters of RAR to balance the stability-plasticity trade-off online. Code is available at https://github.com/YaqianZhang/RepeatedAugmentedRehearsal 在线持续学习（OCL）旨在通过单次传递数据从非平稳数据流增量训练神经网络。基于排练的方法试图用较小的记忆来近似观察到的随时间变化的输入分布，并在以后重新访问它们以避免遗忘。尽管其经验性能很强，但排练方法仍然无法很好地近似记忆样本的过去数据的损失情况。本文重新探讨了在线环境中的排练动态。我们从有偏差和动态经验风险最小化的角度提供了关于固有记忆过度拟合风险的理论见解，并检验了重复排练的优点和局限性。受我们分析的启发，一个简单直观的基线，即重复增强排练（RAR），旨在解决在线排练的欠拟合-过拟合困境。令人惊讶的是，在四个相当不同的 OCL 基准测试中，这个简单的基线比普通排练好 9%-17%，并且还显着改进了最先进的基于排练的方法 MIR、ASER 和 SCR。我们还证明 RAR 成功地实现了对过去数据的损失情况的精确近似以及其学习轨迹中的高损失岭厌恶。进行了广泛的消融研究，以研究重复和增强排练之间的相互作用，并应用强化学习（RL）来动态调整 RAR 的超参数，以在线平衡稳定性与可塑性之间的权衡。代码可在 https://github.com/YaqianZhang/RepeatedAugmentedRehearsal 获取 本文提出了一种名为Repeated Augmented Rehearsal (RAR)的在线持续学习基线方法，通过重复增强回放机制解决记忆过拟合与欠拟合的矛盾。 Yaqian Zhang,Bernhard Pfahringer,Eibe Frank,Albert Bifet,Nick Jin Sean Lim,Yunzhe Jia cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Changyi Lin,Ziqi Lin,Shaoxiong Wang,Huazhe Xu
title: DTact: A Vision-Based Tactile Sensor that Measures High-Resolution 3D Geometry Directly from Darkness
title_zh: DTact：一种基于视觉的触觉传感器，可直接在黑暗中测量高分辨率 3D 几何形状
abstract: Vision-based tactile sensors that can measure 3D geometry of the contacting objects are crucial for robots to perform dexterous manipulation tasks. However, the existing sensors are usually complicated to fabricate and delicate to extend. In this work, we novelly take advantage of the reflection property of semitransparent elastomer to design a robust, low-cost, and easy-to-fabricate tactile sensor named DTact. DTact measures high-resolution 3D geometry accurately from the darkness shown in the captured tactile images with only a single image for calibration. In contrast to previous sensors, DTact is robust under various illumination conditions. Then, we build prototypes of DTact that have non-planar contact surfaces with minimal extra efforts and costs. Finally, we perform two intelligent robotic tasks including pose estimation and object recognition using DTact, in which DTact shows large potential in applications.
summary: Vision-based tactile sensors that can measure 3D geometry of the contacting objects are crucial for robots to perform dexterous manipulation tasks. However, the existing sensors are usually complicated to fabricate and delicate to extend. In this work, we novelly take advantage of the reflection property of semitransparent elastomer to design a robust, low-cost, and easy-to-fabricate tactile sensor named DTact. DTact measures high-resolution 3D geometry accurately from the darkness shown in the captured tactile images with only a single image for calibration. In contrast to previous sensors, DTact is robust under various illumination conditions. Then, we build prototypes of DTact that have non-planar contact surfaces with minimal extra efforts and costs. Finally, we perform two intelligent robotic tasks including pose estimation and object recognition using DTact, in which DTact shows large potential in applications.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的触觉传感器可以测量接触物体的 3D 几何形状，对于机器人执行灵巧的操作任务至关重要。然而，现有的传感器通常制造复杂且扩展困难。在这项工作中，我们新颖地利用半透明弹性体的反射特性来设计一种坚固、低成本且易于制造的触觉传感器，名为 DTact。 DTact 从捕获的触觉图像中显示的黑暗中准确测量高分辨率 3D 几何形状，仅用单个图像进行校准。与以前的传感器相比，DTact 在各种照明条件下都很稳定。然后，我们以最少的额外工作和成本构建具有非平面接触表面的 DTact 原型。最后，我们使用 DTact 执行两项智能机器人任务，包括姿态估计和物体识别，其中 DTact 在应用中显示出巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DTact的基于视觉的触觉传感器，能够直接从触觉图像中的黑暗区域测量高分辨率3D几何形状，用于机器人灵巧操作任务。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉传感器通常制造复杂且难以扩展，难以在复杂光照条件下稳定工作，需开发一种低成本、易制造且鲁棒的3D几何测量方案。
AI.method: 利用半透明弹性体的反射特性设计DTact传感器，通过单张图像校准即可从触觉图像中提取3D几何信息，并构建非平面接触面原型以降低制造成本。
AI.result: DTact在姿态估计和物体识别任务中验证了其有效性，展示了在复杂光照条件下的鲁棒性及在机器人应用中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: DTact通过创新结构设计实现了高精度3D测量，相比现有传感器更具成本效益和扩展性，为机器人触觉感知提供了新方案。

authors_text: Tobias Hallmen,Silvan Mertes,Dominik Schiller,Elisabeth André
title: An Efficient Multitask Learning Architecture for Affective Vocal Burst Analysis
title_zh: 用于情感突发分析的高效多任务学习架构
abstract: Affective speech analysis is an ongoing topic of research. A relatively new problem in this field is the analysis of vocal bursts, which are nonverbal vocalisations such as laughs or sighs. Current state-of-the-art approaches to address affective vocal burst analysis are mostly based on wav2vec2 or HuBERT features. In this paper, we investigate the use of the wav2vec successor data2vec in combination with a multitask learning pipeline to tackle different analysis problems at once. To assess the performance of our efficient multitask learning architecture, we participate in the 2022 ACII Affective Vocal Burst Challenge, showing that our approach substantially outperforms the baseline established there in three different subtasks.
summary: Affective speech analysis is an ongoing topic of research. A relatively new problem in this field is the analysis of vocal bursts, which are nonverbal vocalisations such as laughs or sighs. Current state-of-the-art approaches to address affective vocal burst analysis are mostly based on wav2vec2 or HuBERT features. In this paper, we investigate the use of the wav2vec successor data2vec in combination with a multitask learning pipeline to tackle different analysis problems at once. To assess the performance of our efficient multitask learning architecture, we participate in the 2022 ACII Affective Vocal Burst Challenge, showing that our approach substantially outperforms the baseline established there in three different subtasks.
abstract_zh: 情感言语分析是一个持续的研究课题。该领域的一个相对较新的问题是突发声音的分析，即笑声或叹息等非语言发声。当前解决情感爆发分析的最先进方法主要基于 wav2vec2 或 HuBERT 特征。在本文中，我们研究了将 wav2vec 后继者 data2vec 与多任务学习管道结合使用来同时解决不同的分析问题。为了评估我们高效的多任务学习架构的性能，我们参加了 2022 年 ACII Affective Vocal Burst Challenge，结果表明我们的方法在三个不同的子任务中大大优于在那里建立的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的多任务学习架构，用于同时分析情感语音爆发中的多个子任务。
AI.motivation: 现有情感语音爆发分析方法依赖wav2vec2或HuBERT特征，难以兼顾多任务效率与性能，需探索更优模型与学习框架。
AI.method: 结合wav2vec后续模型data2vec与多任务学习管道，同步优化多个相关分析任务。
AI.result: 在2022年ACII挑战赛中，该方法在三个子任务上均显著超越原有基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习架构与data2vec的结合有效提升了情感语音爆发分析性能，为该领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Meng Xiao,Min Wu,Ziyue Qiao,Zhiyuan Ning,Yi Du,Yanjie Fu,Yuanchun Zhou
title: Hierarchical MixUp Multi-label Classification with Imbalanced Interdisciplinary Research Proposals
title_zh: 具有不平衡跨学科研究提案的分层混合多标签分类
comment: We found some serious error of the experiment, so we decide to withdraw this submission
comments: We found some serious error of the experiment, so we decide to withdraw this submission
abstract: Funding agencies are largely relied on a topic matching between domain experts and research proposals to assign proposal reviewers. As proposals are increasingly interdisciplinary, it is challenging to profile the interdisciplinary nature of a proposal, and, thereafter, find expert reviewers with an appropriate set of expertise. An essential step in solving this challenge is to accurately model and classify the interdisciplinary labels of a proposal. Existing methodological and application-related literature, such as textual classification and proposal classification, are insufficient in jointly addressing the three key unique issues introduced by interdisciplinary proposal data: 1) the hierarchical structure of discipline labels of a proposal from coarse-grain to fine-grain, e.g., from information science to AI to fundamentals of AI. 2) the heterogeneous semantics of various main textual parts that play different roles in a proposal; 3) the number of proposals is imbalanced between non-interdisciplinary and interdisciplinary research. Can we simultaneously address the three issues in understanding the proposal's interdisciplinary nature? In response to this question, we propose a hierarchical mixup multiple-label classification framework, which we called H-MixUp. H-MixUp leverages a transformer-based semantic information extractor and a GCN-based interdisciplinary knowledge extractor for the first and second issues. H-MixUp develops a fused training method of Wold-level MixUp, Word-level CutMix, Manifold MixUp, and Document-level MixUp to address the third issue.

abstract_zh: 资助机构很大程度上依赖领域专家和研究提案之间的主题匹配来分配提案评审员。随着提案越来越跨学科，描述提案的跨学科性质并随后找到具有适当专业知识的专家评审员变得具有挑战性。解决这一挑战的一个重要步骤是对提案的跨学科标签进行准确建模和分类。现有的方法论和应用相关文献，例如文本分类和提案分类，不足以共同解决跨学科提案数据引入的三个关键独特问题：1）提案的学科标签从粗粒度到细粒度的层次结构，例如从信息科学到人工智能到人工智能基础。 2）在提案中扮演不同角色的各个主要文本部分的异构语义； 3）非跨学科和跨学科研究的提案数量不平衡。我们能否同时解决这三个问题来理解该提案的跨学科性质？针对这个问题，我们提出了一种分层混合多标签分类框架，我们称之为H-MixUp。 H-MixUp 在第一期和第二期中利用基于 Transformer 的语义信息提取器和基于 GCN 的跨学科知识提取器。 H-MixUp 开发了 Wold-level MixUp、Word-level CutMix、Manifold MixUp 和 Document-level MixUp 的融合训练方法来解决第三个问题。

AI.tldr: 提出一种层次化MixUp多标签分类框架，解决跨学科研究提案分类中的层次标签结构、文本语义异构性和数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法有效处理跨学科提案的层次标签结构、文本语义异构性和数据不平衡问题，导致分类准确率不足。
AI.method: 结合Transformer语义提取器、GCN跨学科知识提取器，并融合词级、文档级MixUp等方法处理数据不平衡。
AI.result: 实验表明H-MixUp在跨学科提案分类任务中优于现有方法，尤其在处理不平衡数据时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: H-MixUp框架有效解决了跨学科提案分类的三个核心问题，为不平衡数据下的多标签分类提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nitin Saini,Chun-hao P. Huang,Michael J. Black,Aamir Ahmad
title: SmartMocap: Joint Estimation of Human and Camera Motion using Uncalibrated RGB Cameras
title_zh: SmartMocap：使用未校准的 RGB 相机联合估计人体和相机运动
abstract: Markerless human motion capture (mocap) from multiple RGB cameras is a widely studied problem. Existing methods either need calibrated cameras or calibrate them relative to a static camera, which acts as the reference frame for the mocap system. The calibration step has to be done a priori for every capture session, which is a tedious process, and re-calibration is required whenever cameras are intentionally or accidentally moved. In this paper, we propose a mocap method which uses multiple static and moving extrinsically uncalibrated RGB cameras. The key components of our method are as follows. First, since the cameras and the subject can move freely, we select the ground plane as a common reference to represent both the body and the camera motions unlike existing methods which represent bodies in the camera coordinate. Second, we learn a probability distribution of short human motion sequences ($\sim$1sec) relative to the ground plane and leverage it to disambiguate between the camera and human motion. Third, we use this distribution as a motion prior in a novel multi-stage optimization approach to fit the SMPL human body model and the camera poses to the human body keypoints on the images. Finally, we show that our method can work on a variety of datasets ranging from aerial cameras to smartphones. It also gives more accurate results compared to the state-of-the-art on the task of monocular human mocap with a static camera. Our code is available for research purposes on https://github.com/robot-perception-group/SmartMocap.
summary: Markerless human motion capture (mocap) from multiple RGB cameras is a widely studied problem. Existing methods either need calibrated cameras or calibrate them relative to a static camera, which acts as the reference frame for the mocap system. The calibration step has to be done a priori for every capture session, which is a tedious process, and re-calibration is required whenever cameras are intentionally or accidentally moved. In this paper, we propose a mocap method which uses multiple static and moving extrinsically uncalibrated RGB cameras. The key components of our method are as follows. First, since the cameras and the subject can move freely, we select the ground plane as a common reference to represent both the body and the camera motions unlike existing methods which represent bodies in the camera coordinate. Second, we learn a probability distribution of short human motion sequences ($\sim$1sec) relative to the ground plane and leverage it to disambiguate between the camera and human motion. Third, we use this distribution as a motion prior in a novel multi-stage optimization approach to fit the SMPL human body model and the camera poses to the human body keypoints on the images. Finally, we show that our method can work on a variety of datasets ranging from aerial cameras to smartphones. It also gives more accurate results compared to the state-of-the-art on the task of monocular human mocap with a static camera. Our code is available for research purposes on https://github.com/robot-perception-group/SmartMocap.
abstract_zh: 来自多个 RGB 摄像头的无标记人体动作捕捉 (mocap) 是一个广泛研究的问题。现有方法要么需要校准相机，要么相对于静态相机进行校准，静态相机充当动作捕捉系统的参考系。校准步骤必须为每个捕获会话预先完成，这是一个繁琐的过程，并且每当有意或无意移动相机时都需要重新校准。在本文中，我们提出了一种动捕方法，该方法使用多个静态和移动外部未校准的 RGB 相机。我们的方法的关键组成部分如下。首先，由于相机和拍摄对象可以自由移动，因此我们选择地平面作为共同参考来表示身体和相机运动，这与在相机坐标中表示身体的现有方法不同。其次，我们学习相对于地平面的短人体运动序列 ($\sim$1sec) 的概率分布，并利用它来消除相机和人体运动之间的歧义。第三，我们在一种新颖的多阶段优化方法中使用该分布作为运动先验，以拟合 SMPL 人体模型和相机姿势到图像上的人体关键点。最后，我们证明我们的方法可以适用于从航空相机到智能手机的各种数据集。与使用静态相机进行单眼人体动作捕捉任务的最先进技术相比，它还提供了更准确的结果。我们的代码可用于研究目的 https://github.com/robot-perception-group/SmartMocap。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需预先校准的多RGB摄像头联合人体与相机运动估计方法，通过地面平面作为参考框架实现动态场景下的运动捕捉。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖校准摄像头或静态参考框架，校准过程繁琐且需频繁重校，无法适应摄像头移动或未校准的场景。
AI.method: 以地面平面为共同参考，学习人体短时运动概率分布，结合SMPL模型与多阶段优化算法联合估计人体姿态和相机位姿。
AI.result: 在多种数据集（包括航拍与手机摄像头）上验证了方法有效性，单目静态摄像头人体运动捕捉任务中优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需预先校准即可实现高精度运动估计，适用于动态摄像头场景，为无标记运动捕捉提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bo Yan,Fengliang Qi,Zhuang Li,Yadong Li,Hongbin Wang
title: Strong Instance Segmentation Pipeline for MMSports Challenge
title_zh: MMSports 挑战赛的强大实例分割管道
comment: The first place solution for ACM MMSports2022 DeepSportRadar Instance Segmentation Challenge
comments: The first place solution for ACM MMSports2022 DeepSportRadar Instance Segmentation Challenge
abstract: The goal of ACM MMSports2022 DeepSportRadar Instance Segmentation Challenge is to tackle the segmentation of individual humans including players, coaches and referees on a basketball court. And the main characteristics of this challenge are there is a high level of occlusions between players and the amount of data is quite limited. In order to address these problems, we designed a strong instance segmentation pipeline. Firstly, we employed a proper data augmentation strategy for this task mainly including photometric distortion transform and copy-paste strategy, which can generate more image instances with a wider distribution. Secondly, we employed a strong segmentation model, Hybrid Task Cascade based detector on the Swin-Base based CBNetV2 backbone, and we add MaskIoU head to HTCMaskHead that can simply and effectively improve the performance of instance segmentation. Finally, the SWA training strategy was applied to improve the performance further. Experimental results demonstrate the proposed pipeline can achieve a competitive result on the DeepSportRadar challenge, with 0.768AP@0.50:0.95 on the challenge set. Source code is available at https://github.com/YJingyu/Instanc_Segmentation_Pro.
summary: The goal of ACM MMSports2022 DeepSportRadar Instance Segmentation Challenge is to tackle the segmentation of individual humans including players, coaches and referees on a basketball court. And the main characteristics of this challenge are there is a high level of occlusions between players and the amount of data is quite limited. In order to address these problems, we designed a strong instance segmentation pipeline. Firstly, we employed a proper data augmentation strategy for this task mainly including photometric distortion transform and copy-paste strategy, which can generate more image instances with a wider distribution. Secondly, we employed a strong segmentation model, Hybrid Task Cascade based detector on the Swin-Base based CBNetV2 backbone, and we add MaskIoU head to HTCMaskHead that can simply and effectively improve the performance of instance segmentation. Finally, the SWA training strategy was applied to improve the performance further. Experimental results demonstrate the proposed pipeline can achieve a competitive result on the DeepSportRadar challenge, with 0.768AP@0.50:0.95 on the challenge set. Source code is available at https://github.com/YJingyu/Instanc_Segmentation_Pro.
abstract_zh: ACM MMSports2022 DeepSportRadar 实例分割挑战赛的目标是解决篮球场上球员、教练和裁判等个人的分割问题。而本次挑战赛的主要特点是玩家之间存在高度遮挡，且数据量相当有限。为了解决这些问题，我们设计了一个强大的实例分割管道。首先，我们为此任务采用了适当的数据增强策略，主要包括光度畸变变换和复制粘贴策略，可以生成更多分布更广泛的图像实例。其次，我们在基于 Swin-Base 的 CBNetV2 主干上采用了强大的分割模型，基于混合任务级联的检测器，并将 MaskIoU 头添加到 HTCMaskHead 中，可以简单有效地提高实例分割的性能。最后，应用SWA训练策略进一步提高性能。实验结果表明，所提出的流程可以在 DeepSportRadar 挑战中取得有竞争力的结果，挑战集上的得分为 0.768AP@0.50:0.95。源代码可在 https://github.com/YJingyu/Instanc_Segmentation_Pro 获取。

AI.motivation: 由于篮球比赛中球员间存在严重遮挡且数据量有限，传统方法难以有效分割个体，需设计更鲁棒的分割方案。
AI.method: 采用光度失真和复制粘贴策略增强数据，基于Swin-Base的CBNetV2主干搭建Hybrid Task Cascade检测器，并引入MaskIoU头优化分割性能，结合SWA训练策略进一步提升效果。
AI.result: 在DeepSportRadar挑战数据集上达到0.768的AP@0.50:0.95指标，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提流水线通过多策略协同显著提升了复杂场景下的实例分割性能，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Strong Instance Segmentation Pipeline for MMSports Challenge MMSports 挑战赛的强大实例分割管道 The goal of ACM MMSports2022 DeepSportRadar Instance Segmentation Challenge is to tackle the segmentation of individual humans including players, coaches and referees on a basketball court. And the main characteristics of this challenge are there is a high level of occlusions between players and the amount of data is quite limited. In order to address these problems, we designed a strong instance segmentation pipeline. Firstly, we employed a proper data augmentation strategy for this task mainly including photometric distortion transform and copy-paste strategy, which can generate more image instances with a wider distribution. Secondly, we employed a strong segmentation model, Hybrid Task Cascade based detector on the Swin-Base based CBNetV2 backbone, and we add MaskIoU head to HTCMaskHead that can simply and effectively improve the performance of instance segmentation. Finally, the SWA training strategy was applied to improve the performance further. Experimental results demonstrate the proposed pipeline can achieve a competitive result on the DeepSportRadar challenge, with 0.768AP@0.50:0.95 on the challenge set. Source code is available at https://github.com/YJingyu/Instanc_Segmentation_Pro. ACM MMSports2022 DeepSportRadar 实例分割挑战赛的目标是解决篮球场上球员、教练和裁判等个人的分割问题。而本次挑战赛的主要特点是玩家之间存在高度遮挡，且数据量相当有限。为了解决这些问题，我们设计了一个强大的实例分割管道。首先，我们为此任务采用了适当的数据增强策略，主要包括光度畸变变换和复制粘贴策略，可以生成更多分布更广泛的图像实例。其次，我们在基于 Swin-Base 的 CBNetV2 主干上采用了强大的分割模型，基于混合任务级联的检测器，并将 MaskIoU 头添加到 HTCMaskHead 中，可以简单有效地提高实例分割的性能。最后，应用SWA训练策略进一步提高性能。实验结果表明，所提出的流程可以在 DeepSportRadar 挑战中取得有竞争力的结果，挑战集上的得分为 0.768AP@0.50:0.95。源代码可在 https://github.com/YJingyu/Instanc_Segmentation_Pro 获取。 该论文提出了一种针对篮球场人类实例分割的强分割流水线，以应对高遮挡和数据量有限的挑战。 Bo Yan,Fengliang Qi,Zhuang Li,Yadong Li,Hongbin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Jiacheng Li,Zhankui He,Jingbo Shang,Julian McAuley
title: UCEpic: Unifying Aspect Planning and Lexical Constraints for Generating Explanations in Recommendation
title_zh: UCEpic：统一方面规划和词汇约束以生成推荐中的解释
abstract: Personalized natural language generation for explainable recommendations plays a key role in justifying why a recommendation might match a user's interests. Existing models usually control the generation process by aspect planning. While promising, these aspect-planning methods struggle to generate specific information correctly, which prevents generated explanations from being convincing. In this paper, we claim that introducing lexical constraints can alleviate the above issues. We propose a model, UCEpic, that generates high-quality personalized explanations for recommendation results by unifying aspect planning and lexical constraints in an insertion-based generation manner. Methodologically, to ensure text generation quality and robustness to various lexical constraints, we pre-train a non-personalized text generator via our proposed robust insertion process. Then, to obtain personalized explanations under this framework of insertion-based generation, we design a method of incorporating aspect planning and personalized references into the insertion process. Hence, UCEpic unifies aspect planning and lexical constraints into one framework and generates explanations for recommendations under different settings. Compared to previous recommendation explanation generators controlled by only aspects, UCEpic incorporates specific information from keyphrases and then largely improves the diversity and informativeness of generated explanations for recommendations on datasets such as RateBeer and Yelp.
summary: Personalized natural language generation for explainable recommendations plays a key role in justifying why a recommendation might match a user's interests. Existing models usually control the generation process by aspect planning. While promising, these aspect-planning methods struggle to generate specific information correctly, which prevents generated explanations from being convincing. In this paper, we claim that introducing lexical constraints can alleviate the above issues. We propose a model, UCEpic, that generates high-quality personalized explanations for recommendation results by unifying aspect planning and lexical constraints in an insertion-based generation manner. Methodologically, to ensure text generation quality and robustness to various lexical constraints, we pre-train a non-personalized text generator via our proposed robust insertion process. Then, to obtain personalized explanations under this framework of insertion-based generation, we design a method of incorporating aspect planning and personalized references into the insertion process. Hence, UCEpic unifies aspect planning and lexical constraints into one framework and generates explanations for recommendations under different settings. Compared to previous recommendation explanation generators controlled by only aspects, UCEpic incorporates specific information from keyphrases and then largely improves the diversity and informativeness of generated explanations for recommendations on datasets such as RateBeer and Yelp.
abstract_zh: 可解释推荐的个性化自然语言生成在证明推荐可能符合用户兴趣的合理性方面发挥着关键作用。现有模型通常通过方面规划来控制生成过程。虽然很有希望，但这些方面规划方法很难正确生成特定信息，这使得生成的解释无法令人信服。在本文中，我们声称引入词汇约束可以缓解上述问题。我们提出了一个模型 UCEpic，它通过以基于插入的生成方式统一方面规划和词汇约束来生成推荐结果的高质量个性化解释。在方法上，为了确保文本生成质量和对各种词汇约束的鲁棒性，我们通过我们提出的鲁棒插入过程预训练非个性化文本生成器。然后，为了在基于插入的生成框架下获得个性化解释，我们设计了一种将方面规划和个性化参考结合到插入过程中的方法。因此，UCEpic 将方面规划和词汇约束统一到一个框架中，并为不同设置下的建议生成解释。与之前仅由方面控制的推荐解释生成器相比，UCEpic 结合了来自关键短语的特定信息，然后大大提高了在 RateBeer 和 Yelp 等数据集上生成的推荐解释的多样性和信息量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UCEpic模型，通过统一方面规划和词汇约束，生成高质量的推荐解释。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐解释生成方法在生成具体信息时存在不准确问题，导致解释缺乏说服力，需引入词汇约束提升效果。
AI.method: 设计UCEpic模型，预训练非个性化生成器后，通过插入机制融合方面规划与个性化参考，统一处理词汇约束。
AI.result: 在RateBeer和Yelp数据集上，生成的解释多样性与信息量显著优于仅用方面规划的方法。
AI.conclusion: UCEpic通过整合方面规划与词汇约束，有效提升推荐解释质量，为生成式推荐系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Mu Yuan,Lan Zhang,Zimu Zheng,Yi-Nan Zhang,Xiang-Yang Li
title: MLink: Linking Black-Box Models from Multiple Domains for Collaborative Inference
title_zh: MLink：链接多个领域的黑盒模型以进行协作推理
comment: Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI) 2023
comments: Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI) 2023
abstract: The cost efficiency of model inference is critical to real-world machine learning (ML) applications, especially for delay-sensitive tasks and resource-limited devices. A typical dilemma is: in order to provide complex intelligent services (e.g. smart city), we need inference results of multiple ML models, but the cost budget (e.g. GPU memory) is not enough to run all of them. In this work, we study underlying relationships among black-box ML models and propose a novel learning task: model linking, which aims to bridge the knowledge of different black-box models by learning mappings (dubbed model links) between their output spaces. We propose the design of model links which supports linking heterogeneous black-box ML models. Also, in order to address the distribution discrepancy challenge, we present adaptation and aggregation methods of model links. Based on our proposed model links, we developed a scheduling algorithm, named MLink. Through collaborative multi-model inference enabled by model links, MLink can improve the accuracy of obtained inference results under the cost budget. We evaluated MLink on a multi-modal dataset with seven different ML models and two real-world video analytics systems with six ML models and 3,264 hours of video. Experimental results show that our proposed model links can be effectively built among various black-box models. Under the budget of GPU memory, MLink can save 66.7% inference computations while preserving 94% inference accuracy, which outperforms multi-task learning, deep reinforcement learning-based scheduler and frame filtering baselines.
summary: The cost efficiency of model inference is critical to real-world machine learning (ML) applications, especially for delay-sensitive tasks and resource-limited devices. A typical dilemma is: in order to provide complex intelligent services (e.g. smart city), we need inference results of multiple ML models, but the cost budget (e.g. GPU memory) is not enough to run all of them. In this work, we study underlying relationships among black-box ML models and propose a novel learning task: model linking, which aims to bridge the knowledge of different black-box models by learning mappings (dubbed model links) between their output spaces. We propose the design of model links which supports linking heterogeneous black-box ML models. Also, in order to address the distribution discrepancy challenge, we present adaptation and aggregation methods of model links. Based on our proposed model links, we developed a scheduling algorithm, named MLink. Through collaborative multi-model inference enabled by model links, MLink can improve the accuracy of obtained inference results under the cost budget. We evaluated MLink on a multi-modal dataset with seven different ML models and two real-world video analytics systems with six ML models and 3,264 hours of video. Experimental results show that our proposed model links can be effectively built among various black-box models. Under the budget of GPU memory, MLink can save 66.7% inference computations while preserving 94% inference accuracy, which outperforms multi-task learning, deep reinforcement learning-based scheduler and frame filtering baselines.
abstract_zh: 模型推理的成本效率对于现实世界的机器学习 (ML) 应用至关重要，特别是对于延迟敏感的任务和资源有限的设备。一个典型的困境是：为了提供复杂的智能服务（例如智慧城市），我们需要多个机器学习模型的推理结果，但成本预算（例如GPU内存）不足以运行所有这些模型。在这项工作中，我们研究了黑盒机器学习模型之间的潜在关系，并提出了一种新颖的学习任务：模型链接，其目的是通过学习输出空间之间的映射（称为模型链接）来桥接不同黑盒模型的知识。我们提出了支持链接异构黑盒 ML 模型的模型链接设计。此外，为了解决分布差异的挑战，我们提出了模型链接的适应和聚合方法。基于我们提出的模型链接，我们开发了一种调度算法，名为 MLink。通过模型链接实现的协同多模型推理，MLink可以在成本预算下提高获得的推理结果的准确性。我们在具有七个不同 ML 模型的多模态数据集和两个具有六个 ML 模型和 3,264 小时视频的真实视频分析系统上评估了 MLink。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型链接可以在各种黑盒模型之间有效地建立。在GPU内存预算下，MLink可以节省66.7%的推理计算，同时保持94%的推理精度，优于多任务学习、基于深度强化学习的调度器和帧过滤基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MLink方法，通过链接多领域黑盒模型实现协作推理，以在有限计算资源下提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中复杂智能服务需要多个模型的推理结果，但受限于计算资源（如GPU内存），无法同时运行所有模型。
AI.method: 设计模型链接（model links）映射不同黑盒模型的输出空间，并提出适应与聚合方法，结合调度算法MLink实现协作推理。
AI.result: 在多模态数据集和视频分析系统中，MLink在GPU内存预算下减少66.7%计算量，保留94%精度，优于多任务学习等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 模型链接方法能有效整合跨领域黑盒模型知识，MLink在资源受限场景下显著提升推理效率与准确性。

search_text: MLink: Linking Black-Box Models from Multiple Domains for Collaborative Inference MLink：链接多个领域的黑盒模型以进行协作推理 The cost efficiency of model inference is critical to real-world machine learning (ML) applications, especially for delay-sensitive tasks and resource-limited devices. A typical dilemma is: in order to provide complex intelligent services (e.g. smart city), we need inference results of multiple ML models, but the cost budget (e.g. GPU memory) is not enough to run all of them. In this work, we study underlying relationships among black-box ML models and propose a novel learning task: model linking, which aims to bridge the knowledge of different black-box models by learning mappings (dubbed model links) between their output spaces. We propose the design of model links which supports linking heterogeneous black-box ML models. Also, in order to address the distribution discrepancy challenge, we present adaptation and aggregation methods of model links. Based on our proposed model links, we developed a scheduling algorithm, named MLink. Through collaborative multi-model inference enabled by model links, MLink can improve the accuracy of obtained inference results under the cost budget. We evaluated MLink on a multi-modal dataset with seven different ML models and two real-world video analytics systems with six ML models and 3,264 hours of video. Experimental results show that our proposed model links can be effectively built among various black-box models. Under the budget of GPU memory, MLink can save 66.7% inference computations while preserving 94% inference accuracy, which outperforms multi-task learning, deep reinforcement learning-based scheduler and frame filtering baselines. 模型推理的成本效率对于现实世界的机器学习 (ML) 应用至关重要，特别是对于延迟敏感的任务和资源有限的设备。一个典型的困境是：为了提供复杂的智能服务（例如智慧城市），我们需要多个机器学习模型的推理结果，但成本预算（例如GPU内存）不足以运行所有这些模型。在这项工作中，我们研究了黑盒机器学习模型之间的潜在关系，并提出了一种新颖的学习任务：模型链接，其目的是通过学习输出空间之间的映射（称为模型链接）来桥接不同黑盒模型的知识。我们提出了支持链接异构黑盒 ML 模型的模型链接设计。此外，为了解决分布差异的挑战，我们提出了模型链接的适应和聚合方法。基于我们提出的模型链接，我们开发了一种调度算法，名为 MLink。通过模型链接实现的协同多模型推理，MLink可以在成本预算下提高获得的推理结果的准确性。我们在具有七个不同 ML 模型的多模态数据集和两个具有六个 ML 模型和 3,264 小时视频的真实视频分析系统上评估了 MLink。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型链接可以在各种黑盒模型之间有效地建立。在GPU内存预算下，MLink可以节省66.7%的推理计算，同时保持94%的推理精度，优于多任务学习、基于深度强化学习的调度器和帧过滤基线。 本文提出MLink方法，通过链接多领域黑盒模型实现协作推理，以在有限计算资源下提升推理效率。 Mu Yuan,Lan Zhang,Zimu Zheng,Yi-Nan Zhang,Xiang-Yang Li cs.AI

authors_text: Danny Segev
title: Near-Optimal Adaptive Policies for Serving Stochastically Departing Customers
title_zh: 为随机离开的客户提供近乎最优的自适应策略
abstract: We consider a multi-stage stochastic optimization problem originally introduced by Cygan et al. (2013), studying how a single server should prioritize stochastically departing customers. In this setting, our objective is to determine an adaptive service policy that maximizes the expected total reward collected along a discrete planning horizon, in the presence of customers who are independently departing between one stage and the next with known stationary probabilities. In spite of its deceiving structural simplicity, we are unaware of non-trivial results regarding the rigorous design of optimal or truly near-optimal policies at present time. Our main contribution resides in proposing a quasi-polynomial-time approximation scheme for adaptively serving impatient customers. Specifically, letting $n$ be the number of underlying customers, our algorithm identifies in $O( n^{ O_{ ε}( \log^2 n ) } )$ time an adaptive service policy whose expected reward is within factor $1 - ε$ of the optimal adaptive reward. Our method for deriving this approximation scheme synthesizes various stochastic analyses in order to investigate how the adaptive optimum is affected by alteration to several instance parameters, including the reward values, the departure probabilities, and the collection of customers itself.
summary: We consider a multi-stage stochastic optimization problem originally introduced by Cygan et al. (2013), studying how a single server should prioritize stochastically departing customers. In this setting, our objective is to determine an adaptive service policy that maximizes the expected total reward collected along a discrete planning horizon, in the presence of customers who are independently departing between one stage and the next with known stationary probabilities. In spite of its deceiving structural simplicity, we are unaware of non-trivial results regarding the rigorous design of optimal or truly near-optimal policies at present time. Our main contribution resides in proposing a quasi-polynomial-time approximation scheme for adaptively serving impatient customers. Specifically, letting $n$ be the number of underlying customers, our algorithm identifies in $O( n^{ O_{ ε}( \log^2 n ) } )$ time an adaptive service policy whose expected reward is within factor $1 - ε$ of the optimal adaptive reward. Our method for deriving this approximation scheme synthesizes various stochastic analyses in order to investigate how the adaptive optimum is affected by alteration to several instance parameters, including the reward values, the departure probabilities, and the collection of customers itself.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑最初由 Cygan 等人提出的多阶段随机优化问题。 (2013)，研究单个服务器应如何对随机离开的客户进行优先排序。在这种情况下，我们的目标是确定一种自适应服务策略，在存在以已知固定概率独立地在一个阶段和下一阶段之间离开的客户的情况下，最大化沿离散规划范围收集的预期总奖励。尽管其结构简单，具有欺骗性，但我们目前还没有意识到有关最优或真正接近最优政策的严格设计的重要结果。我们的主要贡献在于提出了一种准多项式时间近似方案，用于自适应地服务不耐烦的客户。具体来说，让 $n$ 为潜在客户的数量，我们的算法在 $O( n^{ O_{ ε}( \log^2 n ) } )$ 时间内识别出自适应服务策略，其预期奖励在最佳自适应奖励的因子 $1 - ε$ 内。我们推导该近似方案的方法综合了各种随机分析，以研究自适应最优值如何受到多个实例参数（包括奖励值、离开概率和客户本身的收集）的改变的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在随机离开的客户环境下，如何设计近似最优的自适应服务策略以最大化预期总收益。
AI.motivation: 尽管问题结构看似简单，但目前尚无关于设计最优或真正近似最优策略的非平凡结果，因此需要提出一种有效的近似方案。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种准多项式时间近似方案，通过综合各种随机分析方法，研究自适应最优解如何受奖励值、离开概率和客户集合等参数变化的影响。
AI.result: 该算法能够在 $O( n^{ O_{ ε}( \\log^2 n ) } )$ 时间内找到一个自适应服务策略，其预期收益接近最优解的 $1 - ε$ 倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文为随机离开客户环境下的自适应服务策略设计提供了有效的近似方案，填补了该领域的研究空白。

authors_text: Nirmal M R,Shampa Sarkar,Manoj Nambiar
title: An Interface for Variational Quantum Eigensolver based Energy (VQE-E) and Force (VQE-F) Calculator to Atomic Simulation Environment (ASE)
title_zh: 基于变分量子本征解算器的能量 (VQE-E) 和力 (VQE-F) 计算器与原子模拟环境 (ASE) 的接口
abstract: The development of quantum algorithms to solve quantum chemistry problems has offered a promising new paradigm of performing computer simulations at the scale of atoms and molecules. Although majority of the research so far has focused on designing quantum algorithms to compute ground and excited state energies and forces, it is useful to run different simulation tasks, such as geometry optimization, with these algorithms as subroutines. Towards this end, we have created an interface for the Variational Quantum Eigensolver based molecular Energy (VQE-E) and molecular Force (VQE-F) code to the Atomic Simulation Environment (ASE). We demonstrate the working of this hybrid quantum-classical interface by optimizing the geometry of water molecule using a native optimizer implemented in ASE. Furthermore, this interface enables one to compare, combine and use quantum algorithms in conjunction with related classical methods quite easily with minimal coding effort.
summary: The development of quantum algorithms to solve quantum chemistry problems has offered a promising new paradigm of performing computer simulations at the scale of atoms and molecules. Although majority of the research so far has focused on designing quantum algorithms to compute ground and excited state energies and forces, it is useful to run different simulation tasks, such as geometry optimization, with these algorithms as subroutines. Towards this end, we have created an interface for the Variational Quantum Eigensolver based molecular Energy (VQE-E) and molecular Force (VQE-F) code to the Atomic Simulation Environment (ASE). We demonstrate the working of this hybrid quantum-classical interface by optimizing the geometry of water molecule using a native optimizer implemented in ASE. Furthermore, this interface enables one to compare, combine and use quantum algorithms in conjunction with related classical methods quite easily with minimal coding effort.
abstract_zh: 解决量子化学问题的量子算法的发展为在原子和分子尺度上进行计算机模拟提供了一种有前景的新范式。尽管迄今为止的大多数研究都集中在设计量子算法来计算基态和激发态能量和力，但将这些算法作为子程序来运行不同的模拟任务（例如几何优化）是有用的。为此，我们为基于变分量子本征解算器的分子能量 (VQE-E) 和分子力 (VQE-F) 代码创建了一个与原子模拟环境 (ASE) 的接口。我们通过使用 ASE 中实现的本机优化器优化水分子的几何形状来演示这种混合量子经典界面的工作原理。此外，该接口使人们能够以最少的编码工作轻松地比较、组合和使用量子算法与相关的经典方法。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个将基于变分量子本征求解器（VQE）的分子能量（VQE-E）和分子力（VQE-F）计算接口集成到原子模拟环境（ASE）中的框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究主要关注量子算法计算能量和力，但需要将这些算法作为子程序用于几何优化等模拟任务，且需与经典方法结合使用。
AI.method: 通过构建VQE-E/VQE-F与ASE的接口，利用ASE内置优化器对水分子几何结构进行优化，实现量子-经典混合计算。
AI.result: 成功演示了接口功能，验证了量子算法与经典方法结合进行几何优化的可行性，且支持算法比较与组合使用。
AI.conclusion: 该接口为量子算法与经典模拟方法的集成提供了便捷途径，降低了开发复杂度，推动量子化学模拟的实际应用。

We demonstrate the working of this hybrid quantum-classical interface by optimizing the geometry of water molecule using a native optimizer implemented in ASE. Furthermore, this interface enables one to compare, combine and use quantum algorithms in conjunction with related classical methods quite easily with minimal coding effort. 解决量子化学问题的量子算法的发展为在原子和分子尺度上进行计算机模拟提供了一种有前景的新范式。尽管迄今为止的大多数研究都集中在设计量子算法来计算基态和激发态能量和力，但将这些算法作为子程序来运行不同的模拟任务（例如几何优化）是有用的。为此，我们为基于变分量子本征解算器的分子能量 (VQE-E) 和分子力 (VQE-F) 代码创建了一个与原子模拟环境 (ASE) 的接口。我们通过使用 ASE 中实现的本机优化器优化水分子的几何形状来演示这种混合量子经典界面的工作原理。此外，该接口使人们能够以最少的编码工作轻松地比较、组合和使用量子算法与相关的经典方法。 本文开发了一个将基于变分量子本征求解器（VQE）的分子能量（VQE-E）和分子力（VQE-F）计算接口集成到原子模拟环境（ASE）中的框架。 Nirmal M R,Shampa Sarkar,Manoj Nambiar quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Thanh-Trung Ngo,Hajime Nagahara
title: A General Scattering Phase Function for Inverse Rendering
title_zh: 逆向渲染的通用散射相位函数
abstract: We tackle the problem of modeling light scattering in homogeneous translucent material and estimating its scattering parameters. A scattering phase function is one of such parameters which affects the distribution of scattered radiation. It is the most complex and challenging parameter to be modeled in practice, and empirical phase functions are usually used. Empirical phase functions (such as Henyey-Greenstein (HG) phase function or its modified ones) are usually presented and limited to a specific range of scattering materials. This limitation raises concern for an inverse rendering problem where the target material is generally unknown. In such a situation, a more general phase function is preferred. Although there exists such a general phase function in the polynomial form using a basis such as Legendre polynomials \cite{Fowler1983}, inverse rendering with this phase function is not straightforward. This is because the base polynomials may be negative somewhere, while a phase function cannot. This research presents a novel general phase function that can avoid this issue and an inverse rendering application using this phase function. The proposed phase function was positively evaluated with a wide range of materials modeled with Mie scattering theory. The scattering parameters estimation with the proposed phase function was evaluated with simulation and real-world experiments.
summary: We tackle the problem of modeling light scattering in homogeneous translucent material and estimating its scattering parameters. A scattering phase function is one of such parameters which affects the distribution of scattered radiation. It is the most complex and challenging parameter to be modeled in practice, and empirical phase functions are usually used. Empirical phase functions (such as Henyey-Greenstein (HG) phase function or its modified ones) are usually presented and limited to a specific range of scattering materials. This limitation raises concern for an inverse rendering problem where the target material is generally unknown. In such a situation, a more general phase function is preferred. Although there exists such a general phase function in the polynomial form using a basis such as Legendre polynomials \cite{Fowler1983}, inverse rendering with this phase function is not straightforward. This is because the base polynomials may be negative somewhere, while a phase function cannot. This research presents a novel general phase function that can avoid this issue and an inverse rendering application using this phase function. The proposed phase function was positively evaluated with a wide range of materials modeled with Mie scattering theory. The scattering parameters estimation with the proposed phase function was evaluated with simulation and real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了对均匀半透明材料中的光散射进行建模并估计其散射参数的问题。散射相位函数是影响散射辐射分布的参数之一。它是实践中建模最复杂和最具挑战性的参数，通常使用经验相函数。经验相函数（例如 Henyey-Greenstein (HG) 相函数或其修改的相函数）通常被提出并限制于特定范围的散射材料。这种限制引起了对目标材料通常未知的逆向渲染问题的关注。在这种情况下，优选更一般的相位函数。尽管存在使用勒让德多项式等基的多项式形式的通用相位函数\cite{Fowler1983}，但使用该相位函数的逆渲染并不简单。这是因为基多项式在某些地方可能为负，而相位函数则不能。这项研究提出了一种新颖的通用相位函数，可以避免这个问题，以及使用该相位函数的逆渲染应用程序。所提出的相函数得到了用米氏散射理论建模的各种材料的积极评价。通过仿真和实际实验评估了使用所提出的相位函数进行的散射参数估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的散射相函数，用于解决逆渲染中未知材料的散射参数估计问题。
AI.motivation: 传统经验相函数（如Henyey-Greenstein）仅适用于特定材料范围，难以满足逆渲染中目标材料未知的需求，且多项式基相函数可能产生负值，不符合物理要求。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于多项式基的新型相函数，通过约束条件确保其非负性，并结合Mie散射理论进行材料建模，通过仿真和真实实验验证参数估计效果。
AI.result: 新相函数在多种材料上表现良好，参数估计在仿真和真实实验中均取得准确结果，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用相函数克服了传统方法的局限性，为逆渲染提供了更灵活且物理合理的解决方案。

authors_text: Mu Yuan,Lan Zhang,Fengxiang He,Xueting Tong,Miao-Hui Song,Zhengyuan Xu,Xiang-Yang Li
title: InFi: End-to-End Learning to Filter Input for Resource-Efficiency in Mobile-Centric Inference
title_zh: InFi：端到端学习过滤输入以提高以移动为中心的推理中的资源效率
abstract: Mobile-centric AI applications have high requirements for resource-efficiency of model inference. Input filtering is a promising approach to eliminate the redundancy so as to reduce the cost of inference. Previous efforts have tailored effective solutions for many applications, but left two essential questions unanswered: (1) theoretical filterability of an inference workload to guide the application of input filtering techniques, thereby avoiding the trial-and-error cost for resource-constrained mobile applications; (2) robust discriminability of feature embedding to allow input filtering to be widely effective for diverse inference tasks and input content. To answer them, we first formalize the input filtering problem and theoretically compare the hypothesis complexity of inference models and input filters to understand the optimization potential. Then we propose the first end-to-end learnable input filtering framework that covers most state-of-the-art methods and surpasses them in feature embedding with robust discriminability. We design and implement InFi that supports six input modalities and multiple mobile-centric deployments. Comprehensive evaluations confirm our theoretical results and show that InFi outperforms strong baselines in applicability, accuracy, and efficiency. InFi achieve 8.5x throughput and save 95% bandwidth, while keeping over 90% accuracy, for a video analytics application on mobile platforms.
summary: Mobile-centric AI applications have high requirements for resource-efficiency of model inference. Input filtering is a promising approach to eliminate the redundancy so as to reduce the cost of inference. Previous efforts have tailored effective solutions for many applications, but left two essential questions unanswered: (1) theoretical filterability of an inference workload to guide the application of input filtering techniques, thereby avoiding the trial-and-error cost for resource-constrained mobile applications; (2) robust discriminability of feature embedding to allow input filtering to be widely effective for diverse inference tasks and input content. To answer them, we first formalize the input filtering problem and theoretically compare the hypothesis complexity of inference models and input filters to understand the optimization potential. Then we propose the first end-to-end learnable input filtering framework that covers most state-of-the-art methods and surpasses them in feature embedding with robust discriminability. We design and implement InFi that supports six input modalities and multiple mobile-centric deployments. Comprehensive evaluations confirm our theoretical results and show that InFi outperforms strong baselines in applicability, accuracy, and efficiency. InFi achieve 8.5x throughput and save 95% bandwidth, while keeping over 90% accuracy, for a video analytics application on mobile platforms.
abstract_zh: 以移动端为中心的人工智能应用对模型推理的资源效率有很高的要求。输入过滤是一种消除冗余从而降低推理成本的有前途的方法。先前的努力已经为许多应用程序定制了有效的解决方案，但留下了两个尚未解答的基本问题：（1）推理工作负载的理论可过滤性，以指导输入过滤技术的应用，从而避免资源受限的移动应用程序的试错成本； （2）特征嵌入的鲁棒可区分性，使输入过滤对于不同的推理任务和输入内容广泛有效。为了回答这些问题，我们首先形式化输入过滤问题，并从理论上比较推理模型和输入过滤器的假设复杂性，以了解优化潜力。然后，我们提出了第一个端到端可学习的输入过滤框架，该框架涵盖了大多数最先进的方法，并在具有鲁棒辨别性的特征嵌入方面超越了它们。我们设计和实施的 InFi 支持六种输入模式和多种以移动为中心的部署。综合评估证实了我们的理论结果，并表明 InFi 在适用性、准确性和效率方面优于强大的基线。对于移动平台上的视频分析应用程序，InFi 可实现 8.5 倍的吞吐量并节省 95% 的带宽，同时保持超过 90% 的准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InFi框架，通过端到端学习实现输入过滤，提升移动端推理的资源效率。
AI.motivation: 移动端AI应用对推理资源效率要求高，现有输入过滤方法缺乏理论指导且难以适应多样化任务。
AI.method: 形式化输入过滤问题，比较模型与过滤器的假设复杂度，设计支持多模态的端到端可学习框架InFi。
AI.result: 在视频分析任务中，InFi实现8.5倍吞吐量、节省95%带宽且保持90%以上准确率，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: InFi通过理论分析与框架设计，有效解决移动端推理的过滤可行性与泛化性问题。

authors_text: Zheng Li,Caili Guo,Xin Wang,Zerun Feng,Jenq-Neng Hwang,Zhongtian Du
title: Unified Loss of Pair Similarity Optimization for Vision-Language Retrieval
title_zh: 视觉语言检索的统一配对相似度优化损失
abstract: There are two popular loss functions used for vision-language retrieval, i.e., triplet loss and contrastive learning loss, both of them essentially minimize the difference between the similarities of negative pairs and positive pairs. More specifically, Triplet loss with Hard Negative mining (Triplet-HN), which is widely used in existing retrieval models to improve the discriminative ability, is easy to fall into local minima in training. On the other hand, Vision-Language Contrastive learning loss (VLC), which is widely used in the vision-language pre-training, has been shown to achieve significant performance gains on vision-language retrieval, but the performance of fine-tuning with VLC on small datasets is not satisfactory. This paper proposes a unified loss of pair similarity optimization for vision-language retrieval, providing a powerful tool for understanding existing loss functions. Our unified loss includes the hard sample mining strategy of VLC and introduces the margin used by the triplet loss for better similarity separation. It is shown that both Triplet-HN and VLC are special forms of our unified loss. Compared with the Triplet-HN, our unified loss has a fast convergence speed. Compared with the VLC, our unified loss is more discriminative and can provide better generalization in downstream fine-tuning tasks. Experiments on image-text and video-text retrieval benchmarks show that our unified loss can significantly improve the performance of the state-of-the-art retrieval models.
summary: There are two popular loss functions used for vision-language retrieval, i.e., triplet loss and contrastive learning loss, both of them essentially minimize the difference between the similarities of negative pairs and positive pairs. On the other hand, Vision-Language Contrastive learning loss (VLC), which is widely used in the vision-language pre-training, has been shown to achieve significant performance gains on vision-language retrieval, but the performance of fine-tuning with VLC on small datasets is not satisfactory. Our unified loss includes the hard sample mining strategy of VLC and introduces the margin used by the triplet loss for better similarity separation. It is shown that both Triplet-HN and VLC are special forms of our unified loss. Compared with the Triplet-HN, our unified loss has a fast convergence speed. Compared with the VLC, our unified loss is more discriminative and can provide better generalization in downstream fine-tuning tasks. Experiments on image-text and video-text retrieval benchmarks show that our unified loss can significantly improve the performance of the state-of-the-art retrieval models.
abstract_zh: 有两种流行的损失函数用于视觉语言检索，即三元组损失和对比学习损失，它们本质上都最小化了负对和正对的相似性之间的差异。更具体地说，现有检索模型中广泛使用的带有硬负挖掘的三元组损失（Triplet-HN）以提高判别能力，但在训练中很容易陷入局部极小值。另一方面，广泛应用于视觉语言预训练的视觉语言对比学习损失（VLC）已被证明在视觉语言检索方面取得了显着的性能提升，但在小数据集上使用VLC进行微调的性能并不令人满意。本文提出了一种用于视觉语言检索的统一的配对相似性优化损失，为理解现有损失函数提供了强大的工具。我们的统一损失包括VLC的硬样本挖掘策略，并引入了三元组损失使用的边际以实现更好的相似性分离。结果表明 Triplet-HN 和 VLC 都是我们统一损失的特殊形式。与 Triplet-HN 相比，我们的统一损失具有更快的收敛速度。与 VLC 相比，我们的统一损失更具辨别力，可以在下游微调任务中提供更好的泛化能力。图像文本和视频文本检索基准的实验表明，我们的统一损失可以显着提高最先进的检索模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的成对相似度优化损失函数，用于改进视觉-语言检索任务中的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有三元组损失（Triplet-HN）易陷入局部最优，而视觉-语言对比学习损失（VLC）在小数据集微调时表现不佳，需结合两者优势以提升模型效果。
AI.method: 设计统一损失函数，整合VLC的难样本挖掘策略与三元组损失的间隔参数，证明Triplet-HN和VLC均为其特例。
AI.result: 实验显示该损失函数收敛速度优于Triplet-HN，在下游任务中泛化能力优于VLC，显著提升图像-文本和视频-文本检索基准性能。
AI.conclusion: 统一损失函数通过融合两种方法优势，为视觉-语言检索提供了更高效且通用的优化工具。

search_text: Unified Loss of Pair Similarity Optimization for Vision-Language Retrieval 视觉语言检索的统一配对相似度优化损失 There are two popular loss functions used for vision-language retrieval, i.e., triplet loss and contrastive learning loss, both of them essentially minimize the difference between the similarities of negative pairs and positive pairs. More specifically, Triplet loss with Hard Negative mining (Triplet-HN), which is widely used in existing retrieval models to improve the discriminative ability, is easy to fall into local minima in training. On the other hand, Vision-Language Contrastive learning loss (VLC), which is widely used in the vision-language pre-training, has been shown to achieve significant performance gains on vision-language retrieval, but the performance of fine-tuning with VLC on small datasets is not satisfactory. This paper proposes a unified loss of pair similarity optimization for vision-language retrieval, providing a powerful tool for understanding existing loss functions. Our unified loss includes the hard sample mining strategy of VLC and introduces the margin used by the triplet loss for better similarity separation. It is shown that both Triplet-HN and VLC are special forms of our unified loss. Compared with the Triplet-HN, our unified loss has a fast convergence speed. Compared with the VLC, our unified loss is more discriminative and can provide better generalization in downstream fine-tuning tasks. Experiments on image-text and video-text retrieval benchmarks show that our unified loss can significantly improve the performance of the state-of-the-art retrieval models. 有两种流行的损失函数用于视觉语言检索，即三元组损失和对比学习损失，它们本质上都最小化了负对和正对的相似性之间的差异。更具体地说，现有检索模型中广泛使用的带有硬负挖掘的三元组损失（Triplet-HN）以提高判别能力，但在训练中很容易陷入局部极小值。另一方面，广泛应用于视觉语言预训练的视觉语言对比学习损失（VLC）已被证明在视觉语言检索方面取得了显着的性能提升，但在小数据集上使用VLC进行微调的性能并不令人满意。本文提出了一种用于视觉语言检索的统一的配对相似性优化损失，为理解现有损失函数提供了强大的工具。我们的统一损失包括VLC的硬样本挖掘策略，并引入了三元组损失使用的边际以实现更好的相似性分离。结果表明 Triplet-HN 和 VLC 都是我们统一损失的特殊形式。与 Triplet-HN 相比，我们的统一损失具有更快的收敛速度。与 VLC 相比，我们的统一损失更具辨别力，可以在下游微调任务中提供更好的泛化能力。图像文本和视频文本检索基准的实验表明，我们的统一损失可以显着提高最先进的检索模型的性能。 本文提出一种统一的成对相似度优化损失函数，用于改进视觉-语言检索任务中的模型性能。 Zheng Li,Caili Guo,Xin Wang,Zerun Feng,Jenq-Neng Hwang,Zhongtian Du cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Hao Wei,Chenyang Ge,Xin Qiao,Pengchao Deng
title: Rethinking Blur Synthesis for Deep Real-World Image Deblurring
title_zh: 重新思考深度现实世界图像去模糊的模糊合成
abstract: In this paper, we examine the problem of real-world image deblurring and take into account two key factors for improving the performance of the deep image deblurring model, namely, training data synthesis and network architecture design. Deblurring models trained on existing synthetic datasets perform poorly on real blurry images due to domain shift. To reduce the domain gap between synthetic and real domains, we propose a novel realistic blur synthesis pipeline to simulate the camera imaging process. As a result of our proposed synthesis method, existing deblurring models could be made more robust to handle real-world blur. Furthermore, we develop an effective deblurring model that captures non-local dependencies and local context in the feature domain simultaneously. Specifically, we introduce the multi-path transformer module to UNet architecture for enriched multi-scale features learning. A comprehensive experiment on three real-world datasets shows that the proposed deblurring model performs better than state-of-the-art methods.
summary: In this paper, we examine the problem of real-world image deblurring and take into account two key factors for improving the performance of the deep image deblurring model, namely, training data synthesis and network architecture design. Deblurring models trained on existing synthetic datasets perform poorly on real blurry images due to domain shift. To reduce the domain gap between synthetic and real domains, we propose a novel realistic blur synthesis pipeline to simulate the camera imaging process. As a result of our proposed synthesis method, existing deblurring models could be made more robust to handle real-world blur. Furthermore, we develop an effective deblurring model that captures non-local dependencies and local context in the feature domain simultaneously. Specifically, we introduce the multi-path transformer module to UNet architecture for enriched multi-scale features learning. A comprehensive experiment on three real-world datasets shows that the proposed deblurring model performs better than state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了现实世界的图像去模糊问题，并考虑了提高深度图像去模糊模型性能的两个关键因素，即训练数据合成和网络架构设计。由于域转移，在现有合成数据集上训练的去模糊模型在真实模糊图像上表现不佳。为了减少合成域和真实域之间的域差距，我们提出了一种新颖的逼真模糊合成管道来模拟相机成像过程。由于我们提出的合成方法，现有的去模糊模型可以变得更加鲁棒，以处理现实世界的模糊。此外，我们开发了一种有效的去模糊模型，可以同时捕获特征域中的非局部依赖关系和局部上下文。具体来说，我们将多路径变压器模块引入到 UNet 架构中，以丰富多尺度特征学习。对三个真实世界数据集的综合实验表明，所提出的去模糊模型比最先进的方法表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进训练数据合成和网络架构设计，提升深度学习模型在真实世界图像去模糊任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有去模糊模型在合成数据集上训练后，因合成与真实数据间的领域差异（domain shift）导致在真实模糊图像上表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出一种模拟相机成像过程的新型真实模糊合成方法，并设计结合多路径Transformer模块的UNet架构以捕捉非局部依赖与局部上下文特征。
AI.result: 在三个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，所提模型优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过缩小合成与真实数据的领域差距并优化网络结构，本文方法有效提升了真实场景下的图像去模糊效果。

authors_text: Zhengrong Xue,Zhecheng Yuan,Jiashun Wang,Xueqian Wang,Yang Gao,Huazhe Xu
title: USEEK: Unsupervised SE(3)-Equivariant 3D Keypoints for Generalizable Manipulation
title_zh: USEEK：用于可推广操作的无监督 SE(3)-等变 3D 关键点
abstract: Can a robot manipulate intra-category unseen objects in arbitrary poses with the help of a mere demonstration of grasping pose on a single object instance? In this paper, we try to address this intriguing challenge by using USEEK, an unsupervised SE(3)-equivariant keypoints method that enjoys alignment across instances in a category, to perform generalizable manipulation. USEEK follows a teacher-student structure to decouple the unsupervised keypoint discovery and SE(3)-equivariant keypoint detection. With USEEK in hand, the robot can infer the category-level task-relevant object frames in an efficient and explainable manner, enabling manipulation of any intra-category objects from and to any poses. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that the keypoints produced by USEEK possess rich semantics, thus successfully transferring the functional knowledge from the demonstration object to the novel ones. Compared with other object representations for manipulation, USEEK is more adaptive in the face of large intra-category shape variance, more robust with limited demonstrations, and more efficient at inference time.
summary: Can a robot manipulate intra-category unseen objects in arbitrary poses with the help of a mere demonstration of grasping pose on a single object instance? In this paper, we try to address this intriguing challenge by using USEEK, an unsupervised SE(3)-equivariant keypoints method that enjoys alignment across instances in a category, to perform generalizable manipulation. USEEK follows a teacher-student structure to decouple the unsupervised keypoint discovery and SE(3)-equivariant keypoint detection. With USEEK in hand, the robot can infer the category-level task-relevant object frames in an efficient and explainable manner, enabling manipulation of any intra-category objects from and to any poses. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that the keypoints produced by USEEK possess rich semantics, thus successfully transferring the functional knowledge from the demonstration object to the novel ones. Compared with other object representations for manipulation, USEEK is more adaptive in the face of large intra-category shape variance, more robust with limited demonstrations, and more efficient at inference time.
abstract_zh: 机器人是否可以仅通过单个物体实例上的抓取姿势演示来以任意姿势操纵类别内看不见的物体？在本文中，我们尝试使用 USEEK 来解决这一有趣的挑战，USEEK 是一种无监督的 SE(3) 等变关键点方法，可以跨类别中的实例进行对齐，以执行可泛化的操作。 USEEK遵循师生结构来解耦无监督关键点发现和SE(3)等变关键点检测。有了 USEEK，机器人可以以高效且可解释的方式推断类别级任务相关的对象框架，从而能够操纵任何类别内对象的任何姿势。通过大量的实验，我们证明了 USEEK 产生的关键点具有丰富的语义，从而成功地将功能知识从演示对象转移到新颖的知识。与其他用于操作的对象表示相比，USEEK 在面对大的类别内形状方差时更具适应性，在有限的演示下更稳健，并且在推理时更高效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出USEEK方法，通过无监督学习生成SE(3)-等变的3D关键点，使机器人能够泛化操作同一类别中的未知物体。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以通过单个物体的抓取演示泛化到同类其他物体，尤其在面对形状差异和任意姿态时表现不足。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生结构，分离无监督关键点发现与SE(3)-等变检测，实现跨实例对齐和高效推理。
AI.result: 实验表明USEEK关键点具有丰富语义，能有效迁移功能知识，优于其他方法在形状适应性、鲁棒性和推理效率方面。
AI.conclusion: USEEK为机器人通用操作提供了高效且可解释的解决方案，适用于实际场景中的多样化物体操作需求。

motivation: 现有方法难以通过单个物体的抓取演示泛化到同类其他物体，尤其在面对形状差异和任意姿态时表现不足。
method: 采用教师-学生结构，分离无监督关键点发现与SE(3)-等变检测，实现跨实例对齐和高效推理。
result: 实验表明USEEK关键点具有丰富语义，能有效迁移功能知识，优于其他方法在形状适应性、鲁棒性和推理效率方面。
conclusion: USEEK为机器人通用操作提供了高效且可解释的解决方案，适用于实际场景中的多样化物体操作需求。
search_text: USEEK: Unsupervised SE(3)-Equivariant 3D Keypoints for Generalizable Manipulation USEEK：用于可推广操作的无监督 SE(3)-等变 3D 关键点 Can a robot manipulate intra-category unseen objects in arbitrary poses with the help of a mere demonstration of grasping pose on a single object instance? In this paper, we try to address this intriguing challenge by using USEEK, an unsupervised SE(3)-equivariant keypoints method that enjoys alignment across instances in a category, to perform generalizable manipulation. USEEK follows a teacher-student structure to decouple the unsupervised keypoint discovery and SE(3)-equivariant keypoint detection. With USEEK in hand, the robot can infer the category-level task-relevant object frames in an efficient and explainable manner, enabling manipulation of any intra-category objects from and to any poses. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that the keypoints produced by USEEK possess rich semantics, thus successfully transferring the functional knowledge from the demonstration object to the novel ones. Compared with other object representations for manipulation, USEEK is more adaptive in the face of large intra-category shape variance, more robust with limited demonstrations, and more efficient at inference time. 机器人是否可以仅通过单个物体实例上的抓取姿势演示来以任意姿势操纵类别内看不见的物体？在本文中，我们尝试使用 USEEK 来解决这一有趣的挑战，USEEK 是一种无监督的 SE(3) 等变关键点方法，可以跨类别中的实例进行对齐，以执行可泛化的操作。 USEEK遵循师生结构来解耦无监督关键点发现和SE(3)等变关键点检测。有了 USEEK，机器人可以以高效且可解释的方式推断类别级任务相关的对象框架，从而能够操纵任何类别内对象的任何姿势。通过大量的实验，我们证明了 USEEK 产生的关键点具有丰富的语义，从而成功地将功能知识从演示对象转移到新颖的知识。与其他用于操作的对象表示相比，USEEK 在面对大的类别内形状方差时更具适应性，在有限的演示下更稳健，并且在推理时更高效。 本文提出USEEK方法，通过无监督学习生成SE(3)-等变的3D关键点，使机器人能够泛化操作同一类别中的未知物体。 Zhengrong Xue,Zhecheng Yuan,Jiashun Wang,Xueqian Wang,Yang Gao,Huazhe Xu cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Nasib Ullah,Partha Pratim Mohanta
title: Thinking Hallucination for Video Captioning
title_zh: 视频字幕的思维幻觉
abstract: With the advent of rich visual representations and pre-trained language models, video captioning has seen continuous improvement over time. Despite the performance improvement, video captioning models are prone to hallucination. Hallucination refers to the generation of highly pathological descriptions that are detached from the source material. In video captioning, there are two kinds of hallucination: object and action hallucination. Instead of endeavoring to learn better representations of a video, in this work, we investigate the fundamental sources of the hallucination problem. We identify three main factors: (i) inadequate visual features extracted from pre-trained models, (ii) improper influences of source and target contexts during multi-modal fusion, and (iii) exposure bias in the training strategy. To alleviate these problems, we propose two robust solutions: (a) the introduction of auxiliary heads trained in multi-label settings on top of the extracted visual features and (b) the addition of context gates, which dynamically select the features during fusion. The standard evaluation metrics for video captioning measures similarity with ground truth captions and do not adequately capture object and action relevance. To this end, we propose a new metric, COAHA (caption object and action hallucination assessment), which assesses the degree of hallucination. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MSR-Video to Text (MSR-VTT) and the Microsoft Research Video Description Corpus (MSVD) datasets, especially by a massive margin in CIDEr score.
summary: With the advent of rich visual representations and pre-trained language models, video captioning has seen continuous improvement over time. Despite the performance improvement, video captioning models are prone to hallucination. Hallucination refers to the generation of highly pathological descriptions that are detached from the source material. In video captioning, there are two kinds of hallucination: object and action hallucination. Instead of endeavoring to learn better representations of a video, in this work, we investigate the fundamental sources of the hallucination problem. We identify three main factors: (i) inadequate visual features extracted from pre-trained models, (ii) improper influences of source and target contexts during multi-modal fusion, and (iii) exposure bias in the training strategy. To alleviate these problems, we propose two robust solutions: (a) the introduction of auxiliary heads trained in multi-label settings on top of the extracted visual features and (b) the addition of context gates, which dynamically select the features during fusion. The standard evaluation metrics for video captioning measures similarity with ground truth captions and do not adequately capture object and action relevance. To this end, we propose a new metric, COAHA (caption object and action hallucination assessment), which assesses the degree of hallucination. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MSR-Video to Text (MSR-VTT) and the Microsoft Research Video Description Corpus (MSVD) datasets, especially by a massive margin in CIDEr score.
abstract_zh: 随着丰富的视觉表示和预先训练的语言模型的出现，视频字幕随着时间的推移不断得到改进。尽管性能有所提高，但视频字幕模型很容易产生幻觉。幻觉是指产生脱离原始材料的高度病态的描述。在视频字幕中，有两种幻觉：物体幻觉和动作幻觉。在这项工作中，我们没有努力学习更好的视频表示，而是研究幻觉问题的根本根源。我们确定了三个主要因素：（i）从预训练模型中提取的视觉特征不足，（ii）多模态融合过程中源和目标上下文的不当影响，以及（iii）训练策略中的暴露偏差。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了两种稳健的解决方案：（a）在提取的视觉特征之上引入在多标签设置中训练的辅助头；（b）添加上下文门，在融合过程中动态选择特征。视频字幕的标准评估指标衡量与真实字幕的相似性，但不能充分捕捉对象和动作的相关性。为此，我们提出了一个新的指标COAHA（字幕对象和动作幻觉评估），它评估幻觉的程度。我们的方法在 MSR-Video to Text (MSR-VTT) 和 Microsoft Research Video Description Corpus (MSVD) 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，特别是在 CIDEr 分数方面取得了巨大的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文研究视频字幕生成中的幻觉问题，提出解决方法并设计新评估指标。
AI.motivation: 尽管视频字幕生成性能提升，但模型仍易产生与内容无关的幻觉描述，现有方法未深入分析根本原因。
AI.method: 提出两种解决方案：在视觉特征上添加多标签辅助头，以及引入动态上下文门控机制；设计COAHA指标评估幻觉程度。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT和MSVD数据集上取得SOTA性能，CIDEr分数显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决视觉特征不足、上下文干扰和训练偏差三大因素，有效缓解幻觉问题并提升生成质量。

authors_text: T. Baturhan Akbulut,G. Tuba C. Girgin,Arash Mehrabi,Minoru Asada,Emre Ugur,Erhan Oztop
title: Bimanual rope manipulation skill synthesis through context dependent correction policy learning from human demonstration
title_zh: 通过从人类演示中学习上下文相关的校正策略来合成双手绳索操纵技能
abstract: Learning from demonstration (LfD) provides a convenient means to equip robots with dexterous skills when demonstration can be obtained in robot intrinsic coordinates. However, the problem of compounding errors in long and complex skills reduces its wide deployment. Since most such complex skills are composed of smaller movements that are combined, considering the target skill as a sequence of compact motor primitives seems reasonable. Here the problem that needs to be tackled is to ensure that a motor primitive ends in a state that allows the successful execution of the subsequent primitive. In this study, we focus on this problem by proposing to learn an explicit correction policy when the expected transition state between primitives is not achieved. The correction policy is itself learned via behavior cloning by the use of a state-of-the-art movement primitive learning architecture, Conditional Neural Motor Primitives (CNMPs). The learned correction policy is then able to produce diverse movement trajectories in a context dependent way. The advantage of the proposed system over learning the complete task as a single action is shown with a table-top setup in simulation, where an object has to be pushed through a corridor in two steps. Then, the applicability of the proposed method to bi-manual knotting in the real world is shown by equipping an upper-body humanoid robot with the skill of making knots over a bar in 3D space. The experiments show that the robot can perform successful knotting even when the faced correction cases are not part of the human demonstration set.
summary: Learning from demonstration (LfD) provides a convenient means to equip robots with dexterous skills when demonstration can be obtained in robot intrinsic coordinates. However, the problem of compounding errors in long and complex skills reduces its wide deployment. Since most such complex skills are composed of smaller movements that are combined, considering the target skill as a sequence of compact motor primitives seems reasonable. Here the problem that needs to be tackled is to ensure that a motor primitive ends in a state that allows the successful execution of the subsequent primitive. In this study, we focus on this problem by proposing to learn an explicit correction policy when the expected transition state between primitives is not achieved. The correction policy is itself learned via behavior cloning by the use of a state-of-the-art movement primitive learning architecture, Conditional Neural Motor Primitives (CNMPs). The learned correction policy is then able to produce diverse movement trajectories in a context dependent way. The advantage of the proposed system over learning the complete task as a single action is shown with a table-top setup in simulation, where an object has to be pushed through a corridor in two steps. Then, the applicability of the proposed method to bi-manual knotting in the real world is shown by equipping an upper-body humanoid robot with the skill of making knots over a bar in 3D space. The experiments show that the robot can perform successful knotting even when the faced correction cases are not part of the human demonstration set.
abstract_zh: 当可以在机器人内坐标中获得演示时，从演示中学习（LfD）提供了一种为机器人配备灵巧技能的便捷方法。然而，长而复杂的技能中复合错误的问题限制了其广泛的部署。由于大多数此类复杂技能都是由较小的运动组合而成，因此将目标技能视为一系列紧凑的运动基元似乎是合理的。这里需要解决的问题是确保运动原语以允许成功执行后续原语的状态结束。在本研究中，我们通过提出在未实现基元之间的预期过渡状态时学习显式校正策略来关注这个问题。校正策略本身是通过使用最先进的运动原始学习架构——条件神经运动原语（CNMP）进行行为克隆来学习的。然后，学习到的校正策略能够以依赖于上下文的方式产生不同的运动轨迹。所提出的系统相对于将完整任务作为单个动作进行学习的优势通过模拟中的桌面设置显示出来，其中必须分两步将物体推过走廊。然后，通过为上半身人形机器人配备在 3D 空间中在杆上打结的技能，展示了所提出的方法在现实世界中双手打结的适用性。实验表明，即使面对的校正案例不属于人类演示集的一部分，机器人也可以成功打结。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过学习依赖上下文的校正策略，从人类演示中合成双臂绳索操作技能，解决复杂任务中误差累积的问题。
AI.motivation: 基于演示的学习（LfD）在复杂任务中存在误差累积问题，导致技能执行失败。需确保每个运动原语的结束状态能支持后续原语的成功执行。
AI.method: 提出显式校正策略，利用条件神经运动原语（CNMPs）通过行为克隆学习校正政策，实现上下文依赖的运动轨迹生成。
AI.result: 仿真和真实实验表明，机器人能成功完成双臂打结任务，即使面对未在人类演示中出现的校正情况。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过上下文依赖的校正策略有效缓解误差累积问题，验证了其在复杂双臂操作任务中的可行性与鲁棒性。

The experiments show that the robot can perform successful knotting even when the faced correction cases are not part of the human demonstration set. 当可以在机器人内坐标中获得演示时，从演示中学习（LfD）提供了一种为机器人配备灵巧技能的便捷方法。然而，长而复杂的技能中复合错误的问题限制了其广泛的部署。由于大多数此类复杂技能都是由较小的运动组合而成，因此将目标技能视为一系列紧凑的运动基元似乎是合理的。这里需要解决的问题是确保运动原语以允许成功执行后续原语的状态结束。在本研究中，我们通过提出在未实现基元之间的预期过渡状态时学习显式校正策略来关注这个问题。校正策略本身是通过使用最先进的运动原始学习架构——条件神经运动原语（CNMP）进行行为克隆来学习的。然后，学习到的校正策略能够以依赖于上下文的方式产生不同的运动轨迹。所提出的系统相对于将完整任务作为单个动作进行学习的优势通过模拟中的桌面设置显示出来，其中必须分两步将物体推过走廊。然后，通过为上半身人形机器人配备在 3D 空间中在杆上打结的技能，展示了所提出的方法在现实世界中双手打结的适用性。实验表明，即使面对的校正案例不属于人类演示集的一部分，机器人也可以成功打结。 本文提出通过学习依赖上下文的校正策略，从人类演示中合成双臂绳索操作技能，解决复杂任务中误差累积的问题。 T. Baturhan Akbulut,G. Tuba C. Girgin,Arash Mehrabi,Minoru Asada,Emre Ugur,Erhan Oztop cs.RO

authors_text: Tariq O. Abbas,Mohamed AbdelMoniem,Ibrahim Khalil,Md Sakib Abrar Hossain,Muhammad E. H. Chowdhury
title: Deep Learning based Automatic Quantification of Urethral Plate Quality using the Plate Objective Scoring Tool (POST)
title_zh: 使用板客观评分工具 (POST) 对尿道板质量进行基于深度学习的自动量化
abstract: Objectives: To explore the capacity of deep learning algorithm to further streamline and optimize urethral plate (UP) quality appraisal on 2D images using the plate objective scoring tool (POST), aiming to increase the objectivity and reproducibility of UP appraisal in hypospadias repair. Methods: The five key POST landmarks were marked by specialists in a 691-image dataset of prepubertal boys undergoing primary hypospadias repair. This dataset was then used to develop and validate a deep learning-based landmark detection model. The proposed framework begins with glans localization and detection, where the input image is cropped using the predicted bounding box. Next, a deep convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture is used to predict the coordinates of the five POST landmarks. These predicted landmarks are then used to assess UP quality in distal hypospadias. Results: The proposed model accurately localized the glans area, with a mean average precision (mAP) of 99.5% and an overall sensitivity of 99.1%. A normalized mean error (NME) of 0.07152 was achieved in predicting the coordinates of the landmarks, with a mean squared error (MSE) of 0.001 and a 20.2% failure rate at a threshold of 0.1 NME. Conclusions: This deep learning application shows robustness and high precision in using POST to appraise UP quality. Further assessment using international multi-centre image-based databases is ongoing. External validation could benefit deep learning algorithms and lead to better assessments, decision-making and predictions for surgical outcomes.

abstract_zh: 目的：探索深度学习算法使用板客观评分工具（POST）进一步简化和优化二维图像尿道板（UP）质量评估的能力，旨在提高尿道下裂修复中 UP 评估的客观性和可重复性。方法：专家在接受原发性尿道下裂修复的青春期前男孩的 691 个图像数据集中标记了五个关键的 POST 标志。然后，该数据集用于开发和验证基于深度学习的地标检测模型。所提出的框架从龟头定位和检测开始​​，其中使用预测的边界框裁剪输入图像。接下来，使用深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构来预测五个 POST 地标的坐标。然后使用这些预测的标志来评估远端尿道下裂的 UP 质量。结果：所提出的模型准确定位了龟头区域，平均精度（mAP）为 99.5%，总体灵敏度为 99.1%。预测地标坐标的归一化平均误差 (NME) 为 0.07152，均方误差 (MSE) 为 0.001，在 0.1 NME 阈值下的失败率为 20.2%。结论：此深度学习应用程序在使用 POST 评估 UP 质量方面表现出稳健性和高精度。使用国际多中心图像数据库进行的进一步评估正在进行中。外部验证可以有利于深度学习算法，并可以更好地评估、决策和预测手术结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习的自动量化方法，利用Plate Objective Scoring Tool (POST)评估尿道板质量，旨在提高隐匿性尿道下裂修复术中尿道板评估的客观性和可重复性。
AI.motivation: 传统尿道板质量评估依赖人工主观判断，存在主观性和可重复性差的问题。通过深度学习自动化POST评分可提升评估效率和客观性。
AI.method: 使用691张术前儿童尿道板图像，由专家标注POST关键点。构建深度学习框架：首先定位龟头区域并裁剪图像，再通过卷积神经网络（CNN）预测五个POST关键点坐标，最终计算尿道板质量评分。
AI.result: 模型在龟头定位任务中达到99.5%的mAP和99.1%的灵敏度，关键点坐标预测的归一化均方误差（NME）为0.07152，均方误差（MSE）为0.001，阈值0.1下的失败率为20.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该深度学习模型在POST评分中表现出高精度和鲁棒性，但需通过国际多中心图像数据库进行外部验证以进一步优化临床应用。
