authors_text: Peng Jiang,Juan Liu,Lang Wang,Zhihui Ynag,Hongyu Dong,Jing Feng
title: Deeply Supervised Layer Selective Attention Network: Towards Label-Efficient Learning for Medical Image Classification
title_zh: 深度监督层选择性注意网络：迈向医学图像分类的标签高效学习
abstract: Labeling medical images depends on professional knowledge, making it difficult to acquire large amount of annotated medical images with high quality in a short time. Thus, making good use of limited labeled samples in a small dataset to build a high-performance model is the key to medical image classification problem. In this paper, we propose a deeply supervised Layer Selective Attention Network (LSANet), which comprehensively uses label information in feature-level and prediction-level supervision. For feature-level supervision, in order to better fuse the low-level features and high-level features, we propose a novel visual attention module, Layer Selective Attention (LSA), to focus on the feature selection of different layers. LSA introduces a weight allocation scheme which can dynamically adjust the weighting factor of each auxiliary branch during the whole training process to further enhance deeply supervised learning and ensure its generalization. For prediction-level supervision, we adopt the knowledge synergy strategy to promote hierarchical information interactions among all supervision branches via pairwise knowledge matching. Using the public dataset, MedMNIST, which is a large-scale benchmark for biomedical image classification covering diverse medical specialties, we evaluate LSANet on multiple mainstream CNN architectures and various visual attention modules. The experimental results show the substantial improvements of our proposed method over its corresponding counterparts, demonstrating that LSANet can provide a promising solution for label-efficient learning in the field of medical image classification.
summary: Labeling medical images depends on professional knowledge, making it difficult to acquire large amount of annotated medical images with high quality in a short time. Thus, making good use of limited labeled samples in a small dataset to build a high-performance model is the key to medical image classification problem. In this paper, we propose a deeply supervised Layer Selective Attention Network (LSANet), which comprehensively uses label information in feature-level and prediction-level supervision. For feature-level supervision, in order to better fuse the low-level features and high-level features, we propose a novel visual attention module, Layer Selective Attention (LSA), to focus on the feature selection of different layers. LSA introduces a weight allocation scheme which can dynamically adjust the weighting factor of each auxiliary branch during the whole training process to further enhance deeply supervised learning and ensure its generalization. For prediction-level supervision, we adopt the knowledge synergy strategy to promote hierarchical information interactions among all supervision branches via pairwise knowledge matching. Using the public dataset, MedMNIST, which is a large-scale benchmark for biomedical image classification covering diverse medical specialties, we evaluate LSANet on multiple mainstream CNN architectures and various visual attention modules. The experimental results show the substantial improvements of our proposed method over its corresponding counterparts, demonstrating that LSANet can provide a promising solution for label-efficient learning in the field of medical image classification.
abstract_zh: 医学图像标注依赖于专业知识，难以在短时间内获取大量高质量的带注释医学图像。因此，充分利用小数据集中有限的标记样本来构建高性能模型是医学图像分类问题的关键。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度监督的层选择性注意网络（LSANet），它在特征级和预测级监督中综合利用标签信息。对于特征级监督，为了更好地融合低层特征和高层特征，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉注意模块——层选择性注意（LSA），以专注于不同层的特征选择。 LSA引入了权重分配方案，可以在整个训练过程中动态调整每个辅助分支的权重因子，以进一步增强深度监督学习并保证其泛化性。对于预测级监督，我们采用知识协同策略，通过成对知识匹配促进所有监督分支之间的分层信息交互。使用公共数据集 MedMNIST（涵盖不同医学专业的生物医学图像分类的大规模基准），我们在多种主流 CNN 架构和各种视觉注意模块上评估 LSANet。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法相对于相应的同类方法有了实质性的改进，证明 LSANet 可以为医学图像分类领域的标签高效学习提供有前景的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度监督的层选择性注意力网络（LSANet），旨在通过有效利用有限标签数据提升医学图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像标注依赖专业知识，难以快速获取大量高质量标注数据，如何在小数据集下构建高性能模型是关键挑战。
AI.method: 设计层选择性注意力模块（LSA）动态融合多层特征，并通过权重分配方案增强深度监督；采用知识协同策略促进多监督分支间的信息交互。
AI.result: 在MedMNIST数据集上，LSANet在多种CNN架构和注意力模块中均显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: LSANet通过特征级与预测级联合监督，为医学图像分类的标签高效学习提供了有效解决方案。

In this paper, we propose a deeply supervised Layer Selective Attention Network (LSANet), which comprehensively uses label information in feature-level and prediction-level supervision. For feature-level supervision, in order to better fuse the low-level features and high-level features, we propose a novel visual attention module, Layer Selective Attention (LSA), to focus on the feature selection of different layers. LSA introduces a weight allocation scheme which can dynamically adjust the weighting factor of each auxiliary branch during the whole training process to further enhance deeply supervised learning and ensure its generalization. For prediction-level supervision, we adopt the knowledge synergy strategy to promote hierarchical information interactions among all supervision branches via pairwise knowledge matching. Using the public dataset, MedMNIST, which is a large-scale benchmark for biomedical image classification covering diverse medical specialties, we evaluate LSANet on multiple mainstream CNN architectures and various visual attention modules. The experimental results show the substantial improvements of our proposed method over its corresponding counterparts, demonstrating that LSANet can provide a promising solution for label-efficient learning in the field of medical image classification. 医学图像标注依赖于专业知识，难以在短时间内获取大量高质量的带注释医学图像。因此，充分利用小数据集中有限的标记样本来构建高性能模型是医学图像分类问题的关键。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度监督的层选择性注意网络（LSANet），它在特征级和预测级监督中综合利用标签信息。对于特征级监督，为了更好地融合低层特征和高层特征，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉注意模块——层选择性注意（LSA），以专注于不同层的特征选择。 LSA引入了权重分配方案，可以在整个训练过程中动态调整每个辅助分支的权重因子，以进一步增强深度监督学习并保证其泛化性。对于预测级监督，我们采用知识协同策略，通过成对知识匹配促进所有监督分支之间的分层信息交互。使用公共数据集 MedMNIST（涵盖不同医学专业的生物医学图像分类的大规模基准），我们在多种主流 CNN 架构和各种视觉注意模块上评估 LSANet。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法相对于相应的同类方法有了实质性的改进，证明 LSANet 可以为医学图像分类领域的标签高效学习提供有前景的解决方案。 本文提出一种深度监督的层选择性注意力网络（LSANet），旨在通过有效利用有限标签数据提升医学图像分类性能。 Peng Jiang,Juan Liu,Lang Wang,Zhihui Ynag,Hongyu Dong,Jing Feng cs.CV

authors_text: Tongda Xu,Yan Wang,Dailan He,Chenjian Gao,Han Gao,Kunzan Liu,Hongwei Qin
title: Multi-Sample Training for Neural Image Compression
title_zh: 神经图像压缩的多样本训练
abstract: This paper considers the problem of lossy neural image compression (NIC). Current state-of-the-art (sota) methods adopt uniform posterior to approximate quantization noise, and single-sample pathwise estimator to approximate the gradient of evidence lower bound (ELBO). In this paper, we propose to train NIC with multiple-sample importance weighted autoencoder (IWAE) target, which is tighter than ELBO and converges to log likelihood as sample size increases. First, we identify that the uniform posterior of NIC has special properties, which affect the variance and bias of pathwise and score function estimators of the IWAE target. Moreover, we provide insights on a commonly adopted trick in NIC from gradient variance perspective. Based on those analysis, we further propose multiple-sample NIC (MS-NIC), an enhanced IWAE target for NIC. Experimental results demonstrate that it improves sota NIC methods. Our MS-NIC is plug-and-play, and can be easily extended to other neural compression tasks.
summary: This paper considers the problem of lossy neural image compression (NIC). Current state-of-the-art (sota) methods adopt uniform posterior to approximate quantization noise, and single-sample pathwise estimator to approximate the gradient of evidence lower bound (ELBO). In this paper, we propose to train NIC with multiple-sample importance weighted autoencoder (IWAE) target, which is tighter than ELBO and converges to log likelihood as sample size increases. First, we identify that the uniform posterior of NIC has special properties, which affect the variance and bias of pathwise and score function estimators of the IWAE target. Moreover, we provide insights on a commonly adopted trick in NIC from gradient variance perspective. Based on those analysis, we further propose multiple-sample NIC (MS-NIC), an enhanced IWAE target for NIC. Experimental results demonstrate that it improves sota NIC methods. Our MS-NIC is plug-and-play, and can be easily extended to other neural compression tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑有损神经图像压缩（NIC）问题。当前最先进的（sota）方法采用均匀后验来近似量化噪声，并采用单样本路径估计器来近似证据下限梯度（ELBO）。在本文中，我们建议使用多样本重要性加权自动编码器（IWAE）目标来训练 NIC，该目标比 ELBO 更严格，并且随着样本量的增加收敛到对数似然。首先，我们发现 NIC 的均匀后验具有特殊属性，它影响 IWAE 目标的路径和得分函数估计量的方差和偏差。此外，我们从梯度方差的角度提供了对 NIC 中常用技巧的见解。基于这些分析，我们进一步提出了多样本 NIC (MS-NIC)，这是 NIC 的增强型 IWAE 目标。实验结果表明它改进了 sota NIC 方法。我们的 MS-NIC 是即插即用的，可以轻松扩展到其他神经压缩任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多样本训练方法MS-NIC，通过改进神经图像压缩中的IWAE目标以提升压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经图像压缩方法采用单样本路径估计器，导致梯度估计偏差大且方差高，难以充分逼近理论下界。
AI.method: 基于多样本重要性加权自编码器（IWAE）框架，分析统一后验对估计器偏差-方差的影响，提出改进的多样本训练目标MS-NIC。
AI.result: 实验表明MS-NIC在多个基准数据集上超越现有SOTA方法，且可直接扩展至其他神经压缩任务。
AI.conclusion: 多样本训练能有效提升神经图像压缩性能，MS-NIC为压缩任务提供了更优的训练目标和通用解决方案。

authors_text: Yang Shen,Xuhao Sun,Xiu-Shen Wei,Qing-Yuan Jiang,Jian Yang
title: SEMICON: A Learning-to-hash Solution for Large-scale Fine-grained Image Retrieval
title_zh: SEMICON：大规模细粒度图像检索的学习哈希解决方案
abstract: In this paper, we propose Suppression-Enhancing Mask based attention and Interactive Channel transformatiON (SEMICON) to learn binary hash codes for dealing with large-scale fine-grained image retrieval tasks. In SEMICON, we first develop a suppression-enhancing mask (SEM) based attention to dynamically localize discriminative image regions. More importantly, different from existing attention mechanism simply erasing previous discriminative regions, our SEM is developed to restrain such regions and then discover other complementary regions by considering the relation between activated regions in a stage-by-stage fashion. In each stage, the interactive channel transformation (ICON) module is afterwards designed to exploit correlations across channels of attended activation tensors. Since channels could generally correspond to the parts of fine-grained objects, the part correlation can be also modeled accordingly, which further improves fine-grained retrieval accuracy. Moreover, to be computational economy, ICON is realized by an efficient two-step process. Finally, the hash learning of our SEMICON consists of both global- and local-level branches for better representing fine-grained objects and then generating binary hash codes explicitly corresponding to multiple levels. Experiments on five benchmark fine-grained datasets show our superiority over competing methods.
summary: In this paper, we propose Suppression-Enhancing Mask based attention and Interactive Channel transformatiON (SEMICON) to learn binary hash codes for dealing with large-scale fine-grained image retrieval tasks. In SEMICON, we first develop a suppression-enhancing mask (SEM) based attention to dynamically localize discriminative image regions. More importantly, different from existing attention mechanism simply erasing previous discriminative regions, our SEM is developed to restrain such regions and then discover other complementary regions by considering the relation between activated regions in a stage-by-stage fashion. In each stage, the interactive channel transformation (ICON) module is afterwards designed to exploit correlations across channels of attended activation tensors. Since channels could generally correspond to the parts of fine-grained objects, the part correlation can be also modeled accordingly, which further improves fine-grained retrieval accuracy. Moreover, to be computational economy, ICON is realized by an efficient two-step process. Finally, the hash learning of our SEMICON consists of both global- and local-level branches for better representing fine-grained objects and then generating binary hash codes explicitly corresponding to multiple levels. Experiments on five benchmark fine-grained datasets show our superiority over competing methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出基于抑制增强掩模的注意力和交互式通道变换（SEMICON）来学习二进制哈希码以处理大规模细粒度图像检索任务。在 SEMICON 中，我们首先开发了一种基于注意力的抑制增强掩模（SEM），以动态定位有区别的图像区域。更重要的是，与现有的注意力机制简单地擦除先前的判别区域不同，我们的 SEM 是为了限制这些区域，然后通过逐步考虑激活区域之间的关系来发现其他互补区域。在每个阶段，交互式通道转换（ICON）模块随后被设计为利用参与激活张量通道之间的相关性。由于通道通常可以对应细粒度对象的部分，因此也可以相应地对部分相关性进行建模，这进一步提高了细粒度检索的准确性。此外，为了计算经济性，ICON是通过高效的两步过程实现的。最后，我们的 SEMICON 的哈希学习由全局和局部级别的分支组成，以便更好地表示细粒度对象，然后生成与多个级别明确对应的二进制哈希代码。对五个基准细粒度数据集的实验显示了我们相对于竞争方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEMICON方法，通过学习二进制哈希码解决大规模细粒度图像检索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力机制在细粒度检索中无法有效建模互补区域关系，导致检索精度不足。
AI.method: 设计抑制增强掩码（SEM）动态定位判别区域，并通过交互通道变换（ICON）建模通道间相关性，结合全局-局部双分支生成多级二进制哈希码。
AI.result: 在五个细粒度基准数据集上，SEMICON优于现有对比方法。
AI.conclusion: SEMICON通过阶段化区域抑制与通道交互机制，有效提升了细粒度图像检索性能。

In SEMICON, we first develop a suppression-enhancing mask (SEM) based attention to dynamically localize discriminative image regions. More importantly, different from existing attention mechanism simply erasing previous discriminative regions, our SEM is developed to restrain such regions and then discover other complementary regions by considering the relation between activated regions in a stage-by-stage fashion. authors_text: Tao Wu,Tie Luo,Donald Wunsch
title: Learning Deep Representations via Contrastive Learning for Instance Retrieval
title_zh: 通过实例检索的对比学习学习深度表示
comment: IEEE Symposium Series On Computational Intelligence (SSCI), December 2022. Accepted
comments: IEEE Symposium Series On Computational Intelligence (SSCI), December 2022. Accepted
abstract: Instance-level Image Retrieval (IIR), or simply Instance Retrieval, deals with the problem of finding all the images within an dataset that contain a query instance (e.g. an object). This paper makes the first attempt that tackles this problem using instance-discrimination based contrastive learning (CL). While CL has shown impressive performance for many computer vision tasks, the similar success has never been found in the field of IIR. In this work, we approach this problem by exploring the capability of deriving discriminative representations from pre-trained and fine-tuned CL models. To begin with, we investigate the efficacy of transfer learning in IIR, by comparing off-the-shelf features learned by a pre-trained deep neural network (DNN) classifier with features learned by a CL model. The findings inspired us to propose a new training strategy that optimizes CL towards learning IIR-oriented features, by using an Average Precision (AP) loss together with a fine-tuning method to learn contrastive feature representations that are tailored to IIR. Our empirical evaluation demonstrates significant performance enhancement over the off-the-shelf features learned from a pre-trained DNN classifier on the challenging Oxford and Paris datasets.
summary: Instance-level Image Retrieval (IIR), or simply Instance Retrieval, deals with the problem of finding all the images within an dataset that contain a query instance (e.g. an object). This paper makes the first attempt that tackles this problem using instance-discrimination based contrastive learning (CL). While CL has shown impressive performance for many computer vision tasks, the similar success has never been found in the field of IIR. In this work, we approach this problem by exploring the capability of deriving discriminative representations from pre-trained and fine-tuned CL models. To begin with, we investigate the efficacy of transfer learning in IIR, by comparing off-the-shelf features learned by a pre-trained deep neural network (DNN) classifier with features learned by a CL model. The findings inspired us to propose a new training strategy that optimizes CL towards learning IIR-oriented features, by using an Average Precision (AP) loss together with a fine-tuning method to learn contrastive feature representations that are tailored to IIR. Our empirical evaluation demonstrates significant performance enhancement over the off-the-shelf features learned from a pre-trained DNN classifier on the challenging Oxford and Paris datasets.
abstract_zh: 实例级图像检索 (IIR)，或简称为实例检索，处理查找数据集中包含查询实例（例如对象）的所有图像的问题。本文首次尝试使用基于实例辨别的对比学习（CL）来解决这个问题。虽然 CL 在许多计算机视觉任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，但在 IIR 领域从未取得过类似的成功。在这项工作中，我们通过探索从预训练和微调的 CL 模型中导出判别表示的能力来解决这个问题。首先，我们通过将预训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 分类器学习的现成特征与 CL 模型学习的特征进行比较，研究 IIR 中迁移学习的功效。这些发现启发我们提出一种新的训练策略，通过使用平均精度 (AP) 损失和微调方法来学习针对 IIR 定制的对比特征表示，从而优化 CL 以学习面向 IIR 的特征。我们的实证评估表明，与在具有挑战性的 Oxford 和 Paris 数据集上通过预先训练的 DNN 分类器学习的现成特征相比，性能有了显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过对比学习（CL）生成深度表征以解决实例检索问题，旨在提升图像检索的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管对比学习在计算机视觉任务中表现优异，但其在实例级图像检索（IIR）中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘，传统预训练分类模型的特征在IIR中存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过对比预训练深度神经网络（DNN）分类器与对比学习模型的特征，提出结合平均精度（AP）损失和微调策略的训练方法，优化生成面向IIR的对比特征表征。
AI.result: 在Oxford和Paris数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于传统预训练DNN分类器的特征表现。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习通过针对性优化可有效提升实例检索性能，为IIR任务提供了新的特征学习范式。

search_text: Learning Deep Representations via Contrastive Learning for Instance Retrieval 通过实例检索的对比学习学习深度表示 Instance-level Image Retrieval (IIR), or simply Instance Retrieval, deals with the problem of finding all the images within an dataset that contain a query instance (e.g. an object). This paper makes the first attempt that tackles this problem using instance-discrimination based contrastive learning (CL). While CL has shown impressive performance for many computer vision tasks, the similar success has never been found in the field of IIR. In this work, we approach this problem by exploring the capability of deriving discriminative representations from pre-trained and fine-tuned CL models. To begin with, we investigate the efficacy of transfer learning in IIR, by comparing off-the-shelf features learned by a pre-trained deep neural network (DNN) classifier with features learned by a CL model. The findings inspired us to propose a new training strategy that optimizes CL towards learning IIR-oriented features, by using an Average Precision (AP) loss together with a fine-tuning method to learn contrastive feature representations that are tailored to IIR. Our empirical evaluation demonstrates significant performance enhancement over the off-the-shelf features learned from a pre-trained DNN classifier on the challenging Oxford and Paris datasets. 实例级图像检索 (IIR)，或简称为实例检索，处理查找数据集中包含查询实例（例如对象）的所有图像的问题。本文首次尝试使用基于实例辨别的对比学习（CL）来解决这个问题。虽然 CL 在许多计算机视觉任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，但在 IIR 领域从未取得过类似的成功。在这项工作中，我们通过探索从预训练和微调的 CL 模型中导出判别表示的能力来解决这个问题。首先，我们通过将预训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 分类器学习的现成特征与 CL 模型学习的特征进行比较，研究 IIR 中迁移学习的功效。这些发现启发我们提出一种新的训练策略，通过使用平均精度 (AP) 损失和微调方法来学习针对 IIR 定制的对比特征表示，从而优化 CL 以学习面向 IIR 的特征。我们的实证评估表明，与在具有挑战性的 Oxford 和 Paris 数据集上通过预先训练的 DNN 分类器学习的现成特征相比，性能有了显着提高。 本文提出通过对比学习（CL）生成深度表征以解决实例检索问题，旨在提升图像检索的性能。 Tao Wu,Tie Luo,Donald Wunsch cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaohan Zou,Changqiao Wu,Lele Cheng,Zhongyuan Wang
title: TokenFlow: Rethinking Fine-grained Cross-modal Alignment in Vision-Language Retrieval
title_zh: TokenFlow：重新思考视觉语言检索中的细粒度跨模态对齐
abstract: Most existing methods in vision-language retrieval match two modalities by either comparing their global feature vectors which misses sufficient information and lacks interpretability, detecting objects in images or videos and aligning the text with fine-grained features which relies on complicated model designs, or modeling fine-grained interaction via cross-attention upon visual and textual tokens which suffers from inferior efficiency. To address these limitations, some recent works simply aggregate the token-wise similarities to achieve fine-grained alignment, but they lack intuitive explanations as well as neglect the relationships between token-level features and global representations with high-level semantics. In this work, we rethink fine-grained cross-modal alignment and devise a new model-agnostic formulation for it. We additionally demystify the recent popular works and subsume them into our scheme. Furthermore, inspired by optimal transport theory, we introduce TokenFlow, an instantiation of the proposed scheme. By modifying only the similarity function, the performance of our method is comparable to the SoTA algorithms with heavy model designs on major video-text retrieval benchmarks. The visualization further indicates that TokenFlow successfully leverages the fine-grained information and achieves better interpretability.
summary: Most existing methods in vision-language retrieval match two modalities by either comparing their global feature vectors which misses sufficient information and lacks interpretability, detecting objects in images or videos and aligning the text with fine-grained features which relies on complicated model designs, or modeling fine-grained interaction via cross-attention upon visual and textual tokens which suffers from inferior efficiency. To address these limitations, some recent works simply aggregate the token-wise similarities to achieve fine-grained alignment, but they lack intuitive explanations as well as neglect the relationships between token-level features and global representations with high-level semantics. In this work, we rethink fine-grained cross-modal alignment and devise a new model-agnostic formulation for it. We additionally demystify the recent popular works and subsume them into our scheme. Furthermore, inspired by optimal transport theory, we introduce TokenFlow, an instantiation of the proposed scheme. By modifying only the similarity function, the performance of our method is comparable to the SoTA algorithms with heavy model designs on major video-text retrieval benchmarks. The visualization further indicates that TokenFlow successfully leverages the fine-grained information and achieves better interpretability.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言检索中的大多数现有方法通过比较它们的全局特征向量来匹配两种模态，这会丢失足够的信息并且缺乏可解释性，检测图像或视频中的对象并将文本与依赖于复杂模型设计的细粒度特征对齐，或者通过对视觉和文本标记的交叉关注来建模细粒度交互，但效率较低。为了解决这些限制，最近的一些工作简单地聚合了标记之间的相似性以实现细粒度的对齐，但它们缺乏直观的解释，并且忽略了标记级特征和具有高级语义的全局表示之间的关系。在这项工作中，我们重新思考细粒度的跨模式对齐，并为其设计了一种新的与模型无关的公式。我们还揭开了最近流行作品的神秘面纱，并将它们纳入我们的计划中。此外，受最优传输理论的启发，我们引入了 TokenFlow，这是所提出方案的实例。通过仅修改相似度函数，我们的方法的性能可与主要视频文本检索基准上具有大量模型设计的 SoTA 算法相媲美。可视化进一步表明 TokenFlow 成功地利用了细粒度信息并实现了更好的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TokenFlow方法，通过重新思考细粒度跨模态对齐问题，改进视觉-语言检索任务中的细粒度信息利用与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视觉-语言检索中存在全局特征信息不足、依赖复杂模型设计或效率低下的问题，且缺乏对细粒度特征与全局语义关系的直观解释。
AI.method: 基于最优传输理论，提出TokenFlow框架，通过修改相似性函数实现细粒度跨模态对齐，无需复杂模型设计且保持模型无关性。
AI.result: 在主流视频-文本检索基准测试中，TokenFlow性能与复杂模型相当，可视化结果验证了其对细粒度信息的有效利用和可解释性提升。
AI.conclusion: TokenFlow为细粒度跨模态对齐提供了通用且高效的解决方案，通过理论分析与实验验证了其有效性与可解释性优势。

authors_text: Jacob Hartzer,Srikanth Saripalli
title: Online Multi Camera-IMU Calibration
title_zh: 在线多相机-IMU标定
abstract: Visual-inertial navigation systems are powerful in their ability to accurately estimate localization of mobile systems within complex environments that preclude the use of global navigation satellite systems. However, these navigation systems are reliant on accurate and up-to-date temporospatial calibrations of the sensors being used. As such, online estimators for these parameters are useful in resilient systems. This paper presents an extension to existing Kalman Filter based frameworks for estimating and calibrating the extrinsic parameters of multi-camera IMU systems. In addition to extending the filter framework to include multiple camera sensors, the measurement model was reformulated to make use of measurement data that is typically made available in fiducial detection software. A secondary filter layer was used to estimate time translation parameters without closed-loop feedback of sensor data. Experimental calibration results, including the use of cameras with non-overlapping fields of view, were used to validate the stability and accuracy of the filter formulation when compared to offline methods. Finally the generalized filter code has been open-sourced and is available online.
summary: Visual-inertial navigation systems are powerful in their ability to accurately estimate localization of mobile systems within complex environments that preclude the use of global navigation satellite systems. However, these navigation systems are reliant on accurate and up-to-date temporospatial calibrations of the sensors being used. As such, online estimators for these parameters are useful in resilient systems. This paper presents an extension to existing Kalman Filter based frameworks for estimating and calibrating the extrinsic parameters of multi-camera IMU systems. In addition to extending the filter framework to include multiple camera sensors, the measurement model was reformulated to make use of measurement data that is typically made available in fiducial detection software. A secondary filter layer was used to estimate time translation parameters without closed-loop feedback of sensor data. Experimental calibration results, including the use of cameras with non-overlapping fields of view, were used to validate the stability and accuracy of the filter formulation when compared to offline methods. Finally the generalized filter code has been open-sourced and is available online.
abstract_zh: 视觉惯性导航系统具有强大的能力，可以在无法使用全球导航卫星系统的复杂环境中准确估计移动系统的定位。然而，这些导航系统依赖于所使用的传感器的准确和最新的时空校准。因此，这些参数的在线估计器在弹性系统中非常有用。本文提出了对现有基于卡尔曼滤波器的框架的扩展，用于估计和校准多相机 IMU 系统的外部参数。除了扩展滤波器框架以包含多个相机传感器之外，还重新制定了测量模型，以利用通常在基准检测软件中提供的测量数据。使用二次滤波器层来估计时间平移参数，而无需传感器数据的闭环反馈。实验校准结果（包括使用具有不重叠视场的相机）用于验证滤波器配方与离线方法相比的稳定性和准确性。最后，通用过滤器代码已开源并可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线多摄像头-IMU系统外参校准方法，扩展卡尔曼滤波框架并利用标记检测数据，验证其稳定性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 视觉惯性导航系统需依赖准确的传感器时空校准，传统方法存在实时性不足或闭环反馈依赖等问题，需开发在线参数估计方法以提高系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 扩展卡尔曼滤波框架以支持多摄像头，重构测量模型利用标记检测数据，引入无闭环反馈的次级滤波层估计时间转换参数。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在非重叠视场摄像头场景下的稳定性与准确性，结果优于离线方法，且开源代码已发布。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了多摄像头-IMU系统的在线校准，适用于复杂环境，开源代码促进了实际应用与进一步研究。

ai_content.motivation: 视觉惯性导航系统需依赖准确的传感器时空校准，传统方法存在实时性不足或闭环反馈依赖等问题，需开发在线参数估计方法以提高系统鲁棒性。
ai_content.method: 扩展卡尔曼滤波框架以支持多摄像头，重构测量模型利用标记检测数据，引入无闭环反馈的次级滤波层估计时间转换参数。
ai_content.result: 实验验证了方法在非重叠视场摄像头场景下的稳定性与准确性，结果优于离线方法，且开源代码已发布。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了多摄像头-IMU系统的在线校准，适用于复杂环境，开源代码促进了实际应用与进一步研究。

search_text: Online Multi Camera-IMU Calibration 在线多相机-IMU标定 Visual-inertial navigation systems are powerful in their ability to accurately estimate localization of mobile systems within complex environments that preclude the use of global navigation satellite systems. However, these navigation systems are reliant on accurate and up-to-date temporospatial calibrations of the sensors being used. As such, online estimators for these parameters are useful in resilient systems. This paper presents an extension to existing Kalman Filter based frameworks for estimating and calibrating the extrinsic parameters of multi-camera IMU systems. In addition to extending the filter framework to include multiple camera sensors, the measurement model was reformulated to make use of measurement data that is typically made available in fiducial detection software. A secondary filter layer was used to estimate time translation parameters without closed-loop feedback of sensor data. Experimental calibration results, including the use of cameras with non-overlapping fields of view, were used to validate the stability and accuracy of the filter formulation when compared to offline methods. Finally the generalized filter code has been open-sourced and is available online. 视觉惯性导航系统具有强大的能力，可以在无法使用全球导航卫星系统的复杂环境中准确估计移动系统的定位。然而，这些导航系统依赖于所使用的传感器的准确和最新的时空校准。因此，这些参数的在线估计器在弹性系统中非常有用。本文提出了对现有基于卡尔曼滤波器的框架的扩展，用于估计和校准多相机 IMU 系统的外部参数。除了扩展滤波器框架以包含多个相机传感器之外，还重新制定了测量模型，以利用通常在基准检测软件中提供的测量数据。使用二次滤波器层来估计时间平移参数，而无需传感器数据的闭环反馈。实验校准结果（包括使用具有不重叠视场的相机）用于验证滤波器配方与离线方法相比的稳定性和准确性。最后，通用过滤器代码已开源并可在线获取。 本文提出一种在线多摄像头-IMU系统外参校准方法，扩展卡尔曼滤波框架并利用标记检测数据，验证其稳定性和准确性。 Jacob Hartzer,Srikanth Saripalli cs.RO
